items.title: CREST-CiM: Cross-Coupling-Enhanced Differential STT-MRAM for Robust Computing-in-Memory in Binary Neural Networks.
items.abstract: We propose CREST-CiM, an STT-MRAM-based Computing-in-Memory (CiM) technique, targeted for binary neural networks. To circumvent the low-distinguishability issue in standard MRAM-based CiM, CREST-CiM utilizes two magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs) to store +1 and -1 weights in a bitcell and cross-couples the MTJs, achieving a high-to-low current ratio of up to 8100 for a bit-cell. Our analysis for $64 \times 64$ arrays shows up to 3.4 x higher CiM sense-margin, 27.6% higher read-disturb-margin, and resilience to process variations, and other hardware non-idealities, albeit at the cost of just 7.9% overall-area overhead, and $\lt1 \%$ energy and latency overhead compared to a 2T-2MTJ-CiM design. Our system-level analysis for ResNet-18 trained on CIFAR-10 shows near-sofware inference accuracy with CREST-CiM, with 10.7% improvement over 2T2MTJ baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CREST-CiM，一种基于 STT-MRAM 的内存计算 (CiM) 技术，针对二进制神经网络。为了避免基于标准 MRAM 的 CiM 中的低可分辨性问题，CREST-CiM 利用两个磁性隧道结 (MTJ) 在位单元中存储 +1 和 -1 权重，并交叉耦合 MTJ，从而为位单元实现高达 8100 的高低电流比。我们对 64 美元 × 64 美元阵列的分析显示，与 2T-2MTJ-CiM 设计相比，CiM 感知裕度提高了 3.4 倍，读取干扰裕度提高了 27.6%，并且对工艺变化和其他硬件非理想情况的恢复能力也提高了，尽管与 2T-2MTJ-CiM 设计相比，其总体面积开销仅为 7.9%，以及 $\lt1 \%$ 能源和延迟开销。我们对 CIFAR-10 上训练的 ResNet-18 进行的系统级分析显示，CREST-CiM 的推理精度接近软件，比 2T2MTJ 基线提高了 10.7%。

items.title: Design and Technology Co-optimization Utilizing Flip-FET (FFET) Standard Cells.
items.abstract: With the continued scaling of VLSI technology beyond 3 nm, a consistent demand for layout reduction in standard cells has been made. CFET (Complementary-FET) has been accepted as a promising device technology, stacking N-FET on P-FET (or vice versa) to achieve this goal while providing metal interconnects on both the front and backside of the wafer through BEOL (back-end-of-line) processing. However, the layout synthesis of CFET based standard cells and its use in physical design implementation are not fully compatible with the effective exploitation of backside interconnects. This is because of a considerable overhead on the allocation of special vias in FEOL (front-end-of-line) referred to as tap-cells, which are essential for the net routes using backside wire. To overcome this drawback of using CFET cells, a new technology called FFET (Flip-FET) has been proposed, which flips the lower FET in CFET to enable direct pin accessibility on both sides of BEOL with no tap cells. In this context, we propose an FFET cell based DTCO methodology to fully utilize backside wires with minimal tap-cells. Precisely, we propose a three-step approach: (1) synthesizing multiple FFET standard cells with diverse styles of pin distribution for each of primitive logic gates, (2) performing a tap-cell avoiding cell replacement during placement optimization by using the cells obtained from Step 1 to prevent tap-cell allocation for net routing, and (3) rebalancing the wire usage between the frontside and backside to mitigate net congestion. Experiments with benchmark circuits show that our FFET cell based DTCO methodology scales up chip size beyond CFET designs with much fewer routing failures.
items.abstract_zh: 随着超大规模集成电路技术不断微缩至3纳米以上，对减少标准单元布局提出了一致的要求。 CFET（互补 FET）已被认为是一种有前途的器件技术，将 N-FET 堆叠在 P-FET 上（反之亦然）以实现这一目标，同时通过 BEOL（后端生产线）处理在晶圆的正面和背面提供金属互连。然而，基于 CFET 的标准单元的布局综合及其在物理设计实现中的使用与背面互连的有效利用并不完全兼容。这是因为在 FEOL（前端线路）（称为分接单元）中分配特殊过孔的开销相当大，这对于使用背面线路的网络布线至关重要。为了克服使用 CFET 单元的这一缺点，人们提出了一种称为 FFET (Flip-FET) 的新技术，该技术翻转 CFET 中的下部 FET，从而无需抽头单元即可在 BEOL 两侧直接进行引脚访问。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种基于 FFET 单元的 DTCO 方法，以最少的分接单元充分利用背面布线。准确地说，我们提出了一个三步方法：（1）为每个原始逻辑门合成具有不同引脚分布风格的多个 FFET 标准单元，（2）通过使用从步骤 1 获得的单元执行分接单元，避免在布局优化期间更换单元，以防止网络布线的分接单元分配，以及（3）重新平衡正面和背面之间的线路使用，以减轻网络拥塞。基准电路实验表明，我们基于 FFET 单元的 DTCO 方法将芯片尺寸扩大到超出 CFET 设计，同时布线故障更少。

items.title: ReVeil: Unconstrained Concealed Backdoor Attack on Deep Neural Networks using Machine Unlearning.
items.abstract: Backdoor attacks embed hidden functionalities in deep neural networks (DNN), triggering malicious behavior with specific inputs. Advanced defenses monitor anomalous DNN inferences to detect such attacks. However, concealed backdoors evade detection by maintaining a low pre-deployment attack success rate (ASR) and restoring high ASR post-deployment via machine unlearning. Existing concealed backdoors are often constrained by requiring white-box or black-box access or auxiliary data, limiting their practicality when such access or data is unavailable. This paper introduces ReVeil, a concealed backdoor attack targeting the data collection phase of the DNN training pipeline, requiring no model access or auxiliary data. ReVeil maintains low pre-deployment ASR across four datasets and four trigger patterns, successfully evades three popular backdoor detection methods, and restores high ASR postdeployment through machine unlearning.
items.abstract_zh: 后门攻击在深度神经网络 (DNN) 中嵌入隐藏功能，通过特定输入触发恶意行为。高级防御可监控异常 DNN 推理以检测此类攻击。然而，隐藏的后门通过维持较低的部署前攻击成功率 (ASR) 并通过机器取消学习恢复较高的部署后 ASR 来逃避检测。现有的隐藏后门通常受到需要白盒或黑盒访问或辅助数据的限制，当此类访问或数据不可用时，限制了它们的实用性。本文介绍了 ReVeil，这是一种针对 DNN 训练管道的数据收集阶段的隐蔽后门攻击，不需要模型访问或辅助数据。 ReVeil 在四个数据集和四种触发模式中保持较低的部署前 ASR，成功规避了三种流行的后门检测方法，并通过机器取消学习恢复了较高的部署后 ASR。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Decentralized Voting-Based Attestation for IoT Devices.
items.abstract: Remote Attestation (RA) has become a valuable security service for Internet of Things (IoT) devices, as the security of these devices is often not prioritized during the manufacturing process. However, traditional RA schemes suffer from a single point of failure because they rely on a trusted verifier. To address this issue, we propose a voting-based blockchain attestation protocol that provides a reliable solution by eliminating the single point of failure through distributed verification across all nodes. In addition, it offers a traceable and immutable public history of the attestation results, which can be verified by external auditors at any time. Finally, we verify our proposed protocol on three NVIDIA Jetson embedded devices hosting up to 15 attestation nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 远程认证 (RA) 已成为物联网 (IoT) 设备的一项有价值的安全服务，因为这些设备的安全性在制造过程中通常并未得到优先考虑。然而，传统的 RA 方案由于依赖于可信验证者而存在单点故障。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于投票的区块链证明协议，该协议通过跨所有节点的分布式验证消除单点故障，提供可靠的解决方案。此外，它还提供了认证结果的可追溯且不可变的公共历史记录，可供外部审计员随时验证。最后，我们在三个托管多达 15 个证明节点的 NVIDIA Jetson 嵌入式设备上验证了我们提出的协议。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: The Hidden Risks of Activation Duration in PLPUFs.
items.abstract: The security of Internet of Things (IoT) devices is crucial to protect the vast amounts of data exposed due to their widespread adoption. Authentication is one of the key aspects of IoT security, but it becomes increasingly challenging, especially for resource-constrained devices that require lightweight and efficient solutions. Physical Unclonable Functions (PUFs) have emerged as a promising lightweight solution by using the unique physical properties of Integrated Circuits (ICs). Pseudo Liner Feedback Shift Register PUF (PLPUF) is one of the state-of-the-art implementations known for its flexibility in altering the challenge-response space by changing the activation duration. In this work, we demonstrate that selecting an appropriate activation duration for PLPUF is critical, as improper choices can compromise security. By analyzing the linear dependency between the responses of different PLPUF pairs, our results reveal that predictability can reach up to $96 \%$ when an unsuitable activation duration is chosen.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备的安全性对于保护因其广泛采用而暴露的大量数据至关重要。身份验证是物联网安全的关键方面之一，但它变得越来越具有挑战性，特别是对于需要轻量级高效解决方案的资源有限的设备。通过利用集成电路 (IC) 独特的物理特性，物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 已成为一种有前途的轻量级解决方案。伪线性反馈移位寄存器 PUF (PLPUF) 是最先进的实现之一，以其通过改变激活持续时间来灵活改变挑战-响应空间而闻名。在这项工作中，我们证明为 PLPUF 选择适当的激活持续时间至关重要，因为不正确的选择可能会损害安全性。通过分析不同 PLPUF 对响应之间的线性相关性，我们的结果表明，当选择不合适的激活持续时间时，可预测性最高可达 $96 \%$。

items.title: DDRoute: a Novel Depth-Driven Approach to the Qubit Routing Problem.
items.abstract: In the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, the topological constraints present in many of the currently available quantum devices pose a physical limit on the feasible interactions between qubits. To comply with such limitations, the compilation of quantum circuits requires solving the Qubit Routing Problem (QRP), by inserting SWAP operations among qubits. The State of the Art provides heuristic algorithms addressing this task, yet the depth of the output circuits is often incompatible with the current limits of quantum hardware. Therefore, we propose DDRoute, a novel heuristic algorithm to solve QRP, designed to reduce the depth overhead introduced by the routing process in the compiled circuits. Our experimental evaluation proves the efficiency of our approach, with a depth reduction of up to 70% with respect to the state-of-the-art routing procedures.
items.abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）时代，许多当前可用的量子设备中存在的拓扑约束对量子位之间的可行相互作用造成了物理限制。为了遵守这些限制，量子电路的编译需要通过在量子位之间插入交换操作来解决量子位路由问题（QRP）。最先进的技术提供了解决此任务的启发式算法，但输出电路的深度通常与量子硬件的当前限制不兼容。因此，我们提出了 DDRoute，一种解决 QRP 的新颖启发式算法，旨在减少编译电路中路由过程引入的深度开销。我们的实验评估证明了我们方法的效率，与最先进的路由程序相比，深度减少了高达 70%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Encoder-Decoder Generative Diffusion Transformer Towards Push-Button Analog IC Sizing.
items.abstract: In this paper, disruptive research using generative diffusion models (DMs) with an attention-based encoder-decoder backbone is conducted to automate the sizing of analog integrated circuits (ICs). Unlike time-consuming optimization-based methods, the encoder-decoder DM is able to sample accurate solutions at push-button speed by solving the inverse sizing problem. Experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms the most recent deep learningbased techniques, presenting higher generalization capabilities to performance targets not seen during training.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，使用具有基于注意力的编码器-解码器主干的生成扩散模型（DM）进行颠覆性研究，以自动调整模拟集成电路（IC）的规模。与耗时的基于优化的方法不同，编码器-解码器 DM 能够通过解决逆尺寸问题以按键速度采样准确的解决方案。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于最新的基于深度学习的技术，对训练期间未见的性能目标呈现出更高的泛化能力。

items.title: DARIS: An Oversubscribed Spatio-Temporal Scheduler for Real-Time DNN Inference on GPUs.
items.abstract: The widespread use of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is limited by high computational demands, especially in constrained environments. GPUs, though effective accelerators, often face underutilization and rely on coarse-grained scheduling. This paper introduces DARIS, a priority-based real-time DNN scheduler for GPUs, utilizing NVIDIA’s MPS and CUDA streaming for spatial sharing, and a synchronization-based staging method for temporal partitioning. In particular, DARIS improves GPU utilization and uniquely analyzes GPU concurrency by oversubscribing computing resources. It also supports zero-delay DNN migration between GPU partitions. Experiments show DARIS improves throughput by $15 \%$ and $11.5 \%$ over batching and state-of-the-art schedulers, respectively, even without batching. All high-priority tasks meet deadlines, with low-priority tasks having under 2% deadline miss rate. High-priority response times are 33% better than those of low-priority tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的广泛使用受到高计算需求的限制，尤其是在受限环境中。 GPU 虽然是有效的加速器，但经常面临利用率不足的问题，并且依赖于粗粒度的调度。本文介绍了 DARIS，一种用于 GPU 的基于优先级的实时 DNN 调度程序，利用 NVIDIA 的 MPS 和 CUDA 流进行空间共享，以及基于同步的暂存方法进行时间分区。特别是，DARIS通过超额订阅计算资源来提高GPU利用率并独特地分析GPU并发性。它还支持GPU分区之间的零延迟DNN迁移。实验表明，即使没有批处理，DARIS 也比批处理和最先进的调度程序分别将吞吐量提高了 15 美元和 11.5 美元。所有高优先级任务均按时完成，低优先级任务的截止日期错过率低于 2%。高优先级任务的响应时间比低优先级任务快 33%。

items.title: EdgeMM: Multi-Core CPU with Heterogeneous AI-Extension and Activation-aware Weight Pruning for Multimodal LLMs at Edge.
items.abstract: Emerging multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) exhibit strong cross-modality perception and reasoning capabilities and hold great potential for various applications at edge. However, MLLMs typically consist of a compute-intensive modality encoder and a memory-bound LLM decoder, leading to distinct bottlenecks for hardware designs. In this work, we present a multi-core CPU solution with heterogeneous AI extensions, which are based on either the compute-centric systolic array or memory-centric digital compute-in-memory (CIM) coprocessors. In addition, dynamic activation-aware weight pruning and bandwidth management are developed to enhance bandwidth efficiency and core utilization, improving overall performance. We implemented our solution using commercial 22nm technology. For representative MLLMs, our evaluations show EdgeMM can achieve $2.84 \times$ performance speedup compared to laptop 3060 GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的多模态法学硕士（MLLM）表现出强大的跨模态感知和推理能力，并在各种边缘应用中具有巨大的潜力。然而，MLLM 通常由计算密集型模态编码器和内存限制的 LLM 解码器组成，导致硬件设计出现明显的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有异构 AI 扩展的多核 CPU 解决方案，该解决方案基于以计算为中心的脉动阵列或以内存为中心的数字内存计算 (CIM) 协处理器。此外，还开发了动态激活感知权重修剪和带宽管理，以提高带宽效率和核心利用率，从而提高整体性能。我们使用商用 22 纳米技术实施我们的解决方案。对于代表性的 MLLM，我们的评估显示，与笔记本电脑 3060 GPU 相比，EdgeMM 可以实现 2.84 美元×$ 的性能加速。

items.title: Pipirima: Predicting Patterns in Sparsity to Accelerate Matrix Algebra.
items.abstract: While sparsity, a feature of data in many applications, provides optimization opportunities such as reducing unnecessary computations, data transfers, and storage, it causes several challenges, too. For instance, even in state-of-the-art sparse accelerators, sparsity can result in load imbalance; a performance bottleneck. To solve such challenges, our key insight is that if while reading/streaming compressed sparse matrices we can quickly anticipate the locations of the non-zero values in a sparse matrix, we can leverage this knowledge to accelerate processing sparse matrices. To enable this, we propose Pipirima, a lightweight prediction-based sparse accelerator. Inspired by traditional branch predictors, Pipirima uses resource-friendly simple counters to predict the patterns of non-zero values in the sparse matrices. We evaluate Pipirima based on sparse matrix vector multiplication (SpMV) and sparse matrix-dense matrix multiplication (SpMM) kernels on CSR compressed matrices derived from both scientific computing and transformer models. On average, our experiments show $6 \times$ and $4 \times$ speed up over Tensaurus for SpMM and SpMV, respectively on SuiteSparse workload. Pipirima also shows $40 \times$ speed up over ExTensor for SpMM. We achieve $8.3 \times$, $48.2 \times$ over Tensaurus and Extensor in lesser sparse transformer workloads. Piprima consumes $5.621 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$ area and 544.93 mW power using 45 nm technology with predictor related components as the least expensive ones.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然稀疏性是许多应用程序中数据的一个特征，它提供了优化机会，例如减少不必要的计算、数据传输和存储，但它也带来了一些挑战。例如，即使在最先进的稀疏加速器中，稀疏性也会导致负载不平衡；性能瓶颈。为了解决这些挑战，我们的主要见解是，如果在读取/流式传输压缩稀疏矩阵时我们可以快速预测稀疏矩阵中非零值的位置，我们可以利用这些知识来加速稀疏矩阵的处理。为了实现这一点，我们提出了 Pipirima，一种基于预测的轻量级稀疏加速器。受传统分支预测器的启发，Pipirima 使用资源友好型简单计数器来预测稀疏矩阵中非零值的模式。我们基于稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和稀疏矩阵-密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 内核对源自科学计算和 Transformer 模型的 CSR 压缩矩阵评估 Pipirima。平均而言，我们的实验表明，在 SuiteSparse 工作负载上，SpMM 和 SpMV 的速度分别比 Tensaurus 提高了 6 美元和 4 美元。 Pipirima 还显示 SpMM 的速度比 ExTensor 提高了 40 倍。在稀疏的 Transformer 工作负载中，我们比 Tensaurus 和 Extensor 实现了 8.3 美元、48.2 美元。 Piprima 使用 45 nm 技术，消耗 5.621 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$ 面积和 544.93 mW 功率，预测器相关组件是最便宜的。

items.title: Comparison-Free Bit-Stream Generation for Cost-Efficient Unary Computing.
items.abstract: Today, unconventional hardware design techniques based on simple data representations are receiving more and more attention. Unary computing is one of these techniques that processes data in the form of uniform bit-streams. The simplicity of implementing complex arithmetic operations and high tolerance to noise are the crucial advantages of unary systems. However, converting data from weighed binary radix to unary representation with existing comparator-based unary number generators is expensive regarding footprint area and power consumption. The problem aggregates when the number of inputs and data precision increase. This work proposes a low-cost, comparison-free, unary number generation mechanism for efficient data conversion from binary radix to unary representation. We introduce a serial and two parallel (an exact and an approximate) unary number generators. Synthesis results show that the proposed method reduces the hardware area, power consumption, and area-delay product for both serial and parallel designs compared to the state-of-the-art converter. We evaluate the efficiency of the proposed converter in four use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，基于简单数据表示的非常规硬件设计技术正受到越来越多的关注。一元计算是以统一比特流的形式处理数据的技术之一。实现复杂算术运算的简单性和对噪声的高容忍度是一元系统的关键优势。然而，使用现有的基于比较器的一元数字生成器将数据从加权二进制基数转换为一元表示在占地面积和功耗方面是昂贵的。当输入数量和数据精度增加时，问题就会聚集起来。这项工作提出了一种低成本、无比较的一元数生成机制，用于从二进制基数到一元表示的有效数据转换。我们引入一个串行和两个并行（精确的和近似的）一元数生成器。综合结果表明，与最先进的转换器相比，所提出的方法减少了串行和并行设计的硬件面积、功耗和面积延迟积。我们在四个用例中评估了所提出的转换器的效率。

items.title: CognitiveArm: Enabling Real-Time EEG-Controlled Prosthetic Arm Using Embodied Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Efficient control of prosthetic limbs via non-invasive brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) requires advanced EEG processing capabilities-including pre-filtering, feature extraction, and action pre-diction-all performed in real-time on edge AI hardware. Achieving this level of real-time processing on resource-constrained edge devices presents significant challenges in balancing model complexity, computational efficiency, and latency. We present CognitiveArm, an EEG-driven, brain-controlled prosthetic system implemented on edge AI hardware, achieving real-time performance without compromising accuracy. The system integrates BrainFlow-an open-source library for EEG data acquisition and streaming-and optimized deep learning (DL) models for precise brain signal classification. By leveraging evolutionary search, we identify Pareto-optimal DL model configurations through hyper-parameter tuning, optimizer analysis, and window selection, analyzed individually and in ensemble configurations. We further apply model compression techniques like pruning and quantization to optimize these models for embedded deployment, balancing computational efficiency and accuracy. We collected EEG dataset and designed an annotation pipeline, enabling precise labeling of brain signals corresponding to specific intended actions, which forms the foundation for training our optimized deep learning (DL) models. Our CognitiveArm system also supports voice commands for seamless mode switching, enabling control of the prosthetic arm’s 3 degrees of freedom (DoF). Running independently on embedded hardware, CognitiveArm ensures low latency and facilitates real-time interaction. We developed a full-scale prototype of the CognitiveArm, interfaced with the OpenBCI UltraCortex Mark IV EEG headset. Our evaluations demonstrate a significant improvement in accuracy, reaching up to $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$, for classifying three core actions (left, right, and stay idle). The integration of voice commands allows for multiplexed, variable movement, enabling multi-action control for various everyday tasks (e.g., handshake, cup picking). This enhances CognitiveArm’s real-world performance for prosthetic control, demonstrating its potential as a practical solution for individuals requiring advanced prosthetic limb control.
items.abstract_zh: 通过非侵入性脑机接口 (BCI) 有效控制假肢需要先进的脑电图处理能力，包括预过滤、特征提取和动作预测，所有这些都在边缘人工智能硬件上实时执行。在资源受限的边缘设备上实现这种级别的实时处理在平衡模型复杂性、计算效率和延迟方面提出了重大挑战。我们推出了 CognitiveArm，这是一种在边缘人工智能硬件上实现的脑电图驱动、大脑控制的假肢系统，可在不影响准确性的情况下实现实时性能。该系统集成了 BrainFlow（用于脑电图数据采集和流传输的开源库）和优化的深度学习 (DL) 模型，以实现精确的大脑信号分类。通过利用进化搜索，我们通过超参数调整、优化器分析和窗口选择来识别帕累托最优深度学习模型配置，并单独进行分析和整体配置分析。我们进一步应用剪枝和量化等模型压缩技术来优化这些模型以进行嵌入式部署，平衡计算效率和准确性。我们收集了脑电图数据集并设计了一个注释管道，能够精确标记与特定预期动作相对应的大脑信号，这为训练我们优化的深度学习（DL）模型奠定了基础。我们的 CognitiveArm 系统还支持语音命令以实现无缝模式切换，从而能够控制假肢的 3 个自由度 (DoF)。 CognitiveArm 在嵌入式硬件上独立运行，可确保低延迟并促进实时交互。我们开发了 CognitiveArm 的全尺寸原型，与 OpenBCI UltraCortex Mark IV EEG 耳机连接。我们的评估表明，对三个核心动作（向左、向右和保持空闲）进行分类的准确性显着提高，达到 $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$。语音命令的集成允许进行多重、可变的运动，从而能够对各种日常任务（例如握手、拿起杯子）进行多动作控制。这增强了 CognitiveArm 在假肢控制方面的实际性能，展示了其作为需要先进假肢控制的个人的实用解决方案的潜力。

items.title: Security Opportunities and Challenges for Disaggregated Architectures (Invited).
items.abstract: Disaggregated computer architectures are an interesting paradigm according to which the components of a traditional monolithic server, such as CPU, memory, storage, and networking, are separated into distinct, often independently managed units that communicate over a network. Disaggregation not only offers benefits such as greater flexibility, scalability, and resource optimization but can also improve security. For example, in the context of enterprise routing, it can offer fine-grained control over the network that allows one to deploy security policies, access control rules, and threat detection mechanisms more precisely, ensuring that only authorized traffic flows through the enterprise environment. It makes patch management easier because its modularity allows different components to be patched independently. The same benefits also apply to cellular networks. Disaggregation is a key feature of the Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) paradigm, whose goal is to make the radio access network intelligent, virtualized, and fully interoperable. However, disaggregation also introduces several unique security risks, such as increased attack surfaces, increased exposure of sensitive data, increased difficulty in tracing data provenance, insecure isolation among different components, and insecure APIs. In addition, well-known security technologies, such as trusted execution environments, may have to be redesigned in the context of disaggregated architectures. In this paper, after an overview of these benefits and concerns, we focus on the research approaches proposed to address some of these concerns for network fabric, O-RAN, and trusted execution environments.
items.abstract_zh: 分解的计算机体系结构是一种有趣的范例，根据该范例，传统的整体服务器的组件（例如 CPU、内存、存储和网络）被分为不同的、通常独立管理的单元，这些单元通过网络进行通信。分解不仅提供了更大的灵活性、可扩展性和资源优化等好处，而且还可以提高安全性。例如，在企业路由的背景下，它可以提供对网络的细粒度控制，允许更精确地部署安全策略、访问控制规则和威胁检测机制，确保只有授权的流量流经企业环境。它使补丁管理变得更加容易，因为它的模块化允许独立地修补不同的组件。同样的好处也适用于蜂窝网络。分解是开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）范式的一个关键特征，其目标是使无线接入网络智能化、虚拟化和完全可互操作。然而，分解也带来了一些独特的安全风险，例如攻击面增加、敏感数据暴露增加、追踪数据来源的难度增加、不同组件之间的不安全隔离以及不安全的 API。此外，众所周知的安全技术，例如可信执行环境，可能必须在分解架构的背景下重新设计。在本文中，在概述了这些好处和问题之后，我们重点关注为解决网络结构、O-RAN 和可信执行环境的一些问题而提出的研究方法。

items.title: Fast End-to-End Simulation and Exploration of Many-RISCV-Core Baseband Transceivers for Software-Defined Radio-Access Networks.
items.abstract: The fast-rising demand for wireless bandwidth [1] requires rapid evolution of high-performance baseband processing infrastructure. Programmable many-core processors for software-defined radio (SDR) have emerged as high-performance baseband processing engines, offering the flexibility required to capture evolving wireless standards and technologies [2]–[4]. This trend must be supported by a design framework enabling functional validation and end-to-end performance analysis of SDR hardware within realistic radio environment models. We propose a static binary translation based simulator augmented with a fast, approximate timing model of the hardware and coupled to wireless channel models to simulate the most performancecritical physical layer functions implemented in software on a many (1024) RISC-V cores cluster customized for SDR. Our framework simulates the detection of a 5 G OFDM-symbol on a server-class processor in $9.5 \mathrm{~s}-3 \mathrm{~min}$, on a single thread, depending on the input MIMO size (three orders of magnitude faster than RTL simulation). The simulation is easily parallelized to 128 threads with $73-121 \times$ speedup compared to a single thread.
items.abstract_zh: 对无线带宽[1]快速增长的需求需要高性能基带处理基础设施的快速发展。用于软件定义无线电 (SDR) 的可编程多核处理器已成为高性能基带处理引擎，提供捕获不断发展的无线标准和技术所需的灵活性 [2]–[4]。这一趋势必须得到设计框架的支持，该设计框架能够在现实无线电环境模型中对 SDR 硬件进行功能验证和端到端性能分析。我们提出了一种基于静态二进制翻译的模拟器，增强了快速、近似的硬件时序模型，并与无线通道模型耦合，以模拟在为 SDR 定制的许多（1024）RISC-V 核心集群上的软件中实现的对性能最关键的物理层功能。我们的框架在单个线程上以 9.5 \mathrm{~s}-3 \mathrm{~min}$ 的成本模拟服务器级处理器上 5 G OFDM 符号的检测，具体取决于输入 MIMO 大小（比 RTL 模拟快三个数量级）。模拟很容易并行化为 128 个线程，与单线程相比，速度提高了 73-121 倍。

items.title: Dynamic Local Usage: An Accurate Model for Usage of Tile-Internal Wiring in Global Routing.
items.abstract: Traditional global routing simplifies routing as a Steiner Tree packing problem on a grid graph, often neglecting the need to account for tile-internal wiring connections to pin shapes. Local wiring usage is typically pre-estimated, leading to inaccuracies. To address this gap, we introduce the Dynamic Local Usage (DLU) model, which evaluates wiring usage based on exact wire shapes and optimizes routes up to detailed pin shapes. Key innovations include tip-to-tip penalty extensions to accurately model packing density and new algorithms to optimize routes according to the DLU congestion model. We demonstrate the superiority of the Dynamic Local Usage model by comparing results after global and detailed routing to an industrial global router on the 3 nm and 5 nm technology nodes. Our model achieves significant improvements in the number of vias, scenic routes, design rule violations, and timing metrics after detailed routing. Furthermore, the DLU provides a better support for incremental design changes, such as pin movements, by dynamically updating local wiring usage during routing.
items.abstract_zh: 传统的全局布线将布线简化为网格图上的斯坦纳树封装问题，通常忽略了考虑到引脚形状的块内部布线连接的需要。本地布线的使用通常是预先估计的，从而导致不准确。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了动态本地使用 (DLU) 模型，该模型根据精确的电线形状评估布线使用情况，并优化路线直至详细的引脚形状。关键创新包括用于精确建模包装密度的点对点惩罚扩展以及根据 DLU 拥塞模型优化路线的新算法。我们通过比较 3 纳米和 5 纳米技术节点上的工业全局路由器的全局和详细路由后的结果，展示了动态本地使用模型的优越性。我们的模型在详细布线后的过孔数量、风景路线、设计规则违规和时序指标方面取得了显着改进。此外，DLU 通过在布线期间动态更新本地布线使用情况，为渐进式设计变更提供更好的支持，例如引脚移动。

items.title: Free and Fair Hardware: A Pathway to Copyright Infringement-Free Verilog Generation using LLMs.
items.abstract: Limitations in Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities for hardware design tasks, such as generating functional Verilog codes, have motivated various fine-tuning optimizations utilizing curated hardware datasets from open-source repositories. However, these datasets remain limited in size and contain minimal checks on licensing for reuse, resulting in potential copyright violations by fine-tuned LLMs. Therefore, we propose an evaluation benchmark to estimate the risk of Verilog-trained LLMs to generate copyright-protected codes. To minimize this risk, we present an open-source Verilog dataset, FreeSet, containing over 220k files, along with the automated dataset curation framework utilized to provide additional guarantees of fair-use Verilog data. We then execute an LLM fine-tuning framework consisting of continual pre-training, resulting in a fine-tuned Llama model for Verilog, FreeV. Our results indicate that FreeV demonstrates the smallest risk of copyright-infringement among prior works, with only a 3% violation rate. Furthermore, experimental results demonstrate improvements in Verilog generation functionality over its baseline model, improving VerilogEval pass@10 rates by over 10%.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件设计任务（例如生成功能性 Verilog 代码）的大型语言模型 (LLM) 功能的局限性促使人们利用开源存储库中精选的硬件数据集进行各种微调优化。然而，这些数据集的大小仍然有限，并且对重复使用的许可进行了最少的检查，导致经过微调的法学硕士可能会侵犯版权。因此，我们提出了一个评估基准来估计经过 Verilog 训练的法学硕士生成受版权保护的代码的风险。为了最大限度地降低这种风险，我们提供了一个开源 Verilog 数据集 FreeSet，其中包含超过 22 万个文件，以及用于为合理使用 Verilog 数据提供额外保证的自动数据集管理框架。然后，我们执行由持续预训练组成的 LLM 微调框架，从而生成针对 Verilog、FreeV 的微调 Llama 模型。我们的结果表明，在之前的作品中，FreeV 的版权侵权风险最小，侵权率仅为 3%。此外，实验结果表明，Verilog 生成功能相对于其基准模型有所改进，将 VerilogEval pass@10 率提高了 10% 以上。

items.title: On Bit-level Reverse Engineering of Vehicular CAN Bus.
items.abstract: The Controller Area Network (CAN) bus is a cornerstone of modern vehicles, orchestrating functions from engine control to auxiliary systems. However, its lack of inherent security measures makes it vulnerable to cyberattacks. Accurately mapping CAN signals with car-control actions is critical for detecting security breaches, as it allows pinpointing potential vulnerabilities exploited to compromise vehicular functions. Despite this, existing CAN reverse engineering methods struggle to achieve bit-level resolution due to the huge search space of unique IDs and payload combinations. To address this challenge, we propose a systematic framework for reverse engineering CAN bus messages, achieving precise mapping of control bits in CAN frames to car-control actions. The framework was validated on Tesla Model 3, Leapmotor C10 and C11, demonstrating its versatility across different vehicle platforms. In particular, it successfully identified 43 car-control actions on the Tesla Model 3, showcasing its extensive coverage. Furthermore, its low resource consumption enables seamless integration into compact platforms like the Raspberry Pi, supporting practical deployment in real-world automotive systems.
items.abstract_zh: 控制器局域网 (CAN) 总线是现代车辆的基石，协调从发动机控制到辅助系统的功能。然而，其缺乏固有的安全措施使其容易受到网络攻击。将 CAN 信号与汽车控制操作准确映射对于检测安全漏洞至关重要，因为它可以查明被利用来危害车辆功能的潜在漏洞。尽管如此，由于唯一 ID 和有效负载组合的搜索空间巨大，现有的 CAN 逆向工程方法很难实现位级分辨率。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个用于逆向工程 CAN 总线消息的系统框架，实现 CAN 帧中的控制位到汽车控制操作的精确映射。该框架在特斯拉 Model 3、零跑 C10 和 C11 上进行了验证，展示了其在不同车辆平台上的多功能性。特别是，它成功识别了特斯拉 Model 3 上的 43 个汽车控制动作，展示了其广泛的覆盖范围。此外，其资源消耗低，可以无缝集成到 Raspberry Pi 等紧凑型平台中，支持实际汽车系统中的实际部署。

items.title: CaMDN: Enhancing Cache Efficiency for Multi-tenant DNNs on Integrated NPUs.
items.abstract: With the rapid development of DNN applications, multi-tenant execution, where multiple DNNs are co-located on a single SoC, is becoming a prevailing trend. Although many methods are proposed in prior works to improve multi-tenant performance, the impact of shared cache is not well studied. This paper proposes CaMDN, an architecture-scheduling co-design to enhance cache efficiency for multi-tenant DNNs on integrated NPUs. Specifically, a lightweight architecture is proposed to support model-exclusive, NPU-controlled regions inside shared cache to eliminate unexpected cache contention. Moreover, a cache scheduling method is proposed to improve shared cache utilization. In particular, it includes a cache-aware mapping method for adaptability to the varying available cache capacity and a dynamic allocation algorithm to adjust the usage among co-located DNNs at runtime. Compared to prior works, CaMDN reduces the memory access by 33.4% on average and achieves a model speedup of up to 2.56 × (1.88 × on average).
items.abstract_zh: 随着 DNN 应用的快速发展，多租户执行（即多个 DNN 共同位于单个 SoC 上）正在成为流行趋势。尽管先前的工作提出了许多方法来提高多租户性能，但共享缓存的影响尚未得到很好的研究。本文提出了 CaMDN，一种架构调度协同设计，旨在提高集成 NPU 上多租户 DNN 的缓存效率。具体来说，提出了一种轻量级架构来支持共享缓存内模型独占、NPU 控制的区域，以消除意外的缓存争用。此外，提出了一种缓存调度方法来提高共享缓存利用率。特别是，它包括用于适应不同的可用缓存容量的缓存感知映射方法和用于在运行时调整共置 DNN 之间的使用的动态分配算法。与之前的工作相比，CaMDN 平均减少了 33.4% 的内存访问，并实现了高达 2.56 ×（平均 1.88 ×）的模型加速。

items.title: Enhancing LLM-based Quantum Code Generation with Multi-Agent Optimization and Quantum Error Correction.
items.abstract: Multi-agent frameworks with Large Language Models (LLMs) have become promising tools for generating generalpurpose programming languages using test-driven development, allowing developers to create more accurate and robust code. However, their potential has not been fully unleashed for domainspecific programming languages, where specific domain exhibits unique optimization opportunities for customized improvement. In this paper, we take the first step in exploring multi-agent code generation for quantum programs. By identifying the unique optimizations in quantum designs such as quantum error correction, we introduce a novel multi-agent framework tailored to generating accurate, fault-tolerant quantum code. Each agent in the framework focuses on distinct optimizations, iteratively refining the code using a semantic analyzer with multi-pass inference, alongside an error correction code decoder. We also examine the effectiveness of traditional techniques, like Chain-ofThought (CoT) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in the context of quantum programming, uncovering observations that are different from general-purpose code generation. To evaluate our approach, we develop a test suite to measure the impact each optimization has on the accuracy of the generated code. Our findings indicate that techniques such as structured CoT significantly improve the generation of quantum algorithms by up to $50 \%$. In contrast, we have also found that certain techniques such as RAG show limited improvement, yielding an accuracy increase of only $4 \%$. Moreover, we showcase examples of AIassisted quantum error prediction and correction, demonstrating the effectiveness of our multi-agent framework in reducing the errors of generated quantum programs.
items.abstract_zh: 具有大型语言模型 (LLM) 的多代理框架已成为使用测试驱动开发生成通用编程语言的有前景的工具，使开发人员能够创建更准确、更健壮的代码。然而，对于特定领域的编程语言，它们的潜力尚未完全释放，其中特定领域展示了定制改进的独特优化机会。在本文中，我们迈出了探索量子程序多智能体代码生成的第一步。通过识别量子设计中的独特优化（例如量子纠错），我们引入了一种新颖的多代理框架，专门用于生成准确的、容错的量子代码。框架中的每个代理都专注于不同的优化，使用具有多通道推理的语义分析器以及纠错代码解码器迭代地完善代码。我们还研究了传统技术的有效性，例如量子编程背景下的思想链（CoT）和检索增强生成（RAG），发现了与通用代码生成不同的观察结果。为了评估我们的方法，我们开发了一个测试套件来衡量每个优化对生成代码的准确性的影响。我们的研究结果表明，结构化 CoT 等技术可显着提高量子算法的生成速度高达 50 \%$。相比之下，我们还发现某些技术（例如 RAG）的改进有限，准确率仅提高了 4 美元\%$。此外，我们展示了人工智能辅助量子错误预测和纠正的示例，证明了我们的多代理框架在减少生成的量子程序错误方面的有效性。

items.title: Secondary-Power-Cell-Aware Detailed Placement in Multiple Power Domain Designs.
items.abstract: Using multiple power domains is a common technique to achieve significant power savings in modern designs. However, providing power to cross-domain cells is challenging at advanced technology nodes, due to strict IR drop constraints and competition for routing resources between secondary power routing and signal routing. Despite its importance, this issue has received limited attention in recent literature. In this paper, we propose a detailed placement method that accounts for secondary power routing. Our approach employs an integer linear programming (ILP) model, complemented by targeted adjustments to the placement of cross-domain cells, to optimize the efficiency of secondary power routing. We validate our results with commercial design tools, showing that our approach effectively improves secondary power routing performance by reducing the wirelength of the secondary power distribution network (PDN) and decreasing violations due to secondary PDN constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 使用多个电源域是现代设计中实现显着节能的常用技术。然而，由于严格的 IR 压降限制以及次级电源布线和信号布线之间对布线资源的竞争，在先进技术节点为跨域单元提供电源具有挑战性。尽管这个问题很重要，但在最近的文献中却受到有限的关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种考虑次级电源布线的详细布局方法。我们的方法采用整数线性规划（ILP）模型，辅以对跨域单元布局的有针对性的调整，以优化次级电源布线的效率。我们使用商业设计工具验证了我们的结果，表明我们的方法通过减少二次配电网络 (PDN) 的线长并减少由于二次 PDN 约束而导致的违规，有效地提高了二次电源路由性能。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Statistical Timing Graph Scheduling Algorithm for GPU Computation.
items.abstract: Statistical Static Timing Analysis (SSTA) is a crucial technique in digital circuit design because it addresses on-chip variations (OCV) by propagating timing distributions instead of fixed delays. However, the computational complexity of SSTA demands significant memory and long runtimes. While GPUs offer opportunities to accelerate SSTA, their limited memory capacity makes it challenging to handle large-scale SSTA workloads. To address this challenge, we propose a statistical timing graph (STG) scheduling algorithm combined with a GPU memory management strategy. We have shown up to $4.9 \times$ speedup on a GPU with 16 GB memory compared to a 20-thread CPU baseline when solving an 18.2 GB STG.
items.abstract_zh: 统计静态时序分析 (SSTA) 是数字电路设计中的一项关键技术，因为它通过传播时序分布而不是固定延迟来解决片上变化 (OCV)。然而，SSTA 的计算复杂性需要大量的内存和较长的运行时间。虽然 GPU 提供了加速 SSTA 的机会，但其有限的内存容量使得处理大规模 SSTA 工作负载具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种结合 GPU 内存管理策略的统计时序图 (STG) 调度算法。在求解 18.2 GB STG 时，与 20 线程 CPU 基准相比，我们在具有 16 GB 内存的 GPU 上显示出高达 4.9 美元的加速速度。

items.title: P-DAC: Power-Efficient Photonic Accelerators for LLM Inference.
items.abstract: As traditional electronic hardware encounters the limitations of Moore’s Law, optical computing is emerging as a promising alternative, delivering high data transmission rates, especially beneficial for big data and AI applications. Photonic accelerators, such as the LighteningTransformer, utilize optical analog signals to accelerate Transformerbased models, achieving exceptional speed and low energy consumption. However, controlling modern optical intensity modulators (e.g., MachZehnder Modulators) requires using electrical analog signals (e.g., voltage values) to adjust the optical signal intensity for realizing optical-based vector inner product calculations. Managing this modulation consumes significant power, as it involves selecting optimal electrical values through an electrical controller and converting digital signals to analog using digital-to-analog converters (DACs). In this work, we introduce P-DAC, a solution designed to reduce DAC power consumption, significantly enhancing the energy efficiency of optical accelerators for Transformer models.
items.abstract_zh: 随着传统电子硬件遇到摩尔定律的限制，光计算正在成为一种有前景的替代方案，提供高数据传输速率，特别有利于大数据和人工智能应用。光子加速器（例如 LighteningTransformer）利用光学模拟信号来加速基于 Transformer 的模型，从而实现卓越的速度和低能耗。然而，控制现代光强度调制器（例如MachZehnder调制器）需要使用电模拟信号（例如电压值）来调整光信号强度，以实现基于光学的矢量内积计算。管理这种调制会消耗大量功率，因为​​它涉及通过电气控制器选择最佳电气值并使用数模转换器 (DAC) 将数字信号转换为模拟信号。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 P-DAC，这是一种旨在降低 DAC 功耗的解决方案，可显着提高 Transformer 模型的光学加速器的能效。

items.title: PastATPG: A Hybrid ATPG Framework for Better Test Compaction with Partial Assignment SAT.
items.abstract: In automatic test pattern generation (ATPG), SAT-based methods are typically used to complement structural approaches, especially for addressing hard-to-detect faults. However, as the size and complexity of circuits grow, SAT-based ATPG faces challenges like pattern inflation and excessive runtime, limiting its overall performance. The key problem lies in the fact that current mainstream SAT solvers perform complete assignments for all primary inputs of the fault’s transitive fanin cone without considering the detection of other faults, making test compaction extremely difficult and time consuming. In this paper, a novel SAT solver PA-MiniSat is proposed, which is capable of generating partial assignments for solving variables and significantly reduces the number of specified bits in test cubes. As an extension of MiniSat, it employs a full-literal watching technique and a circuit-adapted heuristic branching strategy, achieving overall improved performance in ATPG. Based on PA-MiniSat, a hybrid ATPG framework PastATPG is proposed for better test compaction, which tightly integrates structural algorithms with the SAT solver into the unified test compaction flow. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other SAT solvers in pattern compaction and, in some cases, even surpasses commercial ATPG tools in terms of speed. The code is available at https://github.com/sklp-eda-lab/PastATPG.
items.abstract_zh: 在自动测试模式生成 (ATPG) 中，基于 SAT 的方法通常用于补充结构方法，特别是用于解决难以检测的故障。然而，随着电路规模和复杂性的增长，基于 SAT 的 ATPG 面临着模式膨胀和运行时间过长等挑战，限制了其整体性能。关键问题在于，当前主流的 SAT 求解器对故障传递扇锥体的所有主要输入进行完整分配，而不考虑其他故障的检测，使得测试压缩极其困难且耗时。本文提出了一种新型 SAT 求解器 PA-MiniSat，它能够生成求解变量的部分赋值，并显着减少测试立方体中指定位数。作为 MiniSat 的扩展，它采用了全文字观察技术和电路自适应启发式分支策略，实现了 ATPG 整体性能的提高。基于PA-MiniSat，为了更好的测试压缩，提出了一种混合ATPG框架PastATPG，它将结构算法与SAT求解器紧密集成到统一的测试压缩流程中。实验结果表明，我们的方法在模式压缩方面优于其他 SAT 求解器，在某些情况下，甚至在速度方面超过了商业 ATPG 工具。代码可在 https://github.com/sklp-eda-lab/PastATPG 获取。

items.title: DIAS: Distance-based Attention Sparsity for Ultra-Long-Sequence Transformer with Tree-like Processing-in-Memory Architecture.
items.abstract: Long-context inference has become a central focus in recent self-regressive Transformer research. However, challenges still remain in performing decode stage due to the memory bandwidth bottleneck of attention mechanisms and the substantial memory overhead associated with KV cache. Although attention sparsity has been proposed as a potential solution, conventional sparsity methods that rely on heuristic algorithms often suffer from accuracy degradation when applied to ultra-long sequences. To break through the dilemma between accuracy-performance and bandwidth-capacity, this work proposes DIAS, a distancebased irregular attention sparsity approach with processing-inmemory (PIM) architecture. DIAS employs approximate topK attention (AKAttention) scores through graph-based search to improve inference efficiency while maintaining accuracy. Furthermore, a scalable tree-like PIM (TreePIM) architecture is introduced to achieve both memory capacity and bandwidth improvement by isolating enormous memory access for KV cache into the PIM units. Evaluations on various configurations of DIAS for Longbench with Llama3-405B models with 1 M sequence length show up to 75 times speedup compared with the state-of-the-art LLM accelerator, with accuracy drop of less than $1 \%$. Index Terms-AI and Machine Learning, Architecture & System Design
items.abstract_zh: 长上下文推理已成为最近自回归 Transformer 研究的中心焦点。然而，由于注意力机制的内存带宽瓶颈以及与 KV 缓存相关的大量内存开销，执行解码阶段仍然存在挑战。尽管注意力稀疏性已被提出作为一种潜在的解决方案，但依赖于启发式算法的传统稀疏性方法在应用于超长序列时常常会出现精度下降的问题。为了突破准确性性能和带宽容量之间的困境，这项工作提出了 DIAS，一种基于内存处理（PIM）架构的基于距离的不规则注意力稀疏方法。 DIAS 通过基于图的搜索采用近似 topK 注意力（AKAttention）分数，在保持准确性的同时提高推理效率。此外，引入了可扩展的树状PIM（TreePIM）架构，通过将KV缓存的大量内存访问隔离到PIM单元中来实现内存容量和带宽的提高。对具有 1 M 序列长度的 Llama3-405B 模型的 Longbench DIAS 的各种配置进行的评估显示，与最先进的 LLM 加速器相比，加速速度高达 75 倍，且精度下降不到 $1 \%$。索引术语-人工智能和机器学习、架构和系统设计

items.title: Delving into Topology Representation for Layout Pattern: A Novel Contrastive Learning Framework for Hotspot Detection.
items.abstract: Recently, machine learning-based techniques have been applied for layout hotspot detection. However, existing methods encounter challenges in capturing the decision boundary across the entire dataset and ignore the geometric properties and topology of the polygons. In this paper, we introduce CLI-HD, a novel contrastive learning framework on layout sequences and images for hotspot detection. Our framework improves the ability to distinguish between hotspots and non-hotspots by similarity computations instead of a single decision boundary. To effectively incorporate geometric information into the model training process, we propose Layout2Seq, which encodes polygon shapes as vectors within sequences that are subsequently fed into the CLIHD. Furthermore, to better represent topology information, we develop an absolute position embedding, replacing the standard position encoders used in Transformer architectures. Extensive evaluations on various benchmarks demonstrate that CLI-HD outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, with an accuracy improvement ranging from $0.82 \%$ to $4.77 \%$ and a reduction in false alarm rates by $\mathbf{4. 9 \%}$ to $\mathbf{2 3. 1 8 \%}$.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，基于机器学习的技术已应用于布局热点检测。然而，现有方法在捕获整个数据集的决策边界方面遇到了挑战，并且忽略了多边形的几何属性和拓扑。在本文中，我们介绍了 CLI-HD，这是一种用于热点检测的布局序列和图像的新型对比学习框架。我们的框架通过相似性计算而不是单个决策边界提高了区分热点和非热点的能力。为了有效地将几何信息融入到模型训练过程中，我们提出了 Layout2Seq，它将多边形形状编码为序列中的向量，随后将其馈送到 CLIHD 中。此外，为了更好地表示拓扑信息，我们开发了绝对位置嵌入，取代了 Transformer 架构中使用的标准位置编码器。对各种基准的广泛评估表明，CLI-HD 优于当前最先进的方法，准确度提高了从 $0.82 \%$ 到 $4.77 \%$，误报率降低了 $\mathbf{4。 9 \%}$ 到 $\mathbf{2 3. 1 8 \%}$。

items.title: A PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-Out Universal Nonlinear Processing Element for Time-Domain In-Memory Computing Systems.
items.abstract: Time-Domain In-Memory Computing (TD-IMC) has emerged as a promising analog computing architecture for edge AI applications. However, the lack of developed hardware operators, especially general nonlinear operators, necessitates frequent cross-domain data transmission in practical TD-IMC systems, significantly reducing energy efficiency. In this work, we propose a PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-OUT Universal Nonlinear Processing Element (PIPO-UNPE) to address the challenges of nonlinear processing in analog computing. By implementing an RRAM-based two-layer ReLU network, the PIPO-UNPE performs universal nonlinear operations entirely in the time domain. Algorithmically, we introduce Dynamic Loss-Responsive Subset Enhancement (DLRSE) to boost the performance of this low-cost network in function approximation tasks. From a hardware perspective, we design an RRAM-based pulse-driven programmable current source and a low-latency dispersion comparator-based voltage-to-time converter (VTC) to enhance both the energy efficiency and precision of the PIPO-UNPE. Hybrid simulations reveal that the PIPO-UNPE consumes 912 uW of power while delivering a throughput of $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ NOPS (Nonlinear Operations Per Second). Incorporating the PIPO-UNPE into the TD-IMC accelerator can increase energy efficiency by a factor of 9.5 to 25, keeping the accuracy loss below 0.1%.
items.abstract_zh: 时域内存计算（TD-IMC）已成为边缘人工智能应用的一种有前景的模拟计算架构。然而，由于缺乏成熟的硬件算子，特别是通用非线性算子，在实际的TD-IMC系统中需要频繁的跨域数据传输，从而显着降低了能源效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-OUT 通用非线性处理元件（PIPO-UNPE）来解决模拟计算中非线性处理的挑战。通过实现基于 RRAM 的两层 ReLU 网络，PIPO-UNPE 完全在时域中执行通用非线性运算。在算法上，我们引入动态损失响应子集增强（DLRSE）来提高这种低成本网络在函数逼近任务中的性能。从硬件角度来看，我们设计了基于 RRAM 的脉冲驱动可编程电流源和基于低延迟色散比较器的电压时间转换器 (VTC)，以提高 PIPO-UNPE 的能效和精度。混合仿真表明，PIPO-UNPE 消耗 912 uW 的功率，同时提供 $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ NOPS（每秒非线性操作）的吞吐量。将PIPO-UNPE纳入TD-IMC加速器可以将能源效率提高9.5至25倍，并将精度损失保持在0.1%以下。

items.title: YAP: Yield Modeling and Simulation for Advanced Packaging.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional integration technologies present a promising path forward for extending Moore’s law, facilitating high-density interconnects between chips and supporting multi-tier architectural designs. Cu-Cu hybrid bonding has emerged as a favored technique for the integration of chiplets at high interconnect density. This paper introduces YAP, a yield model for wafer-to-wafer (W2W) and die-to-wafer (D2W) hybrid bonding process. The model accounts for key failure mechanisms that contribute to yield loss, including overlay errors, particle defects, Cu recess variations, excessive wafer surface roughness, and Cu density. We also develop an open-source yield simulator and compare the accuracy of the near-analytical yield model with the simulation results. The results demonstrate that YAP achieves virtually identical accuracy while offering over 10,000x faster runtime. YAP enables the co-optimization of packaging technologies, assembly design rules, and overall design methodologies. We used YAP to examine the impact of bonding pitch, compare W2W and D2W hybrid bonding for varying chiplet sizes, and explore the benefits of tighter process controls, such as improved particle defect density.
items.abstract_zh: 三维集成技术为扩展摩尔定律、促进芯片之间的高密度互连和支持多层架构设计提供了一条有前途的道路。铜-铜混合键合已成为高互连密度小芯片集成的热门技术。本文介绍了 YAP，一种晶圆到晶圆 (W2W) 和芯片到晶圆 (D2W) 混合键合工艺的良率模型。该模型考虑了导致良率损失的关键失效机制，包括重叠误差、颗粒缺陷、铜凹槽变化、晶圆表面粗糙度过高和铜密度。我们还开发了一个开源良率模拟器，并将近分析良率模型的准确性与模拟结果进行比较。结果表明，YAP 实现了几乎相同的精度，同时运行时间快了 10,000 倍以上。 YAP 能够实现封装技术、装配设计规则和整体设计方法的共同优化。我们使用 YAP 来检查键合间距的影响，比较不同小芯片尺寸的 W2W 和 D2W 混合键合，并探索更严格的工艺控制的好处，例如提高颗粒缺陷密度。

items.title: Clearance-Constrained PCB Global Placement with Heterogeneous Components.
items.abstract: The complexity of design rules and intense time-to-market demands have made auto-placement tools essential for advanced printed circuit board (PCB) designs. This paper presents a novel PCB placement framework to handle pad-to-pad clearance constraints and heterogeneous components to address these challenges. Unlike existing academic placers, our framework focuses on the following key features: a wire-area model to account for various routing resource needs between power and signal nets, a pad-to-pad clearance model to minimize spacing violations, and a two-sided, pad-type-aware density model to reduce component and pad overlap. We further develop a quadratic programming-based legalizer to resolve constraint violations among components of varying shapes. Experimental results show the effectiveness and efficiency of our framework, surpassing two state-of-theart academic placers in post-routing quality on both academic and industrial benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 设计规则的复杂性和严格的上市时间要求使得自动布局工具对于高级印刷电路板 (PCB) 设计至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的 PCB 布局框架，用于处理焊盘到焊盘间隙限制和异构组件，以应对这些挑战。与现有的学术布局器不同，我们的框架侧重于以下关键功能：用于考虑电源和信号网络之间的各种布线资源需求的布线区域模型、用于最大程度地减少间距违规的焊盘到焊盘间隙模型，以及用于减少组件和焊盘重叠的两侧焊盘类型感知密度模型。我们进一步开发了一种基于二次规划的合法化器，以解决不同形状组件之间的约束违规问题。实验结果表明我们的框架的有效性和效率，在学术和工业基准上的后路由质量方面超过了两个最先进的学术放置者。

items.title: E-morphic: Scalable Equality Saturation for Structural Exploration in Logic Synthesis.
items.abstract: In technology mapping, the quality of the final implementation heavily relies on the circuit structure after technologyindependent optimization. Recent studies have introduced equality saturation as a novel optimization approach. However, its efficiency remains a hurdle against its wide adoption in logic synthesis. This paper proposes a highly scalable and efficient framework named E-morphic. It is the first work that employs equality saturation for resynthesis after conventional technology-independent logic optimizations, enabling structure exploration before technology mapping. Powered by several key enhancements to the equality saturation framework, such as direct e-graph-circuit conversion, solution-space pruning, and simulated annealing for e-graph extraction, this approach not only improves the scalability and extraction efficiency of e-graph rewriting but also addresses the structural bias issue present in conventional logic synthesis flows through parallel structural exploration and resynthesis. Experiments show that, compared to the state-of-the-art delay optimization flow in ABC, E-morphic on average achieves 12.54% area saving and 7.29% delay reduction on the large-scale circuits in the EPFL benchmark.
items.abstract_zh: 在技​​术映射中，最终实现的质量很大程度上依赖于独立于技术优化后的电路结构。最近的研究引入了等式饱和作为一种新颖的优化方法。然而，其效率仍然是其在逻辑综合中广泛采用的障碍。本文提出了一种高度可扩展且高效的框架，名为 E-morphic。这是第一个在传统的独立于技术的逻辑优化之后采用等式饱和进行重新综合的工作，从而能够在技术映射之前进行结构探索。在等式饱和框架的几个关键增强的支持下，例如直接电子图电路转换、解空间剪枝和用于电子图提取的模拟退火，该方法不仅提高了电子图重写的可扩展性和提取效率，而且还通过并行结构探索和再综合解决了传统逻辑综合流程中存在的结构偏差问题。实验表明，与 ABC 中最先进的延迟优化流程相比，E-morphic 在 EPFL 基准测试中的大规模电路上平均实现了 12.54% 的面积节省和 7.29% 的延迟减少。

items.title: AttenPIM: Accelerating LLM Attention with Dual-mode GEMV in Processing-in-Memory.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated unprecedented generative performance across a wide range of applications. While recent heterogeneous architectures attempt to address the memory-bound bottleneck from attention computations by processing-in-memory (PIM) offloading, they overlook two critical characteristics of attention GEMVs that distinguish them from traditional PIM scenarios: (1) dynamic matrix dimensions that scale with token length, and (2) distinct GEMV patterns between score computation ($Q \times K_{t}$) and context computation ($S \times V$). Existing PIM designs, employing either uniform or transposed computing modes, suffer from inefficiencies in newly generated element preparation or distinct GEMV execution. To address these limitations, we propose AttenPIM, a software-hardware co-design for efficient PIM-based attention acceleration. For bank-level execution, we propose dual-mode computing modes tailored for score and context computations with PIM-oriented data layouts and execution flows for KV storage, supported by a low-cost configurable per-bank PIM unit (PU). For system-level execution, we leverage token-level and head-level concurrency to ensure workload balance and maximize bank PU parallelism. Furthermore, dynamic allocation and kernel fusion methods are proposed to further minimize memory overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that AttenPIM achieves $1.13 \times-5.26 \times$ speedup and reduces energy consumption by 17 %-49 % compared to two state-of-the-art PIM baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在广泛的应用程序中展示了前所未有的生成性能。虽然最近的异构架构试图通过内存处理（PIM）卸载来解决注意力计算中的内存限制瓶颈，但它们忽略了注意力 GEMV 与传统 PIM 场景的区别的两个关键特征：（1）随 token 长度缩放的动态矩阵维度，以及（2）得分计算（$Q \times K_{t}$）和上下文计算（$S \times V$）之间不同的 GEMV 模式。现有的 PIM 设计采用统一或转置计算模式，但在新生成的元素准备或不同的 GEMV 执行方面效率低下。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 AttenPIM，这是一种软件-硬件协同设计，用于高效的基于 PIM 的注意力加速。对于银行级执行，我们提出了专为分数和上下文计算而定制的双模式计算模式，具有面向 PIM 的数据布局和 KV 存储的执行流程，并由低成本可配置的每银行 PIM 单元（PU）支持。对于系统级执行，我们利用令牌级和头级并发来确保工作负载平衡并最大化银行 PU 并行性。此外，还提出了动态分配和内核融合方法以进一步最小化内存开销。实验结果表明，与两个最先进的 PIM 基线相比，AttenPIM 实现了 1.13 美元 ×-5.26 美元的加速，并将能耗降低了 17%-49%。

items.title: SAGA: A Memory-Efficient Accelerator for GANN Construction via Harnessing Vertex Similarity.
items.abstract: Graph-traversal-based Approximate Nearest Neighbor (GANN) search and construction have become key retrieval techniques in various domains, such as recommendation systems and social networks. However, deploying GANN in real-world scenarios faces significant challenges, as high-dimensional vertices within the graph can lead to intensive memory demands. Although architectures like NDSearch have been proposed to accelerate GANN search, they are hard to deploy for GANN construction, as their pre-processing methods introduce massive overhead in dynamic graphs. In this paper, given the observation that neighboring vertices in a dynamic graph exhibit feature similarity, we propose SAGA, the first accelerator that alleviates memory bound in GANN construction. To capture this similarity, we directly leverage the first step of construction to gather vertices with the same starting point into a cluster to minimize the similarity detection overhead. Next, we decompose vertices into key and non-key ones, where their deltas fall in a narrow range, which is suitable to be quantized to lower bit widths. Building upon this approach, we design a specialized architecture, which efficiently implements the GANN construction by twolevel scheduling and a mixed-precision supported bit-serial unit. Through comprehensive evaluation, we demonstrate that SAGA can achieve an average speedup of $9.30 \times 4.87 \times 4.15 \times$ and $35.46 \times 7.60 \times 5.15 \times$ energy savings over CPU, GPU and NDSearch, respectively, while retaining task accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 基于图遍历的近似最近邻（GANN）搜索和构建已成为推荐系统和社交网络等各个领域的关键检索技术。然而，在现实场景中部署 GANN 面临着巨大的挑战，因为图中的高维顶点可能会导致大量的内存需求。尽管像 NDSearch 这样的架构已经被提出来加速 GANN 搜索，但它们很难部署用于 GANN 构建，因为它们的预处理方法在动态图中引入了大量开销。在本文中，鉴于动态图中相邻顶点表现出特征相似性的观察，我们提出了 SAGA，这是第一个减轻 GANN 构造中内存限制的加速器。为了捕获这种相似性，我们直接利用构造的第一步将具有相同起点的顶点收集到一个簇中，以最小化相似性检测开销。接下来，我们将顶点分解为关键和非关键顶点，它们的增量落在一个狭窄的范围内，适合量化到较低的位宽。基于这种方法，我们设计了一个专门的架构，它通过两级调度和支持混合精度的位串行单元有效地实现了 GANN 构造。通过综合评估，我们证明 SAGA 可以比 CPU、GPU 和 NDSearch 分别实现 $9.30 \times 4.87 \times 4.15 \times$ 的平均加速和 $35.46 \times 7.60 \times 5.15 \times$ 的能耗，同时保持任务精度。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Warpage-Aware Generative Floorplanning for Reliable Advanced Packaging.
items.abstract: This paper presents the first warpage-aware generative learningbased floorplanning algorithm to effectively model the warpage effect and optimize the die floorplan on a fixed outlined substrate. With more heterogeneous materials and dense interconnects in advanced packaging, warpage is a main reliability concern and may degrade system performance. We present a novel transformer-based encoding scheme to learn node and edge representations, followed by parallel decoding and warpage-aware legalization to jointly minimize die displacement and warpage. Experimental results show that our algorithm improves warpage by 9.9% and wirelength by 8.3% on average, compared with the state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了第一个基于翘曲感知生成学习的布局规划算法，可以有效地模拟翘曲效应并优化固定轮廓基板上的芯片布局。随着先进封装中异质材料和密集互连的增多，翘曲成为主要的可靠性问题，并可能降低系统性能。我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的编码方案来学习节点和边缘表示，然后进行并行解码和翘曲感知合法化，以共同最小化芯片位移和翘曲。实验结果表明，与最先进的工作相比，我们的算法平均将翘曲改善了 9.9%，线长平均改善了 8.3%。

items.title: Maximizing Energy Efficiency in Spiking Neural Networks: A Dynamic Joint Pruning Framework.
items.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) face increasing challenges for efficient deployment as architectures grow in complexity, necessitating network pruning to improve energy and computational efficiency. Existing pruning methods primarily focus on a single form of sparsity, overlooking the importance of joint pruning, which is critical for minimizing synaptic operations (SOPs) and enhancing energy efficiency. This paper presents a novel dynamic joint pruning framework that leverages both spatiotemporal spike sparsity and weight sparsity to minimize SOPs in SNN inference. Based on a comprehensive analysis of the SOPs model, we introduce an integrated solution that combines a multi-stage masking mechanism for fine-grained neuron firing threshold control, a temporal attention batch normalization (TABN) module with learnable time scaling factors, and a dynamic sparse strategy that adjusts importance coefficients based on real-time computational impact. Experimental results on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet validate the effectiveness of proposed framework. Our method achieves up to $126.38 \times$ compression ratio of SOPs on CIFAR-10 with minimal accuracy loss, establishing a new state-of-the-art in energy-efficient SNN pruning.
items.abstract_zh: 随着架构变得越来越复杂，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 面临着越来越多的高效部署挑战，需要进行网络修剪以提高能源和计算效率。现有的剪枝方法主要关注单一形式的稀疏性，忽视了联合剪枝的重要性，而联合剪枝对于最小化突触操作（SOP）和提高能量效率至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的动态联合剪枝框架，该框架利用时空尖峰稀疏性和权重稀疏性来最小化 SNN 推理中的 SOP。基于对SOP模型的全面分析，我们引入了一种集成解决方案，该解决方案结合了用于细粒度神经元放电阈值控制的多级掩蔽机制、具有可学习时间缩放因子的时间注意批量归一化（TABN）模块以及基于实时计算影响调整重要性系数的动态稀疏策略。 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验结果验证了所提出框架的有效性。我们的方法在 CIFAR-10 上实现了高达 $126.38 \times$ 的 SOP 压缩比，同时精度损失最小，在节能 SNN 剪枝方面建立了新的最先进技术。

items.title: RUPlace: Optimizing Routability via Unified Placement and Routing Formulation.
items.abstract: Placement plays a critical role in VLSI physical design, particularly in optimizing routability. With continuous advancements in semiconductor manufacturing technology, increased integration, and growing design complexity, managing routing congestion during placement has become increasingly challenging. Despite the widespread techniques to improve routability, these methods often lack theoretical guidance or sever the intrinsic connection between placement and routing optimization. In this paper, we propose RUPlace, an ADMMbased placer for unified optimization of placement and routing. Leveraging Wasserstein distance and bilevel optimization, our approach provides a unified framework for congestion optimization by alternately running global routing and incremental placement. Furthermore, we introduce a simple yet effective model for cell inflation-based global placement, where convex programming is employed to determine the optimal inflation ratio. Experimental results on a diverse set of open-source industrial benchmarks from CircuitNet and Chipyard demonstrate that our method achieves superior congestion reduction compared to widely used tools such as OpenROAD, Xplace 2.0, and DREAMPlace 4.1, while maintaining competitive wirelength and runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 布局在 VLSI 物理设计中起着至关重要的作用，特别是在优化可布线性方面。随着半导体制造技术的不断进步、集成度的提高以及设计复杂性的不断增加，在布局过程中管理布线拥塞变得越来越具有挑战性。尽管提高可布线性的技术广泛存在，但这些方法通常缺乏理论指导或切断布局和布线优化之间的内在联系。在本文中，我们提出了 RUPlace，一种基于 ADMM 的布局器，用于布局和布线的统一优化。利用 Wasserstein 距离和双层优化，我们的方法通过交替运行全局路由和增量放置，为拥塞优化提供了统一的框架。此外，我们引入了一个简单而有效的基于单元通胀的全局布局模型，其中采用凸规划来确定最佳通胀率。来自 CircuitNet 和 Chipyard 的各种开源工业基准测试的实验结果表明，与 OpenROAD、Xplace 2.0 和 DREAMPlace 4.1 等广泛使用的工具相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的拥塞减少效果，同时保持了具有竞争力的线长和运行时间。

items.title: NeuralMesh: Neural Network For FEM Mesh Generation in 2.5D/3D Chiplet Thermal Simulation.
items.abstract: Advanced integrated circuit (IC) systems increasingly utilize chiplet-based packaging with complex $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ structures and dense Through-Silicon Via (TSV) arrays. While the Finite Element Method (FEM) provides high-fidelity thermal simulation for these systems, its computational efficiency degrades significantly when generating and optimizing meshes for intricate geometries. To address these performance limitations while preserving simulation accuracy, we present NeuralMesh, a novel framework that accelerates thermal analysis of chiplet-based ICs. Our approach integrates deep learning and geometric analysis to optimize mesh generation without the need for iterative refinement steps. NeuralMesh first employs an enhanced segmentation model to predict thermal distributions based on geometric, material, and power parameters. These predictions, combined with key geometric features, guide the optimization of an initial coarse FEM mesh. By eliminating traditional iterative mesh refinement, our framework achieves up to $45.00 \times$ mesh generation speedup while maintaining thermal accuracy within 0.8% of commercial COMSOL simulations. It reduces the number of mesh elements in unimportant areas, which represents a speed improvement of the subsequent thermal simulation. This advancement enables rapid yet precise thermal analysis essential for modern IC package design.
items.abstract_zh: 先进的集成电路 (IC) 系统越来越多地利用基于小芯片的封装，该封装具有复杂的 2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ 结构和密集的硅通孔 (TSV) 阵列。虽然有限元法 (FEM) 为这些系统提供高保真热模拟，但在生成和优化复杂几何形状的网格时，其计算效率会显着降低。为了解决这些性能限制，同时保持仿真精度，我们推出了 NeuralMesh，这是一种新型框架，可加速基于小芯片的 IC 的热分析。我们的方法集成了深度学习和几何分析来优化网格生成，而无需迭代细化步骤。 NeuralMesh 首先采用增强的分割模型来根据几何、材料和功率参数预测热分布。这些预测与关键几何特征相结合，指导初始粗略有限元网格的优化。通过消除传统的迭代网格细化，我们的框架实现了高达 45.00 美元 × 的网格生成加速，同时将商业 COMSOL 模拟的热精度保持在 0.8% 以内。减少了不重要区域的网格单元数量，这代表了后续热模拟的速度提升。这一进步使得快速而精确的热分析成为现代 IC 封装设计所必需的。

items.title: A Fast, Iterative Clock Skew Scheduling Algorithm with Dynamic Sequential Graph Extraction.
items.abstract: Clock skew scheduling (CSS) is a well-known technique that improves design timing slack by adjusting clock latency to flipflops. CSS requires obtaining timing path information between sequential elements (including flip-flops and I/O ports), known as sequential graph extraction, which is the most time-consuming part of advanced CSS. In this paper, to quickly identify the potential of clock skew in slack optimization, we propose an iterative CSS algorithm that leverages timing propagation to facilitate sequential graph extraction. Then, we provide a comprehensive skew calculation method that considers multiple clock latency constraints, obtaining the target latency of each flip-flop. Finally, we present slack optimization techniques to achieve the target latencies. Our algorithm achieves a $49.11 \times$ speedup compared to the advanced CSS algorithm based on partial graph extraction, reducing 90.05% of the extracted edges. Compared to a state-of-the-art CSS-based slack optimization methodology, our algorithm delivers a $27.01 \times$ speedup with superior slack improvement.
items.abstract_zh: 时钟偏差调度 (CSS) 是一项众所周知的技术，它通过调整触发器的时钟延迟来改善设计时序裕量。 CSS需要获取顺序元素（包括触发器和I/O端口）之间的时序路径信息，称为顺序图提取，这是高级CSS中最耗时的部分。在本文中，为了快速识别松弛优化中时钟偏差的潜力，我们提出了一种迭代 CSS 算法，该算法利用时序传播来促进顺序图提取。然后，我们提供了一种考虑多个时钟延迟约束的综合偏差计算方法，获得每个触发器的目标延迟。最后，我们提出了松弛优化技术来实现目标延迟。与基于部分图提取的高级 CSS 算法相比，我们的算法实现了 49.11 美元的加速，减少了 90.05% 的提取边缘。与最先进的基于 CSS 的松弛优化方法相比，我们的算法提供了 27.01 美元\times$的加速以及卓越的松弛改进。

items.title: Move Less, Retrieve Fast: A Retrieval-in-Memory Architecture for Language Models.
items.abstract: Retrieval-augmented language models (RALMs) have attracted widespread attention for addressing the limitations of traditional large language models. However, challenges involved in retrieval, including substantial data movement and irregular access patterns, seriously impact the efficiency and deployment of RALMs. The emerging 3D-stacked processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture, characterized by its high memory bandwidth and near-data computing capabilities, presents a promising solution for efficient retrieval. To support large-scale retrieval in RALMs, the PIM architecture should be carefully designed with joint software and hardware optimization. This paper presents Rimast, a retrieval-in-memory architecture for fast retrieval in RALMs. The objective is to minimize data movement and improve overall performance through hardwaresoftware co-design. At the hardware level, a hierarchical PIM architecture with a retrieval-in-memory dataflow is designed to reduce unnecessary data transfer. At the software level, skew-free data mapping and adaptive offloading strategies are proposed to address the irregular access patterns associated with retrieval in RALMs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed Rimast using extensive experiments. The experimental results demonstrate that Rimast effectively reduces data movement, achieving average speedups of $273 \times 55 \times$, and $2.41 \times$ over CPUs, GPUs, and prior art accelerators, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 检索增强语言模型（RALM）因解决传统大型语言模型的局限性而受到广泛关注。然而，检索中涉及的挑战，包括大量数据移动和不规则访问模式，严重影响了 RALM 的效率和部署。新兴的 3D 堆栈内存处理 (PIM) 架构以其高内存带宽和近数据计算能力为特点，为高效检索提供了一种有前景的解决方案。为了支持 RALM 中的大规模检索，PIM 架构应经过精心设计，并进行软硬件联合优化。本文介绍了 Rimast，一种用于在 RALM 中快速检索的内存检索架构。目标是通过硬件软件协同设计最大限度地减少数据移动并提高整体性能。在硬件层面，采用内存检索数据流的分层 PIM 架构旨在减少不必要的数据传输。在软件层面，提出了无偏斜数据映射和自适应卸载策略，以解决与 RALM 中的检索相关的不规则访问模式。我们通过大量实验证明了所提出的 Rimast 的有效性。实验结果表明，Rimat 有效减少了数据移动，与 CPU、GPU 和现有技术加速器相比，平均加速分别为 273 美元 × 55 美元和 2.41 美元 × 2.41 美元。

items.title: Anchor First, Accelerate Next: Revolutionizing GNNs with PIM by Harnessing Stationary Data.
items.abstract: Substantial data movement caused by irregular graph topologies hinders the efficient processing of graph neural networks (GNNs). Although the emerging near-bank processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture offers a promising solution to reduce data transfer between memory and computing units, cross-bank communication remains a critical challenge, limiting the benefits of PIM architectures. Our findings indicate that only $35.6 \%$ of the data can stay stationary within PIM units on average, with the rest requiring movement due to graph dependencies. This situation worsens as the number of PIM units increases, reducing the ratio to $18.7 \%$. In this paper, we argue that to fully leverage PIM architectures, systems must maximize stationary data and minimize the movement of non-stationary data. Following this principle, we propose Anchor, a scalable PIM architecture that exploits stationary data for GNNs through a hardware-software co-design approach. To maximize stationary data, we introduce the graph partitioning algorithm Mastav, which carefully allocates vertices and edges to preserve data locality. To minimize the movement of non-stationary data, we employ a two-step strategy. First, a customized dataflow ensures that non-stationary data is accessed and distributed exactly once. Second, an optimized communication mechanism reduces redundant data transfers through critical paths. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that Anchor significantly reduces processing latency and data movement compared to representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 不规则图拓扑引起的大量数据移动阻碍了图神经网络（GNN）的有效处理。尽管新兴的近银行内存处理 (PIM) 架构为减少内存和计算单元之间的数据传输提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但跨银行通信仍然是一个严峻的挑战，限制了 PIM 架构的优势。我们的研究结果表明，平均只有 35.6 \%$ 的数据可以在 PIM 单位内保持静止，其余数据由于图形依赖性而需要移动。随着 PIM 装置数量的增加，这种情况会变得更糟，比率会降低至 18.7 \%$。在本文中，我们认为，要充分利用 PIM 架构，系统必须最大化固定数据并最小化非固定数据的移动。遵循这一原则，我们提出了 Anchor，这是一种可扩展的 PIM 架构，通过软硬件协同设计方法利用 GNN 的固定数据。为了最大化平稳数据，我们引入了图分区算法 Mastav，该算法仔细分配顶点和边以保留数据局部性。为了最大限度地减少非平稳数据的移动，我们采用了两步策略。首先，定制的数据流确保非静态数据仅被访问和分发一次。其次，优化的通信机制减少了通过关键路径的冗余数据传输。我们广泛的实验表明，与代表性方案相比，Anchor 显着减少了处理延迟和数据移动。

items.title: GPart: A GNN-Enabled Multilevel Graph Partitioner.
items.abstract: This paper introduces GPart, a scalable multilevel framework for graph partitioning that integrates GNN embeddings with efficient coarsening and refinement techniques. On the Titan23 benchmarks, GPart achieves a cut size reduction of 34.13% to 42.92% over METIS and improves cut size by 9.30% on selected DIMACS benchmarks compared to G-kway. Furthermore, experiments on the Titan23 benchmarks show that GPart reduces normalized memory usage by 24.6x compared to GAP and 12.4x compared to GenPart. Unlike existing GNN-based methods, which require large hidden layers and substantial memory, GPart’s multilevel architecture reduces hidden layer sizes, significantly optimizing memory efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 GPart，这是一种用于图划分的可扩展多级框架，它将 GNN 嵌入与高效的粗化和细化技术集成在一起。在 Titan23 基准上，与 METIS 相比，GPart 的切割尺寸减少了 34.13% 至 42.92%，与 G-kway 相比，在选定的 DIMACS 基准上，切割尺寸提高了 9.30%。此外，Titan23 基准测试的实验表明，与 GAP 相比，GPart 将标准化内存使用量减少了 24.6 倍，与 GenPart 相比，减少了 12.4 倍。与现有的基于 GNN 的方法需要大量隐藏层和大量内存不同，GPart 的多级架构减少了隐藏层大小，显着优化了内存效率。

items.title: Configurable DSP-Based CAM Architecture for Data-Intensive Applications on FPGAs.
items.abstract: Content-addressable memory (CAM) is a type of fast memory unique in its ability to perform parallel searches of stored data based on content rather than specific memory addresses. They have been used in many domains, such as networking, databases, and graph processing. Field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) are an attractive platform for implementing CAMs because of their low latency, reconfigurability, and energy-efficient nature. However, such implementations also face significant challenges, including high resource utilization, limited scalability, and suboptimal performance due to the extensive use of look-up tables (LUTs) and block RAMs (BRAMs). These issues stem from the inherent limitations of FPGA architectures when handling the parallel operations required by CAMs, often leading to inefficient designs that cannot meet the demands of high-speed, data-intensive applications. To address these challenges, we propose a novel configurable CAM architecture that leverages the digital signal processing (DSP) blocks available in modern FPGAs as the core resource. By utilizing DSP blocks’ data storage and logic capabilities, our approach enables configurable CAM architecture with efficient multi-query support while significantly reducing search and update latency for data-intensive applications. The DSP-based CAM architecture offers enhanced scalability, higher operating frequency, and improved performance compared to traditional LUT and BRAM-based designs. In addition, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed CAM architecture with a triangle counting application on real graphs. This innovative use of DSP blocks also opens up new possibilities for highperformance, data-intensive applications on FPGAs. Our proposed design is open-sourced at: https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/DSP_CAM/.
items.abstract_zh: 内容寻址存储器 (CAM) 是一种快速存储器，其独特之处在于能够根据内容而不是特定的存储器地址对存储的数据执行并行搜索。它们已被用于许多领域，例如网络、数据库和图形处理。现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 因其低延迟、可重配置性和节能特性而成为实施 CAM 的极具吸引力的平台。然而，此类实现也面临重大挑战，包括资源利用率高、可扩展性有限，以及由于大量使用查找表 (LUT) 和块 RAM (BRAM) 而导致性能欠佳。这些问题源于 FPGA 架构在处理 CAM 所需的并行操作时的固有限制，通常会导致设计效率低下，无法满足高速、数据密集型应用的需求。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的可配置 CAM 架构，该架构利用现代 FPGA 中可用的数字信号处理 (DSP) 块作为核心资源。通过利用 DSP 块的数据存储和逻辑功能，我们的方法支持可配置的 CAM 架构，并提供高效的多查询支持，同时显着减少数据密集型应用程序的搜索和更新延迟。与传统的基于 LUT 和 BRAM 的设计相比，基于 DSP 的 CAM 架构提供了增强的可扩展性、更高的工作频率和改进的性能。此外，我们还通过真实图形上的三角形计数应用程序展示了我们提出的 CAM 架构的有效性。 DSP 模块的这种创新使用还为 FPGA 上的高性能、数据密集型应用开辟了新的可能性。我们提出的设计是开源的：https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/DSP_CAM/。

items.title: PatLabor: Pareto Optimization of Timing-Driven Routing Trees.
items.abstract: Wirelength is the fundamental metric for VLSI routing. With the advancement of new technologies, wire delay has also become a significant factor for timing performances. It is thus necessary to consider both wirelength and delay in routing tree construction, i.e., timing-driven routing trees. Prior methods propose various heuristics to balance wirelength and delay with a tunable parameter, which cannot compute the full Pareto frontier. In this work, we propose PatLabor, a practical method for timing-driven routing. PatLabor directly optimizes the Pareto set, which obtains tighter Pareto curves than prior methods and does not require parameter tuning. PatLabor obtains all Paretooptimal solutions on small-degree nets up to 9 pins and is theoretically guaranteed by provable time complexity and approximation bounds. Experimental results verify our theoretical findings and show that PatLabor obtains tighter Pareto curves than state-of-the-art methods on ICCAD-15 benchmarks. For example, PatLabor obtains up to 58.5% more Pareto-optimal solutions than prior methods for degree-9 nets.
items.abstract_zh: 线长是 VLSI 布线的基本指标。随着新技术的进步，线路延迟也成为影响时序性能的重要因素。因此，在构建路由树（即时序驱动的路由树）时需要同时考虑线长和延迟。现有方法提出了各种启发式方法来通过可调参数来平衡线长和延迟，但这些方法无法计算完整的帕累托前沿。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PatLabor，一种用于时序驱动路由的实用方法。 PatLabor 直接优化 Pareto 集，获得比现有方法更紧的 Pareto 曲线，并且不需要参数调整。 PatLabor 在最多 9 个引脚的小度网络上获得所有 Paretooptimal 解决方案，并且理论上由可证明的时间复杂度和近似界限保证。实验结果验证了我们的理论发现，并表明 PatLabor 在 ICCAD-15 基准上获得了比最先进的方法更严格的帕累托曲线。例如，PatLabor 比之前的 9 阶网络方法获得的帕累托最优解多出 58.5%。

items.title: April: Accuracy-Improved Floating-Point Approximation For Neural Network Accelerators.
items.abstract: Neural Networks (NNs) have achieved breakthroughs in computer vision and natural language processing. However, modern models are computationally expensive, with floating-point operations posing a major bottleneck. Floatingpoint approximation, such as Mitchell’s logarithm, enables floating-point multiplication using simpler integer additions, thereby improving hardware efficiency. However, its practical adoption is hindered by challenges such as precision degradation, efficient hardware integrations, and management of trade-offs between accuracy and resource efficiency. In this paper, we propose a hardware-efficient down-samplingbased compensation method to mitigate precision loss and a flexible bias mechanism to accommodate diverse data distributions in NN models. Building on this foundation, we design configurable systolic arrays optimized for NN accelerators. To further support practical adoption, we introduce April, a co-design framework that balances the accuracy and resource usage of generated synthesizable systolic arrays. Our FPGA-based evaluations demonstrate that April-generated systolic arrays reduce root mean square error (RMSE) by up to $\mathbf{9 6 \%}$ and achieve $\mathbf{3 4 \% -5 2 \%}$ area reduction even compared to INT8-based implementations while maintaining comparable or improved model accuracy. Our design is open-sourced at https://github.com/CLabGit/April
items.abstract_zh: 神经网络（NN）在计算机视觉和自然语言处理方面取得了突破。然而，现代模型的计算成本很高，浮点运算构成了主要瓶颈。浮点近似（例如米切尔对数）可以使用更简单的整数加法进行浮点乘法，从而提高硬件效率。然而，其实际采用受到精度下降、高效硬件集成以及准确性和资源效率之间权衡管理等挑战的阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于硬件高效下采样的补偿方法来减轻精度损失，并提出了一种灵活的偏差机制来适应神经网络模型中的不同数据分布。在此基础上，我们设计了针对神经网络加速器优化的可配置脉动阵列。为了进一步支持实际采用，我们引入了 April，这是一个协同设计框架，可以平衡生成的可合成脉动阵列的准确性和资源使用情况。我们基于 FPGA 的评估表明，与基于 INT8 的实现相比，4 月份生成的脉动阵列可将均方根误差 (RMSE) 降低高达 $\mathbf{9 6 \%}$，并实现 $\mathbf{3 4 \% -5 2 \%}$ 面积减少，同时保持相当或更高的模型精度。我们的设计是开源的 https://github.com/CLabGit/April

items.title: GSIM: Accelerating RTL Simulation for Large-Scale Designs.
items.abstract: Register Transfer Level (RTL) simulation is widely used in design space exploration, verification, debugging, and preliminary performance evaluation for hardware design. Among various RTL simulation approaches, software simulation is the most commonly used due to its flexibility, low cost, and ease of debugging. However, the slow simulation of complex designs has become the bottleneck in design flow. In this work, we explore the sources of computation overhead of RTL simulation and conclude them into four factors. To optimize these factors, we propose several techniques at the supernode level, node level, and bit level. Finally, we implement these techniques in a novel RTL simulator GSIM. GSIM succeeds in simulating XiangShan, the state-of-the-art open-source RISC-V processor. Besides, compared to Verilator, GSIM can achieve speedup of 7.34x for booting Linux on XiangShan, and 19.94x for running CoreMark on Rocket.
items.abstract_zh: 寄存器传输级 (RTL) 仿真广泛应用于硬件设计的设计空间探索、验证、调试和初步性能评估。在各种RTL仿真方法中，软件仿真因其灵活性、低成本和易于调试而最常用。然而，复杂设计的仿真速度缓慢已成为设计流程的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探讨了 RTL 仿真计算开销的来源，并将其归纳为四个因素。为了优化这些因素，我们提出了超级节点级别、节点级别和比特级别的几种技术。最后，我们在新型 RTL 模拟器 GSIM 中实现了这些技术。 GSIM 成功模拟了最先进的开源 RISC-V 处理器香山。此外，与Verilator相比，GSIM在象山上启动Linux可实现7.34倍的加速，在Rocket上运行CoreMark可实现19.94倍的加速。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Source-Aware Adaptive Cache Management for CXL-enabled Disaggregated Memory Sharing.
items.abstract: Dynamic workloads running on multiple hosts will bring changing access patterns on CXL-enabled shared disaggregated memory. Existing works often un-traceably cache multi-source accesses, making it hard to exploit each host’s access behavior and assure service quality. Our solution Alchemy jointly optimizes cache replacement and bypassing and runs as an online reinforcement learning agent with source-aware adaptivity. It gives rewards derived from sampling-based action effectiveness and per-host macro performance. The multi-host prototype-based results on FPGAs show $8.71 \%-14.56 \%$ reduction in average access latency over LRU policy and 44x faster than the hardware-efficient ICGMM method in decision-making with comparable overhead.
items.abstract_zh: Dynamic workloads running on multiple hosts will bring changing access patterns on CXL-enabled shared disaggregated memory.现有的工作往往无法追踪地缓存多源访问，从而难以利用每个主机的访问行为并保证服务质量。我们的解决方案 Alchemy 联合优化缓存替换和绕过，并作为具有源感知适应性的在线强化学习代理运行。它提供从基于采样的操作有效性和每个主机的宏观性能中获得的奖励。 FPGA 上基于多主机原型的结果显示，与 LRU 策略相比，平均访问延迟减少了 8.71 \%-14.56 \%$，并且在决策方面比硬件高效的 ICGMM 方法快 44 倍，且开销相当。

items.title: Process-Variation-Aware Design Optimization for Wavelength-Routed Optical Networks-on-Chip.
items.abstract: With low latency and collision-free communication, wavelength-routed optical networks-on-chip (WRONoC) become an effective solution to the growing demands for multi-core communications. Microring resonators (MRRs), the primary optical components in WRONoC, are susceptible to process variation. Under process variation, the MRR’s transmission spectrum shifts, results reduced signal power and increased crosstalk. However, the impacts caused by process variation have not yet been considered in WRONoC designs. In this work, we propose a methodology to optimize the MRR radii and signal wavelengths to counter process variation. Specifically, we construct analytical models of expected signal power under MRR process variation and develop optimization methods to maximize the expected signal transmission power in WRONoC. Results show up to 7.51 dB improvement in worst-case expected signal transmission power compared to designs that do not consider process variation.
items.abstract_zh: 凭借低延迟和无冲突通信，波长路由片上光网络 (WRONoC) 成为满足不断增长的多核通信需求的有效解决方案。微环谐振器 (MRR) 是 WRONoC 中的主要光学元件，很容易受到工艺变化的影响。在工艺变化的情况下，MRR 的传输频谱会发生变化，导致信号功率降低并串扰增加。然而，WRONoC 设计中尚未考虑工艺变化造成的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种优化 MRR 半径和信号波长以应对过程变化的方法。具体来说，我们构建了 MRR 过程变化下预期信号功率的分析模型，并开发了优化方法以最大化 WRONoC 中的预期信号传输功率。结果显示，与不考虑工艺变化的设计相比，最坏情况下的预期信号传输功率提高了 7.51 dB。

items.title: CirSTAG: Circuit Stability Analysis on Graph-based Manifolds.
items.abstract: Circuit stability (sensitivity) analysis aims to estimate the overall performance impact of variations in underlying design parameters, such as gate sizes and capacitance. This process is challenging because it often requires numerous time-consuming circuit simulations. In contrast, graph neural networks (GNNs) have shown remarkable effectiveness and efficiency in tackling several chip design automation issues, including circuit timing predictions, parasitic prediction, gate sizing, and device placement. This paper introduces a novel approach called CirSTAG, which utilizes GNNs to analyze the stability (robustness) of modern integrated circuits (ICs). CirSTAG is grounded in a spectral framework that examines the stability of GNNs by leveraging input/output graph-based manifolds. When two adjacent nodes on the input manifold are mapped (through a GNN model) to two remote nodes (data samples) on the output manifold, this indicates a significant mapping distortion (DMD) and consequently poor GNN stability. CirSTAG calculates a stability score equivalent to the local Lipschitz constant for each node and edge, considering both graph structure and node feature perturbations. This enables the identification of the most critical (sensitive) circuit elements that could significantly impact circuit performance. Our empirical evaluations across various timing prediction tasks with realistic circuit designs demonstrate that CirSTAG can accurately estimate the stability of each circuit element under diverse parameter variations. This offers a scalable method for assessing the stability of large integrated circuit designs.
