items.abstract_zh: 电路稳定性（灵敏度）分析旨在估计基础设计参数（例如栅极尺寸和电容）变化对整体性能的影响。这个过程具有挑战性，因为它通常需要大量耗时的电路模拟。相比之下，图神经网络 (GNN) 在解决多个芯片设计自动化问题（包括电路时序预测、寄生预测、栅极尺寸和器件布局）方面表现出了显着的有效性和效率。本文介绍了一种名为 CirSTAG 的新颖方法，该方法利用 GNN 来分析现代集成电路 (IC) 的稳定性（鲁棒性）。 CirSTAG 基于谱框架，通过利用基于输入/输出图的流形来检查 GNN 的稳定性。当输入流形上的两个相邻节点（通过 GNN 模型）映射到输出流形上的两个远程节点（数据样本）时，这表明存在显着的映射失真（DMD），从而导致 GNN 稳定性较差。 CirSTAG 考虑图结构和节点特征扰动，计算相当于每个节点和边的局部 Lipschitz 常数的稳定性得分。这使得能够识别可能显着影响电路性能的最关键（敏感）电路元件。我们对各种时序预测任务和实际电路设计的实证评估表明，CirSTAG 可以准确估计每个电路元件在不同参数变化下的稳定性。这为评估大型集成电路设计的稳定性提供了一种可扩展的方法。

items.title: Scalable Community Detection Using Quantum Hamiltonian Descent and QUBO Formulation.
items.abstract: We present a quantum-inspired algorithm that utilizes Quantum Hamiltonian Descent (QHD) for efficient community detection. Our approach reformulates the community detection task as a Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem, and QHD is deployed to identify optimal community structures. We implement a multi-level algorithm that iteratively refines community assignments by alternating between QUBO problem setup and QHD-based optimization. Benchmarking shows our method achieves up to 5.49% better modularity scores while requiring less computational time compared to classical optimization approaches. This work demonstrates the potential of hybrid quantum-inspired solutions for advancing community detection in largescale graph data.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种受量子启发的算法，该算法利用量子哈密顿下降（QHD）进行有效的社区检测。我们的方法将社区检测任务重新表述为二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）问题，并部署 QHD 来识别最佳社区结构。我们实现了一种多级算法，通过在 QUBO 问题设置和基于 QHD 的优化之间交替来迭代地细化社区分配。基准测试显示，与经典优化方法相比，我们的方法可实现高达 5.49% 的模块化分数，同时需要更少的计算时间。这项工作展示了混合量子启发解决方案在推进大规模图数据社区检测方面的潜力。

items.title: EPOC: An Efficient Pulse Generation Framework with Advanced Synthesis for Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: In this work, we aim to address the computational overhead challenge in quantum optimal control while reducing circuit latency. We propose a novel approach combining ZX-Calculus, circuit partitioning, and circuit synthesis for pulse generation. By implementing finer granularity in pulse generation and exploring equivalent circuit representations, we achieve increased parallelism and decreased latency. Our method demonstrates a 31.74% reduction in latency compared to previous work and a 76.80% reduction compared to gate-based pulse generation methods, while minimizing computational overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决量子最优控制中的计算开销挑战，同时减少电路延迟。我们提出了一种结合 ZX 微积分、电路分区和电路合成来生成脉冲的新颖方法。通过在脉冲生成中实现更精细的粒度并探索等效电路表示，我们实现了更高的并行性和更低的延迟。我们的方法表明，与之前的工作相比，延迟减少了 31.74%，与基于门的脉冲生成方法相比，延迟减少了 76.80%，同时最大限度地减少了计算开销。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Scalable GPU-Friendly Parallelization for Sweep-Based Maze Routing.
items.abstract: Global routing is a critical stage in the VLSI design flow, aiming to provide a robust guide for detailed routing and serve as early design feedback for placement. Many approaches have leveraged GPU parallelization to achieve significant acceleration. However, with the fast-growing complexity of modern large-scale designs, recent GPU-accelerated maze routing algorithms, driven by the sweep operation, struggle to find solutions efficiently with limited GPU memory resources. In order to address this issue, this paper proposes a scalable, GPU-friendly sweep-based maze routing that requires significantly less memory and fewer kernel function calls while accelerating overall runtime. We introduce a sweep-sharing technique that allows multiple nets to be routed simultaneously within a single sweeping process, substantially reducing memory consumption and kernel launching overhead. We further propose an edge-level rip-up-andreroute technique that selectively reroutes only overflowed segments, preserving feasible parts of the solution to reduce runtime substantially. Experimental results on the latest ISPD’24 Contest benchmarks demonstrate that our GPUfriendly maze routing with sweep sharing can significantly improve the efficiency of the state-of-the-art GPU-accelerated maze router.
items.abstract_zh: 全局布线是 VLSI 设计流程中的关键阶段，旨在为详细布线提供可靠的指南，并作为布局的早期设计反馈。许多方法都利用 GPU 并行化来实现显着的加速。然而，随着现代大规模设计复杂性的快速增长，最近由扫描操作驱动的 GPU 加速迷宫路由算法很难在有限的 GPU 内存资源下有效地找到解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种可扩展、GPU 友好的基于扫描的迷宫路由，它需要显着更少的内存和更少的内核函数调用，同时加速整体运行时间。我们引入了一种扫描共享技术，允许在单个扫描过程中同时路由多个网络，从而大大减少内存消耗和内核启动开销。我们进一步提出了一种边缘级撕裂和重新路由技术，该技术有选择地仅重新路由溢出的段，保留解决方案的可行部分以大幅减少运行时间。最新 ISPD’24 竞赛基准测试的实验结果表明，我们具有扫描共享的 GPU 友好迷宫路由可以显着提高最先进的 GPU 加速迷宫路由器的效率。

items.title: DBC: Drift-aware Binary Code for Drift-tolerant Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated outstanding performance across a wide range of applications. However, their substantial number of weights necessitates scalable and efficient storage solutions. Emerging non-volatile memory technologies, such as phase change memory (PCM) with multi-level cell (MLC) operation, are promising candidates due to their high scalability and non-volatility compared to conventional charge-based storage devices. Despite these advantages, MLC PCM suffers from reliability issues, particularly conductance drift, where the conductance of a PCM cell changes over time. This drift can lead to significant accuracy degradation in DNNs, as their weights are stored in PCM cells. In this paper, we propose Drift-aware Binary Code (DBC), a novel binary code designed to improve the tolerance of DNNs to conductance drift. DBC maps smaller decimal values to less error-prone MLC PCM cell levels and ensures that values shift to smaller magnitudes when conductance drift occurs. This approach helps maintain the accuracy of the DNN over an extended period compared to conventional binary code, as dominant DNN weights are stored at levels less prone to errors and DNNs exhibit better tolerance when weight values decrease rather than increase due to drift. Additionally, DBC requires no additional hardware overhead for auxiliary bits and can be combined with other fault-tolerant approaches, such as error correction code (ECC). Experimental results based on the real PCM device developed by IBM Research demonstrate that DBC improves the drift tolerance of DNNs by up to $55.18 \times$ compared to conventional binary code.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在广泛的应用中表现出了出色的性能。然而，它们的大量权重需要可扩展且高效的存储解决方案。新兴的非易失性存储器技术，例如具有多级单元（MLC）操作的相变存储器（PCM），由于与传统的基于电荷的存储设备相比具有高可扩展性和非易失性，因此是有前途的候选技术。尽管有这些优点，MLC PCM 仍面临可靠性问题，特别是电导漂移，即 PCM 单元的电导随时间变化。这种漂移可能会导致 DNN 的精度显着下降，因为它们的权重存储在 PCM 单元中。在本文中，我们提出了漂移感知二进制代码（DBC），这是一种新颖的二进制代码，旨在提高 DNN 对电导漂移的容忍度。 DBC 将较小的十进制值映射到不易出错的 MLC PCM 单元级别，并确保在发生电导漂移时值转变为较小的幅度。与传统的二进制代码相比，这种方法有助于在较长时间内保持 DNN 的准确性，因为主要的 DNN 权重存储在不易出错的级别，并且当权重值因漂移而减少而不是增加时，DNN 表现出更好的容忍度。此外，DBC 不需要额外的辅助位硬件开销，并且可以与其他容错方法结合使用，例如纠错码 (ECC)。基于 IBM Research 开发的真实 PCM 设备的实验结果表明，与传统二进制代码相比，DBC 将 DNN 的漂移容忍度提高了高达 55.18 美元\times$。

items.title: Chameleon-SAT: An Adaptive Boolean Satisfiability Accelerator Using Mixed-Signal In-Memory Computing for Versatile SAT Problems.
items.abstract: Boolean satisfiability (SAT), the first proven nondeterministic polynominal-complete problem, is crucial in dataintensive applications. Different applications have a wide spectrum of SAT problem sets (scale, complexity) and also various solution requirements (algorithm completeness, speed). Current SAT solvers are insufficient for providing ideal solutions under different scenarios. This work presents the Chameleon-SAT, the first ASIC-based SAT accelerator that can support local search, Davis-Putnam- Logemann-Lovel, Conflict-Driven Clause Learning algorithms, while leveraging the efficient mixed-signal inmemory computing architecture to achieve orders-of-magnitude improvements in speed compared to the prior SAT solvers. By judiciously selecting the reconfiguration mode, Chameleon-SAT is able to solve a wide range of the SAT problems to achieve smallscale, high-complexity cases ($\geq 90 \times$ for 20 variables/ 86 clauses, satisfiable problems), medium-scale, structured cases ($\geq 19 \times$ for 50 variables/ 215 clauses, unsatisfiable problems), and largescale, high-complexity cases ($\geq 7 \times$ for 100 variables/ 430 clauses, satisfiable problems).
items.abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性 (SAT) 是第一个被证明的非确定性多项式完全问题，在数据密集型应用中至关重要。不同的应用程序具有广泛的 SAT 问题集（规模、复杂性）以及不同的解决方案要求（算法完整性、速度）。目前的 SAT 求解器不足以在不同场景下提供理想的解决方案。这项工作提出了 Chameleon-SAT，这是第一个基于 ASIC 的 SAT 加速器，可以支持本地搜索、Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Lovel、冲突驱动子句学习算法，同时利用高效的混合信号内存计算架构，与之前的 SAT 求解器相比，速度实现了数量级的提高。通过明智地选择重新配置模式，Chameleon-SAT 能够解决各种 SAT 问题，以实现小规模、高复杂性情况（$\geq 90 \times$，20 个变量/ 86 个子句，可满足问题）、中等规模、结构化情况（$\geq 19 \times$，50 个变量/ 215 个子句，不可满足问题）和大规模、高复杂度情况（$\geq 7 \times$ 对于 100 个变量/ 430 个子句，可满足的问题）。

items.title: ZXNet: ZX Calculus-Driven Graph Neural Network Framework for Quantum Circuit Equivalence Checking.
items.abstract: Quantum circuit execution often requires transpilation into hardware-compatible instructions, which can significantly alter the original design, making equivalence checking essential. However, existing approaches struggle with scalability and computational overhead. In this paper, we present ZXNet, a transformative framework for quantum circuit equivalence checking using $\mathbf{Z X}$ calculus-based graph abstractions. Leveraging graph neural networks, ZXNet captures complex equivalence patterns by integrating critical local and global circuit features. ZXNet achieves 99.4% validation accuracy, and up to $62 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art methods, furnishing improvements of 45.83% in scalability, 42.22% in per-qubit verification time, and 5.94% in accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 量子电路执行通常需要转换为硬件兼容的指令，这可能会显着改变原始设计，因此等效性检查至关重要。然而，现有方法在可扩展性和计算开销方面存在困难。在本文中，我们提出了 ZXNet，这是一种使用 $\mathbf{Z X}$ 基于微积分的图抽象进行量子电路等效性检查的变革框架。 ZXNet 利用图神经网络，通过集成关键的局部和全局电路特征来捕获复杂的等价模式。 ZXNet 实现了 99.4% 的验证准确率，与最先进的方法相比，速度提高了 62 美元，可扩展性提高了 45.83%，每量子位验证时间提高了 42.22%，准确性提高了 5.94%，优于最先进的方法。

items.title: ArbiterQ: Improving QNN Convergency and Accuracy by Applying Personalized Model on Heterogeneous Quantum Devices.
items.abstract: In the current NISQ era, the performance of QNN models is strictly hindered by the limited qubit number and inevitable noise. A natural idea to improve the robustness of QNN is to involve multiple quantum devices. Nevertheless, due to the heterogeneity and instability of quantum devices (e.g., noise, frequent online/offline), training and inference on distributed quantum devices may even destroy the accuracy. In this paper, we propose ArbiterQ, a comprehensive QNN framework designed for efficient and high-accuracy training and inference on heterogeneous QPUs. The main innovation of ArbiterQ is it applies personalized models for each QPU via two uniform QNN representations: model vector and behavioral vector. The model vector specifies the logical-level parameters in the QNN model, while the behavioral vector captures the hardware-level features when implementing the QNN circuit. In this manner, by sharing the gradient among QPUs with similar behavioral vectors, we can effectively leverage parallelism while considering heterogeneity. We also propose shot-oriented inference scheduling, which is a much more fine-grained scheduling that can improve accuracy and balance the workload. The experiments show that ArbiterQ accelerates the training process by $4.03 \times$ with $7.87 \%$ loss reduction, compared with the previous distributed QNN framework EQC [1].
items.abstract_zh: 在当前的 NISQ 时代，QNN 模型的性能受到有限的量子比特数和不可避免的噪声的严格阻碍。提高 QNN 鲁棒性的一个自然想法是涉及多个量子设备。然而，由于量子设备的异构性和不稳定性（例如噪声、频繁上下线），分布式量子设备上的训练和推理甚至可能会破坏准确性。在本文中，我们提出了 ArbiterQ，这是一个综合 QNN 框架，旨在对异构 QPU 进行高效、高精度的训练和推理。 ArbiterQ 的主要创新在于它通过两个统一的 QNN 表示（模型向量和行为向量）为每个 QPU 应用个性化模型。模型向量指定 QNN 模型中的逻辑级参数，而行为向量在实现 QNN 电路时捕获硬件级特征。通过这种方式，通过在具有相似行为向量的 QPU 之间共享梯度，我们可以在考虑异构性的同时有效地利用并行性。我们还提出了面向镜头的推理调度，这是一种更细粒度的调度，可以提高准确性并平衡工作负载。实验表明，与之前的分布式 QNN 框架 EQC [1] 相比，ArbiterQ 将训练过程加速了 $4.03 \times$，损失减少了 $7.87 \%$。

items.title: Power-Grid Structure Exploration with Unified Sequence-based Learning Framework.
items.abstract: As increasing gap of the shrinking ratio between device and metal pitches under advanced nodes, power-grid (PG) structure plays a critical role in circuit performance considering power integrity. Initial PG structures, as initiating implementation fundamentals, dominate optimization space. To address initial structures on industrial flow, we propose the first unified framework fueled by novel sequence-based structure generator and Transformer-based predictor, providing accurate static voltage-drop estimation. Learned embeddings are then adopted to determine promising candidates with Pareto frontier during structure optimization. The predictor is demonstrated in different scenarios under 3 nm and 2 nm technology with average 0.011% maximum absolute error of drop percentage while the optimized structures reduce 15% PG utilization with 34% worst timing-slack improvement on industrial designs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着先进节点下器件和金属节距之间缩小比率的差距不断增大，考虑到电源完整性，电网（PG）结构在电路性能中起着至关重要的作用。初始 PG 结构作为启动实现的基础，主导着优化空间。为了解决工业流程的初始结构，我们提出了第一个由新颖的基于序列的结构生成器和基于变压器的预测器推动的统一框架，提供准确的静态压降估计。然后，在结构优化过程中，采用学习嵌入来确定具有帕累托前沿的有前途的候选者。该预测器在 3 nm 和 2 nm 技术的不同场景中进行了演示，平均最大绝对误差下降百分比为 0.011%，而优化结构降低了 15% PG 利用率，工业设计的最差时序裕度改善了 34%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Utilization of Hybrid Threshold-Voltage Flip-flops for Power Recovery.
items.abstract: As the process technology advances, reducing the leakage power as much as possible is one of the utmost challenging tasks in chip implementation. Utilizing cells with multi-VT (threshold voltage) is known to be a very effective method for optimizing leakage power under timing constraints. However, for the sequential cells on the timing critical paths in circuits, there is no easy way for the multi-VT method to reduce the leakage power unless timing is not sacrificed. To overcome this barrier, we introduce a set of new standard cells called hybrid-VT flipflop cells, each of which is implemented with two different VT types, one implanted onto its master latch while the other onto its slave latch, by which the setup time and clock-to-Q delay can be controlled individually and independently. We confirm that applying our power recovery method utilizing hybrid-VT flipflop cells to the benchmark circuits, which have already been optimized by the conventional multi-VT cells, is able to further reduce the leakage power by 8.97% with no timing degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 随着工艺技术的进步，尽可能降低泄漏功率是芯片实现中最具挑战性的任务之一。众所周知，利用具有多 VT（阈值电压）的单元是在时序限制下优化泄漏功率的非常有效的方法。然而，对于电路中时序关键路径上的时序单元，除非不牺牲时序，否则多VT方法没有简单的方法来降低泄漏功率。为了克服这一障碍，我们引入了一组称为混合 VT 触发器单元的新标准单元，每个单元都采用两种不同的 VT 类型来实现，一个植入到其主锁存器上，另一个植入到其从锁存器上，通过这些单元可以单独且独立地控制建立时间和时钟到 Q 延迟。我们确认，将我们利用混合 VT 触发器单元的功率恢复方法应用到已通过传统多 VT 单元优化的基准电路中，能够进一步将泄漏功率降低 8.97%，且不会造成时序劣化。

items.title: Dual-Issue Execution of Mixed Integer and Floating-Point Workloads on Energy-Efficient In-Order RISC-V Cores.
items.abstract: To meet the computational requirements of modern workloads under tight energy constraints, general-purpose accelerator architectures have to integrate an ever-increasing number of extremely area- and energy-efficient processing elements (PEs). In this context, single-issue in-order cores are commonplace, but lean dual-issue cores could boost PE IPC, especially for the common case of mixed integer and floating-point workloads. We develop the COPIFT methodology and RISC-V ISA extensions to enable low-cost and flexible dual-issue execution of mixed integer and floating-point instruction sequences. On such kernels, our methodology achieves speedups of $1.47 x$, reaching a peak 1.75 instructions per cycle, and 1.37 x energy improvements on average, over optimized RV32G baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足严格能源限制下现代工作负载的计算要求，通用加速器架构必须集成数量不断增加的面积和能源效率极高的处理元件 (PE)。在这种情况下，单问题有序核心很常见，但精益双问题核心可以提高 PE IPC，特别是对于混合整数和浮点工作负载的常见情况。我们开发了 COPIFT 方法和 RISC-V ISA 扩展，以实现混合整数和浮点指令序列的低成本和灵活的双发出执行。在此类内核上，与优化的 RV32G 基准相比，我们的方法实现了 1.47 倍的加速，达到每周期 1.75 条指令的峰值，平均能耗提高了 1.37 倍。

items.title: Finding the Pareto Frontier of Low-Precision Data Formats and MAC Architecture for LLM Inference.
items.abstract: To accelerate AI applications, numerous data formats and physical implementations of matrix multiplication have been proposed, creating a complex design space. This paper studies the efficient MAC implementation of the integer, floating-point, posit, and logarithmic number system (LNS) data formats and Microscaling (MX) and VectorScaled Quantization (VSQ) block data formats. We evaluate the area, power, and numerical accuracy (evaluated as signal-to-quantization noise ratio) of $\mathbf{3 5, 0 0 0}$ MAC designs spanning each data format and several key design parameters such as the inner product size and accumulation width. We find that for the same numerical accuracy, pareto optimal MAC designs with emerging data formats (LNS16, MXINT8, VSQINT4) achieve $1.8 \times 2.2 \times$, and $1.9 \times$ TOPs/W improvement compared to FP16, FP8, and FP4 dot product implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 为了加速人工智能应用，人们提出了多种数据格式和矩阵乘法的物理实现，从而创建了复杂的设计空间。本文研究了整数、浮点、正数和对数系统 (LNS) 数据格式以及微缩放 (MX) 和矢量缩放量化 (VSQ) 块数据格式的高效 MAC 实现。我们评估了涵盖每种数据格式的 $\mathbf{3 5, 0 0 0}$ MAC 设计的面积、功率和数值精度（以信号与量化噪声比来评估）以及几个关键设计参数，例如内积大小和累积宽度。我们发现，对于相同的数值精度，与 FP16、FP8 和 FP4 点积实现相比，采用新兴数据格式（LNS16、MXINT8、VSQINT4）的帕累托最优 MAC 设计可实现 $1.8 \times 2.2 \times$ 和 $1.9 \times$ TOPs/W 改进。

items.title: PreDAC: An Efficient Framework of Pre-Refining Enhanced Design Space Exploration for Approximate Computing.
items.abstract: Approximate computing has emerged as a promising solution in energy-efficiency applications. Recently, attention has shifted from approximate components to Design Space Exploration (DSE) algorithms. However, traditional DSE algorithms face challenges in efficiently obtaining optimal solutions within large and complex design spaces. This paper introduces a prerefining enhanced design space exploration framework that provides customized design space and cost-performance formula for applications. Experimental results demonstrate that integrating this pre-refining step into various DSE algorithms leads to substantial performance gains, including up to $87 \times$ speedup and a 23% improvement in hardware overhead. Moreover, the innovative cost-performance-based DSE algorithm attains a $7.7 \times$ acceleration and further optimizes hardware metrics by an additional 8.8% compared to advanced frameworks employing the same pre-refinement.
items.abstract_zh: 近似计算已成为能源效率应用中一种有前景的解决方案。最近，注意力已经从近似组件转移到设计空间探索（DSE）算法。然而，传统的 DSE 算法面临着在大型复杂设计空间中高效获得最优解决方案的挑战。本文介绍了一种预精炼增强型设计空间探索框架，为应用程序提供定制设计空间和性价比公式。实验结果表明，将此预精炼步骤集成到各种 DSE 算法中可带来显着的性能提升，包括高达 87 美元的加速和 23% 的硬件开销改进。此外，与采用相同预优化的高级框架相比，创新的基于性价比的 DSE 算法实现了 7.7 美元的加速，并进一步优化了硬件指标 8.8%。

items.title: IntraFuzz: Coverage-Guided Intra-Enclave Fuzzing for Intel SGX Applications.
items.abstract: Intel SGX is susceptible to intra-enclave software vulnerabilities. Existing automated bug-finding methods primarily focus on fuzzing enclave boundaries for SGX applications in simulated, rather than actual hardware-protected enclaves. This limits the ability to identify potential security violations originating from within SGX application code. This paper presents IntraFuzz, the first system that enables efficient fuzzing of SGX applications inside actual hardware enclaves. We evaluated IntraFUZZ with 21 real-world SGX applications, running on Intel Xeon scalable processors with up to 256 GB of enclave page cache. IntraFuzz successfully detected all vulnerabilities in SGX application code previously identified by the state-of-the-art tool EnclaveFuzz, as well as 6 previously undiscovered vulnerabilities. These results highlight the importance of hardware-based fuzzing in securing SGX applications.
items.abstract_zh: 英特尔 SGX 容易受到飞地内软件漏洞的影响。现有的自动错误查找方法主要侧重于模糊模拟中 SGX 应用程序的飞地边界，而不是实际的受硬件保护的飞地。这限制了识别源自 SGX 应用程序代码内部的潜在安全违规的能力。本文介绍了 IntraFuzz，这是第一个能够在实际硬件飞地内对 SGX 应用程序进行高效模糊测试的系统。我们使用 21 个真实的 SGX 应用程序评估了 IntraFUZZ，这些应用程序在 Intel Xeon 可扩展处理器上运行，具有高达 256 GB 的 enclave 页缓存。 IntraFuzz 成功检测到 SGX 应用程序代码中先前由最先进的工具 EnclaveFuzz 识别的所有漏洞，以及 6 个先前未发现的漏洞。这些结果凸显了基于硬件的模糊测试在保护 SGX 应用程序安全方面的重要性。

items.title: Machine Learning-Driven STL Generation for Enhancing Functional Safety of E/E Systems.
items.abstract: The increasing complexity of safety-critical hardware systems demands advanced methods for ensuring functional safety (FuSa). Traditional techniques like ATPG and BIST are intrusive, requiring additional hardware and disrupting operations, making them unsuitable for in-field testing. To address this, for the first time, we propose a machine learning (ML)-driven automated Self-Test Library (STL) generation for seamless in-field testing during idle periods, ensuring uninterrupted fault detection and high system performance. Utilizing reinforcement learning, the STL generates design-specific test patterns, achieving up to $57.57 \%$ improvement in fault coverage and up to $85 \%$ efficiency compared to existing pattern-based testing, enhancing FuSa in mission-critical applications.
items.abstract_zh: 安全关键硬件系统日益复杂，需要先进的方法来确保功能安全 (FuSa)。 ATPG 和 BIST 等传统技术具有侵入性，需要额外的硬件并会中断操作，因此不适合现场测试。为了解决这个问题，我们首次提出了一种由机器学习 (ML) 驱动的自动自检库 (STL) 生成方法，可在空闲期间进行无缝现场测试，确保不间断的故障检测和高系统性能。利用强化学习，STL 生成特定于设计的测试模式，与现有基于模式的测试相比，故障覆盖率提高高达 $57.57 \%$，效率高达 $85 \%$，从而增强了任务关键型应用中的 FuSa。

items.title: ChipAlign: Instruction Alignment in Large Language Models for Chip Design via Geodesic Interpolation.
items.abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have expanded their application across various domains, including chip design, where domain-adapted chip models like ChipNeMo have emerged. However, these models often struggle with instruction alignment, a crucial capability for LLMs that involves following explicit human directives. This limitation impedes the practical application of chip LLMs, including serving as assistant chatbots for hardware design engineers. In this work, we introduce ChipAlign, a novel approach that utilizes a training-free model merging strategy, combining the strengths of a general instruction-aligned LLM with a chip-specific LLM. By considering the underlying manifold in the weight space, ChipAlign employs geodesic interpolation to effectively fuse the weights of input LLMs, producing a merged model that inherits strong instruction alignment and chip expertise from the respective instruction and chip LLMs. Our results demonstrate that ChipAlign significantly enhances instruction-following capabilities of existing chip LLMs, achieving up to a 26.6% improvement on the IFEval benchmark, while maintaining comparable expertise in the chip domain. This improvement in instruction alignment also translates to notable gains in instruction-involved QA tasks, delivering performance enhancements of 3.9% on the OpenROAD QA benchmark and 8.25% on production-level chip QA benchmarks, surpassing state-of-the-art baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 大语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展已将其应用扩展到各个领域，包括芯片设计，其中出现了 ChipNeMo 等适应领域的芯片模型。然而，这些模型经常难以应对指令一致性问题，而指令一致性是法学硕士的一项关键能力，涉及遵循明确的人类指令。这种限制阻碍了芯片法学硕士的实际应用，包括充当硬件设计工程师的助理聊天机器人。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ChipAlign，这是一种利用免训练模型合并策略的新颖方法，将通用指令对齐 LLM 与芯片特定 LLM 的优势结合起来。通过考虑权重空间中的底层流形，ChipAlign 采用测地线插值来有效融合输入 LLM 的权重，生成一个合并模型，该模型继承了各自指令和芯片 LLM 的强大指令对齐和芯片专业知识。我们的结果表明，ChipAlign 显着增强了现有芯片 LLM 的指令跟踪能力，在 IFEval 基准的基础上实现了高达 26.6% 的改进，同时保持了芯片领域的可比专业知识。指令对齐方面的改进还转化为指令涉及的 QA 任务的显着收益，在 OpenROAD QA 基准上实现了 3.9% 的性能增强，在生产级芯片 QA 基准上实现了 8.25% 的性能增强，超越了最先进的基准。

items.title: Mixed-Precision Quantization for Deep Vision Models with Integer Quadratic Programming.
items.abstract: Quantization is a widely used technique to compress neural networks. Assigning uniform bit-widths across all layers can result in significant accuracy degradation at low precision and inefficiency at high precision. Mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) addresses this by assigning varied bit-widths to layers, optimizing the accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Existing sensitivity-based methods for MPQ assume that quantization errors across layers are independent, which leads to suboptimal choices. We introduce CLADO, a practical sensitivity-based MPQ algorithm that captures cross-layer dependency of quantization error. CLADO approximates pairwise cross-layer errors using linear equations on a small data subset. Layerwise bit-widths are assigned by optimizing a new MPQ formulation based on cross-layer quantization errors using an Integer Quadratic Program. Experiments with CNN and vision transformer models on ImageNet demonstrate that CLADO achieves state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization performance. Code repository available here.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup><sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>https://github.com/JamesTuna/CLADOMPQ
items.abstract_zh: 量化是一种广泛使用的压缩神经网络技术。在所有层上分配统一的位宽可能会导致低精度时精度显着下降，而高精度时效率低下。混合精度量化（MPQ）通过为层分配不同的位宽来解决这个问题，优化精度与效率的权衡。现有的基于灵敏度的 MPQ 方法假设跨层的量化误差是独立的，这会导致次优选择。我们引入了 CLADO，一种实用的基于灵敏度的 MPQ 算法，可以捕获量化误差的跨层依赖性。 CLADO 在小数据子集上使用线性方程来近似成对跨层误差。通过使用整数二次规划基于跨层量化误差优化新的 MPQ 公式来分配分层位宽。在 ImageNet 上使用 CNN 和视觉转换器模型进行的实验表明，CLADO 实现了最先进的混合精度量化性能。代码存储库位于此处。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup><sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>https://github.com/JamesTuna/CLADOMPQ

items.title: FastPath: A Hybrid Approach for Efficient Hardware Security Verification.
items.abstract: Many verification methods have been proposed to detect microarchitectural information leakage in response to the surge of security breaches in hardware designs. These sophisticated efforts have gone a long way toward preventing attackers from breaking the system’s confidentiality. However, each approach has its own set of weaknesses: it may not be scalable enough, exhaustive enough, flexible enough to meet changing requirements or fit well into existing verification flows. We propose FastPath, a hybrid verification methodology that combines the efficiency of simulation with the exhaustive nature of formal verification. FastPath employs a structural analysis framework to automate the method further. Our experimental results compare FastPath to a state-of-the-art formal approach, showing a significant reduction in manual effort while achieving the same level of exhaustive confidence. We also discovered and contributed a fix for a previously unknown leak of internal operands in cv32e40s, a RISC-V processor intended for security applications.
items.abstract_zh: 为了应对硬件设计中安全漏洞的激增，人们提出了许多验证方法来检测微架构信息泄漏。这些复杂的努力在防止攻击者破坏系统机密性方面发挥了很大作用。然而，每种方法都有其自身的弱点：它可能不够可扩展、不够详尽、不够灵活，无法满足不断变化的需求或很好地适应现有的验证流程。我们提出了 FastPath，一种混合​​验证方法，它将模拟的效率与形式验证的详尽性结合起来。 FastPath 采用结构分析框架来进一步自动化该方法。我们的实验结果将 FastPath 与最先进的形式方法进行了比较，表明在达到相同水平的详尽置信度的同时，手动工作量显着减少。我们还发现并修复了 cv32e40s 中先前未知的内部操作数泄漏问题，cv32e40s 是一款用于安全应用的 RISC-V 处理器。

items.title: Centralized Training and Decentralized Control through the Actor-Critic Paradigm for Highly Optimized Multicores.
items.abstract: While distributed, neural-network-based resource controllers represent the state of the art for their ability to cope with the ever-expanding decision space, such approaches suffer from several limitations, like conflicting control decisions and partial observability. These effects can significantly impair the controllers’ learning capabilities and the stability of their control policies, causing substantial performance losses. We are the first to solve this problem employing a centralized training and decentralized control regime to mitigate the aforementioned limitations. Specifically, we design a centralized neural network (critic) that evaluates the behavior of multiple decentralized neural controllers (actors) in a system-wide context. The objective of our proposed technique is to maximize the performance under a temperature constraint through dynamic voltage frequency scaling. The evaluation of our technique shows its superiority over the state of the art, yielding average (peak) performance improvements of 20% (34%), which we consider a breakthrough as the gains are measured on a real-world platform.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然分布式、基于神经网络的资源控制器代表了其处理不断扩大的决策空间的能力的最新技术，但这种方法受到一些限制，例如冲突的控制决策和部分可观察性。这些影响会严重损害控制器的学习能力及其控制策略的稳定性，从而导致严重的性能损失。我们是第一个通过集中训练和分散控制机制来解决这个问题的人，以减轻上述限制。具体来说，我们设计了一个集中式神经网络（批评家），用于评估系统范围内多个分散式神经控制器（参与者）的行为。我们提出的技术的目标是通过动态电压频率缩放在温度限制下最大化性能。我们的技术的评估显示了它相对于最先进技术的优越性，平均（峰值）性能提高了 20% (34%)，我们认为这是一个突破，因为增益是在现实世界的平台上测量的。

items.title: Graph in the Vault: Protecting Edge GNN Inference with Trusted Execution Environment.
items.abstract: Wide deployment of machine learning models on edge devices has rendered the model intellectual property (IP) and data privacy vulnerable. We propose GNNVault, the first secure Graph Neural Network (GNN) deployment strategy based on Trusted Execution Environment (TEE). GNNVault follows the design of “partition-before-training” and includes a private GNN rectifier to complement with a public backbone model. This way, both critical GNN model parameters and the private graph used during inference are protected within secure TEE compartments. Real-world implementations with Intel SGX demonstrate that GNNVault safeguards GNN inference against state-of-the-art link stealing attacks with a negligible accuracy degradation ($\lt 2 \%$).
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在边缘设备上的广泛部署使得模型知识产权 (IP) 和数据隐私容易受到攻击。我们提出了 GNNVault，这是第一个基于可信执行环境（TEE）的安全图神经网络（GNN）部署策略。 GNNVault 遵循“训练前分区”的设计，并包含一个私有 GNN 整流器来补充公共主干模型。这样，关键的 GNN 模型参数和推理过程中使用的私有图都受到安全 TEE 隔间的保护。英特尔 SGX 的实际实施表明，GNNVault 可以保护 GNN 推理免受最先进的链接窃取攻击，且精度下降可以忽略不计 ($\lt 2 \%$)。

items.title: DeepPUFSCA: Deep learning for Physical Unclonable Function attack based on Side Channel Analysis support.
items.abstract: Physical Unclonable Function (PUF) poses a vulnerability that it could be imitated by machine learning attacks and side channel attacks, which break its physical uniqueness and unpredictable characteristic. Hence, many works are concerned with enhancing PUF design by introducing more nonlinear modules inside to differentiate approximating PUF behavior from the attacker side. However, the safety of these PUFs are still an open area and need to be verified. In this paper, we propose DeepPUFSCA, which is a deep learning-based model that uniquely combines both challenge and side-channel information features during training to attack PUF. To gather the data, we conduct a design of an arbiter PUF on FPGA and measure its power consumption. Our intensive experiments on this dataset demonstrate that DeepPUFSCA outperforms other machine learning-based methods in terms of attacking accuracy, even the novel ensemble algorithms. Moreover, we also show that combined side channel information boosts the model performance compared to attacking with challenge-response only.
items.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆函数（PUF）存在可被机器学习攻击和侧通道攻击模仿的漏洞，破坏了其物理唯一性和不可预测性。因此，许多工作都关注通过在内部引入更多非线性模块来增强 PUF 设计，以区分攻击者方的近似 PUF 行为。然而，这些PUF的安全性仍然是一个开放领域，需要验证。在本文中，我们提出了 DeepPUFSCA，这是一种基于深度学习的模型，在攻击 PUF 的训练过程中独特地结合了挑战和旁道信息特征。为了收集数据，我们在 FPGA 上设计了仲裁器 PUF，并测量了其功耗。我们对该数据集的深入实验表明，DeepPUFSCA 在攻击准确性方面优于其他基于机器学习的方法，甚至优于新颖的集成算法。此外，我们还表明，与仅使用挑战响应进行攻击相比，组合的侧信道信息可以提高模型性能。

items.title: DuQTTA: Dual Quantized Tensor-Train Adaptation with Decoupling Magnitude-Direction for Efficient Fine-Tuning of LLMs.
items.abstract: Recent parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques have enabled large language models (LLMs) to be efficiently fine-tuned for specific tasks, while maintaining model performance with minimal additional trainable parameters. However, existing PEFT techniques continue to face challenges in balancing both accuracy and efficiency, especially when addressing scalability and the demands of lightweight deployment for LLMs. In this paper, we propose an efficient fine-tuning method of LLMs based on dual quantized Tensor-Train adaptation with decoupling magnitude-direction (DuQTTA). The proposed DuQTTA method employs Tensor-Train decomposition and dual-stage quantization to minimize model size and resource consumption. Additionally, it employs an adaptive optimization strategy and a decoupled update mechanism to improve model performance, thereby minimizing suboptimal outcomes and ensuring alignment with the full-parameter fine-tuning goals. Experimental results indicate that the proposed DuQTTA method outperforms existing PEFT methods, achieving up to a $65 \times$ compression rate compared to the LLaMA2-7B models, meanwhile delivering improvements of $4.44 \%, 3.14 \%$, and 0.97% over LoRA on LLaMA2-7B, LLaMA3-8B, and LLaMA2-13B, respectively. The proposed DuQTTA method is effective in compressing LLMs for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的参数高效微调（PEFT）技术使得大型语言模型（LLM）能够针对特定任务进行高效微调，同时以最少的额外可训练参数保持模型性能。然而，现有的 PEFT 技术在平衡准确性和效率方面继续面临挑战，特别是在解决可扩展性和法学硕士轻量级部署的需求时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于双量化张量训练自适应与幅度方向解耦（DuQTTA）的 LLM 高效微调方法。所提出的 DuQTTA 方法采用 Tensor-Train 分解和双级量化来最小化模型大小和资源消耗。此外，它采用自适应优化策略和解耦更新机制来提高模型性能，从而最大限度地减少次优结果并确保与全参数微调目标保持一致。实验结果表明，所提出的 DuQTTA 方法优于现有的 PEFT 方法，与 LLaMA2-7B 模型相比，压缩率高达 $65 \times$，同时在 LLaMA2-7B、LLaMA3-8B 和 LLaMA2-13B 上分别比 LoRA 提高了 $4.44 \%、3.14 \%$ 和 0.97%。所提出的 DuQTTA 方法可以有效地压缩 LLM 以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。

items.title: 3D-CIMlet: A Chiplet Co-Design Framework for Heterogeneous In-Memory Acceleration of Edge LLM Inference and Continual Learning.
items.abstract: The design space for edge AI hardware supporting large language model (LLM) inference and continual learning is underexplored. We present 3D-CIMlet, a thermal-aware modeling and co-design framework for 2.5D/3D edge-LLM engines exploiting heterogeneous computing-in-memory (CIM) chiplets, adaptable for both inference and continual learning. We develop memory-reliability-aware chiplet mapping strategies for a case study of edge LLM system integrating RRAM, capacitor-less eDRAM, and hybrid chiplets in mixed technology nodes. Compared to 2 D baselines, $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ designs improve energy efficiency by up to 9.3 x and 12 x, with up to 90.2% and 92.5% energy-delay product (EDP) reduction respectively, on edge LLM continual learning.
items.abstract_zh: 支持大语言模型 (LLM) 推理和持续学习的边缘人工智能硬件的设计空间尚未得到充分探索。我们推出了 3D-CIMlet，这是一种热感知建模和协同设计框架，适用于利用异构内存计算 (CIM) 小芯片的 2.5D/3D 边缘 LLM 引擎，适用于推理和持续学习。我们开发了内存可靠性感知芯片映射策略，用于在混合技术节点中集成 RRAM、无电容器 eDRAM 和混合芯片的边缘 LLM 系统案例研究。与 2 D 基线相比，$2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ 设计在边缘 LLM 持续学习下，能效分别提高了 9.3 倍和 12 倍，能量延迟积 (EDP) 分别降低了 90.2% 和 92.5%。

items.title: Towards Training Robustness Against Dynamic Errors in Quantum Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Quantum machine learning, crucial in the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, confronts challenges in error mitigation. Current noise-aware training (NAT) methods often assume static error rates in quantum neural networks (QNNs), overlooking the dynamic nature of quantum noise. Our work highlights how error rates fluctuate over time and across different qubits, affecting QNN performance even when overall error rates are similar. We introduce a novel NAT strategy that dynamically adjusts to standard and fatal error conditions, incorporating a low-complexity search method to identify fatal errors during optimization. This strategy significantly improves robustness, maintaining competitive performance with leading NAT methods across varying error scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习在嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）时代至关重要，但它面临着减轻错误的挑战。当前的噪声感知训练（NAT）方法通常假设量子神经网络（QNN）中的静态错误率，忽略了量子噪声的动态性质。我们的工作强调了错误率如何随着时间和不同量子位的波动而波动，即使总体错误率相似，也会影响 QNN 性能。我们引入了一种新颖的 NAT 策略，可以动态调整标准和致命错误条件，并结合低复杂度搜索方法来识别优化过程中的致命错误。该策略显着提高了稳健性，在不同的错误场景中通过领先的 NAT 方法保持具有竞争力的性能。

items.title: Holistic Design towards Resource-Stringent Binary Vector Symbolic Architecture.
items.abstract: Classification tasks on ultra-lightweight devices demand devices that are resource-constrained and deliver swift responses. Binary Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) is a promising approach due to its minimal memory requirements and fast execution times compared to traditional machine learning (ML) methods. Nonetheless, binary VSA’s practicality is limited by its inferior inference performance and a design that prioritizes algorithmic over hardware optimization. This paper introduces UniVSA, a co-optimized binary VSA framework for both algorithm and hardware. UniVSA not only significantly enhances inference accuracy beyond current state-of-the-art binary VSA models but also reduces memory footprints. It incorporates novel, lightweight modules and design flow tailored for optimal hardware performance. Experimental results show that UniVSA surpasses traditional ML methods in terms of performance on resource-limited devices, achieving smaller memory usage, lower latency, reduced resource demand, and decreased power consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 超轻量级设备上的分类任务需要资源有限且能够快速响应的设备。与传统机器学习 (ML) 方法相比，二进制向量符号架构 (VSA) 具有最小的内存需求和较快的执行时间，因此是一种很有前景的方法。尽管如此，二进制 VSA 的实用性受到其较差的推理性能和优先考虑算法而非硬件优化的设计的限制。本文介绍了 UniVSA，一种算法和硬件协同优化的二进制 VSA 框架。 UniVSA 不仅显着提高了推理精度，超越了当前最先进的二进制 VSA 模型，而且还减少了内存占用。它采用了新颖、轻量级的模块和专为最佳硬件性能而定制的设计流程。实验结果表明，UniVSA 在资源有限设备上的性能超越了传统的 ML 方法，实现了更小的内存占用、更低的延迟、更少的资源需求和更低的功耗。

items.title: An Energy-Efficient Kalman Filter Architecture with Tunable Accuracy for Brain-Computer Interfaces.
items.abstract: Kalman Filter (KF) is the most prominent algorithm to predict motion from measurements of brain activity. However, little effort has been made to specialize KF hardware for the unique requirements of embedded brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). For this reason, we present the first configurable KF hardware architecture that enables fine-grained tuning of latency and accuracy, thereby facilitating specialization for neural data processing in BCI applications and supporting design-space exploration. Based on our architecture, we design KF hardware accelerators and integrate them into a heterogeneous system-on-chip (SoC). Through FPGA-based experiments, we demonstrate an energy-efficiency improvement of $15.3 x$ and $10^{3} x$ better accuracy compared to state-of-the-art implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 是根据大脑活动测量来预测运动的最著名的算法。然而，在专门化 KF 硬件来满足嵌入式脑机接口 (BCI) 的独特要求方面却做得很少。因此，我们提出了第一个可配置的 KF 硬件架构，该架构能够对延迟和准确性进行细粒度调整，从而促进 BCI 应用中神经数据处理的专业化并支持设计空间探索。基于我们的架构，我们设计了 KF 硬件加速器并将其集成到异构片上系统 (SoC) 中。通过基于 FPGA 的实验，我们证明与最先进的实现相比，能效提高了 15.3 x$，精度提高了 10^{3} x$。

items.title: VISTA: Optimizing GPU Scheduling through Versatile Locality-Aware Data Sharing.
items.abstract: Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) play a pivotal role in high-performance computing by utilizing the massive parallelism of concurrent thread execution to enhance processing efficiency, known as thread-level parallelism (TLP). However, effectively managing the significant memory access generated by a large number of concurrent threads presents a significant challenge, affecting both performance and energy consumption. However, previous GPU scheduling methods often overlook the significant potential of data sharing among non-adjacent warps or Cooperative Thread Arrays (CTAs), thereby limiting their effectiveness in reducing unnecessary memory accesses through supporting data sharing. Our observation underscores the untapped potential of non-adjacent data sharing, motivating our work to optimize schedules more effectively. In this paper, we present VISTA, a smart locality-aware GPU scheduler that dynamically identifies data locality patterns at both the CTA and warp levels, leveraging this runtime information to make intelligent scheduling decisions and improving memory efficiency and overall performance. VISTA significantly reduces unnecessary memory accesses. Simulation results show a 48.1% improvement in performance and a 51.8% reduction in energy consumption for memory-intensive GPGPU applications, compared to the baseline, with negligible hardware overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 通过利用并发线程执行的大规模并行性来提高处理效率（称为线程级并行性 (TLP)），在高性能计算中发挥着关键作用。然而，有效管理大量并发线程生成的大量内存访问是一项重大挑战，会影响性能和能耗。然而，以前的 GPU 调度方法经常忽视非相邻线程束或协作线程阵列 (CTA) 之间数据共享的巨大潜力，从而限制了它们通过支持数据共享来减少不必要的内存访问的有效性。我们的观察强调了非相邻数据共享的未开发潜力，激励我们更有效地优化时间表。在本文中，我们介绍了 VISTA，这是一种智能局部性感知 GPU 调度程序，可动态识别 CTA 和扭曲级别的数据局部性模式，利用此运行时信息做出智能调度决策并提高内存效率和整体性能。 VISTA 显着减少了不必要的内存访问。仿真结果显示，与基准相比，内存密集型 GPGPU 应用程序的性能提高了 48.1%，能耗降低了 51.8%，而硬件开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: SQ-DM: Accelerating Diffusion Models with Aggressive Quantization and Temporal Sparsity.
items.abstract: Diffusion models have gained significant popularity in image generation tasks. However, generating high-quality content remains notably slow because it requires running model inference over many time steps. To accelerate these models, we propose to aggressively quantize both weights and activations, while simultaneously promoting significant activation sparsity. We further observe that the stated sparsity pattern varies among different channels and evolves across time steps. To support this quantization and sparsity scheme, we present a novel diffusion model accelerator featuring a heterogeneous mixed-precision dense-sparse architecture, channel-last address mapping, and a time-step-aware sparsity detector for efficient handling of the sparsity pattern. Our 4-bit quantization technique demonstrates superior generation quality compared to existing $\mathbf{4}$-bit methods. Our custom accelerator achieves $6.91 \times$ speed-up and 51.5% energy reduction compared to traditional dense accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散模型在图像生成任务中非常受欢迎。然而，生成高质量内容仍然非常缓慢，因为它需要在多个时间步上运行模型推理。为了加速这些模型，我们建议积极量化权重和激活，同时促进显着的激活稀疏性。我们进一步观察到，所述稀疏模式在不同通道之间有所不同，并且随着时间步长的变化而变化。为了支持这种量化和稀疏方案，我们提出了一种新颖的扩散模型加速器，具有异构混合精度密集稀疏架构、通道最后地址映射和时间步感知稀疏检测器，用于有效处理稀疏模式。与现有的 $\mathbf{4}$ 位方法相比，我们的 4 位量化技术展现了卓越的生成质量。与传统密集加速器相比，我们的定制加速器实现了 6.91 美元的加速和 51.5% 的能耗降低。

items.title: NetTAG: A Multimodal RTL-and-Layout-Aligned Netlist Foundation Model via Text-Attributed Graph.
items.abstract: Circuit representation learning has shown promise in advancing Electronic Design Automation (EDA) by capturing structural and functional circuit properties for various tasks. Existing pre-trained solutions rely on graph learning with complex functional supervision, such as truth table simulation. However, they only handle simple andinverter graphs (AIGs), struggling to fully encode other complex gate functionalities. While large language models (LLMs) excel at functional understanding, they lack the structural awareness for flattened netlists. To advance netlist representation learning, we present NetTAG, a netlist foundation model that fuses gate semantics with graph structure, handling diverse gate types and supporting a variety of functional and physical tasks. Moving beyond existing graph-only methods, NetTAG formulates netlists as text-attributed graphs, with gates annotated by symbolic logic expressions and physical characteristics as text attributes. Its multimodal architecture combines an LLM-based text encoder for gate semantics and a graph transformer for global structure. Pre-trained with gate and graph self-supervised objectives and aligned with RTL and layout stages, NetTAG captures comprehensive circuit intrinsics. Experimental results show that NetTAG consistently outperforms each task-specific method on four largely different functional and physical tasks and surpasses state-of-the-art AIG encoders, demonstrating its versatility.
items.abstract_zh: 电路表示学习通过捕获各种任务的结构和功能电路属性，在推进电子设计自动化 (EDA) 方面显示出了前景。现有的预训练解决方案依赖于具有复杂功能监督的图学习，例如真值表模拟。然而，它们只处理简单的反相图（AIG），难以完全编码其他复杂的门功能。虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 擅长功能理解，但它们缺乏扁平化网表的结构意识。为了推进网表表示学习，我们提出了 NetTAG，这是一种网表基础模型，它将门语义与图形结构融合在一起，处理不同的门类型并支持各种功能和物理任务。 NetTAG 超越了现有的纯图方法，将网表制定为文本属性图，其中门由符号逻辑表达式注释，物理特性作为文本属性。其多模态架构结合了用于门语义的基于 LLM 的文本编码器和用于全局结构的图转换器。 NetTAG 通过门和图形自监督目标进行预训练，并与 RTL 和布局阶段保持一致，可捕获全面的电路内在特性。实验结果表明，NetTAG 在四种截然不同的功能和物理任务上始终优于每种特定任务的方法，并超越了最先进的 AIG 编码器，展示了其多功能性。

items.title: Invited paper: Enhancing Design Automation with Quantum Algorithms for Chip Design.
authors: João Marcus Epifânio Morais de Assunção
items.abstract: The design of resource-efficient chips has become a critical priority for the semiconductor industry. A key challenge in this process is the placement of cells on the chip’s physical layout to optimize performance and manufacturability. The present work proposes a novel optimization strategy to determine cell placements that minimize the Half-Perimeter Wire Length (HPWL), a metric strongly correlated with chip area and power consumption. The presented approach is designed for flexibility, enabling integration with diverse optimization methods, and demonstrates implementations using both a custom Simulated Annealing (SA) algorithm and a D-Wave Constrained Quadratic Model (CQM) solver. The resulting placements were validated through integration with the OpenROAD flow, bridging the gap between classical, quantum, and hybrid optimization algorithms and industry standard tools for chip design and routing with a real-world case using the ASAP7 7nm PDK. Preliminary results indicate that the proposed approach provides better area usage and considerable speedup / performance improvement showing a path towards the usage of quantum computer for chip design EDA workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 资源高效型芯片的设计已成为半导体行业的首要任务。此过程中的一个关键挑战是在芯片的物理布局上放置单元以优化性能和可制造性。目前的工作提出了一种新颖的优化策略来确定单元布局，从而最大限度地减少半周线长度（HPWL），这是与芯片面积和功耗密切相关的指标。所提出的方法旨在实现灵活性，能够与多种优化方法集成，并演示使用自定义模拟退火 (SA) 算法和 D-Wave 约束二次模型 (CQM) 求解器的实现。最终的布局通过与 OpenROAD 流程集成进行了验证，弥合了经典、量子和混合优化算法与用于芯片设计和布线的行业标准工具与使用 ASAP7 7nm PDK 的实际案例之间的差距。初步结果表明，所提出的方法提供了更好的面积利用率和相当大的加速/性能改进，展示了使用量子计算机进行芯片设计 EDA 工作负载的路径。

items.title: High-Performance Computing Architecture Exploration with Stage-Enhanced Bayesian Optimization.
items.abstract: The emergence of new applications in high-performance computing is driving the need for more efficient computing machines. As supercomputer architectures become increasingly complex, the combinatorial explosion of design spaces and the time-consuming nature of design simulations lead to challenging design space exploration problems. This work introduces an automated search framework to achieve power-performance-area efficient Arm Neoverse V1 processor designs. Based on multi-objective Bayesian optimization, we propose a new exploration algorithm named SEBO by enhancing the three main stages of the optimization. Experimental results show that SEBO can not only compete with the top state-of-the-art baseline algorithms, but also outperforms them in terms of the quality and diversity of the returned Pareto-optimal designs.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算领域新应用的出现推动了对更高效计算机器的需求。随着超级计算机架构变得越来越复杂，设计空间的组合爆炸和设计模拟的耗时性质导致了具有挑战性的设计空间探索问题。这项工作引入了一个自动搜索框架，以实现功耗性能面积高效的 Arm Neoverse V1 处理器设计。基于多目标贝叶斯优化，我们通过增强优化的三个主要阶段，提出了一种名为SEBO的新探索算法。实验结果表明，SEBO 不仅可以与最先进的基线算法竞争，而且在返回的帕累托最优设计的质量和多样性方面也优于它们。

items.title: ReSMiPS: A ReRAM-based Sparse Mixed-precision Solver with Fast Matrix Reordering Algorithm.
items.abstract: The solution of sparse matrix equations is essential in scientific computing. However, traditional solvers on digital computing platforms are limited by memory bottlenecks in largescale sparse matrix storage and computation. Resistive Random Access Memory (ReRAM)-based computing-in-memory (CIM) offers a promising solution to this challenge but faces constraints in achieving high solution precision and energy efficiency simultaneously in sparse matrix computations. In this work, we propose ReSMiPS, a ReRAM-accelerated sparse mixed-precision solver. ReSMiPS incorporates a novel Fast Sparse Matrix Reordering (FSMR) algorithm and introduces an In-memory float64 (IF64) data format, enabling efficient floating-point sparse matrix computation directly within the analog ReRAM array. By combining our floating-point CIM macro design with a hybrid-domain solution framework, ReSMiPS achieves precision comparable to CPU and GPU-based BiCGSTAB solvers (with errors below $10^{-15}$) on real-world workloads, while demonstrating over two orders of magnitude improvement in both computational speed and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵方程的求解在科学计算中至关重要。然而，数字计算平台上的传统求解器在大规模稀疏矩阵存储和计算中受到内存瓶颈的限制。基于电阻随机存取存储器 (ReRAM) 的内存计算 (CIM) 为这一挑战提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但在稀疏矩阵计算中同时实现高求解精度和能源效率方面面临着限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ReSMiPS，一种 ReRAM 加速的稀疏混合精度求解器。 ReSMiPS 结合了新颖的快速稀疏矩阵重新排序 (FSMR) 算法，并引入了内存中 float64 (IF64) 数据格式，可直接在模拟 ReRAM 阵列中实现高效的浮点稀疏矩阵计算。通过将我们的浮点 CIM 宏设计与混合域解决方案框架相结合，ReSMiPS 在实际工作负载上实现了与基于 CPU 和 GPU 的 BiCGSTAB 求解器相当的精度（误差低于 10^{-15}$），同时在计算速度和能源效率方面实现了两个数量级以上的改进。

items.title: UniCoS: A Unified Neural and Accelerator Co-Search Framework for CNNs and ViTs.
items.abstract: Current algorithm-hardware co-search works often suffer from lengthy training times and inadequate exploration of hardware design spaces, leading to suboptimal performance. This work introduces UniCoS, a unified framework for co-optimizing neural networks and accelerators for CNNs and Vision Transformers (ViTs). By introducing a novel training-free proxy that evaluates accuracy within seconds and a clustering-based algorithm for exploring heterogeneous dataflows, UniCoS efficiently navigates the design spaces of both architectures. Experimental results demonstrate that the solutions generated by UniCoS consistently surpass state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods (e.g., $3.54 \times$ energy-delay product (EDP) improvement with a $1.76 \%$ higher accuracy on ImageNet) while requiring notably reduced search time (up to $48 \times, \sim 3$ hours). The code is available at https://github.com/mine7777/Unicos.git.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的算法-硬件协同搜索工作经常受到训练时间过长和对硬件设计空间探索不足的困扰，从而导致性能不佳。这项工作介绍了 UniCoS，这是一个用于协同优化神经网络以及 CNN 和 Vision Transformers (ViT) 加速器的统一框架。通过引入一种新颖的免训练代理（可在几秒钟内评估准确性）和基于集群的算法来探索异构数据流，UniCoS 可以有效地导航两种架构的设计空间。实验结果表明，UniCoS 生成的解决方案始终超越最先进的 (SOTA) 方法（例如，在 ImageNet 上，能量延迟乘积 (EDP) 改进了 3.54 美元 \times$，精度提高了 1.76 \%$ 美元），同时需要显着减少搜索时间（高达 48 美元 \times，\sim 3$ 小时）。代码可在 https://github.com/mine7777/Unicos.git 获取。

items.title: PairGraph: An Efficient Search-space-aware Accelerator for High-performance Concurrent Pairwise Queries.
items.abstract: Pairwise queries have been widely used in many applications. Although several approaches have been recently proposed to accelerate a single query, they still suffer from irregular memory access and fragmented data sharing when processing Concurrent Pairwise Queries (CPQ) because of the poor temporal and spatial locality of traversal overlaps (i.e., graph structure data traversed by several queries). To address these challenges, this paper presents an accelerator named PairGraph to effectively support CPQ based on a novel Search-spaceaware Processing Model (SPM). The key insight is the strong similarity of queries’ search spaces, which are primarily concentrated on the graph topology between source and destination vertices. Consequently, our approach identifies the graph structure data traversed by most of the queries according to the graph topology between multiple pairs of vertices, and then fully reuses the data worth sharing to reduce off-chip communications. The experimental results indicate that PairGraph gains speedups of $5.59 \times \sim 14.25 \times$ and $3.76 \times \sim 7.58 \times$ compared with the state-of-the-art CPU-based system Gemini and the GPU-based system Gunrock, respectively. Compared with three cutting-edge accelerators, i.e., LCCG, ScalaGraph, and ReGraph, it gains speedups of $1.67 \times \sim 2.72 \times$, $1.93 \times \sim 4.26 \times$, and $2.66 \times \sim 4.28 \times$, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 成对查询已广泛应用于许多应用程序中。尽管最近提出了几种加速单个查询的方法，但在处理并发成对查询（CPQ）时，由于遍历重叠（即多个查询遍历的图结构数据）的时空局部性较差，它们仍然面临着不规则的内存访问和碎片数据共享的问题。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种名为 PairGraph 的加速器，以基于新颖的搜索空间感知处理模型（SPM）有效支持 CPQ。关键的见解是查询搜索空间的强烈相似性，这些空间主要集中在源顶点和目标顶点之间的图拓扑上。因此，我们的方法根据多对顶点之间的图拓扑来识别大多数查询遍历的图结构数据，然后充分重用值得共享的数据以减少片外通信。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于 CPU 的系统 Gemini 和基于 GPU 的系统 Gunrock 相比，PairGraph 分别获得了 $5.59 \times \sim 14.25 \times$ 和 $3.76 \times \sim 7.58 \times$ 的加速。与LCCG、ScalaGraph和ReGraph这三种前沿加速器相比，其加速分别为$1.67 \times \sim 2.72 \times$、$1.93 \times \sim 4.26 \times$和$2.66 \times \sim 4.28 \times$。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Hybrid Logic Optimization with Predictive Self-Supervision.
items.abstract: Hybrid optimization is an emerging approach in logic synthesis, focusing on applying diverse optimization methods to different parts of a logic circuit. This paper analyzes the relationship between each vertex and its corresponding optimization method. We extract a subgraph centered on each vertex and quantify the logic optimization results of these subgraphs as vertex features. Based on these features, we propose a circuit partitioning method to cluster the logic circuit, enabling the final optimized circuit to be constructed by merging clusters optimized with their respective methods. Additionally, we introduce a self-supervised prediction model to efficiently obtain vertex features. The experimental results targeting LUT mapping demonstrate that our method achieves improvements of $8.48 \%$ in area and 9.81% in delay compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 混合优化是逻辑综合中的一种新兴方法，侧重于将多种优化方法应用于逻辑电路的不同部分。本文分析了各个顶点之间的关系及其相应的优化方法。我们提取以每个顶点为中心的子图，并将这些子图的逻辑优化结果量化为顶点特征。基于这些特征，我们提出了一种电路划分方法来对逻辑电路进行聚类，从而能够通过合并用各自的方法优化的簇来构建最终的优化电路。此外，我们引入了自监督预测模型来有效地获取顶点特征。针对 LUT 映射的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在面积上实现了 $8.48 \%$ 的改进，在延迟上实现了 9.81% 的改进。

items.title: CND-IDS: Continual Novelty Detection for Intrusion Detection Systems.
items.abstract: Intrusion detection systems (IDS) play a crucial role in IoT and network security by monitoring system data and alerting to suspicious activities. Machine learning (ML) has emerged as a promising solution for IDS, offering highly accurate intrusion detection. However, ML-IDS solutions often overlook two critical aspects needed to build reliable systems: continually changing data streams and a lack of attack labels. Streaming network traffic and associated cyber attacks are continually changing, which can degrade the performance of deployed ML models. Labeling attack data, such as zero-day attacks, in real-world intrusion scenarios may not be feasible, making the use of ML solutions that do not rely on attack labels necessary. To address both these challenges, we propose CND-IDS, a continual novelty detection IDS framework which consists of (i) a learning-based feature extractor that continuously updates new feature representations of the system data, and (ii) a novelty detector that identifies new cyber attacks by leveraging principal component analysis (PCA) reconstruction. Our results on realistic intrusion datasets show that CND-IDS achieves up to $6.1 \times$ F-score improvement, and up to $6.5 \times$ improved forward transfer over the SOTA unsupervised continual learning algorithm. Our code is available at https://github.com/Sean-Fuhrman/CND-IDS.
items.abstract_zh: 入侵检测系统 (IDS) 通过监控系统数据并对可疑活动发出警报，在物联网和网络安全中发挥着至关重要的作用。机器学习 (ML) 已成为一种很有前景的 IDS 解决方案，可提供高度准确的入侵检测。然而，ML-IDS 解决方案常常忽视构建可靠系统所需的两个关键方面：不断变化的数据流和缺乏攻击标签。流网络流量和相关的网络攻击不断变化，这可能会降低已部署的机器学习模型的性能。在现实世界的入侵场景中，标记攻击数据（例如零日攻击）可能并不可行，因此有必要使用不依赖攻击标签的机器学习解决方案。为了应对这两个挑战，我们提出了 CND-IDS，这是一种持续新颖性检测 IDS 框架，它由 (i) 一个基于学习的特征提取器，不断更新系统数据的新特征表示，以及 (ii) 一个新颖性检测器，通过利用主成分分析 (PCA) 重建来识别新的网络攻击。我们在真实入侵数据集上的结果表明，与 SOTA 无监督持续学习算法相比，CND-IDS 的 F 分数提高了高达 6.1 美元，前向传输提高了 6.5 美元。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Sean-Fuhrman/CND-IDS 获取。

items.title: EVA: An Efficient and Versatile Generative Engine for Targeted Discovery of Novel Analog Circuits.
items.abstract: Analog circuit design has traditionally depended on manual expertise, slowing the discovery of novel topologies essential for advanced technologies like AI, $5 \mathrm{G} / 6 \mathrm{G}$, and quantum computing. While AI-driven methods have accelerated hardware design workflows, most of them focus on topology synthesis, often reusing known structures to achieve specific goals. The challenge of discovering entirely new, high-performance topologies remains largely underexplored due to its abstract nature. In this work, we introduce EVA, an efficient and versatile generative engine for discovering novel analog circuit topologies. EVA employs a bottom-up generation framework, using a decoder-only transformer to sequentially predict device pin connections and create diverse circuits from scratch. Pretraining on unlabeled circuit topologies builds foundational knowledge about circuit connectivity, achieving baseline discovery efficiency by generating valid circuits and reducing performance-labeled samples needed in fine-tuning. For targeted discovery of highperformance designs, EVA leverages two fine-tuning strate-gies-proximal policy optimization (PPO) and direct preference optimization (DPO)-to further enhance discovery efficiency for relevant, high-performing topologies. Experimental results across various circuit types highlight EVA’s strengths in validity, novelty, versatility, and both training sample and discovery efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 传统上，模拟电路设计依赖于手工专业知识，从而减缓了人工智能、$5 \mathrm{G} / 6 \mathrm{G}$ 和量子计算等先进技术所必需的新颖拓扑的发现速度。虽然人工智能驱动的方法加速了硬件设计工作流程，但大多数都侧重于拓扑综合，通常重用已知结构来实现特定目标。由于其抽象性质，发现全新的高性能拓扑的挑战在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 EVA，一种高效且多功能的生成引擎，用于发现新颖的模拟电路拓扑。 EVA 采用自下而上的生成框架，使用仅解码器的变压器来顺序预测器件引脚连接并从头开始创建不同的电路。对未标记的电路拓扑进行预训练可以构建有关电路连接的基础知识，通过生成有效电路并减少微调所需的性能标记样本来实现基线发现效率。为了有针对性地发现高性能设计，EVA 利用两种微调策略——邻近策略优化 (PPO) 和直接偏好优化 (DPO)——进一步提高相关高性能拓扑的发现效率。各种电路类型的实验结果凸显了 EVA 在有效性、新颖性、多功能性以及训练样本和发现效率方面的优势。

items.title: Power-Constrained Printed Neuromorphic Hardware Training.
items.abstract: With the rising demand for ultra-low-cost and flexible electronics in applications like smart packaging and wearable health monitoring, printed electronics provide an affordable, adaptable, and customizable alternative to conventional silicon. However, these systems often rely on printed batteries or energy harvesters with limited power capacity, making strict power budgets critical. Printed neuromorphic circuits (pNCs) are promising for their analog signal processing, reduced circuit complexity, and energy efficiency in low-power environments. Nonetheless, maintaining robust performance under strict power constraints remains challenging, necessitating advanced optimization techniques. In this work, we propose an augmented Lagrangian approach to enforce task-specific power constraints in pNCs, validated across 13 benchmark datasets. Our method preserves accuracy within strict power budgets while achieving Pareto-optimal power-accuracy trade-offs in a single training run. In contrast, the penalty-based method, which serves as the baseline, requires up to 150 runs per dataset to generate the Pareto front. For low-power scenarios ($\approx 20 \%$ of the original power), our method demonstrates a $52 \times$ improvement in accuracy-to-power ratio over the baseline. At higher power budgets $(\approx 80 \%$ of the original power), it achieves a $59 \times$ improvement, maintaining competitive performance. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves $\mathbf{8 1. 8 2 \%}$ accuracy with p-tanh activation function (AF) at high power budgets and excels with p-Clipped_ReLU AF under low power constraints. This highlights the computational efficiency and effectiveness of our approach for power-constrained circuit design.
items.abstract_zh: 随着智能包装和可穿戴健康监测等应用对超低成本和柔性电子产品的需求不断增长，印刷电子产品为传统硅提供了一种经济实惠、适应性强且可定制的替代品。然而，这些系统通常依赖于功率容量有限的印刷电池或能量采集器，因此严格的功率预算至关重要。印刷神经形态电路 (pNC) 因其模拟信号处理、降低电路复杂性以及低功耗环境中的能源效率而前景广阔。尽管如此，在严格的功耗限制下保持稳健的性能仍然具有挑战性，需要先进的优化技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种增强拉格朗日方法来强制 pNC 中特定于任务的功率约束，并在 13 个基准数据集上进行了验证。我们的方法在严格的功率预算内保持准确性，同时在单次训练运行中实现帕累托最优功率精度权衡。相比之下，作为基线的基于惩罚的方法需要每个数据集最多运行 150 次才能生成帕累托前沿。对于低功耗场景（原始功率的 $\大约 20 \%$），我们的方法显示精度与功率比比基线提高了 $52 \times$。在较高的功率预算 $（原始功率的约 80 \%$）下，它实现了 $59 \times$ 的改进，保持了具有竞争力的性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法在高功率预算下使用 p-tanh 激活函数 (AF) 实现了 $\mathbf{8 1. 8 2 \%}$ 精度，并且在低功率约束下使用 p-Clipped_ReLU AF 表现出色。这凸显了我们的功率受限电路设计方法的计算效率和有效性。

items.title: ParGNN: A Scalable Graph Neural Network Training Framework on multi-GPUs.
items.abstract: Full-batch Graph Neural Network (GNN) training is indispensable for interdisciplinary applications. Although fullbatch training has advantages in convergence accuracy and speed, it still faces challenges such as severe load imbalance and high communication traffic overhead. In order to address these challenges, we propose ParGNN, an efficient full-batch training system for GNNs, which adopts a profiler-guided adaptive load balancing method along with graph over-partition to alleviate load imbalance. Based on the over-partition results, we present a subgraph pipeline algorithm to overlap communication and computation while maintaining the accuracy of GNN training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ParGNN can not only obtain the highest accuracy but also reach the preset accuracy in the shortest time. In the end-to-end experiments performed on the four datasets, ParGNN outperforms the two state-of-theart full-batch GNN systems, PipeGCN and DGL, achieving the highest speedup of $2.7 \times$ and $21.8 \times$ times respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 全批量图神经网络（GNN）训练对于跨学科应用是必不可少的。虽然fullbatch训练在收敛精度和速度上具有优势，但仍然面临负载不平衡严重、通信流量开销高等挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 ParGNN，一种高效的 GNN 全批量训练系统，它采用分析器引导的自适应负载平衡方法以及图过度分区来缓解负载不平衡。基于过度划分的结果，我们提出了一种子图管道算法来重叠通信和计算，同时保持 GNN 训练的准确性。大量的实验表明，ParGNN不仅可以获得最高的精度，而且可以在最短的时间内达到预设的精度。在四个数据集上进行的端到端实验中，ParGNN 的性能优于两个最先进的全批量 GNN 系统 PipeGCN 和 DGL，分别实现了最高加速 2.7 倍和 21.8 倍。

items.title: MemSeer: Leverage Memory Failure Distinctions and Multi-Grained Prediction in Ultra-Scale Heterogeneous X86/ARM Clusters.
items.abstract: In high-performance ultra-scale cloud computing, heterogeneous clusters consisting of x86 and ARM architecture platforms have become increasingly common to boost performance and energy efficiency. Ensuring high availability in these environments is crucial for meeting service-level agreements. However, DRAM failures, a primary cause of server downtimes, present significant challenges to reliability, availability, and serviceability. This paper provides an in-depth analysis of memory failure characteristics across cross-architecture platforms in large-scale heterogeneous clusters. We introduce MemSeer, an AIOps-integrated tool that utilizes a multi-grained memory failure prediction approach for x86/ARM heterogeneous clusters. MemSeer improves the F1-score by 17.3% and increases recall by an average of $27 \%$ across different lead times compared to state-of-the-art methods. These advancements show great promise in reducing memory failures in cluster environments, decreasing VM interruptions by up to 42.7% and averaging 24.2% in real-world implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 在高性能超大规模云计算中，由x86和ARM架构平台组成的异构集群越来越普遍，以提高性能和能源效率。确保这些环境中的高可用性对于满足服务级别协议至关重要。然而，DRAM 故障是服务器停机的主要原因，对可靠性、可用性和可维护性提出了重大挑战。本文深入分析了大规模异构集群中跨架构平台的内存故障特征。我们推出 MemSeer，这是一款 AIOps 集成工具，它利用 x86/ARM 异构集群的多粒度内存故障预测方法。与最先进的方法相比，MemSeer 在不同的交付周期内将 F1 分数提高了 17.3%，召回率平均提高了 27 $%$。这些进步在减少集群环境中的内存故障方面展现了巨大的前景，将虚拟机中断减少高达 42.7%，在实际实施中平均减少 24.2%。

items.title: VersaSlot: Efficient Fine-grained FPGA Sharing with Big.Little Slots and Live Migration in FPGA Cluster.
items.abstract: As FPGAs gain popularity for on-demand application acceleration in data center computing, dynamic partial reconfiguration (DPR) has become an effective fine-grained sharing technique for FPGA multiplexing. However, current FPGA sharing encounters partial reconfiguration contention and task execution blocking problems introduced by the DPR, which significantly degrade application performance. In this paper, we propose VersaSlot, an efficient spatio-temporal FPGA sharing system with novel Big.Little slot architecture that can effectively resolve the contention and task blocking while improving resource utilization. For the heterogeneous Big.Little architecture, we introduce an efficient slot allocation and scheduling algorithm, along with a seamless cross-board switching and live migration mechanism, to maximize FPGA multiplexing across the cluster. We evaluate the VersaSlot system on an FPGA cluster composed of the latest Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGAs (ZCU216) and compare its performance against four existing scheduling algorithms. The results demonstrate that VersaSlot achieves up to 13.66x lower average response time than the traditional temporal FPGA multiplexing, and up to $2.19 x$ average response time improvement over the state-of-the-art spatio-temporal sharing systems. Furthermore, VersaSlot enhances the LUT and FF resource utilization by 35% and 29% on average, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 FPGA 在数据中心计算中按需应用加速方面的普及，动态部分重配置 (DPR) 已成为 FPGA 复用的有效细粒度共享技术。然而，当前的FPGA共享遇到了DPR引入的部分重配置争用和任务执行阻塞问题，这显着降低了应用程序性能。在本文中，我们提出了VersaSlot，一种高效的时空FPGA共享系统，具有新颖的Big.Little插槽架构，可以有效解决争用和任务阻塞，同时提高资源利用率。对于异构Big.Little架构，我们引入了高效的槽位分配和调度算法，以及无缝跨板切换和实时迁移机制，以最大限度地提高跨集群的FPGA复用。我们在由最新 Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA (ZCU216) 组成的 FPGA 集群上评估 VersaSlot 系统，并将其性能与四种现有调度算法进行比较。结果表明，VersaSlot 的平均响应时间比传统时态 FPGA 多路复用缩短了 13.66 倍，与最先进的时空共享系统相比，平均响应时间缩短了 2.19 倍。此外，VersaSlot 将 LUT 和 FF 资源利用率平均分别提高了 35% 和 29%。

items.title: Weighted Range-Constrained Ising-Model Decoder for Quantum Error Correction.
items.abstract: Ising model-based Quantum Error Correction decoders reduce topological complexity compared to classical decoders. However, the SOTA Ising decoder has a higher time complexity than union-find (UF) and a lower threshold than minimum-weight perfect-matching (MWPM). We propose the Weighted Range-Constrained Ising Model-Based (WRIM) decoder. WRIM uses a polygonal region to enclose flipped syndromes, ensuring the coverage of all potential error chains while optimizing coupling and external field coefficients. WRIM reduces the variable count by $97.8 x$, achieves microsecondlevel decoding, and has a worst-case time complexity of $O(n)$, outperforming UF. WRIM exhibits threshold behavior up to 10.7$\mathbf{1 1. 0 \%}$, surpassing the MWPM’s highest reported threshold.
items.abstract_zh: 与经典解码器相比，基于 Ising 模型的量子纠错解码器降低了拓扑复杂性。然而，SOTA Ising 解码器的时间复杂度比并查找（UF）更高，阈值比最小权重完美匹配（MWPM）更低。我们提出了基于加权范围约束伊辛模型（WRIM）的解码器。 WRIM 使用多边形区域来包围翻转综合症，确保覆盖所有潜在的误差链，同时优化耦合和外场系数。 WRIM 减少变量数 $97.8 x$，实现微秒级解码，最坏情况时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，优于 UF。 WRIM 表现出高达 10.7$\mathbf{1 1. 0 \%}$ 的阈值行为，超过了 MWPM 报告的最高阈值。

items.title: KLiNQ: Knowledge Distillation-Assisted Lightweight Neural Network for Qubit Readout on FPGA.
items.abstract: Superconducting qubits are among the most promising candidates for building quantum information processors. Yet, they are often limited by slow and error-prone qubit readout-a critical factor in achieving high-fidelity operations. While current methods, including deep neural networks, enhance readout accuracy, they typically lack support for mid-circuit measurements essential for quantum error correction, and they usually rely on large, resource-intensive network models. This paper presents KLiNQ, a novel qubit readout architecture leveraging lightweight neural networks optimized via knowledge distillation. Our approach achieves around a $99 \%$ reduction in model size compared to the baseline while maintaining a qubitstate discrimination accuracy of $91 \%$. KLiNQ facilitates rapid, independent qubit-state readouts that enable mid-circuit measurements by assigning a dedicated, compact neural network for each qubit. Implemented on the Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA, our design can perform the discrimination within 32 ns. The results demonstrate that compressed neural networks can maintain highfidelity independent readout while enabling efficient hardware implementation, advancing practical quantum computing.
items.abstract_zh: 超导量子位是构建量子信息处理器最有希望的候选者之一。然而，它们通常受到缓慢且容易出错的量子位读出的限制——这是实现高保真操作的关键因素。虽然包括深度神经网络在内的当前方法可以提高读出精度，但它们通常缺乏对量子纠错所必需的中电路测量的支持，并且通常依赖于大型资源密集型网络模型。本文提出了 KLiNQ，一种新颖的量子位读出架构，利用通过知识蒸馏优化的轻量级神经网络。与基线相比，我们的方法实现了模型大小约 $99 \%$ 的减少，同时保持了 $91 \%$ 的量子位状态辨别精度。 KLiNQ 有助于快速、独立的量子位状态读出，通过为每个量子位分配专用、紧凑的神经网络来实现中间电路测量。我们的设计在 Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA 上实现，可以在 32 ns 内执行区分。结果表明，压缩神经网络可以保持高保真独立读出，同时实现高效的硬件实现，从而推进实用的量子计算。

items.title: PracMHBench: Re-evaluating Model-Heterogeneous Federated Learning Based on Practical Edge Device Constraints.
items.abstract: Federating heterogeneous models on edge devices with diverse resource constraints has been a notable trend in recent years. Compared to traditional federated learning (FL) that assumes an identical model architecture to cooperate, model-heterogeneous FL is more practical and flexible since the model can be customized to satisfy the deployment requirement. Unfortunately, no prior work ever dives into the existing model-heterogeneous FL algorithms under the practical edge device constraints and provides quantitative analysis on various data scenarios and metrics, which motivates us to rethink and re-evaluate this paradigm. In our work, we construct the first system platform PracMHBench to evaluate model-heterogeneous FL on practical constraints of edge devices, where diverse model heterogeneity algorithms are classified and tested on multiple data tasks and metrics. Based on the platform, we perform extensive experiments on these algorithms under the different edge constraints to observe their applicability and the corresponding heterogeneity pattern.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，在具有不同资源限制的边缘设备上联合异构模型已成为一个显着趋势。与采用相同模型架构进行协作的传统联邦学习（FL）相比，模型异构 FL 更加实用和灵活，因为模型可以定制以满足部署要求。不幸的是，之前没有任何工作深入研究实际边缘设备限制下的现有模型异构 FL 算法，并提供对各种数据场景和指标的定量分析，这促使我们重新思考和重新评估这种范式。在我们的工作中，我们构建了第一个系统平台 PracMHBench，用于在边缘设备的实际约束下评估模型异构 FL，其中在多个数据任务和指标上对不同的模型异构算法进行分类和测试。基于该平台，我们在不同的边缘约束下对这些算法进行了广泛的实验，以观察它们的适用性和相应的异质性模式。

items.title: LightRIM: Light Runtime Integrity Measurement for Linux Kernels in Embedded Applications.
items.abstract: Linux kernels are being widely deployed in embedded applications, such as increasingly automated vehicles and robots, due to their robust ecosystem. Security modules have been developed to enhance the integrity of Linux kernels, a critical system component. However, these modules consume substantial computational resources, making them unsuitable for embedded domains. We introduce LightRIM, a lightweight method to measure the Linux kernel’s integrity during runtime, ideal for resource-limited embedded applications. We focus on major attack types and extract objects for monitoring. Our approach includes a two-stage hashing process and an event-triggered measurement algorithm tied to the security value. To mitigate Time-of-Check-to-Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) attacks, we introduce a heuristic algorithm that maximizes the attack detection rate within CPU usage constraint and randomizes the measurement intervals. Experimental results indicate that LightRIM incurs less than 0.7% performance overhead while providing extensive attack coverage.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其强大的生态系统，Linux 内核被广泛部署在嵌入式应用中，例如日益自动化的车辆和机器人。安全模块的开发是为了增强关键系统组件 Linux 内核的完整性。然而，这些模块消耗大量的计算资源，使得它们不适合嵌入式领域。我们推出 LightRIM，这是一种在运行时测量 Linux 内核完整性的轻量级方法，非常适合资源有限的嵌入式应用程序。我们关注主要的攻击类型并提取监控对象。我们的方法包括两阶段哈希过程和与安全值相关的事件触发测量算法。为了减轻检查时间到使用时间 (TOCTOU) 攻击，我们引入了一种启发式算法，可在 CPU 使用限制内最大化攻击检测率并随机化测量间隔。实验结果表明，LightRIM 在提供广泛的攻击覆盖范围的同时，产生的性能开销不到 0.7%。

items.title: IRGNN: A Graph-based Framework Integrating Numerical Solution and Point Cloud for Static IR Drop Prediction.
items.abstract: With the continued scaling of integrated circuits (ICs), IR drop analysis for on-chip power grids (PGs) is crucial but increasingly computationally demanding. Traditional numerical methods deliver high accuracy but are prohibitively time-intensive, while various machine learning (ML) methods have been introduced to alleviate these computational burdens. However, most CNN-based methods ignore the fine structure and topological information of PGs, and face interpretability or scalability issues. In this work, we propose a novel graphbased framework, IRGNN, leveraging the PG topology with the integration of numerical solutions and point clouds. Our framework applies a numerical solver, AMG-PCG, to generate rough numerical solutions as a reliable interpretability foundation for ML. Then, to capture PG topology, we regard nodes of PG as point clouds and extract point cloud features, and we introduce a novel graph structure, IRGraph. Furthermore, a novel graph-based model IRGNN is designed, incorporating a designed neighbor distance attention (NDA) layer for distanceaware PG features aggregation and graph transformer (GT) layer to capture global information. It should be noted that our framework can analyze the IR drop of each node in PG, which CNN-based methods cannot do. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our framework achieves significantly higher accuracy than previous CNN-based approaches and numerical solvers while substantially reducing computation time.
items.abstract_zh: 随着集成电路 (IC) 尺寸的不断缩小，片上电网 (PG) 的压降分析至关重要，但对计算的要求也越来越高。传统的数值方法精度很高，但时间密集程度过高，而各种机器学习 (ML) 方法已经被引入来减轻这些计算负担。然而，大多数基于 CNN 的方法忽略了 PG 的精细结构和拓扑信息，并面临可解释性或可扩展性问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图的框架 IRGNN，利用 PG 拓扑与数值解和点云的集成。我们的框架应用数值求解器 AMG-PCG 来生成粗略的数值解，作为 ML 的可靠可解释性基础。然后，为了捕获PG拓扑，我们将PG的节点视为点云并提取点云特征，并引入一种新颖的图结构IRGraph。此外，设计了一种新颖的基于图的模型 IRGNN，结合了用于距离感知 PG 特征聚合的设计邻居距离注意（NDA）层和用于捕获全局信息的图变换器（GT）层。值得注意的是，我们的框架可以分析PG中每个节点的IR drop，这是基于CNN的方法无法做到的。实验评估表明，我们的框架比以前基于 CNN 的方法和数值求解器实现了显着更高的精度，同时大大减少了计算时间。

items.title: GEM: GPU-Accelerated Emulator-Inspired RTL Simulation.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present a GPU-accelerated RTL simulator addressing critical challenges in high-speed circuit verification. Traditional CPU-based RTL simulators struggle with scalability and performance, and while FPGA-based emulators offer acceleration, they are costly and less accessible. Previous GPU-based attempts have failed to speed up RTL simulation due to the heterogeneous nature of circuit partitions, which conflicts with the SIMT (Single Instruction, Multiple Thread) paradigm of GPUs. Inspired by the design of emulators, our approach introduces a novel virtual Very Long Instruction Word (VLIW) architecture, designed for efficient CUDA execution. We also design a flow that maps circuit logic to the architecture in a process analogous to the FPGA CAD flow. This architecture mitigates issues of irregular memory access and thread divergence, unlocking GPU potential for RTL simulation. Our solution achieves up to $64 \times$ speed-up over the best CPU simulators, democratizing high-speed RTL simulation with accessible hardware and establishing a new frontier for GPUaccelerated circuit verification.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种 GPU 加速的 RTL 模拟器，可解决高速电路验证中的关键挑战。传统的基于 CPU 的 RTL 模拟器在可扩展性和性能方面遇到困难，虽然基于 FPGA 的模拟器提供加速，但它们成本高昂且不易访问。由于电路分区的异构性质，之前基于 GPU 的尝试未能加速 RTL 仿真，这与 GPU 的 SIMT（单指令、多线程）范式相冲突。受模拟器设计的启发，我们的方法引入了一种新颖的虚拟超长指令字 (VLIW) 架构，专为高效 CUDA 执行而设计。我们还设计了一个流程，将电路逻辑映射到架构，其流程类似于 FPGA CAD 流程。该架构缓解了不规则内存访问和线程发散的问题，释放了 GPU 进行 RTL 模拟的潜力。我们的解决方案比最好的 CPU 模拟器实现了高达 64 美元的加速，通过可访问的硬件实现高速 RTL 模拟的大众化，并为 GPU 加速电路验证开辟了新领域。

items.title: DM-Tune: Quantizing Diffusion Models with Mixture-of-Gaussian Guided Noise Tuning.
items.abstract: Diffusion models have become essential generative tools for tasks such as image generation, video creation, and inpainting, but their high computational and memory demands pose challenges for efficient deployment. Contrary to the traditional belief that full-precision computation ensures optimal image quality, we demonstrate that a fine-grained mixed-precision strategy can surpass full-precision models in terms of image quality, diversity, and text-to-image alignment. However, directly implementing such strategies can lead to increased complexity and reduced runtime performance due to the overheads of managing multiple precision formats and casting operations. To address this, we introduce DM-Tune, which replaces complex mixed-precision quantization with a unified low-precision format, supplemented by noise-tuning, to improve both image generation quality and runtime efficiency. The proposed noise-tuning mechanism is a type of fine-tuning that reconstructs the mixed-precision output by learning adjustable noise through a parameterized nonlinear function consisting of Gaussian and linear components. Key steps in our framework include identifying sensitive layers for quantization, modeling quantization noise, and optimizing runtime with custom low-precision GPU kernels that support efficient noise-tuning. Experimental results across various diffusion models and datasets demonstrate that DM-Tune not only significantly improves runtime but also enhances diversity, quality, and text-to-image alignment compared to FP32, FP8, and state-of-the-art mixed-precision methods. Our approach is broadly applicable and lays a solid foundation for simplifying complex mixed-precision strategies at minimal cost.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散模型已成为图像生成、视频创建和修复等任务的重要生成工具，但其高计算和内存需求对高效部署提出了挑战。与全精度计算确保最佳图像质量的传统观念相反，我们证明了细粒度混合精度策略可以在图像质量、多样性和文本到图像对齐方面超越全精度模型。然而，由于管理多种精度格式和转换操作的开销，直接实施此类策略可能会导致复杂性增加并降低运行时性能。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DM-Tune，它用统一的低精度格式取代复杂的混合精度量化，并辅以噪声调整，以提高图像生成质量和运行时效率。所提出的噪声调谐机制是一种微调，通过由高斯和线性分量组成的参数化非线性函数学习可调噪声来重建混合精度输出。我们框架中的关键步骤包括识别量化敏感层、对量化噪声建模以及使用支持高效噪声调整的自定义低精度 GPU 内核优化运行时间。各种扩散模型和数据集的实验结果表明，与 FP32、FP8 和最先进的混合精度方法相比，DM-Tune 不仅显着提高了运行时间，而且还增强了多样性、质量和文本到图像对齐。我们的方法具有广泛的适用性，并为以最低的成本简化复杂的混合精度策略奠定了坚实的基础。

items.title: Device-Aware Test: A Means to Attack Unmodelled Defects (Invited).
items.abstract: Structural testing has been very successful in the VLSI manufacturing process to screen out faulty devices and provide high outgoing product quality. However, recent reported data show that existing solutions are not good enough for advanced technology nodes and emerging device technologies. This paper discusses a new manufacturing test approach called DeviceAware Test (DAT), applies it to different flavors of emerging devices, and its potential to be used beyond just manufacturing test.
items.abstract_zh: 结构测试在 VLSI 制造过程中非常成功，可以筛选出故障器件并提供较高的出厂产品质量。然而，最近报道的数据表明，现有的解决方案对于先进技术节点和新兴设备技术来说还不够好。本文讨论了一种称为 DeviceAware Test (DAT) 的新制造测试方法，将其应用于不同类型的新兴设备，以及其在制造测试之外的应用潜力。

items.title: BBAL: A Bidirectional Block Floating Point-Based Quantisation Accelerator for Large Language Models.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs), with their billions of parameters, pose substantial challenges for deployment on edge devices, straining both memory capacity and computational resources. Block Floating Point (BFP) quantisation reduces memory and computational overhead by converting high-overhead floating point operations into low-bit fixed point operations. However, BFP requires aligning all data to the maximum exponent, which causes loss of small and moderate values, resulting in quantisation error and degradation in the accuracy of LLMs. To address this issue, we propose a Bidirectional Block Floating Point (BBFP) data format, which reduces the probability of selecting the maximum as shared exponent, thereby reducing quantisation error. By utilizing the features in BBFP, we present a full-stack Bidirectional Block Floating Point-Based Quantisation Accelerator for LLMs (BBAL), primarily comprising a processing element array based on BBFP, paired with proposed cost-effective nonlinear computation unit. Experimental results show BBAL achieves a 22% improvement in accuracy compared to an outlier-aware accelerator at similar efficiency, and a 40% efficiency improvement over a BFP-based accelerator at similar accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 具有数十亿个参数，对边缘设备上的部署提出了巨大的挑战，导致内存容量和计算资源紧张。块浮点 (BFP) 量化通过将高开销浮点运算转换为低位定点运算来减少内存和计算开销。然而，BFP 要求将所有数据对齐到最大指数，这会导致小值和中等值的丢失，从而导致量化误差和 LLM 准确性的下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双向块浮点（BBFP）数据格式，它减少了选择最大值作为共享指数的概率，从而减少了量化误差。通过利用 BBFP 中的功能，我们提出了一种用于 LLM 的全栈双向块基于浮点的量化加速器（BBAL），主要包括基于 BBFP 的处理元件阵列，并与所提出的经济有效的非线性计算单元配对。实验结果表明，与具有相似效率的异常值感知加速器相比，BBAL 的精度提高了 22%；在相似精度下，与基于 BFP 的加速器相比，BBAL 的效率提高了 40%。

items.title: EnQode: Fast Amplitude Embedding for Quantum Machine Learning Using Classical Data.
items.abstract: Amplitude embedding (AE) is essential in quantum machine learning (QML) for encoding classical data onto quantum circuits. However, conventional AE methods suffer from deep, variable-length circuits that introduce high output error due to extensive gate usage and variable error rates across samples, resulting in noise-driven inconsistencies that degrade model accuracy. We introduce EnQode, a fast AE technique based on symbolic representation that addresses these limitations by clustering dataset samples and solving for cluster mean states through a low-depth, machine-specific ansatz.
