Optimized to reduce physical gates and SWAP operations, EnQode ensures all samples face consistent, low noise levels by standardizing circuit depth and composition. With over 94% fidelity in data mapping, EnQode enables robust, high-performance QML on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. Our opensource solution provides a scalable and efficient alternative for integrating classical data with quantum models.
items.abstract_zh: 幅度嵌入 (AE) 在量子机器学习 (QML) 中对于将经典数据编码到量子电路中至关重要。然而，传统的 AE 方法受到深度、可变长度电路的困扰，由于广泛的门使用和样本之间的可变错误率，这些电路会引入高输出误差，从而导致噪声驱动的不一致，从而降低模型精度。我们引入了 EnQode，这是一种基于符号表示的快速 AE 技术，它通过对数据集样本进行聚类并通过低深度、特定于机器的 ansatz 求解聚类平均状态来解决这些限制。 EnQode 经过优化，可减少物理门和交换操作，通过标准化电路深度和组成，确保所有样本都具有一致的低噪声水平。 EnQode 的数据映射保真度超过 94%，可在噪声中等规模量子 (NISQ) 设备上实现稳健、高性能的 QML。我们的开源解决方案为将经典数据与量子模型集成提供了可扩展且高效的替代方案。

items.title: FLAG: An FPGA-Based System for Low-Latency GNN Inference Service Using Vector Quantization.
items.abstract: Enabling real-time GNN inference services requires low end-to-end latency to meet service level agreements. However, intensive preparation steps and the neighborhood explosion problem pose significant challenges to efficient GNN inference serving. In this paper, we propose FLAG, an FPGA-based GNN inference serving system using vector quantization. To reduce preparation overhead, we introduce offline preprocessing to precompute and compress hidden embeddings for serving. A dedicated FPGA accelerator leverages the precomputed data to enable lightweight aggregation. As a result, FLAG achieves average speedups of $154 \times 176 \times$, and $333 \times$ on three GNN models compared to the baseline system.
items.abstract_zh: 启用实时 GNN 推理服务需要较低的端到端延迟来满足服务级别协议。然而，密集的准备步骤和邻域爆炸问题对高效的 GNN 推理服务提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 FLAG，一种使用矢量量化的基于 FPGA 的 GNN 推理服务系统。为了减少准备开销，我们引入离线预处理来预计算和压缩隐藏嵌入以供服务。专用 FPGA 加速器利用预先计算的数据来实现轻量级聚合。结果，与基线系统相比，FLAG 在三个 GNN 模型上的平均加速分别为 154 美元 × 176 倍和 333 美元。

items.title: SCONE: A Logic Locking Technique Utilizing SMT Solver and Circuit Encoding Scheme for Efficient Hardware IP Protection.
items.abstract: Multiple intellectual property (IP) protections have emerged to defeat security threats in integrated circuit (IC) supply chain. Among these, logic locking is regarded as a promising IP protection for its security. A state-of-the-art work uses stripped-functionality logic locking (SFLL) technique with protected input patterns (PIPs) satisfying the distance of at least 2 (Dist2) property, or D2PIPs, for ensuring resilience against both input-output (I/O)-based and structural attacks. However, this approach has research challenges in scalability, flexibility, and security, as stated and discussed in our paper. Our paper solves these challenges by (i) utilizing a satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver and (ii) developing a secure circuit encoding scheme. SCONE, our secure logic locking technique, combines the two methods and meets all three challenges simultaneously. Our results show that SCONE improves scalability $\mathbf{3 5 0} \times$ on the IBEX processor (16 K gates) and remains resilient against five I/O or structural attacks. Index Terms-logic locking, encoding scheme, SMT solver.
items.abstract_zh: 多种知识产权 (IP) 保护措施的出现，旨在应对集成电路 (IC) 供应链中的安全威胁。其中，逻辑锁定因其安全性被认为是一种很有前景的IP保护。最先进的工作使用剥离功能逻辑锁定 (SFLL) 技术和满足至少 2 (Dist2) 属性距离的受保护输入模式 (PIP) 或 D2PIP，以确保抵御基于输入输出 (I/O) 的攻击和结构性攻击。然而，正如我们的论文中所述和讨论的那样，这种方法在可扩展性、灵活性和安全性方面存在研究挑战。我们的论文通过（i）利用可满足性模理论（SMT）求解器和（ii）开发安全电路编码方案来解决这些挑战。 SCONE 是我们的安全逻辑锁定技术，结合了这两种方法并同时应对所有三个挑战。我们的结果表明，SCONE 提高了 IBEX 处理器（16 K 门）上的可扩展性 $\mathbf{3 5 0} \times$，并且对五次 I/O 或结构攻击保持弹性。索引术语-逻辑锁定、编码方案、SMT 求解器。

items.title: Near-Memory LLM Inference Processor based on 3D DRAM-to-logic Hybrid Bonding.
items.abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference poses dual challenges, demanding substantial memory bandwidth and computing resources. Recent advancements in near-memory accelerators leveraging 3D DRAM-to-logic hybrid-bonding (HB) interconnects have gained attention due to their highly parallel data transfer capabilities. We address limitations in previous HB-DRAM accelerators, such as those stemming from distributed controller designs, by introducing an architecture with a centralized controller and dual-IO scheme. This approach not only reduces the chip area overhead but also enables reconfigurable GEMV/GEMM operations, boosting the performance. Simulations for the OPT 66B model show that our proposed accelerator achieves 2.9X, 3.5X, and 2.5X higher performance compared to NPU, DRAM-PIM, and heterogeneous designs (DRAM-PIM + NPU), respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理带来双重挑战，需要大量的内存带宽和计算资源。利用 3D DRAM 到逻辑混合键合 (HB) 互连的近内存加速器的最新进展因其高度并行的数据传输能力而受到关注。我们通过引入具有集中控制器和双 IO 方案的架构来解决以前 HB-DRAM 加速器中的限制，例如源自分布式控制器设计的限制。这种方法不仅减少了芯片面积开销，而且还实现了可重新配置的 GEMV/GEMM 操作，从而提高了性能。 OPT 66B 模型的仿真表明，与 NPU、DRAM-PIM 和异构设计 (DRAM-PIM + NPU) 相比，我们提出的加速器的性能分别提高了 2.9 倍、3.5 倍和 2.5 倍。

items.title: An Algorithm-Hardware Co-design Based on Revised Microscaling Format Quantization for Accelerating Large Language Models.
items.abstract: The narrow-bit-width data format is crucial for reducing the computation and storage costs of modern deep learning applications, particularly in large language models (LLMs) based applications. Microscaling (MX) format has been proven as a drop-in replacement for the baseline FP32 in existing inference frameworks, with low user friction. However, deploying such a new format into existing hardware systems is still challenging, and the dominant solution for LLM inference at low precision is still low-bit quantization. This particularly limits the strategic applications of such LLMs in real deployment on a large scale. In this work, we propose an algorithm-hardware co-design that adopts a two-level $Revised MX Format Quantization$ (RMFQ) and a $Revised MX Format Accelerator$ (RMFA) architecture design. RMFQ proposes the $revised M X(R M X)$ format and provides a novel quantization framework with innovative group direction. Also, RMFA provides an RMX adaptive hardware architecture and an RMX encoding scheme. As a result, RMFQ pushes the limit of 4-bit and 6-bit quantization to a new state-of-the-art, and RMFA surpasses the existing outlier-aware accelerator such as OliVe, achieving a $1.28 \times$ speedup and a $1.31 \times$ energy reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 窄位宽数据格式对于降低现代深度学习应用程序的计算和存储成本至关重要，特别是在基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的应用程序中。微缩放 (MX) 格式已被证明可以直接替代现有推理框架中的基线 FP32，并且用户摩擦较小。然而，将这种新格式部署到现有的硬件系统中仍然具有挑战性，低精度LLM推理的主导解决方案仍然是低位量化。这尤其限制了此类法学硕士在实际大规模部署中的战略应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计，采用两级$Revised MX Format Quantization$（RMFQ）和$Revised MX Format Accelerator$（RMFA）架构设计。 RMFQ 提出了$修订版 M X(R M X)$ 格式，并提供了具有创新组方向的新颖量化框架。此外，RMFA还提供了RMX自适应硬件架构和RMX编码方案。结果，RMFQ 将 4 位和 6 位量化的极限推向了新的最先进水平，而 RMFA 超越了 OliVe 等现有的异常值感知加速器，实现了 1.28 美元的加速和 1.31 美元的能源减少。

items.title: A High-Precision and Low-Cost Approximate Transform Accelerator for Video Coding.
items.abstract: The introduction of multiple transform types in the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard has yielded notable encoding gains but also imposed considerable computational burdens. Existing transform circuits of different types are typically implemented separately due to their independence, leading to substantial hardware overhead. To address this, we explore the relationship between Discrete Cosine Transform Type-2 (DCT2) and Discrete Sine Transform Type-7 (DST7) matrices and reveal a prominent diagonal aggregation phenomenon in their transfer matrix. Based on this insight, the least-squares method is applied to optimize the transfer matrix sparsity, achieving a high-precision, low-cost approximate conversion from DCT2 to DST7. Furthermore, we optimize DCT2 computation by proposing an elaborate matrix decomposition approach that allows a lightweight shift-adder unit to efficiently generate all required product terms across varying sizes. Leveraging these algorithmic optimizations, we implement a highly reusable and area-efficient approximate transform accelerator that supports sizes from 4 to 32 points and accommodates three types in VVC. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed accelerator achieves over 44% reduction in circuit resource consumption with negligible BD-BR performance loss of just $\mathbf{0. 5 3 \%}$, maintaining processing capabilities up to $8 K \text{@} 57 \mathrm{fps}$.
items.abstract_zh: 通用视频编码 (VVC) 标准中引入的多种变换类型带来了显着的编码增益，但也带来了相当大的计算负担。现有的不同类型的变换电路由于其独立性通常单独实现，导致大量的硬件开销。为了解决这个问题，我们探索了离散余弦变换类型 2 (DCT2) 和离散正弦变换类型 7 (DST7) 矩阵之间的关系，并揭示了它们的传输矩阵中突出的对角聚集现象。基于这一见解，应用最小二乘法来优化传输矩阵的稀疏性，实现了从DCT2到DST7的高精度、低成本的近似转换。此外，我们通过提出一种复杂的矩阵分解方法来优化 DCT2 计算，该方法允许轻量级移位加法器单元有效地生成不同大小的所有所需的乘积项。利用这些算法优化，我们实现了高度可重用且面积高效的近似变换加速器，支持 4 到 32 点的大小，并在 VVC 中容纳三种类型。实验结果表明，所提出的加速器使电路资源消耗减少了 44% 以上，而 BD-BR 性能损失仅为 $\mathbf{0. 5 3 \%}$，保持高达 $8 K \text{@} 57 \mathrm{fps}$ 的处理能力。

items.title: Invited: EDA for Heterogeneous Integration.
items.abstract: The advent of heterogeneous integration (HI) places new demands on EDA tooling. Building large systems requires (1) methods for chiplet disaggregation that map the system to smaller chiplets, working in conjunction with system-technology co-optimization to determine the right design decisions that optimize computation and communication, together with the choice of substrate and chiplet technologies; (2) multiphysics and multiscale analyses that incorporate thermomechanical aspects into performance analysis, ranging from fast machine-learningdriven analyses in early stages to signoff-quality multiphysics-based analysis; (3) physical design techniques for placing and routing chiplets and embedded active/passive elements on and within the substrate, including the design of thermal and power delivery solutions; and (4) underlying infrastructure required to facilitate HI-based design, including the design and characterization of chiplet libraries and the establishment of data formats and standards. This paper overviews these issues and lays out a set of EDA needs for HI designs.
items.abstract_zh: 异构集成 (HI) 的出现对 EDA 工具提出了新的要求。构建大型系统需要 (1) 小芯片分解方法，将系统映射到较小的小芯片，与系统技术协同优化结合起来，确定优化计算和通信的正确设计决策，以及基板和小芯片技术的选择； (2) 多物理场和多尺度分析，将热机械方面纳入性能分析，范围从早期阶段的快速机器学习驱动分析到基于签核质量的多物理场分析； (3) 在基板上和基板内放置和布线小芯片和嵌入式有源/无源元件的物理设计技术，包括热和电力传输解决方案的设计； (4) 促进基于 HI 的设计所需的底层基础设施，包括小芯片库的设计和表征以及数据格式和标准的建立。本文概述了这些问题并列出了 HI 设计的一系列 EDA 需求。

items.title: DANN: Diffractive Acoustic Neural Network for in-sensor computing system target at multi-biomarker diagnosis.
items.abstract: Analog machine learning hardware platforms, such as those using wave physics, present potential for edge artificial intelligence (AI) applications due to in-sensor computing architecture, offering superior energy efficiency compared to digital circuits. While the diffractive neural network has been implemented in optical systems, its deployment on integrated acoustic systems has not been achieved due to the challenges associated with hardware optimization. In this paper, we propose the Diffractive Acoustic Neural Network (DANN), a novel approach that applies diffractive neural network algorithms to surface acoustic wave (SAW) systems for in-sensor multibiomarker diagnosis. To address optimization challenges, we introduce a novel training methodology that combines Finite Element Analysis (FEA) with gradient descent. We validate our method on Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) and prostate cancer, achieving accuracies of $74.07 \%$ and $86.0 \%$, respectively, nearly reaching the accuracy levels of clinical diagnoses. By comparing the co-training method with the traditional gradient descent training method and direct training on the FEA model, the co-training method demonstrates its advantages in balancing training efficiency and accuracy. Furthermore, a comparison of power consumption is conducted between the traditional method and the in-sensor computing system, indicating $66 \%$ energy savings attributed to its high level of integration.
items.abstract_zh: 模拟机器学习硬件平台（例如使用波动物理学的硬件平台）由于传感器内计算架构而呈现出边缘人工智能 (AI) 应用的潜力，与数字电路相比，可提供卓越的能源效率。虽然衍射神经网络已在光学系统中实现，但由于与硬件优化相关的挑战，其在集成声学系统上的部署尚未实现。在本文中，我们提出了衍射声学神经网络（DANN），这是一种将衍射神经网络算法应用于表面声波（SAW）系统以进行传感器内多生物标志物诊断的新方法。为了解决优化挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的训练方法，将有限元分析 (FEA) 与梯度下降相结合。我们在重度抑郁症 (MDD) 和前列腺癌上验证了我们的方法，分别达到了 $74.07 \%$ 和 $86.0 \%$ 的准确度，几乎达到了临床诊断的准确度水平。通过将协同训练方法与传统的梯度下降训练方法以及在FEA模型上直接训练进行比较，协同训练方法展示了其在平衡训练效率和准确性方面的优势。此外，对传统方法和传感器内计算系统的功耗进行了比较，表明其高集成度可节省 66 \%$ 的能源。

items.title: An Input-Aware Sparse Tensor Compiler Empowered by Vectorized Acceleration.
items.abstract: Sparsity is widely prevalent in real-world applications, yet existing compiler optimizations and code generation techniques for sparse computations remain underdeveloped. Sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpMM) is a representative operator in sparse computations, whose performance is often limited by the design of sparse formats and the extent of hardware architecture optimization. Most existing solutions achieve highperformance SpMM through two approaches: (1) meticulously designed kernels and specialized sparse formats, which require extensive manual effort, or (2) tensor compilers that support code generation, though these typically offer limited support for sparse patterns, making it challenging to adapt to complex sparsity patterns in practical applications. This paper presents SpMMTC, an input-aware sparse tensor compiler. Given a sparse matrix as input, SpMMTC analyzes its non-zero distribution and generates a vectorized kernel optimized for SpMM on the specific matrix. We evaluated SpMMTC on various workloads. It achieves speedups of 1.21 x to 2.97 x over state-of-the-art methods such as TACO, TVM, and ASpT on different multi-core processors. It also provides a speedup of up to $\mathbf{1. 5 2 x}$ for sparse MobileNetV1 inference on the edge device.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏性在现实应用中广泛存在，但现有的稀疏计算编译器优化和代码生成技术仍然不发达。稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是稀疏计算中的代表性算子，其性能往往受到稀疏格式设计和硬件架构优化程度的限制。大多数现有解决方案通过两种方法实现高性能 SpMM：（1）精心设计的内核和专门的稀疏格式，这需要大量的手动工作，或（2）支持代码生成的张量编译器，尽管这些编译器通常对稀疏模式提供有限的支持，使得在实际应用中适应复杂的稀疏模式具有挑战性。本文提出了 SpMMTC，一种输入感知的稀疏张量编译器。给定一个稀疏矩阵作为输入，SpMMTC 分析其非零分布并生成针对特定矩阵上的 SpMM 优化的矢量化内核。我们在各种工作负载上评估了 SpMMTC。它在不同的多核处理器上比 TACO、TVM 和 ASpT 等最先进的方法实现了 1.21 倍到 2.97 倍的加速。它还提供高达 $\mathbf{1. 5 2 x}$ 用于边缘设备上的稀疏 MobileNetV1 推理。

items.title: Hydra: Harnessing Expert Popularity for Efficient Mixture-of-Expert Inference on Chiplet System.
items.abstract: The rapid growth of model sizes in advanced artificial intelligence algorithms, particularly in Transformerbased large language models (LLMs), has led to significant computational overhead. Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) models offer a solution through their sparsely gating mechanism but introduce new challenges of extensive all-to-all communication and model computational inefficiencies. This paper presents Hydra, a software/hardware co-design aimed at accelerating MoE inference on chiplet-based architectures. In software, Hydra employs a popularity-aware expert mapping strategy to optimize interchiplet communication. In hardware, it incorporates Content Addressable Memory (CAM) to eliminate expensive explicit token (un)-permutation based on sparse matrix multiplications and a redundant-calculation-skipping softmax engine to bypass unnecessary division and exponential operations. Evaluated in 22 nm technology, Hydra achieves latency reductions of $14.2 \times$ and $3.5 \times$ and power reductions of $169.1 \times$ and $18.9 \times$ over GPU and state-of-the-art MoE accelerator, respectively, thereby offering a scalable and efficient solution for MoE model deployment.
items.abstract_zh: 先进人工智能算法中模型大小的快速增长，特别是基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM)，导致了巨大的计算开销。专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过其稀疏门控机制提供了解决方案，但引入了广泛的全对全通信和模型计算效率低下的新挑战。本文介绍了 Hydra，这是一种软件/硬件协同设计，旨在加速基于小芯片的架构上的 MoE 推理。在软件方面，Hydra 采用流行感知专家映射策略来优化芯片间通信。在硬件中，它结合了内容可寻址内存（CAM）来消除基于稀疏矩阵乘法的昂贵的显式令牌（un）排列，并采用冗余计算跳过softmax引擎来绕过不必要的除法和指数运算。在 22 nm 技术中进行评估，与 GPU 和最先进的 MoE 加速器相比，Hydra 的延迟分别降低了 14.2 美元和 3.5 美元，功耗降低了 169.1 美元和 18.9 美元，从而为 MoE 模型部署提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案。

items.title: Cost-Distance Steiner Trees for Timing-Constrained Global Routing.
items.abstract: The cost-distance Steiner tree problem seeks a Steiner tree that minimizes the total congestion cost plus the weighted sum of sourcesink delays. This problem arises as a subroutine in timing-constrained global routing with a linear delay model, used before buffer insertion. Here, the congestion cost and the delay of an edge are essentially uncorrelated, unlike in most other algorithms for timing-driven Steiner trees. We present a fast algorithm for the cost-distance Steiner tree problem. Its running time is $\mathcal{O}(t(n \log n+m))$, where $t, n$, and m are the numbers of terminals, vertices, and edges in the global routing graph. We also prove that our algorithm guarantees an approximation factor of $\mathcal{O}(\log t)$. This matches the best-known approximation factor for this problem, but with a much faster running time. To account for increased capacitance and delays after buffering caused by bifurcations, we incorporate a delay penalty for each bifurcation without compromising the running time or approximation factor. In our experimental results, we show that our algorithm outperforms previous methods that first compute a Steiner topology, e.g. based on shallow-light Steiner trees or the Prim-Dijkstra algorithm, and then embed this into the global routing graph.
items.abstract_zh: 成本距离斯坦纳树问题寻求一种斯坦纳树，它可以最小化总拥塞成本加上源宿延迟的加权和。这个问题是作为具有线性延迟模型的时序约束全局路由中的子例程而出现的，在缓冲区插入之前使用。与大多数其他时序驱动斯坦纳树算法不同，这里的拥塞成本和边缘延迟本质上是不相关的。我们提出了一种用于成本距离斯坦纳树问题的快速算法。其运行时间为$\mathcal{O}(t(n \log n+m))$，其中$t、n$和m是全局路由图中终端、顶点和边的数量。我们还证明我们的算法保证了 $\mathcal{O}(\log t)$ 的近似因子。这与该问题最著名的近似因子相匹配，但运行时间要快得多。为了解决分叉引起的缓冲后电容增加和延迟的问题，我们在不影响运行时间或近似因子的情况下对每个分叉进行延迟惩罚。在我们的实验结果中，我们表明我们的算法优于之前首先计算斯坦纳拓扑的方法，例如基于浅光 Steiner 树或 Prim-Dijkstra 算法，然后将其嵌入到全局路由图中。

items.title: Joint Cutting for Hybrid Schrödinger-Feynman Simulation of Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: Despite the continuous advancements in size and robustness of real quantum devices, reliable large-scale quantum computers are not yet available. Hence, classical simulation of quantum algorithms remains crucial for testing new methods and estimating quantum advantage. Pushing classical simulation methods to their limit is essential, particularly due to their inherent exponential complexity. Besides the established Schrödinger-style full statevector simulation, so-called Hybrid Schrödinger-Feynman (HSF) approaches have shown promise to make simulations more efficient. HSF simulation employs the idea of “cutting” the circuit into smaller parts, reducing their execution times. This, however, comes at the cost of an exponential overhead in the number of cuts. Inspired by the domain of Quantum Circuit Cutting, we propose an HSF simulation method based on the idea of “joint cutting” to significantly reduce the aforementioned overhead. This means that, prior to the cutting procedure, gates are collected into “blocks” and all gates in a block are jointly cut instead of individually. We investigate how the proposed refinement can help decrease simulation times and highlight the remaining challenges. Experimental evaluations show that “joint cutting” can outperform the standard HSF simulation by up to a factor $\approx 4000 \times$ and the Schrödinger-style simulation by a factor $\approx 200 \times$ for suitable instances. The implementation is available at https://github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qsim-joint-cutting.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管真实量子设备的尺寸和鲁棒性不断进步，但可靠的大规模量子计算机尚未可用。因此，量子算法的经典模拟对于测试新方法和估计量子优势仍然至关重要。将经典模拟方法推向极限至关重要，特别是由于其固有的指数复杂性。除了已建立的薛定谔式全状态向量仿真之外，所谓的混合薛定谔-费曼（HSF）方法也有望提高仿真效率。 HSF 仿真采用了将电路“切割”成更小的部分的思想，从而减少了它们的执行时间。然而，这是以削减次数呈指数级开销为代价的。受量子电路切割领域的启发，我们提出了一种基于“联合切割”思想的HSF模拟方法，以显着减少上述开销。这意味着，在切割过程之前，浇口被收集成“块”，并且块中的所有浇口被联合切割而不是单独切割。我们研究了所提出的改进如何帮助减少模拟时间并强调剩余的挑战。实验评估表明，在合适的实例中，“联合切割”的性能比标准 HSF 模拟高出 $\约 4000 \times$，比薛定谔式模拟高出 $\approx \times$。该实现可在 https://github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qsim-joint-cutting 获取。

items.title: InsightAlign: A Transferable Physical Design Recipe Recommender Based on Design Insights.
items.abstract: Physical design tools have complex workflows with many different ways of optimizing power, performance, and area (PPA) out of a large number of options and hyperparameters in different engines and functionalities. Black-box optimization techniques are widely adopted to automate quality-of-result (QoR) exploration. Such exploration often proves impractical in real-world customer environments due to high computational demands, lengthy exploration cycles, and the need for large parallel jobs. To reduce the exploration space for viable compute resource requirements, we propose a novel design methodology to enable transferable learning by incorporating design insights crafted on top of physical design experts’ experience and streamlining QoR exploration as a sequence generation task for best recipe selection. We apply language model-inspired alignment techniques to learn the ranking of different recipe sets, enabling our model to generalize beyond known-good manually tuned expert design recipes. Extensive evaluations demonstrate our method’s superior QoRs and runtime performance on unseen industrial designs and rigorous benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 物理设计工具具有复杂的工作流程，具有多种不同的方法来优化不同引擎和功能中的大量选项和超参数中的功耗、性能和面积 (PPA)。黑盒优化技术被广泛采用来自动化结果质量 (QoR) 探索。由于计算需求高、探索周期长以及需要大型并行作业，这种探索在现实客户环境中通常被证明是不切实际的。为了减少可行计算资源需求的探索空间，我们提出了一种新颖的设计方法，通过结合基于物理设计专家经验的设计见解，并将 QoR 探索简化为最佳配方选择的序列生成任务，从而实现可迁移学习。我们应用受语言模型启发的对齐技术来学习不同配方集的排名，使我们的模型能够推广到已知良好的手动调整的专家设计配方之外。广泛的评估证明了我们的方法在未见过的工业设计和严格的基准测试中具有卓越的 QoR 和运行时性能。

items.title: DCO-3D: Differentiable Congestion Optimization in 3D ICs.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art 3D IC flows fail to consider 3D congestion during earlier stages, leading to excessive use of end-of-flow ECO resources for routability correction that severely degrades full-chip Power, Performance, and Area metrics. We present DCO-3D, a Machine Learning-based routability-aware 3D PD flow that performs early post-route congestion prediction using Siamese Networks and resolves the predicted hotspots using a fully differentiable 3D cell spreading with Graph Neural Network. On 6 industrial designs in a commercial 3nm node, DCO-3D improves Pin-3D, the known best Pin-3D flow, by up to 47.2% in overflow, 86.2% in TNS and 5.1% in power at signoff.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的 3D IC 流程未能考虑早期阶段的 3D 拥塞，导致过度使用流程末端 ECO 资源进行可布线性校正，从而严重降低全芯片功耗、性能和面积指标。我们提出了 DCO-3D，这是一种基于机器学习的可路由性感知 3D PD 流，它使用 Siamese 网络执行早期路由后拥塞预测，并使用图神经网络的完全可微 3D 单元扩展来解析预测的热点。在商用 3nm 节点的 6 个工业设计中，DCO-3D 将 Pin-3D（已知的最佳 Pin-3D 流程）改进高达 47.2%，在签核时溢出高达 47.2%，TNS 高达 86.2%，功耗高达 5.1%。

items.title: TransRoute: A Novel Hierarchical Transistor-Level Routing Framework Beyond Standard-Cell Methodology.
items.abstract: In advanced technology nodes, benefits from scaling have become limited in terms of power, performance, and area (PPA), necessitating improvements through design-technology cooptimization (DTCO). While the standard-cell methodology is widely used in modern VLSI design, it inherently constrains the potential of DTCO due to its abstraction at the logic level, limiting optimization at the physical level. To bridge this gap, transistor-level design methodology is desired to break the abstraction of standard cells. Existing research has explored large-scale transistor placement, but a gap remains in developing a routing framework that efficiently addresses transistor-level routing challenges. This paper proposes a pioneering transistorlevel routing framework for large-scale transistor placements, along with an efficient CP-SAT (Constraint ProgrammingSATisfiability) formulation for routing in lower layers. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed routing framework enables transistor-level designs to achieve significantly reduced total wirelength and high utilization rates for designs with hundreds to thousands of transistors, outperforming traditional standard-cell-based approaches in advanced technology nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 在先进技术节点中，扩展带来的好处在功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 方面变得有限，因此需要通过设计技术协同优化 (DTCO) 进行改进。虽然标准单元方法广泛应用于现代 VLSI 设计中，但由于其在逻辑层面的抽象，它本质上限制了 DTCO 的潜力，限制了物理层面的优化。为了弥补这一差距，需要晶体管级设计方法来打破标准单元的抽象。现有研究已经探索了大规模晶体管布局，但在开发有效解决晶体管级布线挑战的布线框架方面仍然存在差距。本文提出了一种用于大规模晶体管布局的开创性晶体管级布线框架，以及用于较低层布线的高效 CP-SAT（约束编程SATisfiability）公式。实验结果表明，所提出的布线框架使晶体管级设计能够显着缩短总线长，并为具有数百至数千个晶体管的设计实现高利用率，在先进技术节点中优于传统的基于标准单元的方法。

items.title: AdreamDCO: AI-Driven Robust and Efficient Design Automation for Digitally Controlled Oscillators.
items.abstract: This paper presents how we leverage AI-human collaboration to develop an end-to-end, automated design flow for digitally controlled oscillators (DCOs), a key radio-frequency (RF) integrated circuits (ICs) building block that dominates phase noise and jitter performance of RF systems. Specifically, we decompose the DCO design process into two steps and use AI to enhance productivity and optimize performance within each step. Additionally, we demonstrate how AI can assist RF IC designers in creating unconventional circuit components to tackle challenging design specifications. Overall, the proposed flow is capable of synthesizing the DCO design including the schematic and layout in 80 seconds after one-time training, and is frequency agile between 1 and 20 GHz. Moreover, it can select the most robust design under process variations when multiple design parameters meet target specifications under the nominal condition. The proposed automated DCO design flow is demonstrated using two silicon prototypes implemented in the GlobalFoundries $22-\mathrm{nm}$ CMOS SOI process. In the measurements, they achieve $\gt 192.4-\mathrm{dBc} / \mathrm{Hz}$ figure-of-merit (FoM) and $\lt 1.5-\mathrm{kHz}$ frequency resolution at 7.1 to 8.6 GHz and 3.8 to 4.6 GHz, outperforming existing manual designs at similar frequencies.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们如何利用人工智能与人类协作来开发数控振荡器 (DCO) 的端到端自动化设计流程，数控振荡器是一种关键的射频 (RF) 集成电路 (IC) 构建模块，主导着 RF 系统的相位噪声和抖动性能。具体来说，我们将 DCO 设计流程分解为两个步骤，并在每个步骤中使用 AI 来提高生产力并优化性能。此外，我们还演示了人工智能如何帮助射频 IC 设计人员创建非常规电路组件，以应对具有挑战性的设计规范。总体而言，所提出的流程能够在一次性训练后 80 秒内综合 DCO 设计，包括原理图和布局，并且频率在 1 至 20 GHz 之间灵活。此外，当多个设计参数满足标称条件下的目标规格时，它可以在工艺变化下选择最稳健的设计。使用在 GlobalFoundries $22-\mathrm{nm}$ CMOS SOI 工艺中实现的两个硅原型来演示所提出的自动化 DCO 设计流程。在测量中，它们在 7.1 至 8.6 GHz 和 3.8 至 4.6 GHz 下实现了 $\gt 192.4-\mathrm{dBc} / \mathrm{Hz}$ 品质因数 (FoM) 和 $\lt 1.5-\mathrm{kHz}$ 频率分辨率，优于类似频率下的现有手动设计。

items.title: Energy-Efficient Large-Scale Vector Similarity Search in NAND-Flash via Hybrid Matching.
items.abstract: Vector similarity search (VSS) is crucial in many AI applications, such as few-shot learning (FSL) and approximate nearest-neighbor search (ANNS), but it demands significant memory capacity and incurs substantial energy costs for data transfers during large-scale comparisons. Various in-memory search technologies have been developed to improve energy efficiency, with NAND-based multi-bit content-addressable memory (MCAM) standing out as a promising solution for its high density and large capacity. MCAM can operate in exact-search (ES) mode, supporting only perfect matches with low energy cost, or in approximate-search (AS) mode, enabling flexible VSS. However, AS mode incurs significant energy waste when comparing queries with non-target stored vectors. To address this issue, we propose Hybrid-M, a 3D NAND-based in-memory VSS architecture that integrates both modes into a single hybrid matching process, using ES mode as a filter to reduce redundant searches for AS mode. We apply three techniques to optimize this integration: range encoding for multi-level cells (MLC) to enhance filtering, search voltage shifts to mitigate the impact on AS accuracy and reduce matching currents, and a filtering-aware training method to further improve reliability and energy efficiency. Results show that Hybrid-M achieves comparable accuracy while reducing energy consumption by 67% to 83% compared to MACM-based VSS using only AS mode, across various many-class FSL and ANNS workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 向量相似性搜索（VSS）在许多人工智能应用中至关重要，例如少样本学习（FSL）和近似最近邻搜索（ANNS），但它需要大量的内存容量，并且在大规模比较期间的数据传输会产生大量的能源成本。为了提高能源效率，人们开发了各种内存搜索技术，其中基于 NAND 的多位内容可寻址存储器 (MCAM) 因其高密度和大容量而成为一种有前途的解决方案。 MCAM 可以在精确搜索 (ES) 模式下运行，仅支持低能耗的完美匹配，也可以在近似搜索 (AS) 模式下运行，从而实现灵活的 VSS。然而，当将查询与非目标存储向量进行比较时，AS 模式会导致大量的能源浪费。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Hybrid-M，这是一种基于 3D NAND 的内存 VSS 架构，它将两种模式集成到单个混合匹配过程中，使用 ES 模式作为过滤器来减少 AS 模式的冗余搜索。我们应用三种技术来优化这种集成：用于多级单元 (MLC) 的范围编码以增强滤波、搜索电压偏移以减轻对 AS 精度的影响并减少匹配电流，以及滤波感知训练方法以进一步提高可靠性和能效。结果表明，与仅使用 AS 模式的基于 MACM 的 VSS 相比，Hybrid-M 在各种多类 FSL 和 ANNS 工作负载中实现了相当的精度，同时将能耗降低了 67% 至 83%。

items.title: Mixed Structural Choice Operator: Enhancing Technology Mapping with Heterogeneous Representations.
items.abstract: The independence of logic optimization and technology mapping poses a significant challenge in achieving high-quality synthesis results. Recent studies have improved optimization outcomes through collaborative optimization of multiple logic representations and have improved structural bias through structural choices. However, these methods still rely on technology-independent optimization and fail to truly resolve structural bias issues. This paper proposes a scalable and efficient framework based on Mixed Structural Choices (MCH). This is a novel heterogeneous mapping method that combines multiple logic representations with technology-aware optimization. MCH flexibly integrates different logic representations and stores candidates for various optimization strategies. By comprehensively evaluating the technology costs of these candidates, it enhances technology mapping and addresses structural bias issues in logic synthesis. Notably, the MCH-based lookup table (LUT) mapping algorithm set new records in the EPFL Best Results Challenge by combining the structural strengths of both And-Inverter Graph (AIG) and XOR-Majority Graph (XMG) logic representations. Additionally, MCH-based ASIC technology mapping achieves a $3.73 \%$ area and $8.94 \%$ delay reduction (balanced), 20.35% delay reduction (delay-oriented), and $\mathbf{2 1. 0 2 \%}$ area reduction (area-oriented), outperforming traditional structural choice methods. Furthermore, MCH-based logic optimization utilizes diverse structures to surpass local optima and achieve better results.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑优化和技术映射的独立性对实现高质量综合结果提出了重大挑战。最近的研究通过多种逻辑表示的协作优化改善了优化结果，并通过结构选择改善了结构偏差。然而，这些方法仍然依赖于技术无关的优化，未能真正解决结构偏差问题。本文提出了一种基于混合结构选择（MCH）的可扩展且高效的框架。这是一种新颖的异构映射方法，它将多种逻辑表示与技术感知优化相结合。 MCH灵活地集成不同的逻辑表示并存储各种优化策略的候选者。通过综合评估这些候选技术的技术成本，它增强了技术映射并解决了逻辑综合中的结构偏差问题。值得注意的是，基于 MCH 的查找表 (LUT) 映射算法通过结合与反转图 (AIG) 和异或多数图 (XMG) 逻辑表示的结构优势，在 EPFL 最佳结果挑战赛中创造了新记录。此外，基于MCH的ASIC技术映射实现了$3.73 \%$面积和$8.94 \%$延迟减少（平衡）、20.35%延迟减少（面向延迟）和$\mathbf{2 1. 0 2 \%}$面积减少（面向面积），优于传统的结构选择方法。此外，基于MCH的逻辑优化利用多种结构来超越局部最优并取得更好的结果。

items.title: Cross-Attention for AES Mode Variation in Side-Channel Analysis.
items.abstract: Portability poses a significant challenge for Deep Learning (DL)-based profiling Side-Channel Analysis (SCA) on AES encryption, as attackers cannot always ensure that training and target samples use the same encryption mode. To address this, we propose an Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) DL-SCA framework for achieving effective and robust cross-encryption-mode attacks. By incorporating cross-attention and UDA techniques, our framework aligns high-dimensional input samples, reducing interference from encryption mode mismatches. Evaluation across five distinct AES modes demonstrates that our method achieves robust SCA performance without requiring prior knowledge or multiple labeled datasets for analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 可移植性对 AES 加密上基于深度学习 (DL) 的分析侧通道分析 (SCA) 提出了重大挑战，因为攻击者无法始终确保训练样本和目标样本使用相同的加密模式。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种无监督域适应（UDA）DL-SCA 框架，用于实现有效且鲁棒的交叉加密模式攻击。通过结合交叉注意力和 UDA 技术，我们的框架对齐高维输入样本，减少加密模式不匹配的干扰。对五种不同 AES 模式的评估表明，我们的方法无需先验知识或多个标记数据集即可实现强大的 SCA 性能进行分析。

items.title: GNN-MLS: Signal Routing in Mixed-Node 3D ICs through GNN-Assisted Metal Layer Sharing.
items.abstract: Native 3D Integrated Circuit (3D IC) design offers enhanced performance and density but faces challenges in signal routing due to limited true 3D EDA tool support. Pseudo-3D flows bridge this gap but lack cross-tier optimization, critical for both mixed-node and homogeneous designs. Metal Layer Sharing (MLS) addresses this by enabling cross-tier routing co-optimization but risks timing degradation if not applied strategically. Additionally, MLS creates open connections in hybrid-bonded 3D ICs, making chips untestable. We propose GNN-MLS, a Graph Neural Network-based framework for precise MLS net selection, combined with a tailored DFT solution for robust testability. Experiments show GNN-MLS reduces timing violations by 79% and improves WNS and TNS by 81% and 94%, and moves designs closer to true 3D ICs.
items.abstract_zh: 原生 3D 集成电路 (3D IC) 设计可提供增强的性能和密度，但由于真正的 3D EDA 工具支持有限，因此在信号路由方面面临挑战。伪 3D 流程弥补了这一差距，但缺乏跨层优化，这对于混合节点和同构设计至关重要。金属层共享（MLS）通过启用跨层路由协同优化来解决这个问题，但如果没有策略性地应用，则存在时序退化的风险。此外，MLS 在混合键合 3D IC 中创建开放连接，使芯片无法测试。我们提出了 GNN-MLS，这是一种基于图神经网络的框架，用于精确的 MLS 网络选择，并与定制的 DFT 解决方案相结合，以实现稳健的可测试性。实验表明，GNN-MLS 将时序违规减少了 79%，并将 WNS 和 TNS 分别提高了 81% 和 94%，并使设计更接近真正的 3D IC。

items.title: ANGraph: A GNN-Based Performance Prediction Framework for Asynchronous Neuromorphic Hardware.
items.abstract: Design space exploration (DSE) through system-level simulation is essential for designing energy-efficient asynchronous neuromorphic hardware, which is increasingly promising in edge AI applications. However, there are significant mismatches between system-level predictions and gate-level simulations, resulting in low precision when predicting performance during the DSE process for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. To address this issue, we put forward ANGraph, a graph neural network (GNN)-based performance prediction framework for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. In the ANGraph framework, we transform the intermediate representation of systemlevel simulations into graphs, collect gate-level circuit simulation results to build benchmarks with over one million samples, and train a GNN model to predict hardware latency for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. Additionally, we use a residual network (ResNet)-based method to predict the power consumption of asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. We evaluate these two models on additional datasets without extra training across different scales, process nodes, and traffic patterns of input data. Compared to the latency predictions from the state-of-the-art simulator, we improve the R -square score by 0.69 and reduce root mean square error (RMSE) by 76% on average across all datasets. We also achieve an R-square score of 0.98 and a mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of 0.88% for the power consumption prediction task. The benchmarks and models are available at https://github.com/HuaGuaiGuai/ANGraph.
items.abstract_zh: 通过系统级仿真进行设计空间探索（DSE）对于设计节能异步神经形态硬件至关重要，这在边缘人工智能应用中越来越有前景。然而，系统级预测和门级模拟之间存在显着的不匹配，导致异步神经形态硬件的 DSE 过程中预测性能时精度较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ANGraph，一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的异步神经形态硬件性能预测框架。在 ANGraph 框架中，我们将系统级仿真的中间表示转换为图形，收集门级电路仿真结果以构建超过一百万个样本的基准，并训练 GNN 模型来预测异步神经形态硬件的硬件延迟。此外，我们使用基于残差网络（ResNet）的方法来预测异步神经形态硬件的功耗。我们在额外的数据集上评估这两个模型，无需跨不同规模、流程节点和输入数据的流量模式进行额外训练。与最先进的模拟器的延迟预测相比，我们在所有数据集中将 R 方得分平均提高了 0.69，并将均方根误差 (RMSE) 降低了 76%。我们还为功耗预测任务实现了 0.98 的 R 平方分数和 0.88% 的平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE)。基准和模型可在 https://github.com/HuaGuaiGuai/ANGraph 获取。

items.title: SuperCopyback: Revisiting Copyback on Modern High-Performance NAND Flash-based SSDs.
items.abstract: NAND flash-based SSDs have emerged as a critical storage solution due to their exceptional performance and cost-effectiveness. However, the sequential write limitation of NAND flash blocks necessitates garbage collection (GC) to reclaim space occupied by stale data. Nevertheless, the extensive data migration involved in GC significantly impacts performance and Quality of Service (QoS) of SSDs. To mitigate this issue, copyback has been proposed as a means to accelerate GC by eliminating off-chip data movements. Specifically, copyback reads data into on-plane latches and immidiately re-writes it into another page on the same plane. However, in the case of modern high-performance SSDs, copyback is rarely utilized due to the following challenges: (1) Copyback operates at the page-level and thus fails to effectively reclaim invalid data within the context of subpage-level mapping; (2) Copyback eliminates off-chip data movements, preventing data pages from being read out for Redundant Array of Independent NAND (RAIN) parity computation, thereby compromising SSD reliability. In this study, we introduce SuperCopyback as a solution that efficiently addresses these issues for modern SSDs. Firstly, we propose a Multiple-Read-One-Write (MROW) copyback approach through lightweight latch circuit modifications to enable subpage-level copyback implementation; additionally, we propose an orchestrated GC method to effectively utilize MROW copyback. Furthermore, we present a novel copyback-based RAIN scheme that conceals data pages readout latency in write operations and relocates parities to support efficient copyback. The experimental results on both synthetic and real traces demonstrate that SuperCopyback achieves a performance comparable to an ideal scenario where data movement of $\mathbf{4 K B}$ takes only 1ns.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 NAND 闪存的 SSD 因其卓越的性能和成本效益而成为关键的存储解决方案。然而，NAND 闪存块的顺序写入限制需要垃圾收集 (GC) 来回收陈旧数据占用的空间。然而，GC 中涉及的大量数据迁移会严重影响 SSD 的性能和服务质量 (QoS)。为了缓解这个问题，人们提出了回拷作为一种通过消除片外数据移动来加速 GC 的方法。具体来说，回拷将数据读取到平面上锁存器中，并立即将其重新写入同一平面上的另一个页面中。然而，在现代高性能SSD的情况下，由于以下挑战，回写很少被使用：（1）回写在页面级别操作，因此无法在子页面级别映射的上下文中有效回收无效数据； (2) 回写消除了片外数据移动，防止数据页被读出以进行独立 NAND 冗余阵列 (RAIN) 奇偶校验计算，从而损害 SSD 的可靠性。在本研究中，我们引入 SuperCopyback 作为有效解决现代 SSD 的这些问题的解决方案。首先，我们提出了一种多读一写（MROW）回拷方法，通过轻量级锁存电路修改来实现子页面级回拷实现；此外，我们提出了一种精心策划的 GC 方法来有效利用 MROW 回拷。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的基于回拷的 RAIN 方案，该方案隐藏写入操作中的数据页读出延迟并重新定位奇偶校验以支持高效的回拷。合成迹线和真实迹线的实验结果表明，SuperCopyback 的性能可与 $\mathbf{4 K B}$ 的数据移动仅需 1 ns 的理想场景相媲美。

items.title: PASK: Cold Start Mitigation for Inference with Proactive and Selective Kernel Loading on GPUs.
items.abstract: Today, DNN inference is widely adopted, with numerous inference services being spawned from scratch across instances in scenarios such as spot serving, serverless scaling and edge computing, where frequent start-stops are required. In this work, we first delve into the inference workflow and uncover the origins of cold start when invoking a DNN model. Specifically, DNN execution is blocked by the kernel loading process to prepare the code object executing on GPU at the DL primitive library (e.g., cuDNN and MIOpen). To tackle this, we propose PASK, a kernel loading and reusing middleware to mitigate the widespread cold start issue. Unlike the reactive kernel scheduling policy used by existing frameworks, PASK adopts a proactive strategy to interleave code loading, kernel issuing and GPU computation to achieve higher hardware utilization. To further reduce the loading overhead, PASK recycles existing loaded kernels to accomplish the DNN operator, rather than introducing new kernels for every layer. Meanwhile, PASK categorically organizes the cached kernels to efficiently find the applicable kernel for reuse and thus minimize incurred runtime overhead. We implement and evaluate PASK atop of open source DNN inference engine and primitive library on off-the-shelf GPUs. Experiments demonstrate PASK is capable of alleviating the cold start overhead of popular DNN models with $5.62 \times$ speedup on average.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，DNN 推理已被广泛采用，在现场服务、无服务器扩展和边缘计算等需要频繁启停的场景中，跨实例从头开始生成大量推理服务。在这项工作中，我们首先深入研究推理工作流程并揭示调用 DNN 模型时冷启动的起源。具体来说，DNN 执行被内核加载过程阻止，以准备在 DL 原语库（例如 cuDNN 和 MIOpen）上在 GPU 上执行的代码对象。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 PASK，这是一种加载和重用中间件的内核，以缓解普遍存在的冷启动问题。与现有框架使用的反应式内核调度策略不同，PASK 采用主动策略将代码加载、内核发布和 GPU 计算交错，以实现更高的硬件利用率。为了进一步减少加载开销，PASK 回收现有加载的内核来完成 DNN 算子，而不是为每一层引入新的内核。同时，PASK 对缓存的内核进行分类组织，以有效地找到可重用的适用内核，从而最大限度地减少运行时开销。我们在开源 DNN 推理引擎和现成 GPU 上的原语库之上实现和评估 PASK。实验证明 PASK 能够减轻流行 DNN 模型的冷启动开销，平均加速速度为 5.62 美元 × 美元。

items.title: VQT-CiM: Accelerating Vector Quantization Enhanced Transformer with Ferroelectric Compute-in-Memory.
items.abstract: Transformer models have achieved state-of-the-art performance in various natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) tasks. To meet their substantial computational demands, the compute-in-memory (CiM) architectures, which alleviate the memory wall problem and enable efficient vector-matrix multiplication (VMM), have been adopted for transformer accelerators. However, the dynamic VMM involved in the attention mechanism, which necessitates runtime write operations, presents significant challenges for non-volatile memory (NVM)-based CiM designs. High write overhead, complex compute-write-compute (CWC) dependencies, and limited endurance reduce their effectiveness. In this paper, we propose VQT-CiM, a ferroelectric FET (FeFET)-based CiM design that accelerates vector quantization (VQ) enhanced transformers by eliminating the runtime write operations. VQT-CiM quantizes keys and values in self-attention to convert dynamic VMMs in inner-product and weighted-sum into static VMMs with the codebooks, enabling efficient calculations with CiM crossbars. However, directly applying VQ hinders the accuracy of transformer model due to its limited representation capability. To address this, we introduce a vector quantization scheme that integrates residual VQ (RVQ) and product VQ (PVQ) for enhanced representation space. We present an efficient hardware implementation for the proposed VQT-CiM with optimized dataflow in RVQ, which incorporates the FeFET-based CiM crossbars and peripheral digital circuits. Evaluation results suggest that VQT-CiM achieves the $3.54 \times$ and $4.53 \times$ improvements in energy efficiency and throughput, respectively, compared to state-of-the-art NVM-based CiM transformer designs.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型在各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 任务中实现了最先进的性能。为了满足大量的计算需求，Transformer 加速器采用了内存计算 (CiM) 架构，该架构可缓解内存墙问题并实现高效的向量矩阵乘法 (VMM)。然而，注意力机制中涉及的动态 VMM 需要运行时写入操作，这给基于非易失性存储器 (NVM) 的 CiM 设计带来了重大挑战。高写入开销、复杂的计算-写入-计算 (CWC) 依赖性以及有限的耐用性降低了其有效性。在本文中，我们提出了 VQT-CiM，这是一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的 CiM 设计，可通过消除运行时写入操作来加速矢量量化 (VQ) 增强型变压器。 VQT-CiM 量化自注意力中的键和值，将内积和加权和中的动态 VMM 转换为带有码本的静态 VMM，从而能够使用 CiM 交叉开关进行高效计算。然而，由于其表示能力有限，直接应用 VQ 会影响变压器模型的准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种矢量量化方案，该方案集成了残差 VQ (RVQ) 和乘积 VQ (PVQ) 以增强表示空间。我们为所提出的 VQT-CiM 提供了一种高效的硬件实现，并在 RVQ 中优化了数据流，其中结合了基于 FeFET 的 CiM 交叉开关和外围数字电路。评估结果表明，与最先进的基于 NVM 的 CiM 变压器设计相比，VQT-CiM 在能源效率和吞吐量方面分别实现了 3.54 美元和 4.53 美元的改进。

items.title: MIA-aware FinFlex Cell Legalization with Power-Driven Cell Version Substitution.
items.abstract: FinFlex standard cells have been proposed in sub-3 nm process nodes by TSMC to offer great design flexibility and a good trade-off between performance, power, and area efficiency. In the FinFlex technology, each cell type has a number of versions, varying in cell heights and threshold voltages, enabling flexible cell substitution for placement optimization. This paper presents the first work in the literature on standard cell legalization for the FinFlex technology, addressing cell version substitution, power efficiency, and minimum implant area (MIA) constraints. Our proposed algorithm comprises three stages: intra-row violationaware pre-processing considering timing and power levels, directed acyclic graph-based initial legalization with cell version substitution, and dynamic programming-based inter-row violation removal. Experimental results show the superior performance of our approach over a baseline using state-of-the-art techniques.
items.abstract_zh: TSMC 在 3 nm 以下工艺节点中提出了 FinFlex 标准单元，以提供极大的设计灵活性以及性能、功耗和面积效率之间的良好权衡。在 FinFlex 技术中，每种单元类型都有多个版本，单元高度和阈值电压各不相同，从而可以灵活地替换单元以实现布局优化。本文介绍了 FinFlex 技术标准单元合法化文献中的第一项工作，解决了单元版本替换、功率效率和最小植入面积 (MIA) 限制的问题。我们提出的算法包括三个阶段：考虑时序和功率级别的行内违规感知预处理、具有单元版本替换的基于有向非循环图的初始合法化以及基于动态编程的行间违规去除。实验结果表明，我们的方法比使用最先进技术的基线具有优越的性能。

items.title: Construction of DAG Models for Autonomous Systems.
items.abstract: Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) are widely deployed as task models in autonomous systems, including vehicles and drones, to capture functional dependency. DAG scheduling has been extensively investigated by various communities to shorten makespan, under the common assumption that the model itself is given a priori. This work studies a rarely touched problem - construction of DAG models - and considers time-triggered blended task chains predominant in autonomous systems. We report representation semantics and a topology optimization method. Experiments show that the average end-to-end response time reduction is 4.8 times of the conventional Floyd algorithm. Our time complexity is $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$, making it suitable for handling dynamic tasks as well.
items.abstract_zh: 有向无环图 (DAG) 作为任务模型广泛部署在自主系统（包括车辆和无人机）中，以捕获功能依赖性。 DAG 调度已被各个社区广泛研究，以缩短完工时间，普遍假设模型本身是先验的。这项工作研究了一个很少涉及的问题 - DAG 模型的构建 - 并考虑了在自治系统中占主导地位的时间触发的混合任务链。我们报告表示语义和拓扑优化方法。实验表明，平均端到端响应时间降低是传统Floyd算法的4.8倍。我们的时间复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$，使其也适合处理动态任务。

items.title: DRAFT: Decoupling Backpropagation from Pre-trained Backbone for Efficient Transformer Fine-Tuning on Edge.
items.abstract: Transformers have demonstrated outstanding performance across diverse applications recently, necessitating finetuning to optimize their performance for downstream tasks. However, fine-tuning remains challenging due to the substantial computational costs and storage overhead of backpropagation (BP). The existing fine-tuning techniques require the BP through the massive pre-trained backbone weights for computing the input gradient, resulting in significant computing overhead and memory footprint for resource-constrained edge devices. To address the challenge, this work proposes an algorithm-hardware co-design framework, DRAFT, for efficient Transformer finetuning by decoupling the BP from the backbone weights, thereby efficiently reducing the BP overhead. The framework employs Feedback Decoupling Approximation (FDA), an efficient finetuning algorithm that decouples BP into two low-complexity pathways: trainable adapter pathway and sparse ternary Bypass Network (BPN) pathway. The two pathways work collaboratively to approximate the conventional BP process. Further, a DRAFT accelerator is proposed, featuring a reconfigurable design with lightweight sparse gather networks and dynamic workflows to fully harness the sparsity and data parallelism inherent to the FDA. Experimental results demonstrate that DRAFT achieves a speedup of $4.9 \times$ and an energy efficiency improvement of $4.2 \times$ on average compared to baseline fine-tuning methods across multiple fine-tuning tasks with negligible accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 最近在不同的应用程序中展示了出色的性能，因此需要进行微调以优化其下游任务的性能。然而，由于反向传播（BP）的巨大计算成本和存储开销，微调仍然具有挑战性。现有的微调技术需要BP通过大量预先训练的主干权重来计算输入梯度，这导致资源受限的边缘设备产生巨大的计算开销和内存占用。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计框架 DRAFT，通过将 BP 与主干权重解耦来实现高效 Transformer 微调，从而有效降低 BP 开销。该框架采用反馈解耦近似 (FDA)，这是一种高效的微调算法，可将 BP 解耦为两个低复杂度路径：可训练适配器路径和稀疏三元旁路网络 (BPN) 路径。这两种途径协同工作以近似传统的 BP 过程。此外，还提出了 DRAFT 加速器，其特点是可重构设计，具有轻量级稀疏收集网络和动态工作流程，以充分利用 FDA 固有的稀疏性和数据并行性。实验结果表明，与跨多个微调任务的基线微调方法相比，DRAFT 平均实现了 4.9 美元的加速和 4.2 美元的能源效率提升，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

items.title: Segmented Angular Pre-Processing for Accurate and Efficient In-Memory Vector Similarity Search.
items.abstract: Vector similarity search (VSS) is a fundamental operation in modern AI applications, including few-shot learning (FSL) and approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS). Cosine similarity is widely regarded as the optimal metric for VSS. However, VSS incurs substantial energy and computational overhead, primarily due to frequent vector transfers and the complexity of cosine similarity calculations in high-dimensional spaces. Prior research has explored the use of ternary content addressable memories (TCAMs) for parallel in-memory VSS to reduce vector movement. Exact-Match TCAM (EX-TCAM) enables exact bitmatching, and Best-Match TCAM (Best-TCAM) supports Hamming distance calculations, both of which are spatial metrics and computationally efficient. As a result, existing TCAM-based VSS approaches have focused on developing frameworks to efficiently support more complex spatial metrics such as the $L_{\infty}$ and $L_{1}$ norms. However, these spatial metrics exhibit notable discrepancies compared to angular metrics like cosine similarity. To overcome this limitation, we propose Seg-Cos, a TCAM-based framework that directly approximates cosine similarity within TCAM for angular VSS. Seg-Cos introduces a dedicated preprocessing technique and encoding scheme that segments vectors and encodes them as circular ranges based on their angles and magnitudes. Seg-Cos is the first angular VSS framework compatible with both EX-TCAM and Best-TCAM, enabling accurate and energy-efficient VSS in the angular domain. Simulation results demonstrate that Seg-Cos improves energy efficiency by $1.41 \times$ and achieves up to $2.2 \%$ higher accuracy over prior EX-TCAMbased methods in FSL. In ANNS, Seg-Cos enhances recall rate by $10 \%$ to $52 \%$ and improves energy efficiency by $2 \times$ compared to previous Best-TCAM approaches with $L_{1}$ norm.
items.abstract_zh: 向量相似性搜索（VSS）是现代人工智能应用中的基本操作，包括少样本学习（FSL）和近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）。余弦相似度被广泛认为是 VSS 的最佳度量。然而，VSS 会产生大量的能量和计算开销，这主要是由于频繁的向量传输和高维空间中余弦相似度计算的复杂性。先前的研究探索了使用三态内容可寻址存储器 (TCAM) 进行并行内存 VSS 来减少向量移动。精确匹配 TCAM (EX-TCAM) 可实现精确位匹配，而最佳匹配 TCAM (Best-TCAM) 支持汉明距离计算，两者都是空间度量且计算效率高。因此，现有的基于 TCAM 的 VSS 方法专注于开发框架以有效支持更复杂的空间指标，例如 $L_{\infty}$ 和 $L_{1}$ 规范。然而，与余弦相似度等角度度量相比，这些空间度量表现出显着的差异。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了 Seg-Cos，这是一种基于 TCAM 的框架，可直接近似角度 VSS 的 TCAM 内的余弦相似度。 Seg-Cos 引入了一种专用的预处理技术和编码方案，可对矢量进行分段并根据其角度和大小将其编码为圆形范围。 Seg-Cos 是第一个兼容 EX-TCAM 和 Best-TCAM 的角度 VSS 框架，可在角度域实现准确且节能的 VSS。仿真结果表明，与 FSL 中之前基于 EX-TCAM 的方法相比，Seg-Cos 将能源效率提高了 1.41 美元 \times$，精度提高了 2.2 美元\%$。在 ANNS 中，与之前采用 $L_{1}$ 范数的 Best-TCAM 方法相比，Seg-Cos 将召回率提高了 $10 \%$ 至 $52 \%$，并将能源效率提高了 $2 \times$。

items.title: Expanding Logical Space Freely: A Memory-efficient Mapping Table Design for Compressional SSDs.
items.abstract: Compressional SSDs can be a mixed blessing. While they offer users expanded logical space beyond the physical capacity, they complicate the Flash Translation Layer (FTL) design by requiring a larger Logical-to-Physical (L2P) address mapping, which places a heavier burden on the limited in-SSD memory, leading to a degraded I/O performance. In this paper, we aim to reduce the memory footprint of the L2P mapping table in compressional SSDs by proposing a novel N-to-1 L2P mapping table design that consolidates multiple logical entries into a single entry. This approach eliminates the duplication of physical page numbers when a physical page contains several compressed logical pages. To accommodate the dynamic compression ratios of real-world workloads, we introduce promotion and demotion that enable mapping table entries to migrate between pages with different compression ratios. Additionally, to address the issue of partial invalidation-where some compressed logical pages within a physical page are invalid due to the N-to-1 mapping-we present a compression-aware garbage collection algorithm aimed at minimizing the number of copy operations for partially invalid physical pages. We have implemented our design in MQsim, a widely used SSD simulator, and have conducted a series of experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. The results demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces the mapping table size in compressional SSDs, leading to an improved mapping table cache hit ratio and a reduced I/O latency compared to traditional compressional SSDs.
items.abstract_zh: 压缩 SSD 可能是好坏参半。虽然它们为用户提供了超出物理容量的扩展逻辑空间，但它们需要更大的逻辑到物理 (L2P) 地址映射，从而使闪存转换层 (FTL) 设计变得复杂，这给有限的 SSD 内存带来了更重的负担，导致 I/O 性能下降。在本文中，我们的目标是通过提出一种新颖的 N 对 1 L2P 映射表设计来减少压缩 SSD 中 L2P 映射表的内存占用，该设计将多个逻辑条目合并为单个条目。当物理页包含多个压缩逻辑页时，此方法消除了物理页号的重复。为了适应实际工作负载的动态压缩比，我们引入了升级和降级，使映射表条目能够在具有不同压缩比的页面之间迁移。此外，为了解决部分无效问题（由于 N 对 1 映射，物理页中的一些压缩逻辑页无效），我们提出了一种压缩感知垃圾收集算法，旨在最大限度地减少部分无效物理页的复制操作数量。我们在广泛使用的 SSD 模拟器 MQsim 中实现了我们的设计，并进行了一系列实验来评估所提出技术的有效性。结果表明，与传统压缩 SSD 相比，我们的方法显着减小了压缩 SSD 中的映射表大小，从而提高了映射表缓存命中率并减少了 I/O 延迟。

items.title: Self-Attention to Operator Learning-based 3D-IC Thermal Simulation.
items.abstract: Thermal management in 3D ICs is increasingly challenging due to higher power densities. Traditional PDESolving based methods, while accurate, are too slow for iterative design. Machine learning approaches like FNO provide faster alternatives but suffer from high-frequency information loss and high-fidelity data dependency. We introduce Self-Attention UNet Fourier Neural Operator (SAU-FNO), a novel framework combining self-attention and U-Net with FNO to capture longrange dependencies and model local high-frequency features effectively. Transfer learning is employed to fine-tune low-fidelity data, minimizing the need for extensive high-fidelity datasets and speeding up training. Experiments demonstrate that SAUFNO achieves state-of-the-art thermal prediction accuracy and provides an $842 \times$ speedup over traditional FEM methods, making it an efficient tool for advanced 3D IC thermal simulations.
items.abstract_zh: 由于功率密度更高，3D IC 中的热管理变得越来越具有挑战性。基于传统偏微分方程求解的方法虽然准确，但对于迭代设计来说速度太慢。 FNO 等机器学习方法提供了更快的替代方案，但面临高频信息丢失和高保真数据依赖性的问题。我们引入了自注意力 UNet 傅立叶神经算子（SAU-FNO），这是一种将自注意力和 U-Net 与 FNO 相结合的新颖框架，可以捕获长程依赖性并有效地模拟局部高频特征。采用迁移学习来微调低保真度数据，最大限度地减少对大量高保真数据集的需求并加快训练速度。实验表明，SAUFNO 实现了最先进的热预测精度，并且比传统 FEM 方法提供了 842 美元的加速，使其成为先进 3D IC 热模拟的有效工具。

items.title: Uncertainty-Aware Energy Management for Wearable IoT Devices with Conformal Prediction.
items.abstract: Wearable internet of things (IoT) are transforming diverse healthcare applications including rehabilitation, vital symptom monitoring, and activity recognition. However, the small form-factor of wearable devices constrains the battery capacity and the operating lifetime, thus requiring frequent recharging or battery replacements. Frequent recharging and battery replacement leads to lower quality of service and user satisfaction. Harvesting energy from ambient sources to augment the battery has emerged as an effective solution to improving its operating lifetime. However, ambient energy sources are highly stochastic, making energy management challenging. Prior approaches typically use point predictions for estimating future energy and do not explicitly account for the uncertainty. In strong contrast to prior approaches, this paper presents a conformal predictionbased method for future energy harvest that provides small uncertainty regions with provable coverage guarantees (true output is within the uncertainty region). The uncertainty regions over energy harvest are then leveraged in an energy management algorithm that employs Monte Carlo sampling to evaluate the quality of multiple decisions with varying energy harvests. The decisions are then combined using a lightweight machine learning model to make an energy management decision that is close to the optimal. Experiments on two diverse real-world datasets with about 10 users show that conformal prediction achieves more than 90% coverage with tight prediction intervals; and the energy management algorithm produces decisions that are on average within 2 J of an optimal Oracle, thus showing its effectiveness in improving the quality of service.
items.abstract_zh: 可穿戴物联网 (IoT) 正在改变各种医疗保健应用，包括康复、生命症状监测和活动识别。然而，可穿戴设备的小外形尺寸限制了电池容量和工作寿命，因此需要频繁充电或更换电池。频繁充电和更换电池会导致服务质量和用户满意度下降。从环境来源收集能量来增强电池已成为延长电池使用寿命的有效解决方案。然而，环境能源具有高度随机性，使得能源管理具有挑战性。现有方法通常使用点预测来估计未来能量，并且没有明确考虑不确定性。与之前的方法形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出了一种基于共形预测的未来能量收集方法，该方法为小的不确定性区域提供了可证明的覆盖范围保证（真实输出位于不确定性区域内）。然后，在能源管理算法中利用能量收获的不确定性区域，该算法采用蒙特卡罗采样来评估具有不同能量收获的多个决策的质量。然后使用轻量级机器学习模型将这些决策组合起来，以做出接近最优的能源管理决策。在大约 10 个用户的两个不同的现实世界数据集上进行的实验表明，保形预测在紧密的预测区间内实现了 90% 以上的覆盖率；能源管理算法产生的决策平均与最佳预言机相差2J以内，从而显示出其在提高服务质量方面的有效性。

items.title: PIMPAL: Accelerating LLM Inference on Edge Devices via In-DRAM Arithmetic Lookup.
items.abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices poses significant challenges due to their high computational and memory demands. In particular, General MatrixVector Multiplication (GEMV), a key operation in LLM inference, is highly memory-intensive, making it difficult to accelerate using conventional edge computing systems. While Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have emerged as a promising solution to this challenge, they often suffer from high area overhead or restricted computational precision. This paper proposes PIMPAL (Processing-In-Memory architecture with Parallel Arithmetic Lookup), a cost-effective PIM architecture leveraging LookUp Table (LUT)-based computation for GEMV acceleration in sLLMs (small LLMs). By replacing traditional arithmetic operations with parallel in-DRAM LUT lookups, PIMPAL significantly reduces area overhead while maintaining high performance. PIMPAL introduces three key innovations: (1) it divides DRAM bank subarrays into compute blocks for parallel LUT processing; (2) it employs Localityaware Compute Mapping (LCM) to reduce row activations by maximizing LUT access locality; and (3) it enables multi-precision computations through a LUT Aggregation (LAG) mechanism that combines results from multiple small LUTs. Experimental results show that PIMPAL achieves up to $17.8 x$ higher performance than previous LUT-based PIM designs and reduces area overhead by $40 \%$ compared to conventional processing unit-based PIM designs.
items.abstract_zh: 由于计算和内存需求较高，在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 带来了重大挑战。特别是，LLM 推理中的关键操作通用矩阵向量乘法 (GEMV) 是高度内存密集型的，因此很难使用传统的边缘计算系统进行加速。虽然内存处理 (PIM) 架构已成为应对这一挑战的有前途的解决方案，但它们经常遭受高面积开销或有限的计算精度的困扰。本文提出了 PIMPAL（具有并行算术查找的内存处理架构），这是一种经济高效的 PIM 架构，利用基于查找表 (LUT) 的计算在 sLLM（小型 LLM）中实现 GEMV 加速。通过用并行的 DRAM 内 LUT 查找取代传统的算术运算，PIMPAL 显着减少了面积开销，同时保持了高性能。 PIMPAL 引入了三项关键创新：(1) 将 DRAM Bank 子阵列划分为计算块以进行并行 LUT 处理； (2) 它采用局部感知计算映射 (LCM)，通过最大化 LUT 访问局部性来减少行激活； (3) 它通过 LUT 聚合 (LAG) 机制实现多精度计算，该机制组合了多个小型 LUT 的结果。实验结果表明，与之前基于 LUT 的 PIM 设计相比，PIMPAL 的性能提高了 17.8 美元 x 美元，并且与传统的基于处理单元的 PIM 设计相比，面积开销减少了 40 美元\%$。

items.title: Security of Approximate Neural Networks against Power Side-channel Attacks.
items.abstract: Emerging low-energy computing technologies, in particular approximate computing, are becoming increasingly relevant in key applications. A significant use case for these technologies is reduced energy consumption in Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), an increasingly pressing concern with the rapid growth of AI deployments. It is essential we understand the security implications of approximate computing in an ANN context before this practice becomes commonplace. In this work, we examine the test case of approximate ANN processing elements (PE) in terms of information leakage via the power side channel. We perform a weight extraction correlation Power Analysis (CPA) attack under three approximation scenarios: overclocking, voltage scaling, and circuit level bitwise approximation. We demonstrate that as the degree of approximation increases the Signal to Noise Ratio (SNR) of power traces rapidly degrades. We show that the Measurement to Disclosure (MTD) increases for all approximate techniques. An MTD of 48 under precise computing is increased to at minimum 200 (bitwise approximate circuit at $\mathbf{2 5 \%}$ approximation), and under some approximation scenarios $\gt1024$. i.e. an increase in attack difficulty of at least x4 and potentially over x20. A relative Security-Power-Delay (SPD) analysis reveals that, in addition to the across the board improvement vs precise computing, voltage and clock scaling both significantly outperform approximate circuits with voltage scaling as the highest performing technique.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的低能耗计算技术，特别是近似计算，在关键应用中变得越来越重要。这些技术的一个重要用例是降低人工神经网络 (ANN) 的能耗，这是随着人工智能部署的快速增长而日益紧迫的问题。在这种做法变得普遍之前，我们必须了解人工神经网络环境中近似计算的安全影响。在这项工作中，我们通过电源侧通道的信息泄漏来检查近似 ANN 处理元件 (PE) 的测试用例。我们在三种近似场景下执行权重提取相关功率分析（CPA）攻击：超频、电压缩放和电路级按位近似。我们证明，随着近似程度的增加，功率迹线的信噪比 (SNR) 会迅速下降。我们表明，所有近似技术的披露测量（MTD）都会增加。精确计算下的 MTD 48 增加到最小 200（按位近似电路在 $\mathbf{2 5 \%}$ 近似），并且在某些近似场景下 $\gt1024$。即攻击难度至少增加 4 倍，甚至可能超过 20 倍。相对安全功耗延迟 (SPD) 分析表明，除了与精确计算相比的全面改进之外，电压和时钟缩放都显着优于近似电路，其中电压缩放作为性能最高的技术。

items.title: iTaskSense: Task-Oriented Object Detection in Resource-Constrained Environments.
items.abstract: Task-oriented object detection is increasingly essential for intelligent sensing applications, enabling AI systems to operate autonomously in complex, real-world environments such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and industrial automation. Conventional models often struggle with generalization, requiring vast datasets to accurately detect objects within diverse contexts. In this work, we introduce iTask, a taskoriented object detection framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) to generalize efficiently from limited samples by generating an abstract knowledge graph. This graph encapsulates essential task attributes, allowing iTask to identify objects based on high-level characteristics rather than extensive data, making it possible to adapt to complex mission requirements with minimal samples. iTask addresses the challenges of high computational cost and resource limitations in vision-language models by offering two configuration models: a distilled, task-specific vision transformer optimized for high accuracy in defined tasks, and a quantized version of the model for broader applicability across multiple tasks. Additionally, we designed a hardware acceleration circuit to support real-time processing, essential for edge devices that require low latency and efficient task execution. Our evaluations show that the task-specific configuration achieves a 15% higher accuracy over the quantized configuration in specific scenarios, while the quantized model provides robust multi-task performance. The hardware-accelerated iTask system achieves a $3.5 x$ speedup and a 40% reduction in energy consumption compared to GPU-based implementations. These results demonstrate that iTask’s dual-configuration approach and situational adaptability offer a scalable solution for task-specific object detection, providing robust and efficient performance in resourceconstrained environments.
items.abstract_zh: 面向任务的物体检测对于智能传感应用越来越重要，使人工智能系统能够在自动驾驶、医疗保健和工业自动化等复杂的现实环境中自主运行。传统模型通常难以泛化，需要大量数据集才能准确检测不同上下文中的对象。在这项工作中，我们引入了 iTask，这是一种面向任务的对象检测框架，它利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过生成抽象知识图来从有限的样本中高效地进行泛化。该图封装了基本的任务属性，使 iTask 能够根据高级特征而不是大量数据来识别对象，从而能够以最少的样本适应复杂的任务需求。 iTask 通过提供两种配置模型来解决视觉语言模型中高计算成本和资源限制的挑战：一个针对定义任务的高精度而优化的精炼、特定于任务的视觉转换器，以及一个跨多个任务更广泛适用性的模型的量化版本。此外，我们还设计了硬件加速电路来支持实时处理，这对于需要低延迟和高效任务执行的边缘设备至关重要。我们的评估表明，在特定场景下，特定于任务的配置比量化配置的准确率提高了 15%，而量化模型提供了强大的多任务性能。与基于 GPU 的实现相比，硬件加速的 iTask 系统实现了 3.5 x 美元的加速，能耗降低了 40%。这些结果表明，iTask 的双配置方法和情境适应性为特定任务的对象检测提供了可扩展的解决方案，在资源受限的环境中提供稳健且高效的性能。

items.title: HH-PIM: Dynamic Optimization of Power and Performance with Heterogeneous-Hybrid PIM for Edge AI Devices.
items.abstract: Processing-in-Memory (PIM) architectures offer promising solutions for efficiently handling AI applications in energy-constrained edge environments. While traditional PIM designs enhance performance and energy efficiency by reducing data movement between memory and processing units, they are limited in edge devices due to continuous power demands and the storage requirements of large neural network weights in SRAM and DRAM. Hybrid PIM architectures, incorporating nonvolatile memories like MRAM and ReRAM, mitigate these limitations but struggle with a mismatch between fixed computing resources and dynamically changing inference workloads. To address these challenges, this study introduces a Heterogeneous-Hybrid PIM (HH-PIM) architecture, comprising high-performance MRAM-SRAM PIM modules and low-power MRAM-SRAM PIM modules. We further propose a data placement optimization algorithm that dynamically allocates data based on computational demand, maximizing energy efficiency. FPGA prototyping and power simulations with processors featuring HH-PIM and other PIM types demonstrate that the proposed HH-PIM achieves up to 60.43% average energy savings over conventional PIMs while meeting application latency requirements. These results confirm HH-PIM’s suitability for adaptive, energy-efficient AI processing in edge devices.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构提供了有前景的解决方案，可在能源受限的边缘环境中有效处理 AI 应用。虽然传统的 PIM 设计通过减少内存和处理单元之间的数据移动来提高性能和能源效率，但由于持续的电力需求以及 SRAM 和 DRAM 中大型神经网络权重的存储要求，它们在边缘设备中受到限制。混合 PIM 架构结合了 MRAM 和 ReRAM 等非易失性存储器，缓解了这些限制，但面临着固定计算资源和动态变化的推理工作负载之间不匹配的问题。为了应对这些挑战，本研究引入了异构混合 PIM (HH-PIM) 架构，包括高性能 MRAM-SRAM PIM 模块和低功耗 MRAM-SRAM PIM 模块。我们进一步提出了一种数据放置优化算法，该算法根据计算需求动态分配数据，最大限度地提高能源效率。使用具有 HH-PIM 和其他 PIM 类型的处理器进行的 FPGA 原型设计和功率仿真表明，所提出的 HH-PIM 比传统 PIM 平均节能高达 60.43%，同时满足应用延迟要求。这些结果证实了 HH-PIM 适用于边缘设备中的自适应、节能的 AI 处理。

items.title: Enabling On-Tiny-Device Model Personalization via Gradient Condensing and Alternant Partial Update.
items.abstract: On-device training enables the model to adapt to user-specific data by fine-tuning a pre-trained model locally. As embedded devices become ubiquitous, on-device training is increasingly essential since users can benefit from the personalized model without transmitting data and model parameters to the server. Despite significant efforts toward efficient training, ondevice training still faces a major challenge: The prohibitive cost of multi-layer backpropagation strains the limited resources of tiny devices. In this paper, we propose an algorithm-system cooptimization framework TinyMP that enables self-adaptive on-tiny-device model personalization. To mitigate backpropagation costs, we introduce Gradient Condensing to condense the gradient map structure, significantly reducing the computational complexity and memory consumption of backpropagation while preserving model performance. To further reduce computation overhead, we propose Alternant Partial Update, a mechanism that locally and alternatively selects essential parameters to update without requiring retraining or offline evolutionary search. Our framework is evaluated through extensive experiments using various CNN models (e.g., MobileNetV2, MCUNet) on embedded devices with minimal resources (e.g., OpenMV-H7 with less than 1MB SRAM and 2 MB Flash). Experimental results show that our framework achieves up to $2.4 \times$ speedup, 80.8% memory saving, and 30.3% accuracy improvement on downstream tasks, outperforming SOTA approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 设备端训练通过在本地微调预训练模型，使模型能够适应用户特定的数据。随着嵌入式设备变得无处不在，设备上的培训变得越来越重要，因为用户可以从个性化模型中受益，而无需将数据和模型参数传输到服务器。尽管在高效训练方面做出了巨大努力，但设备上训练仍然面临着重大挑战：多层反向传播的高昂成本给微型设备的有限资源带来了压力。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法系统协同优化框架TinyMP，该框架能够实现自适应微型设备模型个性化。为了降低反向传播成本，我们引入梯度压缩来压缩梯度图结构，显着降低反向传播的计算复杂度和内存消耗，同时保持模型性能。为了进一步减少计算开销，我们提出了交替部分更新（Alternant Partial Update），这是一种本地选择性地选择基本参数进行更新的机制，无需重新训练或离线进化搜索。我们的框架是通过在资源最少的嵌入式设备（例如，具有小于 1MB SRAM 和 2 MB 闪存的 OpenMV-H7）上使用各种 CNN 模型（例如 MobileNetV2、MCUNet）进行大量实验来评估的。实验结果表明，我们的框架在下游任务上实现了高达 2.4 美元的加速、80.8% 的内存节省和 30.3% 的准确性提高，优于 SOTA 方法。

items.title: FireGuard: A Generalized Microarchitecture for Fine-Grained Security Analysis on OoO Superscalar Cores.
items.abstract: High-performance security guarantees rely on hardware support. Generic programmable support for fine-grained instruction analysis has gained broad interest in the literature as a fundamental building block for the security of future processors. Yet, implementation in real out-of-order (OoO) superscalar processors presents tough challenges that cannot be explored in highly abstract simulators. We detail the challenges of implementing complex programmable pathways without critical paths or contention. We then introduce FireGuard, the first implementation of fine-grained instruction analysis on a real $\mathbf{O o O}$ superscalar processor. We establish an end-to-end system, including microarchitecture, SoC, ISA and programming model. Experiments show that our solution simultaneously ensures both security and performance of the system, with parallel scalability. We examine the feasibility of building FireGuard into modern SoCs: Apple’s M1-Pro, Huawei’s Kirin-960, and Intel’s i7-12700F, where less than 1% silicon area is introduced. The Repo. of FireGuard’s source code: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-FireGuard-DAC-25.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能的安全保障依赖于硬件的支持。作为未来处理器安全性的基本构建块，对细粒度指令分析的通用可编程支持已在文献中引起了广泛的兴趣。然而，真正的无序 (OoO) 超标量处理器的实现提出了高度抽象模拟器无法探索的严峻挑战。我们详细介绍了在没有关键路径或争用的情况下实现复杂的可编程路径的挑战。然后我们介绍 FireGuard，它是第一个在真正的 $\mathbf{O o O}$ 超标量处理器上实现细粒度指令分析的方法。我们建立了一个端到端的系统，包括微架构、SoC、ISA和编程模型。实验表明，我们的解决方案同时保证了系统的安全性和性能，并具有并行的可扩展性。我们研究了将 FireGuard 构建到现代 SoC 中的可行性：苹果的 M1-Pro、华为的 Kirin-960 和英特尔的 i7-12700F，其中引入的硅面积不到 1%。回购协议。 FireGuard 源代码：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-FireGuard-DAC-25。

items.title: Unlocking a New Rust Programming Experience: Fast and Slow Thinking with LLMs to Conquer Undefined Behaviors.
items.abstract: To provide flexibility and low-level interaction capabilities, the “unsafe” tag in Rust is essential, but undermines memory safety and introduces Undefined Behaviors (UBs) that reduce safety. Eliminating UBs requires a deep understanding of Rust’s safety rules and strong typing. Traditional methods require depth analysis of code, which is laborious and depends on knowledge design. The powerful semantic understanding capabilities of LLM offer new opportunities to solve this problem. Although existing large model debugging frameworks excel in semantic tasks, limited by fixed processes and lack adaptive and dynamic adjustment capabilities. Inspired by the dual process theory of decision-making (“Fast and Slow Thinking”), we present a LLM-based framework called RustBrain that automatically and flexibly minimizes UBs in Rust projects. Fast thinking extracts features to generate solutions, while slow thinking decomposes, verifies, and generalizes them abstractly. To apply verification and generalization results to solution generation, enabling dynamic adjustments and precise outputs, RustBrain integrates two thinking through a feedback mechanism. Experimental results on Miri dataset show a 94.3% pass rate and 80.4% execution rate, improving flexibility and Rust projects safety.
items.abstract_zh: 为了提供灵活性和低级交互能力，Rust 中的“不安全”标签是必不可少的，但它会破坏内存安全并引入降低安全性的未定义行为（UB）。消除 UB 需要深入了解 Rust 的安全规则和强类型。传统方法需要对代码进行深度分析，费力且依赖于知识设计。 LLM强大的语义理解能力为解决这一问题提供了新的机会。现有的大型模型调试框架虽然在语义任务上表现出色，但受限于固定流程，缺乏自适应和动态调整能力。受到决策的双重过程理论（“快思考和慢思考”）的启发，我们提出了一个名为 RustBrain 的基于 LLM 的框架，它可以自动灵活地最小化 Rust 项目中的 UB。快速思维提取特征以生成解决方案，而慢速思维则对它们进行抽象分解、验证和概括。为了将验证和泛化结果应用到解决方案生成中，实现动态调整和精确输出，RustBrain 通过反馈机制整合了两种思维。 Miri 数据集上的实验结果显示，通过率达 94.3%，执行率达 80.4%，提高了灵活性和 Rust 项目的安全性。

items.title: Megabits Down to Kilobits: Memory-Efficient Time-Aware Shaping for TSN.
items.abstract: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) provides bounded latency and low jitter for cyber-physical systems, such as industrial control. As a key component of TSN, the Time-Aware Shaper (TAS) applies gate control rules to control the transmission time of frames in critical flows. TAS stores the gate control rules for each frame in the gate control table. However, in typical industrial setups, the memory usage of the table could reach over tens of megabits and even exceed the total memory capacity of TSN switches.To address this issue, we propose a memory-efficient TAS design named METAS. It transitions from a per-frame to a per-flow approach. METAS stores one persistent rule for a flow and dynamically generates a temporary rule for a frame only when the frame arrives. We prototyped METAS on an FPGA, and experimental results show that METAS reduces memory usage from 14.34 Mbits to 288 Kbits when supporting 1,024 flows, using just 1.56% of the FPGA’s logic resources while maintaining microsecondlevel latency and nanosecond-level jitter for critical flows.
items.abstract_zh: 时间敏感网络 (TSN) 为网络物理系统（例如工业控制）提供有限的延迟和低抖动。作为 TSN 的关键组件，时间感知整形器 (TAS) 应用门控规则来控制关键流中帧的传输时间。 TAS在门控表中存储每个帧的门控规则。然而，在典型的工业设置中，表的内存使用量可能会达到数十兆位，甚至超过 TSN 交换机的总内存容量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 METAS 的内存高效 TAS 设计。它从每帧方法过渡到每流方法。 METAS 为流存储一条持久规则，并仅在帧到达时动态为该帧生成临时规则。我们在 FPGA 上进行了 METAS 原型设计，实验结果表明，当支持 1,024 个流时，METAS 将内存使用量从 14.34 Mbits 减少到 288 Kbits，仅使用 1.56% 的 FPGA 逻辑资源，同时保持关键流的微秒级延迟和纳秒级抖动。

items.title: MEEK: Re-thinking Heterogeneous Parallel Error Detection Architecture for Real-World OoO Superscalar Processors.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous parallel error detection is an approach to achieving fault-tolerant processors, leveraging multiple power-efficient cores to re-execute software originally run on a high-performance core. Yet, its complex components, gathering data cross-chip from many parts of the core, raise questions of how to build it into commodity cores without heavy design invasion and extensive re-engineering. We build the first full-RTL design, MEEK, into an open-source SoC, from microarchitecture and ISA to the OS and programming model. We identify and solve bottlenecks and bugs overlooked in previous work, and demonstrate that MEEK offers microsecond-level detection capacity with affordable overheads. By trading off architectural functionalities across codesigned hardware-software layers, MEEK features only light changes to a mature out-of-order superscalar core, simple coordinating software layers, and a few lines of operating-system code. The Repo. of MEEK’s source code: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-MEEK-DAC-25
items.abstract_zh: 异构并行错误检测是一种实现容错处理器的方法，利用多个节能内核重新执行最初在高性能内核上运行的软件。然而，其复杂的组件从核心的许多部分收集跨芯片的数据，引发了如何将其构建到商品核心中而不需要大量设计入侵和广泛的重新设计的问题。我们将第一个完整的 RTL 设计 MEEK 构建到开源 SoC 中，从微架构和 ISA 到操作系统和编程模型。我们识别并解决了之前工作中忽视的瓶颈和错误，并证明 MEEK 以可承受的开销提供微秒级的检测能力。通过跨协同设计的硬件-软件层权衡架构功能，MEEK 仅对成熟的无序超标量核心、简单的协调软件层和几行操作系统代码进行了少量更改。回购协议。 MEEK 源代码：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-MEEK-DAC-25

items.title: A Systematic Approach for Multi-objective Double-side Clock Tree Synthesis.
items.abstract: As the scaling of semiconductor devices nears its limits, utilizing the back-side space of silicon has emerged as a new trend for future integrated circuits. With intense interest, several works have hacked existing backend tools to explore the potential of synthesizing double-side clock trees via nano Through-Silicon-Vias (nTSVs). However, these works lack a systematic perspective on design resource allocation and multi-objective optimization. We propose a systematic approach to design clock trees with double-side metal layers, including hierarchical clock routing, concurrent buffers and nTSVs insertion, and skew refinement. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, the widely-used open-source tool, our algorithm outperforms them in latency, skew, wirelength, and the number of buffers and nTSVs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着半导体器件的尺寸缩小接近极限，利用硅的背面空间已成为未来集成电路的新趋势。出于浓厚的兴趣，一些工作已经破解了现有的后端工具，以探索通过纳米硅通孔（nTSV）合成双面时钟树的潜力。然而，这些工作缺乏对设计资源分配和多目标优化的系统视角。我们提出了一种系统方法来设计具有双面金属层的时钟树，包括分层时钟布线、并发缓冲器和 nTSV 插入以及偏差细化。与最先进的 (SOTA) 方法、广泛使用的开源工具相比，我们的算法在延迟、偏斜、线长以及缓冲区和 nTSV 数量方面优于它们。

items.title: NDFT: Accelerating Density Functional Theory Calculations via Hardware/Software Co-Design on Near-Data Computing System.
items.abstract: Linear-response time-dependent Density Functional Theory (LR-TDDFT) is a widely used method for accurately predicting the excited-state properties of physical systems. Previous works have attempted to accelerate LR-TDDFT using heterogeneous systems such as GPUs, FPGAs, and the Sunway architecture. However, a major drawback of these approaches is the constant data movement between host memory and the memory of the heterogeneous systems, which results in substantial data movement overhead. Moreover, these works focus primarily on optimizing the compute-intensive portions of LR-TDDFT, despite the fact that the calculation steps are fundamentally memory-bound.To address these challenges, we propose NDFT, a Near-Data Density Functional Theory framework. Specifically, we design a novel task partitioning and scheduling mechanism to offload each part of LR-TDDFT to the most suitable computing units within a CPU-NDP system. Additionally, we implement a hardware/software co-optimization of a critical kernel in LR-TDDFT to further enhance performance on the CPU-NDP system. Our results show that NDFT achieves performance improvements of 5.2x and 2.5x over CPU and GPU baselines, respectively, on a large physical system.
items.abstract_zh: 线性响应时间相关密度泛函理论 (LR-TDDFT) 是一种广泛使用的方法，用于准确预测物理系统的激发态特性。之前的工作尝试使用 GPU、FPGA 和 Sunway 架构等异构系统来加速 LR-TDDFT。然而，这些方法的一个主要缺点是主机存储器和异构系统的存储器之间的持续数据移动，这导致大量的数据移动开销。此外，这些工作主要集中在优化 LR-TDDFT 的计算密集型部分，尽管计算步骤基本上是内存限制的。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 NDFT，一种近数据密度泛函理论框架。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的任务划分和调度机制，将 LR-TDDFT 的每个部分卸载到 CPU-NDP 系统中最合适的计算单元。此外，我们对 LR-TDDFT 中的关键内核进行了硬件/软件协同优化，以进一步增强 CPU-NDP 系统的性能。我们的结果表明，在大型物理系统上，NDFT 的性能分别比 CPU 和 GPU 基线提高了 5.2 倍和 2.5 倍。

items.title: Generalizable Lithographic Hotspot Detection Using Asynchronous Meta-Learning with Only One Shot.
items.abstract: With integrated circuits shrinking in feature size, layout printability has become increasingly challenging, making lithographic hotspot detection ever-crucial in computer-aided design (CAD) flows. In recent years, numerous studies have explored deep learning to detect lithographic hotspots, offering promising results. However, neural networks can easily be biased and overfit when lacking sufficient training data, especially in the CAD domain. A generalizable DL-based hotspot detector should learn the genuine lithography principle and ensure consistent accuracy across layouts from various designs at the same technology node, regardless of their varying design styles. However, we find that existing convolutional neural network (CNN)-based hotspot detectors fail to generalize to different circuit layouts other than the design it has been trained for. To this end, we propose a few-shot learning-based framework for generalizable CNN-based hotspot detection. We develop a meta-learning scheme that asynchronously updates the CNN feature extraction and classification component to obtain a metainitialized model that can quickly adapt to new designs using as few as one training layout clip. We propose a layout topologybased sampling strategy for few-shot adaptation to enhance generalization stability. Experimental results on ICCAD 2012 and 2019 datasets show that our framework enables superior generalization capabilities than prior arts on unseen new designs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着集成电路特征尺寸的缩小，布局的可印刷性变得越来越具有挑战性，使得光刻热点检测在计算机辅助设计（CAD）流程中变得至关重要。近年来，大量研究探索了深度学习来检测光刻热点，并提供了有希望的结果。然而，当缺乏足够的训练数据时，神经网络很容易出现偏差和过度拟合，尤其是在 CAD 领域。基于深度学习的通用热点检测器应该学习真正的光刻原理，并确保同一技术节点上的各种设计的布局保持一致的精度，无论其设计风格如何不同。然而，我们发现现有的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的热点检测器无法推广到除其训练设计之外的不同电路布局。为此，我们提出了一种基于几次学习的框架，用于可泛化的基于 CNN 的热点检测。我们开发了一种元学习方案，该方案异步更新 CNN 特征提取和分类组件，以获得元初始化模型，该模型可以使用少至一个训练布局剪辑快速适应新设计。我们提出了一种基于布局拓扑的采样策略，用于少样本自适应，以增强泛化稳定性。 ICCAD 2012 和 2019 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的框架在未见过的新设计上比现有技术具有更出色的泛化能力。

items.title: Query-Based Black-Box Stealthy Sensor Attacks on Cyber-Physical Systems.
items.abstract: We study the vulnerability of Cyber-physical systems (CPS) under stealthy sensor attacks in black-box scenarios. “Black-box” refers to scenarios where the attacker has minimal knowledge of the target system. Designing a stealthy sensor attack sequence under this scenario has two main challenges. The first one lies in ensuring the stealthiness of the sensor attack, meaning does not trigger an alert when applying the generated sensor attack sequence to the CPS. The second one is maintaining stealthiness throughout the attack generation process, indicating the limitation on the alarm frequency when generating the attack sequence. To address the above challenges, we develop a querybased black-box stealthy attack framework to violate the safety of the CPS. To maintain stealthiness during training, an active learning method has been introduced to extract the detector’s information to a time series model. The stealthy attack sequence is then generated from that model. Experiments on four numerical simulations and a high-fidelity simulator demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
