items.abstract_zh: 我们研究黑盒场景中信息物理系统（CPS）在隐形传感器攻击下的脆弱性。 “黑盒”是指攻击者对目标系统知之甚少的情况。在这种情况下设计隐形传感器攻击序列有两个主要挑战。第一个在于确保传感器攻击的隐秘性，这意味着将生成的传感器攻击序列应用于 CPS 时不会触发警报。第二个是在整个攻击生成过程中保持隐秘性，即生成攻击序列时对报警频率的限制。为了解决上述挑战，我们开发了一种基于查询的黑盒隐形攻击框架来侵犯 CPS 的安全性。为了在训练过程中保持隐秘性，引入了主动学习方法来将探测器的信息提取到时间序列模型中。然后从该模型生成隐形攻击序列。四个数值模拟和一个高保真模拟器的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。

items.title: GraphFI: An Efficient Fault Injection Framework for Graph Processing on GPGPUs.
items.abstract: As graph tasks become pervasive in real-time and safetycritical domains (e.g., financial fraud detection and electrical power systems), it is also essential to guarantee their reliable execution beyond pursuing extraordinary performance. However, due to the neglect of consideration for graph-specific execution paradigm, existing Fault Injection (FI) reliability analysis methods typically incur inaccurate system error resilience characterization, making it challenging to provide helpful guidance for efficient and reliable graph processing paradigm design. This paper proposes GraphFI, an efficient Graph Fault Injection framework on the universal parallel tasks acceleration platform (i.e., GPGPUs). Our key insight is progressively excavating the graph-specific error propagation and effect mechanisms, thereby avoiding blind FI trials. Firstly, observing that iterations with similar active vertex set exhibit similar error behavior, we propose iteration-driven GraphFI (ID-GraphFI) to solely select representative iterations for fast error resilience profile assessment. Secondly, by detecting resilience-similarity communities in graph topology, we propose topology-driven GraphFI (TD-GraphFI) that only selects representative vertices for community overall reliability evaluation. Thirdly, by exploring the graph-specific fault monotonic property, we propose the monotonicity-driven GraphFI (MD-GraphFI) to granularly draw system severe error boundaries for predictable/unnecessary fault injection avoidance. Merging them all, GraphFI can reduce system fault site space by up to two orders of magnitude, which achieves $2.1 \sim 15.2 \times$ speedup compared to SOTA methods while providing better reliability assessment accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着图任务在实时和安全关键领域（例如金融欺诈检测和电力系统）中变得普遍，除了追求卓越的性能之外，保证其可靠执行也至关重要。然而，由于忽视了图特定执行范式的考虑，现有的故障注入（FI）可靠性分析方法通常会导致系统错误恢复表征不准确，这使得为高效可靠的图处理范式设计提供有用的指导变得具有挑战性。本文提出了 GraphFI，这是一种在通用并行任务加速平台（即 GPGPU）上的高效图故障注入框架。我们的主要见解是逐步挖掘图特定的错误传播和影响机制，从而避免盲目的 FI 试验。首先，观察到具有相似活动顶点集的迭代表现出相似的错误行为，我们提出迭代驱动的 GraphFI (ID-GraphFI) 来仅选择代表性迭代来进行快速错误弹性概况评估。其次，通过检测图拓扑中的弹性相似性社区，我们提出了拓扑驱动的 GraphFI（TD-GraphFI），仅选择代表性顶点进行社区整体可靠性评估。第三，通过探索图特定的故障单调性，我们提出了单调性驱动的 GraphFI (MD-GraphFI) 来精细地绘制系统严重错误边界，以避免可预测/不必要的故障注入。将它们全部合并，GraphFI 可以将系统故障站点空间减少多达两个数量级，与 SOTA 方法相比，实现 $2.1 \sim 15.2 \times$ 加速，同时提供更好的可靠性评估精度。

items.title: AARC: Automated Affinity-aware Resource Configuration for Serverless Workflows.
items.abstract: Serverless computing is increasingly adopted for its ability to manage complex, event-driven workloads without the need for infrastructure provisioning. However, traditional resource allocation in serverless platforms couples CPU and memory, which may not be optimal for all functions. Existing decoupling approaches, while offering some flexibility, are not designed to handle the vast configuration space and complexity of serverless workflows. In this paper, we propose AARC, an innovative, automated framework that decouples CPU and memory resources to provide more flexible and efficient provisioning for serverless workloads. AARC is composed of two key components: Graph-Centric Scheduler, which identifies critical paths in workflows, and Priority Configurator, which applies priority scheduling techniques to optimize resource allocation. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that AARC achieves substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods, with total search time reductions of $85.8 \%$ and $89.6 \%$, and cost savings of $49.6 \%$ and $61.7 \%$, respectively, while maintaining SLO compliance.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算因其能够管理复杂的、事件驱动的工作负载而无需配置基础设施而得到越来越多的采用。然而，无服务器平台中的传统资源分配将CPU和内存耦合在一起，这可能并不适合所有功能。现有的解耦方法虽然提供了一定的灵活性，但其设计无法处理无服务器工作流程的巨大配置空间和复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 AARC，这是一种创新的自动化框架，可解耦 CPU 和内存资源，为无服务器工作负载提供更灵活、更高效的配置。 AARC 由两个关键组件组成：以图形为中心的调度程序，用于识别工作流中的关键路径；以及优先级配置器，用于应用优先级调度技术来优化资源分配。我们的实验评估表明，AARC 相对于最先进的方法实现了实质性改进，在保持 SLO 合规性的同时，总搜索时间分别减少了 $85.8 \%$ 和 $89.6 \%$，成本节省了 $49.6 \%$ 和 $61.7 \%$。

items.title: PiSPICE: Accelerating Post-Layout SPICE Simulation via Essential Parasitic Identification.
items.abstract: As process nodes scale to more advanced technologies, post-layout simulations for integrated circuits have become increasingly complex, involving billions to trillions of nodes. The growing design complexity and transistor integration require more accurate and efficient post-layout SPICE simulations. However, existing methods for solving large-scale post-layout circuits face significant challenges due to high computational costs. In this paper, we propose a new approach, PiSPICE, which utilizes adjoint sensitivity analysis to identify critical parasitics and eliminate non-critical ones, effectively reducing the simulation scale and improving speed. By modeling parasitics and performing sensitivity analysis on pre-layout circuits, we significantly reduce the computational burden and avoid the overhead of directly analyzing sensitivities in large-scale postlayout circuits. By retaining only the critical parasitics and applying model order reduction to minimize their impact, while eliminating non-critical parasitics, PiSPICE achieves a speedup of up to 17.27 x in simulation with an error margin of less than 0.78% compared to the commercial simulator Spectre.
items.abstract_zh: 随着工艺节点扩展到更先进的技术，集成电路的布局后仿真变得越来越复杂，涉及数十亿到数万亿个节点。不断增长的设计复杂性和晶体管集成度需要更准确、更高效的布局后 SPICE 仿真。然而，由于高计算成本，解决大规模布局后电路的现有方法面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法PiSPICE，它利用伴随灵敏度分析来识别关键寄生参数并消除非关键寄生参数，有效减小仿真规模并提高速度。通过对寄生效应进行建模并对布局前电路进行灵敏度分析，我们显着减少了计算负担，并避免了直接分析大规模布局后电路中的灵敏度的开销。通过仅保留关键寄生参数并应用模型降阶以最大程度地减少其影响，同时消除非关键寄生参数，与商业模拟器 Spectre 相比，PiSPICE 的仿真速度提高了 17.27 倍，误差范围小于 0.78%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: BLAST: Bisection-Free Learning Approach for Statistical Timing Characterization.
items.abstract: Statistical timing characterization for standard cells faces significant computational challenges due to the laborious bisection analysis for setup/hold constraint of sequential cells. To address this issue, we propose a Bisection-Free Learning Approach for Statistical Timing Characterization (BLAST) by extracting inherent delay for data path and clock path in sequential cells as specific features. Multi-task learning is implemented with a multi-gate mixture-of-experts (MMoE) model to exploit the profound interdependency between setup and hold constraint for different timing arcs, where the active learning strategy is incorporated to improve learning efficiency. Experimental results under 135 PVT corners with TSMC 12nm process demonstrate that the proposed BLAST achieves considerable acceleration by avoiding the iterative bisection search for statistical constraint prediction with 76.9% runtime reduction compared to the commercial tool. Excellent prediction accuracy is achieved for various flip-flops by BLAST with the relative root mean square error (rRMSE) of $\mathbf{2. 2 1 \%}$ and worst-case absolute error (WCAE) of 0.82 ps.
items.abstract_zh: 由于对时序单元的建立/保持约束进行费力的二分分析，标准单元的统计时序表征面临着巨大的计算挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于统计时序表征（BLAST）的无二分学习方法，通过提取时序单元中数据路径和时钟路径的固有延迟作为特定特征。多任务学习是通过多门专家混合（MMoE）模型来实现的，以利用不同时序弧的建立和保持约束之间的深刻相互依赖性，其中结合主动学习策略来提高学习效率。采用 TSMC 12nm 工艺的 135 个 PVT 角下的实验结果表明，所提出的 BLAST 通过避免统计约束预测的迭代二分搜索实现了相当大的加速，与商业工具相比，运行时间减少了 76.9%。通过 BLAST，相对均方根误差 (rRMSE) 为 $\mathbf{2.2，可以对各种触发器实现出色的预测精度。 2 1 \%}$ 和最坏情况绝对误差 (WCAE) 为 0.82 ps。

items.title: GS-TG: 3D Gaussian Splatting Accelerator with Tile Grouping for Reducing Redundant Sorting while Preserving Rasterization Efficiency.
items.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) has emerged as a promising alternative to neural radiance fields (NeRF) as it offers high speed as well as high image quality in novel view synthesis. Despite these advancements, 3D-GS still struggles to meet the frames per second (FPS) demands of real-time applications. In this paper, we introduce GS-TG, a tile-grouping-based accelerator that enhances 3D-GS rendering speed by reducing redundant sorting operations and preserving rasterization efficiency. GS-TG addresses a critical trade-off issue in 3D-GS rendering: increasing the tile size effectively reduces redundant sorting operations, but it concurrently increases unnecessary rasterization computations. So, during sorting of the proposed approach, GS-TG groups small tiles (for making large tiles) to share sorting operations across tiles within each group, significantly reducing redundant computations. During rasterization, a bitmask assigned to each Gaussian identifies relevant small tiles, to enable efficient sharing of sorting results. Consequently, GS-TG enables sorting to be performed as if a large tile size is used by grouping tiles during the sorting stage, while allowing rasterization to proceed with the original small tiles by using bitmasks in the rasterization stage. GS-TG is a lossless method requiring no retraining or fine-tuning and it can be seamlessly integrated with previous 3D-GS optimization techniques. Experimental results show that GS-TG achieves an average speed-up of 1.54 times over state-of-the-art 3D-GS accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯溅射 (3D-GS) 已成为神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的一种有前途的替代方案，因为它在新颖的视图合成中提供高速和高图像质量。尽管取得了这些进步，3D-GS 仍然难以满足实时应用程序的每秒帧数 (FPS) 需求。在本文中，我们介绍了 GS-TG，这是一种基于图块分组的加速器，它通过减少冗余排序操作并保持光栅化效率来提高 3D-GS 渲染速度。 GS-TG 解决了 3D-GS 渲染中的一个关键权衡问题：增加图块大小可以有效减少冗余排序操作，但同时会增加不必要的光栅化计算。因此，在对所提出的方法进行排序期间，GS-TG 将小图块分组（用于制作大图块），以在每个组内的图块之间共享排序操作，从而显着减少冗余计算。在光栅化过程中，分配给每个高斯的位掩码会识别相关的小图块，以实现排序结果的有效共享。因此，GS-TG 使得能够执行排序，就像在排序阶段通过对图块进行分组来使用大图块大小一样，同时允许通过在光栅化阶段使用位掩码对原始小图块进行光栅化。 GS-TG 是一种无损方法，无需重新训练或微调，并且可以与之前的 3D-GS 优化技术无缝集成。实验结果表明，GS-TG 的平均加速比最先进的 3D-GS 加速器高出 1.54 倍。

items.title: A Mixed-Signal Photonic SRAM-based High-Speed Energy-Efficient Photonic Tensor Core with Novel Electro-Optic ADC.
items.abstract: The rapid surge in data generated by Internet of Things (IoT), artificial intelligence (AI), and machine learning (ML) applications demands ultra-fast, scalable, and energy-efficient hardware, as traditional von Neumann architectures face significant latency and power challenges due to data transfer bottlenecks between memory and processing units. Furthermore, conventional electrical memory technologies are increasingly constrained by rising bitline and wordline capacitance, as well as the resistance of compact and long interconnects, as technology scales. In contrast, photonics-based in-memory computing systems offer substantial speed and energy improvements over traditional transistor-based systems, owing to their ultra-fast operating frequencies, low crosstalk, and high data bandwidth. Hence, we present a novel differential photonic SRAM (pSRAM) bitcell-augmented scalable mixed-signal multi-bit photonic tensor core, enabling high-speed, energy-efficient matrix multiplication operations using fabrication-friendly integrated photonic components. Additionally, we propose a novel 1-hot encoding electro-optic analog-to-digital converter (eoADC) architecture to convert the multiplication outputs into digital bitstreams, supporting processing in the electrical domain. Our designed photonic tensor core, utilizing GlobalFoundries’ monolithic 45SPCLO technology node, achieves computation speeds of 4.10 tera-operations per second (TOPS) and a power efficiency of 3.02 TOPS/W.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT)、人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 应用生成的数据迅速激增，需要超快速、可扩展且节能的硬件，因为传统的冯诺依曼架构由于内存和处理单元之间的数据传输瓶颈而面临严重的延迟和功耗挑战。此外，随着技术规模的扩大，传统的电存储器技术越来越受到不断增加的位线和字线电容以及紧凑和长互连的电阻的限制。相比之下，基于光子学的内存计算系统由于其超快的工作频率、低串扰和高数据带宽，比传统的基于晶体管的系统提供了显着的速度和能量改进。因此，我们提出了一种新型差分光子 SRAM (pSRAM) 位单元增强的可扩展混合信号多位光子张量核心，使用易于制造的集成光子组件实现高速、节能的矩阵乘法运算。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 1-hot 编码电光模数转换器 (eoADC) 架构，可将乘法输出转换为数字比特流，支持电气域中的处理。我们设计的光子张量核心采用 GlobalFoundries 的单片 45SPCLO 技术节点，实现了每秒 4.10 万亿次运算 (TOPS) 的计算速度和 3.02 TOPS/W 的功效。

items.title: Computational Advantage in Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks: Myth or Reality?
items.abstract: Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks (HQNNs), under the umbrella of Quantum Machine Learning (QML), have garnered significant attention due to their potential to enhance computational performance by integrating quantum layers within traditional neural network (NN) architectures. Despite numerous state-of-the-art applications, a fundamental question remains: Does the inclusion of quantum layers offer any computational advantage over purely classical models? If yes/no, how and why? In this paper, we analyze how classical and hybrid models adapt their architectural complexity in response to increasing problem complexity. To this end, we select a multiclass classification problem and perform comprehensive benchmarking of classical models for increasing problem complexity, identifying those that optimize both accuracy and computational efficiency to establish a robust baseline for comparison. These baseline models are then systematically compared with HQNNs by evaluating the rate of increase in floating-point operations (FLOPs) and number of parameters, providing insights into how architectural complexity scales with problem complexity in both classical and hybrid networks. We utilize classical machines to simulate the quantum layers in HQNNs, a common practice in Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era. Our analysis reveals that, as problem complexity increases, the architectural complexity of HQNNs, and consequently their FLOPs consumption, despite the simulation overhead associated with quantum layer’s simulation on classical hardware, scales more efficiently $(53.1 \%$ increase in FLOPs from 10 features (low problem complexity) to 110 features (high problem complexity)), compared to classical networks (88.1%). Moreover, as the problem complexity increases, classical networks consistently exhibit a need for a larger number of parameters to accommodate the increasing problem complexity. Additionally, the rate of increase in number of parameters is also slower in HQNNs (81.4%) than classical NNs (88.5%). These findings suggest that HQNNs provide a more scalable and resource-efficient solution, positioning them as a promising alternative for tackling complex computational problems.
items.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习 (QML) 下的混合量子神经网络 (HQNN) 因其通过在传统神经网络 (NN) 架构中集成量子层来增强计算性能的潜力而受到了广泛关注。尽管有许多最先进的应用，但仍然存在一个基本问题：与纯经典模型相比，包含量子层是否具有任何计算优势？如果是/否，如何以及为什么？在本文中，我们分析了经典模型和混合模型如何调整其架构复杂性以应对日益增加的问题复杂性。为此，我们选择一个多类分类问题，并对经典模型进行全面的基准测试，以增加问题的复杂性，识别那些优化准确性和计算效率的模型，以建立稳健的比较基准。然后，通过评估浮点运算 (FLOP) 的增长率和参数数量，将这些基线模型与 HQNN 进行系统比较，从而深入了解经典网络和混合网络中的架构复杂性如何随着问题复杂性而变化。我们利用经典机器来模拟 HQNN 中的量子层，这是噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 时代的常见做法。我们的分析表明，随着问题复杂性的增加，HQNN 的架构复杂性及其 FLOP 消耗（尽管与经典硬件上的量子层模拟相关的模拟开销）与经典网络 (88.1%) 相比，可以更有效地扩展（从 10 个特征（低问题复杂性）到 110 个特征（高问题复杂性），FLOP 增加 53.1 \%$））。此外，随着问题复杂性的增加，经典网络始终表现出对大量参数的需求，以适应不断增加的问题复杂性。此外，HQNN 中参数数量的增加速度 (81.4%) 也比经典神经网络 (88.5%) 慢。这些发现表明，HQNN 提供了一种更具可扩展性和资源效率的解决方案，使它们成为解决复杂计算问题的有前途的替代方案。

items.title: Reinforcement Learning-Driven Window Selection for Enhanced Window-Based Rip-up and Reroute in Chip Detailed Routing.
items.abstract: With increasingly complex design rules and pin density in advanced technology nodes, achieving a violation-free layout has become more challenging, also making rip-up and reroute (RUR) the most runtime-intensive component of detailed routing. We propose a novel reinforcement learning (RL)based approach to enhance the window-based RUR process. Our method features a dynamic window generation strategy that adjusts window size and position based on the distribution of design rule violations (DRV), enabling efficient targeting of congested areas. By leveraging the predictive capabilities of RL, our approach aims to minimize DRVs and achieve high-quality routing results. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-theart detailed routers, TritonRoute, achieving a DRV-free solution, averagely improving wirelength by 0.07%, via count by 2.42%, and consuming almost the same average runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 随着先进技术节点中的设计规则和引脚密度日益复杂，实现无违规布局变得更具挑战性，也使得剥离和重新布线 (RUR) 成为详细布线中运行时间最密集的组件。我们提出了一种新颖的基于强化学习（RL）的方法来增强基于窗口的 RUR 过程。我们的方法采用动态窗口生成策略，可根据设计规则违规 (DRV) 的分布调整窗口大小和位置，从而能够有效定位拥挤区域。通过利用 RL 的预测能力，我们的方法旨在最大限度地减少 DRV 并实现高质量的路由结果。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的详细路由器 TritonRoute，实现了无 DRV 的解决方案，平均线长提高了 0.07%，过孔数量提高了 2.42%，并且平均运行时间几乎相同。

items.title: Supporting Register-based Addressing Modes for in-DRAM PIM ISAs.
items.abstract: Processing-in-Memory architecture presents a promising solution to alleviate the data movement bottleneck that arises from transferring data between memory and compute units in traditional processor-centric systems, particularly for DNN applications. However, this architecture introduces two inherent overheads: PIM code offloading and data transferring between CPU and memory. To address these issues, we propose two register-based addressing modes, indexed and base-offset addressing, for DMA descriptor-based in-DRAM PIM ISAs. Our full-system performance evaluation demonstrates that the approach significantly reduces the overheads, resulting in up to 1.94x speedup compared to the baseline PIM, additionally only with $4.65 \%$ area and $8.61 \%$ power consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理架构提供了一种很有前途的解决方案，可以缓解传统以处理器为中心的系统中内存和计算单元之间传输数据所产生的数据移动瓶颈，特别是对于 DNN 应用程序。然而，这种架构引入了两个固有的开销：PIM 代码卸载以及 CPU 和内存之间的数据传输。为了解决这些问题，我们针对基于 DMA 描述符的 DRAM 内 PIM ISA 提出了两种基于寄存器的寻址模式：索引寻址和基址偏移寻址。我们的全系统性能评估表明，该方法显着降低了开销，与基准 PIM 相比，速度提高了 1.94 倍，此外仅占用 4.65 美元的面积和 8.61 美元的功耗。

items.title: FedEDA: Federated Learning Framework for Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in EDA.
items.abstract: In advanced nodes, the optimization of Power, Performance, and Area (PPA) is becoming increasingly complex, requiring significant resources and time for circuit design and optimization using Electronic Design Automation (EDA). As a key approach to overcome these challenges, Machine Learning (ML) techniques have been widely studied in the field of EDA. However, security concerns around Intellectual Property (IP) limit access to real-world circuit data, making it difficult to gather sufficient data for training ML models. This lack of available circuit benchmarks restricts progress in ML research. In this study, we propose FedEDA, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the first Federated Learning (FL) aggregation algorithm specifically designed for EDA. FedEDA addresses concerns about IP security by exchanging model weights among FL participants instead of sharing raw data. Furthermore, FedEDA leverages Rent’s Rule and circuit size to capture the hierarchical structure of circuits, mitigating issues related to data imbalance among participants and improving the quality of weight aggregation on EDA data. We demonstrate the applicability of FedEDA across various EDA tasks, including routability, parasitic RC, and wirelength prediction. FedEDA outperforms existing FL algorithms in EDA tasks, demonstrating superior performance.
items.abstract_zh: 在先进节点中，功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 的优化变得越来越复杂，需要大量资源和时间使用电子设计自动化 (EDA) 进行电路设计和优化。作为克服这些挑战的关键方法，机器学习（ML）技术在 EDA 领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，围绕知识产权 (IP) 的安全问题限制了对现实世界电路数据的访问，导致难以收集足够的数据来训练 ML 模型。缺乏可用的电路基准限制了机器学习研究的进展。在本研究中，我们提出了 FedEDA，据我们所知，这是第一个专门为 EDA 设计的联邦学习 (FL) 聚合算法。 FedEDA 通过在 FL 参与者之间交换模型权重而不是共享原始数据来解决对 IP 安全的担忧。此外，FedEDA 利用 Rent 规则和电路大小来捕获电路的层次结构，缓解与参与者之间的数据不平衡相关的问题，并提高 EDA 数据权重聚合的质量。 We demonstrate the applicability of FedEDA across various EDA tasks, including routability, parasitic RC, and wirelength prediction. FedEDA 在 EDA 任务中优于现有的 FL 算法，展现出卓越的性能。

items.title: Intermittent Systems at Small Scale: Execution Model and Design Guidelines.
items.abstract: Intermittent systems require software support to execute tasks amid frequent power failures. In designing such techniques, software designers rely on execution models that abstract hardware-level operations. In this paper, we propose an execution model that more accurately describes emerging intermittent systems with small energy storage. Our evaluation shows show that systems designed based on the traditional models can be up to 5.62 x less power-efficient than expected and may result in unsafe checkpoint operations. Our design guidelines enhance the performance of existing static and dynamic checkpoint techniques by 3.04 x and 2.85 x on average, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 间歇性系统需要软件支持才能在频繁断电的情况下执行任务。 In designing such techniques, software designers rely on execution models that abstract hardware-level operations.在本文中，我们提出了一种执行模型，可以更准确地描述具有小能量存储的新兴间歇性系统。我们的评估表明，基于传统模型设计的系统的能效可能比预期低 5.62 倍，并可能导致检查点操作不安全。我们的设计指南将现有静态和动态检查点技术的性能平均分别提高了 3.04 倍和 2.85 倍。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: A Diffusion-Based Framework for Configurable and Realistic Multi-Storage Trace Generation.
items.abstract: We propose DiTTO, a novel diffusion-based framework for generating realistic, precisely configurable, and diverse multi-device storage traces. Leveraging advanced diffusion techniques, DiTTO enables the synthesis of high-fidelity continuous traces that capture temporal dynamics and inter-device dependencies with user-defined configurations. Our experimental results demonstrate that DiTTO can generate traces with high fidelity and diversity while aligning closely with guided configurations with only 8% errors.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DiTTO，一种新颖的基于扩散的框架，用于生成真实的、精确可配置的和多样化的多设备存储轨迹。利用先进的扩散技术，DiTTO 能够合成高保真连续轨迹，通过用户定义的配置捕获时间动态和设备间依赖性。我们的实验结果表明，DiTTO 可以生成具有高保真度和多样性的轨迹，同时与引导配置紧密对齐，误差仅为 8%。

items.title: GLOVA: Global and Local Variation-Aware Analog Circuit Design with Risk-Sensitive Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Analog/mixed-signal circuit design encounters significant challenges due to performance degradation from process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations. To achieve commercial-grade reliability, iterative manual design revisions and extensive statistical simulations are required. While several studies have aimed to automate variation-aware analog design to reduce time-to-market, the substantial mismatches in real-world wafers have not been thoroughly addressed. In this paper, we present GLOVA, an analog circuit sizing framework that effectively manages the impact of diverse random mismatches to improve robustness against PVT variations. In the proposed approach, risk-sensitive reinforcement learning is leveraged to account for the reliability bound affected by PVT variations, and ensemble-based critic is introduced to achieve sample-efficient learning. For design verification, we also propose μ-σ evaluation and simulation reordering method to reduce simulation costs of identifying failed designs. GLOVA supports verification through industrial-level PVT variation evaluation methods, including corner simulation as well as global and local Monte Carlo (MC) simulations. Compared to previous state-of-the-art variation-aware analog sizing frameworks, GLOVA achieves up to $80.5 \times$ improvement in sample efficiency and $76.0 \times$ reduction in time.
items.abstract_zh: 由于工艺、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化导致性能下降，模拟/混合信号电路设计面临重大挑战。为了实现商业级可靠性，需要迭代的手动设计修改和广泛的统计模拟。虽然一些研究旨在自动化变化感知模拟设计以缩短上市时间，但现实世界中晶圆的严重不匹配尚未得到彻底解决。在本文中，我们提出了 GLOVA，一种模拟电路尺寸调整框架，可有效管理各种随机失配的影响，以提高针对 PVT 变化的鲁棒性。在所提出的方法中，利用风险敏感的强化学习来解释PVT变化影响的可靠性界限，并引入基于集成的批评家来实现样本高效学习。对于设计验证，我们还提出了 μ-σ 评估和仿真重新排序方法，以降低识别失败设计的仿真成本。 GLOVA 支持通过工业级 PVT 变化评估方法进行验证，包括角点模拟以及全局和局部蒙特卡罗 (MC) 模拟。与之前最先进的变化感知模拟大小调整框架相比，GLOVA 的样本效率提高了 80.5 美元，时间缩短了 76.0 美元。

items.title: 333-eDRAM - 3T Embedded DRAM Leveraging Monolithic 3D Integration of 3 Transistor Types: IGZO, Carbon Nanotube and Silicon FETs.
items.abstract: The memory wall is a major bottleneck for continuing to improve the energy efficiency of computing systems. To overcome this challenge, various nanomaterials, devices, circuits, architectures, and three-dimensional (3D) integration techniques are under development for future memory solutions. However, major trade-offs exist when designing memories to achieve high on-chip memory capacity, high retention time, high endurance, low access times, low access energy, and low static leakage power. We present an energy- and area-efficient embedded DRAM memory architecture (quantified by EADP: the product of total energy consumption, circuit area footprint and application execution time) that leverages monolithic threedimensional (3D) integration of three types of field-effect transistors (FETs): (i) Indium Gallium Zinc Oxide (IGZO) FETs for ultra-low off-state leakage currents enabling high retention time DRAM; (ii) Carbon Nanotube FETs (CNFETs) for high on-state drive currents leading to fast access times; and (iii) Silicon CMOS for its combined energy efficiency and low off-state leakage current (for memory peripheral circuits implemented on the bottom physical circuit layer). Our resulting 333-eDRAM achieves each of the following simultaneously, which we quantify and describe how to co-optimize in this paper: high density, high retention time, high endurance, low access times, low access energy, and low static leakage power. We show full physical layout designs detailing how to implement 333-eDRAM and quantify EADP for an ARM Cortex-M0 processor + on-chip 333-eDRAM implemented at a 7 nm technology node, running applications from the Embench benchmark suite. Using cycleaccurate simulations of applications, SPICE circuit simulations, compact models calibrated to experimental data, and detailed full physical layout designs of 333-eDRAM memories, we show that on average (across 16 Embench benchmarks), ARM CortexM0 + IGZO/CNT/Si 333-eDRAM offers $1.96 \times$ better EDP and $5.15 \times$ better EADP than ARM Cortex-M0 + Silicon eDRAM.
items.abstract_zh: 内存墙是持续提高计算系统能效的主要瓶颈。为了克服这一挑战，正在开发各种纳米材料、器件、电路、架构和三维 (3D) 集成技术，以用于未来的存储解决方案。然而，在设计存储器以实现高片上存储器容量、高保留时间、高耐用性、低存取时间、低存取能量和低静态泄漏功率时，存在重大权衡。我们提出了一种节能和面积高效的嵌入式 DRAM 内存架构（通过 EADP 量化：总能耗、电路面积和应用程序执行时间的乘积），该架构利用三种类型场效应晶体管 (FET) 的单片三维 (3D) 集成：(i) 铟镓锌氧化物 (IGZO) FET，可实现超低断态漏电流，从而实现高保留时间 DRAM； (ii) 碳纳米管 FET (CNFET)，可实现高通态驱动电流，从而实现快速存取时间； (iii) 硅 CMOS 具有综合能效和低断态漏电流（对于在底部物理电路层实现的存储器外围电路）。我们最终的 333-eDRAM 同时实现了以下各项，我们在本文中量化并描述了如何共同优化：高密度、高保留时间、高耐用性、低访问时间、低访问能量和低静态泄漏功率。我们展示了完整的物理布局设计，详细说明了如何实现 333-eDRAM 并量化 ARM Cortex-M0 处理器 + 在 7 nm 技术节点实现的片上 333-eDRAM 的 EADP，并运行 Embench 基准测试套件中的应用程序。使用应用程序的周期精确仿真、SPICE 电路仿真、根据实验数据校准的紧凑模型以及 333-eDRAM 存储器的详细完整物理布局设计，我们表明，平均而言（在 16 个 Embench 基准测试中），ARM CortexM0 + IGZO/CNT/Si 333-eDRAM 提供比 ARM Cortex-M0 + 芯片高 1.96 美元的 EDP 和高 5.15 美元的 EADP eDRAM。

items.title: Accuracy Is Not Always We Need: Precision-Aware Bayesian Yield Optimization.
items.abstract: Integrated circuit yield optimization plays a vital role in ensuring reliable semiconductor manufacturing, directly impacting both product quality and production costs. Current approaches to yield optimization face two fundamental challenges that limit their practical effectiveness. First, yield estimation requires intensive computational resources. Second, traditional black-box optimization methods inefficiently allocate these resources across design candidates. Most existing approaches compound these issues by performing detailed yield estimations uniformly across all candidates, regardless of their potential quality. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel precision-aware yield optimization framework that intelligently adapts computational resource allocation based on each design candidate’s predicted performance. Our approach moves beyond simple simulation counting by incorporating a Figure of Merit (FoM) as a continuous quality metric. By combining a Continuous AutoRegression model to characterize the relationship between true yield and precision levels with a sophisticated multi-fidelity acquisition strategy, our framework achieves optimal resource distribution. Experimental validation on four industry-standard benchmark circuits demonstrates that our method converges with fewer than 1,000 simulations, reducing simulation costs by over $10 \times$ while achieving better final designs and robustness than state-of-the-art high-fidelity approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 集成电路良率优化对于确保可靠的半导体制造起着至关重要的作用，直接影响产品质量和生产成本。当前的产量优化方法面临着两个限制其实际有效性的基本挑战。首先，产量估计需要大量的计算资源。其次，传统的黑盒优化方法在设计候选之间分配这些资源效率低下。大多数现有方法通过对所有候选者统一执行详细的产量估计而使这些问题变得更加复杂，而不管其潜在质量如何。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的精度感知良率优化框架，该框架根据每个设计候选者的预测性能智能地调整计算资源分配。我们的方法超越了简单的模拟计数，将品质因数 (FoM) 纳入连续质量指标。通过将连续自回归模型与复杂的多保真度采集策略相结合来表征真实产量和精度水平之间的关系，我们的框架实现了最佳资源分配。对四个行业标准基准电路的实验验证表明，我们的方法只需不到 1,000 次仿真即可收敛，将仿真成本降低了 10 多美元，同时实现了比最先进的高保真方法更好的最终设计和鲁棒性。

items.title: GPS: GNN-Based Two-Stage Pre-Scheduling Loop Mapping Method on CGRAs.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture (CGRA) has emerged as a promising solution for accelerating computationally intensive applications, particularly in the field of artificial intelligence. One of the primary challenges for CGRA compilers is generating effective mapping results for complex applications within a limited time-frame. This paper presents an enhanced pre-scheduling method that integrates Integer Linear Programming (ILP) and Graph Neural Networks (GNN), along with a corresponding two-stage mapping approach. This combination significantly reduces the search space and accelerates the solution process for mapping problems. Experimental results demonstrate performance improvements ranging from $29.4 \%$ to $406.7 \%$, along with compilation time reductions of up to $1106.8 \times$ compared to existing compilation techniques, as well as excellent scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA）已成为加速计算密集型应用程序的有前途的解决方案，特别是在人工智能领域。 CGRA 编译器面临的主要挑战之一是在有限的时间范围内为复杂的应用程序生成有效的映射结果。本文提出了一种集成整数线性规划（ILP）和图神经网络（GNN）的增强预调度方法，以及相应的两阶段映射方法。这种组合显着减少了搜索空间并加速了映射问题的解决过程。实验结果表明，与现有编译技术相比，性能提升了从 $29.4 \%$ 到 $406.7 \%$，编译时间减少了高达 $1106.8 \times$，并且具有出色的可扩展性。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Automated Topology Generation for Power Amplifier Designs through BiLSTM-based DNN and Multi-objective Optimizations.
items.abstract: This work presents an automated, intelligent methodology for optimizing power amplifier (PA) design by predicting the most suitable circuit topology-specifically, the input and output matching networks-for a given high electron mobility transistor (HEMT). A classification-based bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) deep neural network (DNN) is trained to determine the optimal PA topology, while multi-objective Pareto front-based optimization techniques refine the network’s hyperparameters, including the number of hidden layers and neurons. The proposed approach is adaptable to various HEMT models and is validated through the design and optimization of high-performance PAs using lumped elements and transmission lines, operating within the $1-2 \mathrm{GHz}$ frequency range. The method is demonstrated using the Cree CGH40010 GaN HEMT on a Rogers RO4350B substrate, achieving a power output of approximately 40 dBm, a power-added efficiency (PAE) of at least 50%, and a power gain exceeding 10dB.
items.abstract_zh: This work presents an automated, intelligent methodology for optimizing power amplifier (PA) design by predicting the most suitable circuit topology-specifically, the input and output matching networks-for a given high electron mobility transistor (HEMT).基于分类的双向长短期记忆 (BiLSTM) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 经过训练以确定最佳 PA 拓扑，同时基于多目标帕累托前沿的优化技术细化网络的超参数，包括隐藏层和神经元的数量。所提出的方法适用于各种 HEMT 模型，并通过使用集总元件和传输线的高性能 PA 的设计和优化进行了验证，在 1-2 \mathrm{GHz}$ 频率范围内运行。该方法在 Rogers RO4350B 基板上使用 Cree CGH40010 GaN HEMT 进行了演示，实现了约 40 dBm 的功率输出、至少 50% 的功率附加效率 (PAE) 以及超过 10dB 的功率增益。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Versatile 4:1 Multiplexer Using 1T1R RRAM Crossbar for High Speed In-Memory Computing.
items.abstract: This paper presents a high speed NAND based 4:1 Multiplexer (MUX) for various logic operations in a ResistiveRandom access memory crossbar structure. Compared to existing 4:1 MUX designs that require 10 steps, our proposed method completes execution in 3 steps. Additionally, proposed $4: 1$ MUX based Full adder, Full subtractor and 1-bit Comparator reduce clock cycles by 75% compared to state-of-the-art. Despite an increase in memristor count, the reduction in computational delay makes this approach promising for fast in-memory computing.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 NAND 的高速 4:1 多路复用器 (MUX)，用于电阻式随机存取存储器交叉开关结构中的各种逻辑操作。与需要 10 个步骤的现有 4:1 MUX 设计相比，我们提出的方法只需 3 个步骤即可完成执行。此外，与最先进的技术相比，提议的基于 4:1$ MUX 的全加器、全减器和 1 位比较器将时钟周期减少了 75%。尽管忆阻器数量增加，但计算延迟的减少使得这种方法有望用于快速内存计算。

items.title: Quantum-Resistant Security: PQC Readiness and Research Challenges (Invited).
items.abstract: What is your PQC-readiness” - in this paper, we have explored this problem, some of the key challenges to address it and how ciphersuite dependency graphs alongwith observability plays a vital role in addressing some of those challenges. Quantum computing capabilities are evolving fast and on course to develop a cryptographically relevant quantum computer (CRQC). With that several widely used classical cryptography protocols such as RSA are poised to be broken in the next few years. NIST has announced three cryptography protocols as part of the first batch of post-quantum cryptography standards. However, implementation and adoption of quantum-resistant cryptography is a hard problem given the complexities of today’s internet and computing stack. Our work has led to development of algorithms and a system Quartz (Quantum Risk and Threat Analyzer) for observability for quantum vulnerabilities for cryptography suites, where they are used, and analyzing their risks. In that context, we used observability, and the concept of ciphersuite dependency graphs in order to determine use of quantum-unsafe cryptography, and its influence on cryptography supply chain, and generation of cryptography bill of materials (CBOM).
items.abstract_zh: 你的 PQC 准备情况如何”——在本文中，我们探讨了这个问题、解决该问题的一些关键挑战，以及密码套件依赖图和可观测性如何在解决其中一些挑战中发挥至关重要的作用。量子计算能力正在快速发展，并正在开发与密码相关的量子计算机 (CRQC)。因此，几种广泛使用的经典密码协议（例如 RSA）将在未来几年内被破解。NIST 已宣布三种密码协议作为第一批的一部分然而，考虑到当今互联网和计算堆栈的复杂性，抗量子密码学的实施和采用是一个难题，我们的工作导致了算法和 Quartz 系统（量子风险和威胁分析器）的开发，用于观察密码学套件的量子漏洞，并分析其风险。在这种情况下，我们使用可观察性和密码套件依赖图的概念来确定量子不安全密码学的使用。及其对密码学供应链和密码学物料清单（CBOM）生成的影响。

items.title: GraphAccel: An In-Storage Accelerator for Efficient Graph-Based Vector Similarity Search Using Page Packing and Speculative Search Optimization.
items.abstract: Graph-based search for approximate vector similarity is essential in AI applications, such as retrieval-augmented generation. To support large-scale searches, vector search graphs are often stored on storage devices like SSDs. In this paper, we introduce GraphAccel, an in-storage accelerator optimized for efficient graph-based vector similarity search. Our architecture incorporates an optimized page packing mechanism to reduce SSD page accesses per query, alongside a speculative search scheme that maximizes utilization of idle SSD chips and channels. Through these optimizations, GraphAccel achieves notable performance improvements over existing SSD-based graph search solutions, including DiskANN and DiskANN++.
items.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似向量相似度搜索在人工智能应用中至关重要，例如检索增强生成。为了支持大规模搜索，矢量搜索图通常存储在 SSD 等存储设备上。在本文中，我们介绍了 GraphAccel，这是一种针对高效的基于图的向量相似性搜索而优化的存储内加速器。我们的架构采用了优化的页面打包机制，以减少每次查询的 SSD 页面访问量，同时采用推测搜索方案，最大限度地利用空闲 SSD 芯片和通道。通过这些优化，GraphAccel 比现有基于 SSD 的图搜索解决方案（包括 DiskANN 和 DiskANN++）实现了显着的性能改进。

items.title: Real-Time Dynamic IR-drop Prediction for IR ECO.
items.abstract: During the IR Engineering Change Order (ECO) stage, cell moving leads to uncertain IR-drop results, requiring designers to explore multiple ECO candidates in each iteration to find a solution that effectively mitigates IR-drop, resulting in a long evaluation time. Although machine learning (ML)-based predictors have been proposed to expedite IR-drop evaluation, partial simulations are still needed to update features after ECO, taking over an hour and delaying IR-drop results. In this work, we propose a real-time dynamic IR-drop estimation method based on an XGBoost model with a global view of a cell’s surroundings. After ECO, our method provides dynamic IR-drop results in minutes without running any simulations and thus achieves real-time estimation. This allows designers to evaluate multiple ECO candidates concurrently in a single iteration. We conducted the experiments on five ECO candidates of an industrial design with 3 nm technology. The results show that the proposed model can effectively predict the IR-drop variations of moved cells after ECO with over $93 \%$ of fixed cells detected and an average MAE of 8.75 mV achieved. Furthermore, our method achieves an $88 X$ speedup over Voltus (commercial tool) and a $64 X$ speedup over traditional ML predictors when evaluating a single ECO candidate. The speedup is expected to increase as the number of ECO candidates increases.
items.abstract_zh: 在 IR 工程变更指令 (ECO) 阶段，单元移动会导致不确定的 IR 压降结果，需要设计人员在每次迭代中探索多个 ECO 候选方案，以找到有效减轻 IR 压降的解决方案，从而导致评估时间较长。尽管基于机器学习 (ML) 的预测器已被提出来加快 IR 压降评估，但在 ECO 后仍需要进行部分模拟来更新功能，这需要一个多小时并延迟 IR 压降结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 XGBoost 模型的实时动态 IR 压降估计方法，具有细胞周围环境的全局视图。 ECO之后，我们的方法在几分钟内提供动态IR压降结果，而无需运行任何模拟，从而实现实时估计。这使得设计人员能够在一次迭代中同时评估多个 ECO 候选者。我们对采用 3 nm 技术的工业设计的 5 个 ECO 候选方案进行了实验。结果表明，所提出的模型可以有效预测 ECO 后移动单元的 IR 压降变化，检测到超过 $93 \%$ 的固定单元，平均 MAE 达到 8.75 mV。此外，在评估单个 ECO 候选者时，我们的方法比 Voltus（商业工具）实现了 88 X$ 加速，比传统 ML 预测器实现了 64 X$ 加速。随着 ECO 候选者数量的增加，加速预计会增加。

items.title: BEVSA: A Real-Time Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation Accelerator for Multi-Camera System.
items.abstract: A bird’s-eye-view (BEV) semantic segmentation accelerator (BEVSA) is proposed for real-time 3D space perception in multi-camera system (MCS). The view transformation from multi-camera-view to BEV obstructs the real-time operation on edge devices through 68.3 ms of time consumption during BEV pooling, which requires sorting and irregular memory access over wide searching space. Moreover, the 69.1% high average input activation sparsity of the segmentation process for the transformed BEV features results in excessive meaningless computations. For the real-time implementation of BEV semantic segmentation on edge platforms, this paper proposes two key features: 1) Block-decomposed hierarchical BEV pooling cluster that partitions the searching space in an MCS-suitable way and supports parallel pooling, achieving $43.2 \times$ speedup for BEV pooling over the edge computing platform; 2) Coarse-to-fine-grained zero skipping convolution cluster, which conducts coarse-grained zero skipping for all-zero channels and tile-wise fine-grained zero skipping, improving the convolution throughput by $1.61 \times$. Implemented with 28 nm technology, and evaluated on two representative MCS datasets, BEVSA finally achieves 23.1 frames-per-second of real-time BEV segmentation throughput with $167.4 \times$ higher energy-per-frame over the edge computing platform.
items.abstract_zh: 提出了一种鸟瞰 (BEV) 语义分割加速器 (BEVSA)，用于多摄像头系统 (MCS) 中的实时 3D 空间感知。从多摄像机视图到 BEV 的视图转换阻碍了边缘设备上的实时操作，BEV 池化期间消耗了 68.3 毫秒的时间，这需要在广泛的搜索空间上进行排序和不规则的内存访问。此外，转换后的 BEV 特征的分割过程的平均输入激活稀疏度高达 69.1%，导致过多的无意义计算。对于边缘平台上 BEV 语义分割的实时实现，本文提出了两个关键特征：1）分块分解的分层 BEV 池化集群，以适合 MCS 的方式划分搜索空间并支持并行池化，在边缘计算平台上实现 BEV 池化 43.2 美元的加速； 2）粗粒度到细粒度的跳零卷积簇，对全零通道进行粗粒度的跳零，并进行tile-wise细粒度的跳零，将卷积吞吐量提高了1.61倍。 BEVSA 采用 28 nm 技术实现，并在两个代表性的 MCS 数据集上进行评估，最终实现了每秒 23.1 帧的实时 BEV 分段吞吐量，每帧能量比边缘计算平台高出 167.4 美元\倍$。

items.title: iG-kway: Incremental k-way Graph Partitioning on GPU.
items.abstract: Recent advances in GPU-accelerated graph partitioning have achieved significant performance gains but remain limited to full graph partitioning, lacking support for incremental updates. This limitation is critical in CAD applications, where circuit graphs undergo iterative, incremental modifications during optimization. We present iG-kway, the first GPU-based incremental k-way graph partitioner. iG-kway features an incrementality-aware data structure and a refinement kernel that efficiently updates only affected vertices with minimal quality loss. Experiments show that iG-kway delivers up to $84 \times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art G-kway with comparable partitioning quality.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 加速图分区的最新进展取得了显着的性能提升，但仍仅限于完整图分区，缺乏对增量更新的支持。这种限制在 CAD 应用中至关重要，因为电路图在优化过程中会经历迭代、增量修改。我们推出了 iG-kway，第一个基于 GPU 的增量 k-way 图分区器。 iG-kway 具有增量感知数据结构和细化内核，可以有效地仅更新受影响的顶点，同时将质量损失降至最低。实验表明，在具有相当的分区质量的情况下，iG-kway 比最先进的 G-kway 提供高达 84 倍的加速。

items.title: CVMAX: Accelerator Architecture with Polar Form Multiplication for Complex-Valued Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Complex-Valued Neural Networks (CVNNs) have demonstrated high performance in applications where complex numbers are essential, but suffer from higher computational and memory overheads. Since their target applications often operate in resource-constrained environments, optimizing CVNNs for energy and area efficiency is important for their acceleration. To resolve these challenges, we present CVMAX, a software-hardware co-design for energy and area-efficient CVNN acceleration. CVMAX introduces a specialized quantization technique based on polar form representation and shift quantization. The technique significantly reduces the bit width of CVNNs and computational complexity compared to conventional quantization with rectangular form. Moreover, shift quantization leverages the computational simplicity of multiplication in polar form, reducing the complexity of complex number multiplication. With the quantization technique, we designed a dedicated hardware accelerator that supports CVMAX data and its associated arithmetic operations. In our evaluation, CVMAX achieves a 75% reduction in energy consumption and achieves a $4.44 \times$ speedup compared to conventional accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 复值神经网络 (CVNN) 在复数必不可少的应用中表现出了高性能，但其计算和内存开销较高。由于它们的目标应用程序通常在资源受限的环境中运行，因此优化 CVNN 的能源和面积效率对于它们的加速非常重要。为了解决这些挑战，我们推出了 CVMAX，这是一种用于节能和面积高效的 CVNN 加速的软硬件协同设计。 CVMAX 引入了一种基于极坐标形式表示和移位量化的专门量化技术。与传统的矩形量化相比，该技术显着降低了 CVNN 的位宽和计算复杂度。此外，移位量化利用了极坐标形式乘法的计算简单性，降低了复数乘法的复杂性。利用量化技术，我们设计了专用的硬件加速器，支持CVMAX数据及其相关算术运算。在我们的评估中，与传统加速器相比，CVMAX 实现了 75% 的能耗降低，并实现了 4.44 美元×$ 的加速。

items.title: Accelerating design-technology co-development using neural compact modeling and data-driven SPICE simulation.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a new design-technology cooptimization framework that expedites circuit optimization by utilizing the neural compact modeling (NCM) and a data-driven SPICE simulation. An efficient retargeting strategy of NCM and its improved design capability through a direct data driven SPICE simulation were leveraged at the industry level in response to increasingly challenging current development situations. To facilitate rapid feedback for extensive trial and error in technology optimization, the NCM swiftly fine-tune itself using pre-trained model. Then, the data interpolation and derating techniques are utilized to provide the same design environment as before such as instance binning, process variations, and layout dependent effects. Demonstrating the robustness of our framework, we achieved a 95% reduction in PDK release time while maintaining model consistency and performance at a mid-scale design of $\mathbf{1 5 k}$ transistors, with no SPICE run time and accuracy loss. This solution allows for rapid incorporation of process changes into the design, supporting quick path-finding during a design-technology co-development.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的设计技术协同优化框架，该框架利用神经紧凑建模（NCM）和数据驱动的 SPICE 仿真来加速电路优化。 NCM 的高效重定向策略及其通过直接数据驱动的 SPICE 仿真改进的设计能力在行业层面得到利用，以应对当前日益严峻的开发形势。为了促进技术优化中大量试验和错误的快速反馈，NCM 使用预先训练的模型快速进行自我调整。然后，利用数据插值和降额技术来提供与以前相同的设计环境，例如实例分级、工艺变化和布局相关效果。为了证明我们框架的稳健性，我们将 PDK 发布时间缩短了 95%，同时保持了 $\mathbf{1 5 k}$ 晶体管中型设计的模型一致性和性能，并且没有 SPICE 运行时间和精度损失。该解决方案允许将流程变更快速纳入设计中，支持设计技术联合开发期间的快速路径查找。

items.title: BiNeuroRAM: Energy-Efficient ReRAM-Based PIM for Accurate Bipolar Spiking Neural Network Acceleration.
items.abstract: ReRAM is a promising non-volatile memory for neuromor-phic accelerators, yet it faces challenges such as high sensing power and accuracy degradation. This work proposes BiNeuroRAM, a novel spiking neural network (SNN) accelerator leveraging ReRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM), with three key contributions: (1) It is the first to support higher-accuracy spike-tracing bipolar-integrate-and-fire (ST-BIF) neurons, achieving 80.9% accuracy on ImageNet, 8.4% higher than the previous state-of-the-art; (2) It introduces a low-power voltage sense amplifier (LPVSA) that reduces ReRAM read power by 14.7~58.2×, enhancing energy efficiency; (3) It employs an asynchronous micro-architecture that fully exploits the event-driven nature of SNNs. Experimental results show that BiNeuroRAM improves throughput density and energy efficiency by 2.08× and 2.09× on ImageNet with ResNet-18, compared to traditional integrate-and-fire (IF) neuron-based SNN accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: ReRAM 是一种很有前景的神经形态加速器非易失性存储器，但它面临着高传感功率和精度下降等挑战。这项工作提出了 BiNeuroRAM，一种利用基于 ReRAM 的内存处理（PIM）的新型尖峰神经网络（SNN）加速器，具有三个关键贡献：（1）它是第一个支持更高精度尖峰跟踪双极积分激发（ST-BIF）神经元的技术，在 ImageNet 上实现了 80.9% 的准确率，比之前最先进的技术高出 8.4%； （2）引入低功耗电压感应放大器（LPVSA），将ReRAM读取功耗降低14.7~58.2倍，提高能效； (3)它采用异步微架构，充分利用了SNN的事件驱动特性。实验结果表明，与传统的基于集成和激发 (IF) 神经元的 SNN 加速器相比，BiNeuroRAM 在使用 ResNet-18 的 ImageNet 上将吞吐量密度和能源效率提高了 2.08 倍和 2.09 倍。

items.title: Logic Restructuring with Preserved Logic Blocks.
items.abstract: During technology mapping, complex cells such as adders and multiplexers are often available in the standard cell library, which helps improve the final PPA results. However, technology-independent optimization tends to over-optimize towards the cost metrics measurable with technology-independent representations (e.g., AIG size) by decomposing blocks of logic that could have been mapped into complex cells. Besides, it is also of practical interest to model and preserve some special logic components, such as the enable logic of flops, during optimization. This paper studies “boxing” logic blocks before technology-independent optimization and preserving them during optimization. A wire-based resubstitution is proposed to optimize boxed networks. Experiments with academic and industrial benchmarks show that transparent-boxing, i.e., preserving boxes while utilizing the information on their logic, achieves better results than black-boxing, i.e., completely ignoring the logic in boxes. Specifically, in the technology-independent evaluation, transparentboxing reduces the mapped network size by 4% more than blackboxing; in the full-flow evaluation, transparent-boxing achieves 1.8% more improvement on timing and similar improvements in area, power, and wire length compared to black-boxing.
items.abstract_zh: 在技​​术映射过程中，标准单元库中通常提供加法器和多路复用器等复杂单元，这有助于改善最终的 PPA 结果。然而，与技术无关的优化往往会通过分解可能映射到复杂单元的逻辑块，对可通过与技术无关的表示（例如 AIG 大小）测量的成本指标进行过度优化。此外，在优化过程中建模和保留一些特殊的逻辑组件（例如触发器的使能逻辑）也具有实际意义。本文研究了在与技术无关的优化之前“装箱”逻辑块并在优化过程中保留它们。提出了基于线路的重新替换来优化盒装网络。学术和工业基准的实验表明，透明装箱（即在利用其逻辑信息的同时保留盒子）比黑盒（即完全忽略盒子中的逻辑）取得更好的结果。具体来说，在与技术无关的评估中，透明盒化比黑盒化减少了映射网络大小4%；在全流程评估中，与黑盒相比，透明盒在时序上实现了 1.8% 的改进，并且在面积、功率和线长度方面实现了类似的改进。

items.title: Optimizing Recovery Logic in Speculative High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) excels at handling compute-intensive loops with straightforward control but struggles to identify parallelism in kernels with complex and irregular control-flow. To address this, novel scheduling techniques based on speculation have been introduced. While these methods outperform traditional static scheduling, they also introduce significant area overhead, particularly in the rollback control logic. Optimizing the cost of this rollback control logic remains an open challenge. In this work, we show how it is possible to simplify and/or eliminate rollback logic using a combination of static analysis and linear programming. Our results show improvements in both execution throughput and area cost.
items.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 擅长通过简单的控制来处理计算密集型循环，但难以识别具有复杂和不规则控制流的内核中的并行性。为了解决这个问题，引入了基于推测的新颖的调度技术。虽然这些方法优于传统的静态调度，但它们也引入了显着的区域开销，特别是在回滚控制逻辑中。优化回滚控制逻辑的成本仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用静态分析和线性编程的组合来简化和/或消除回滚逻辑。我们的结果显示执行吞吐量和面积成本均有所改善。

items.title: PipeLink: A Pipelined Resource Sharing System for Dataflow High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: Dynamically scheduled high-level synthesis (HLS) is an approach to HLS that maps programs into dataflow circuits. These circuits use distributed control for communication and therefore can be automatically pipelined. However, pipelined function call is challenging due to the absence of centralized control, thus general software programs cannot be well-supported by the HLS tools. Traditional solutions to this problem impose restrictions on pipelining when accessing the shared functions. We present PipeLink, a modular synthesis method that decomposes the synthesis into compilation stage and linking stage, which enables the fully-pipelined access to shared functions in dataflow circuits. We develop a complete HLS engine using this approach and use asynchronous circuits as the target implementation. Our engine supports pipelined access to shared function units, as well as pipelined memory access in a unified fashion. Compared to existing HLS tools, PipeLink results in 20X reduction in energy and 1.56 X improvement in throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 动态调度高级综合 (HLS) 是一种将程序映射到数据流电路的 HLS 方法。这些电路使用分布式控制进行通信，因此可以自动流水线化。然而，由于缺乏集中控制，流水线函数调用具有挑战性，因此HLS工具无法很好地支持通用软件程序。该问题的传统解决方案在访问共享函数时对流水线施加了限制。我们提出了 PipeLink，一种模块化综合方法，将综合分解为编译阶段和链接阶段，从而实现对数据流电路中共享函数的全流水线访问。我们使用这种方法开发了一个完整的 HLS 引擎，并使用异步电路作为目标实现。我们的引擎支持对共享功能单元的流水线访问，以及统一方式的流水线内存访问。与现有的 HLS 工具相比，PipeLink 的能耗降低了 20 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.56 倍。

items.title: StreamCSD: SSD-Autonomous Stream Management via In-Storage Content Learning.
items.abstract: Write amplification (WA) from migrating valid pages during garbage collection (GC) degrades SSD performance and lifespan. Although stream management based on high-level software semantics reduces WA, existing solutions require host modifications, hindering their adoption. We introduce StreamCSD, an SSD-autonomous stream management approach using in-storage content learning, eliminating host-side changes. Leveraging compression ratios from embedded compressors in computational storage drives (CSDs), StreamCSD employs a streaming Kmeans algorithm to cost-efficiently cluster data into streams. Evaluations show that StreamCSD reduces WA from 1.7 to 1.06 under multimodal generative AI workloads, matching state-of-the-art methods with minimal impact on bandwidth. StreamCSD operates without host modifications, promoting broader adoption of multi-stream SSDs.
items.abstract_zh: 垃圾收集 (GC) 期间迁移有效页面产生的写放大 (WA) 会降低 SSD 性能和使用寿命。虽然基于高级软件语义的流管理减少了WA，但现有解决方案需要主机修改，阻碍了其采用。我们引入了 StreamCSD，这是一种使用存储内内容学习的 SSD 自主流管理方法，消除了主机端更改。 StreamCSD 利用计算存储驱动器 (CSD) 中嵌入式压缩机的压缩比，采用流式 Kmeans 算法以经济高效的方式将数据聚类到流中。评估表明，StreamCSD 在多模式生成 AI 工作负载下将 WA 从 1.7 降低到 1.06，匹配最先进的方法，同时对带宽的影响最小。 StreamCSD 无需修改主机即可运行，从而促进了多流 SSD 的更广泛采用。

items.title: MemSens: Significantly Reducing Memory Overhead in Adjoint Sensitivity Analysis Using Novel Error-Bounded Lossy Compression.
items.abstract: Adjoint sensitivity analysis is an exceptionally efficient method for computing the gradient of an objective function with respect to given parameters, playing a crucial role in modern circuit design and verification. According to the principles of the adjoint method, it is necessary to store all essential system state information, such as state vectors and Jacobian matrices, at each time step during the forward integration process in order to construct the adjoint equations during the backward integration. Therefore, the memory overhead of the adjoint method is proportional to the system size and the number of time steps, resulting in prohibitive memory costs for solving large-scale dynamic systems.In this paper, we propose a novel, memory-efficient adjoint sensitivity analysis method that significantly reduces the memory overhead of storing system state information by employing error-bounded lossy compression techniques. Our compression algorithm effectively utilizes the spatiotemporal characteristics of data in circuit simulations and incorporates stringent error control mechanisms. This approach achieves a two-order-ofmagnitude reduction in memory overhead during simulation while ensuring that the accuracy of the adjoint solution remains unaffected.
items.abstract_zh: 伴随灵敏度分析是一种非常有效的方法，用于计算目标函数相对于给定参数的梯度，在现代电路设计和验证中发挥着至关重要的作用。根据伴随方法的原理，需要在前向积分过程中的每个时间步存储所有必要的系统状态信息，例如状态向量和雅可比矩阵，以便在后向积分过程中构造伴随方程。因此，伴随方法的内存开销与系统规模和时间步数成正比，导致求解大规模动态系统的内存成本过高。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的、内存高效的伴随灵敏度分析方法，该方法通过采用误差有界有损压缩技术显着降低了存储系统状态信息的内存开销。我们的压缩算法有效地利用了电路仿真中数据的时空特性，并结合了严格的错误控制机制。这种方法在模拟过程中将内存开销减少了两个数量级，同时确保伴随解的准确性不受影响。

items.title: GauRast: Enhancing GPU Triangle Rasterizers to Accelerate 3D Gaussian Splatting.
items.abstract: 3D intelligence leverages rich 3D features and stands as a promising frontier in AI, with 3D rendering fundamental to many downstream applications. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), an emerging high-quality 3D rendering method, requires significant computation, making real-time execution on existing GPU-equipped edge devices infeasible. Previous efforts to accelerate 3DGS rely on dedicated accelerators that require substantial integration overhead and hardware costs. This work proposes an acceleration strategy that leverages the similarities between the 3DGS pipeline and the highly optimized conventional graphics pipeline in modern GPUs. Instead of developing a dedicated accelerator, we enhance existing GPU rasterizer hardware to efficiently support 3DGS operations. Our results demonstrate a 23× increase in processing speed and a 24 × reduction in energy consumption, with improvements yielding 6× faster end-to-end runtime for the original 3DGS algorithm and 4× for the latest efficiency-improved pipeline, achieving 24 FPS and 46 FPS respectively. These enhancements incur only a minimal area overhead of 0.2% relative to the entire SoC chip area, underscoring the practicality and efficiency of our approach for enabling 3DGS rendering on resource-constrained platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 智能利用丰富的 3D 功能，是人工智能领域前景广阔的前沿领域，其中 3D 渲染是许多下游应用的基础。 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 是一种新兴的高质量 3D 渲染方法，需要大量计算，使得在现有配备 GPU 的边缘设备上实时执行不可行。以前加速 3DGS 的努力依赖于需要大量集成开销和硬件成本的专用加速器。这项工作提出了一种加速策略，利用 3DGS 管道和现代 GPU 中高度优化的传统图形管道之间的相似性。我们没有开发专用加速器，而是增强现有的 GPU 光栅器硬件以有效支持 3DGS 操作。我们的结果表明，处理速度提高了 23 倍，能耗降低了 24 倍，原始 3DGS 算法的端到端运行时间提高了 6 倍，而最新效率改进的管道则提高了 4 倍，分别实现了 24 FPS 和 46 FPS。相对于整个 SoC 芯片面积，这些增强功能仅产生 0.2% 的最小面积开销，凸显了我们在资源受限平台上实现 3DGS 渲染的方法的实用性和效率。

items.title: PUFiM: A Robust and Efficient FeFET-Based Security Solution Merging Physical Unclonable Function with Compute-in-Memory for Edge AI.
items.abstract: Compute-in-memory (CiM) has become a promising candidate for edge AI by reducing data movements through insitu operations. However, this emerging computational paradigm also poses the vulnerability of model leakage as the weights are stored in plaintext for computing. While prior works have explored lightweight encryption methods, CiM is usually considered a separate module instead of a system component, leaving the origin of keys unclear and unprotected. Physical unclonable functions (PUFs) offer a potential origin of keys, but a comprehensive framework for securing key generation and delivery remains lacking. Besides, the complementary ciphertext storage incurs substantial costs and degrades the performance. This work proposes PUFiM, a robust and efficient security solution for edge computing based on ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs). For the first time, a strong PUF is synergized with CiM to enable authentication, key generation, and encrypted computations within a unified array for comprehensive protection. To achieve this synergization, a high-density hybrid storage and computation approach combining PUF and weight bits via multi-level cell (MLC) FeFETs is proposed. Besides, two PUF enhancement techniques and a novel mapping scheme are developed to improve security and efficiency further. Results show that PUFiM withstands PUF modeling attacks with up to $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ samples. Moreover, PUFiM reduces the inference accuracy by $\gt 60 \%$ under 95% key leakage and achieves $\gt 9.7 \times$ compute density and $\gt 1.2 \times$ energy efficiency improvement compared with the state-of-the-art SRAM/NVM secure CiMs.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算（CiM）通过原位操作减少数据移动，已成为边缘人工智能的一个有前途的候选者。然而，这种新兴的计算范式也带来了模型泄漏的漏洞，因为权重以明文形式存储以进行计算。虽然之前的工作已经探索了轻量级加密方法，但 CiM 通常被认为是一个单独的模块而不是系统组件，导致密钥的来源不清楚且不受保护。物理不可克隆函数 (PUF) 提供了潜在的密钥来源，但仍然缺乏用于保护密钥生成和传递的综合框架。此外，互补的密文存储会产生大量成本并降低性能。这项工作提出了 PUFiM，这是一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的强大且高效的边缘计算安全解决方案。强大的 PUF 首次与 CiM 协同作用，在统一阵列内实现身份验证、密钥生成和加密计算，从而实现全面保护。为了实现这种协同作用，提出了一种通过多级单元 (MLC) FeFET 将 PUF 和权重位相结合的高密度混合存储和计算方法。此外，还开发了两种 PUF 增强技术和一种新颖的映射方案，以进一步提高安全性和效率。结果表明，PUFiM 可抵御高达 $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ 样本的 PUF 建模攻击。此外，与最先进的 SRAM/NVM 安全 CiM 相比，PUFiM 在 95% 密钥泄漏的情况下将推理精度降低 $\gt 60 \%$，并实现 $\gt 9.7 \times$ 计算密度和 $\gt 1.2 \times$ 能效提升。

items.title: ATLAS: A Self-Supervised and Cross-Stage Netlist Power Model for Fine-Grained Time-Based Layout Power Analysis.
items.abstract: Accurate power prediction in VLSI design is crucial for effective power optimization, especially as designs get transformed from gate-level netlist to layout stages. However, traditional accurate power simulation requires time-consuming back-end processing and simulation steps, which significantly impede design optimization. To address this, we propose ATLAS, which can predict the ultimate time-based layout power for any new design in the gate-level netlist. To the best of our knowledge, ATLAS is the first work that supports both time-based power simulation and general cross-design power modeling. It achieves such general timebased power modeling by proposing a new pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm customized for circuit power. Targeting golden per-cycle layout power from commercial tools, our ATLAS achieves the mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of only ${0. 5 8 \%, ~} {0. 4 5 \%}$, and ${5. 1 2 \%}$ for the clock tree, register, and combinational power groups, respectively, without any layout information. Overall, the MAPE for the total power of the entire design is $\lt1 \%$, and the inference speed of a workload is significantly faster than the standard flow of commercial tools.
items.abstract_zh: VLSI 设计中准确的功耗预测对于有效的功耗优化至关重要，尤其是当设计从门级网表转变为布局阶段时。然而，传统的精确功率仿真需要耗时的后端处理和仿真步骤，这极大地阻碍了设计优化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ATLAS，它可以预测门级网表中任何新设计的最终基于时间的布局能力。据我们所知，ATLAS 是第一个同时支持基于时间的功耗仿真和通用交叉设计功耗建模的作品。它通过提出一种针对电路功率定制的新的预训练和微调范例来实现这种基于时间的通用功率建模。我们的 ATLAS 以商业工具的黄金每周期布局能力为目标，实现了仅 ${0.0 美元的平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE)。 5 8 \%, ~} {0. 4 5 \%}$ 和 ${5. 1 2 \%}$ 分别用于时钟树、寄存器和组合电源组，没有任何布局信息。总体而言，整个设计的总算力的MAPE为$\lt1\%$，并且工作负载的推理速度明显快于商业工具的标准流程。

items.title: STREAM: Spatiotemporal Similarity-based Efficient Approximate Median with Tunable Granularity.
items.abstract: The median (MED) is a crucial statistic for measuring the central tendency. However, exact MED computation remains costly, with even state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms failing to meet (near) real-time processing demands. While approximate MED algorithm has arisen as a promising candidate, existing approaches ignore the potential opportunity of spatiotemporal similarity within the application and fail to provide applicationspecific trade-offs between execution time and accuracy. Our goal is to design an enhanced approximate MED algorithm STREAM, which is capable of exploiting the spatiotemporal similarity to achieve bucket reuse and establish a tunable-grained bucket mechanism to meet the accuracy of application-specific requirements. Experimental results show that while maintaining nearly identical accuracy, STREAM outperforms the SOTA approximate methods DDSketch (up to $10 \times 4.7 \times$ on average) and KLL (up to $71.2 \times 10.1 \times$ on average).
items.abstract_zh: 中位数（MED）是衡量集中趋势的重要统计量。然而，精确的 MED 计算仍然成本高昂，即使是最先进的 (SOTA) 算法也无法满足（近）实时处理需求。虽然近似 MED 算法已成为一种有前途的候选算法，但现有方法忽略了应用程序内时空相似性的潜在机会，并且无法提供执行时间和准确性之间的特定于应用程序的权衡。我们的目标是设计一种增强的近似MED算法STREAM，它能够利用时空相似性来实现桶的重用，并建立可调粒度的桶机制来满足特定应用程序的精度要求。实验结果表明，在保持几乎相同的精度的同时，STREAM 的性能优于 SOTA 近似方法 DDSketch（平均高达 $10 × 4.7 ×$）和 KLL（平均高达 $71.2 × 10.1 ×$）。

items.title: Resilient Federated Learning on Embedded Devices with Constrained Network Connectivity.
items.abstract: Federated learning enables decentralized model training while preserving data privacy. However, since the learning process overlays the physical network infrastructure, the efficiency of learning can be impacted by network connectivity. In this work, we conducted extensive experiments to empirically characterize the impacts and leverage the insights to propose an adaptive federation framework, where clients with limited bandwidth are only prompted to transmit adaptively compressed gradient updates when the gradient similarity score is similar between the local and global models. Our evaluation in simulated environments and on real hardware devices shows bandwidth savings of 60% to 78% compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习可以实现去中心化模型训练，同时保护数据隐私。然而，由于学习过程覆盖物理网络基础设施，因此学习效率可能会受到网络连接的影响。在这项工作中，我们进行了广泛的实验来凭经验描述影响，并利用这些见解提出一个自适应联合框架，其中只有当局部模型和全局模型之间的梯度相似度分数相似时，才会提示带宽有限的客户端传输自适应压缩的梯度更新。我们在模拟环境和真实硬件设备上的评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，带宽节省了 60% 到 78%。

items.title: KVO-LLM: Boosting Long-Context Generation Throughput for Batched LLM Inference.
items.abstract: With the widespread deployment of long-context large language models (LLMs), efficient and high-quality generation is becoming increasingly important. Modern LLMs employ batching and key-value (KV) cache to improve generation throughput and quality. However, as the context length and batch size rise drastically, the KV cache incurs extreme external memory access (EMA) issues. Recent LLM accelerators face substantial processing element (PE) under-utilization due to the low arithmetic intensity of attention with KV cache, while existing KV cache compression algorithms struggle with hardware inefficiency or significant accuracy degradation. To address these issues, an algorithm-architecture co-optimization, KVO-LLM, is proposed for long-context batched LLM generation. At the algorithm level, we propose a KV cache quantization-aware pruning method that first adopts salient-token-aware quantization and then prunes KV channels and tokens by attention guided pruning based on salient tokens identified during quantization. Achieving substantial savings on hardware overhead, our algorithm reduces the EMA of KV cache over 91% with significant accuracy advantages compared to previous KV cache compression algorithms. At the architecture level, we propose a multi-core jointly optimized accelerator that adopts operator fusion and cross-batch interleaving strategy, maximizing PE and DRAM bandwidth utilization. Compared to the state-of-the-art LLM accelerators, KVO-LLM improves generation throughput by up to $7.32 \times$, and attains $5.52 \sim 8.38 \times$ better energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 随着长上下文大语言模型（LLM）的广泛部署，高效、高质量的生成变得越来越重要。现代法学硕士采用批处理和键值 (KV) 缓存来提高生成吞吐量和质量。然而，随着上下文长度和批量大小急剧增加，KV 缓存会引发极端的外部内存访问 (EMA) 问题。由于 KV 缓存的算术强度较低，最近的 LLM 加速器面临着严重的处理元素 (PE) 利用率不足的问题，而现有的 KV 缓存压缩算法则面临着硬件效率低下或精度显着下降的问题。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种算法架构协同优化 KVO-LLM，用于长上下文批量 LLM 生成。在算法层面，我们提出了一种 KV 缓存量化感知剪枝方法，该方法首先采用显着令牌感知量化，然后根据量化过程中识别的显着令牌通过注意力引导剪枝来剪枝 KV 通道和令牌。我们的算法大大节省了硬件开销，将 KV 缓存的 EMA 降低了 91% 以上，与之前的 KV 缓存压缩算法相比，具有显着的准确性优势。在架构层面，我们提出了一种多核联合优化的加速器，采用算子融合和跨批次交错策略，最大限度地提高PE和DRAM带宽利用率。与最先进的 LLM 加速器相比，KVO-LLM 将发电吞吐量提高了高达 7.32 美元\times$，并实现了 5.52 美元\sim 8.38 \times$ 更高的能源效率。

items.title: Espresso: Exploiting the Sparsity Property in Event Sensors with Spatiotemporal Ordering.
items.abstract: Event-based vision sensors are novel cameras inspired by human eyes, capable of capturing the rapid motion of objects with the high-speed sparse event stream. However, it is challenging to efficiently stream process event data without demolishing its sparsity. In this paper, we design Espresso, an architecture for event-based vision processing that can efficiently stream spatiotemporal events while preserving sparsity. We implement Espresso on the FPGA platform and design experiments to compare the performance with embedded GPU and line-buffer-based accelerator. In real-world scenarios, Espresso achieves throughput up to 5000 fps, which is $5.1 \times$ higher than the embedded GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 基于事件的视觉传感器是受人眼启发的新型相机，能够通过高速稀疏事件流捕捉物体的快速运动。然而，在不破坏事件数据稀疏性的情况下有效地流处理事件数据是一项挑战。在本文中，我们设计了 Espresso，一种基于事件的视觉处理架构，可以有效地传输时空事件，同时保持稀疏性。我们在 FPGA 平台上实现 Espresso 并设计实验，以将其与嵌入式 GPU 和基于行缓冲区的加速器的性能进行比较。在现实场景中，Espresso 的吞吐量高达 5000 fps，比嵌入式 GPU 高 5.1 美元。

items.title: MARIO: A Superadditive Multi-Algorithm Interworking Optimization Framework for Analog Circuit Sizing.
items.abstract: Numeric optimization methods are widely utilized to tackle complex analog circuit sizing problems, where the challenges include expensive simulations, non-linearity, and high parameter dimensionality. However, the diverse characteristics exhibited by different circuits result in varied optimization landscapes, making it difficult to identify a single algorithm that consistently outperforms others across all problems. In this paper, we introduce a multi-algorithm interworking optimization framework, which achieves optimization superadditivity based on a pool of member algorithms and a powerful algorithm-interworking protocol. We propose a computing resource reallocation method, which employs multitask Gaussian process regression and portfolio optimization techniques, leading to flexible and prudent online adaption of member algorithms. To efficiently utilize the computing resources for local exploitation, an evaluation data broadcast strategy enables cooperativeness across member algorithms. Besides, algorithms with different modeling overheads are integrated time-adaptively via an asynchronous parallelization mechanism. Comparative experiments against state-of-the-art algorithmcombining tools and optimization algorithms demonstrate the superiority of the proposed optimization framework.
items.abstract_zh: 数值优化方法被广泛用于解决复杂的模拟电路尺寸问题，其中的挑战包括昂贵的模拟、非线性和高参数维数。然而，不同电路表现出的不同特征导致了不同的优化环境，因此很难确定在所有问题上始终优于其他算法的单一算法。在本文中，我们介绍了一种多算法互通优化框架，该框架基于成员算法池和强大的算法互通协议实现了优化超可加性。我们提出了一种计算资源重新分配方法，该方法采用多任务高斯过程回归和投资组合优化技术，从而实现成员算法灵活谨慎的在线适应。为了有效地利用计算资源进行本地开发，评估数据广播策略可以实现成员算法之间的协作。此外，具有不同建模开销的算法通过异步并行机制进行时间自适应集成。与最先进的算法结合工具和优化算法的比较实验证明了所提出的优化框架的优越性。

items.title: FT-MUX: A Fault-Tolerant Microfluidic Multiplexer Design.
items.abstract: Continuous-flow microfluidic chips are multilayered miniaturized platforms to manipulate small volumes of fluids with valves. There are two types of channels on a chip: flow channels for the reaction of fluids, and control channels for the actuation of valves. Multiplexers (MUXes) are essential microfluidic components for individually addressing many flow channels with few control channels. As the integration scale of microfluidic chips increases, the reliability of MUXes becomes a critical concern, as a single defective control channel in a MUX will affect a large part of the flow channels addressed by the MUX. This paper formally analyzes and identifies the design rules for a MUX to tolerate n defective control channels, and model the fault-tolerant MUX (FT-MUX) design problem as a binary constant weight code problem to minimize resource overheads. We demonstrate that FT-MUX improves resource efficiency by up to hundreds of times compared to the conventional fault-tolerant design method. Besides, given no less than 10 control channels, FT-MUX tolerates at least one defective control channel and addresses even more flow channels with equal or fewer resources than a standard MUX. The advantages become more significant as the integration scale increases.
items.abstract_zh: 连续流微流控芯片是多层微型平台，可通过阀门操纵少量流体。芯片上有两种类型的通道：用于流体反应的流动通道和用于阀门驱动的控制通道。多路复用器 (MUX) 是重要的微流体组件，可通过少量控制通道单独处理多个流道。随着微流控芯片集成规模的增加，MUX的可靠性成为一个关键问题，因为MUX中的单个有缺陷的控制通道将影响MUX所处理的大部分流道。本文正式分析并确定了 MUX 的设计规则，以容忍 n 个有缺陷的控制通道，并将容错 MUX (FT-MUX) 设计问题建模为二进制恒权码问题，以最大限度地减少资源开销。我们证明，与传统的容错设计方法相比，FT-MUX 将资源效率提高了数百倍。此外，在给定不少于 10 个控制通道的情况下，FT-MUX 可以容忍至少一个有缺陷的控制通道，并且可以使用与标准 MUX 相同或更少的资源来处理更多的流通道。随着集成规模的增大，优势变得更加显着。

items.title: H3Match: A Hybrid Heterogeneous Hypergraph Matching Method for Subcircuit Identification.
items.abstract: Subcircuit matching is widely applied in logic synthesis, design verification, hardware security, etc. Previous works employ redundant circuit representations, coupled with timeconsuming enumerative search methods. Subsequent works use a hybrid “approximate filtering - exact verification” framework, but the numerous false negatives predicted by the graph neural network (GNN) based filtering lead to severe matching failure. In this paper, an improved hybrid method named H3Match is proposed to achieve a better tradeoff between runtime, accuracy, and false negative rate. First, we model the circuits as hypergraphs to fully capture the topology and construct diverse heterogeneous hyperedge features to facilitate the learning of circuit topologies. Second, to reduce the false negatives, we reformulate the subgraph matching problem as matching directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with embedded circular structure information and develop a directed GNN-based approximate matching approach to identify potential matching subcircuits. Finally, we propose a general mixed integer nonlinear programming (MINLP) formulation for exact verification, with convergency speed accelerated by extracting the initial solution from the results in approximate matching. Experimental results show that our approximate method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by 4.31% in accuracy while achieving virtually zero false negatives. Our exact verification is on average $4.16 \times$ faster than SOTA exact methods. Overall, the end-to-end flow achieves a $7.08 \times$ speedup compared to existing approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 子电路匹配广泛应用于逻辑综合、设计验证、硬件安全等领域。以前的工作采用冗余电路表示，加上耗时的枚举搜索方法。后续工作使用了混合的“近似过滤-精确验证”框架，但基于图神经网络（GNN）的过滤预测的大量漏报导致严重的匹配失败。本文提出了一种名为 H3Match 的改进混合方法，以实现运行时间、准确性和漏报率之间的更好权衡。首先，我们将电路建模为超图，以充分捕获拓扑并构造不同的异构超边特征，以促进电路拓扑的学习。其次，为了减少漏报，我们将子图匹配问题重新表述为将有向无环图（DAG）与嵌入的循环结构信息进行匹配，并开发了一种基于有向 GNN 的近似匹配方法来识别潜在的匹配子电路。最后，我们提出了一种用于精确验证的通用混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）公式，通过从近似匹配结果中提取初始解来加速收敛速度。实验结果表明，我们的近似方法在准确度上比最先进的 (SOTA) 方法高出 4.31%，同时几乎实现了零假阴性。我们的精确验证平均比 SOTA 精确方法快 4.16 美元\倍$。总体而言，与现有方法相比，端到端流程实现了 7.08 美元的加速。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Multi-Objective Multi-Bit Flip-Flop Placement Considering Pre-Placed Cells.
items.abstract: Clustering single-bit flip-flops (SBFFs) into multi-bit flip-flops (MBFFs) effectively reduces power and area. However, excessive displacement during the clustering and legalization process may incur significant timing degradation. To address this issue, we propose the first comprehensive MBFF placement methodology that addresses excessive displacement caused by pre-placed cells during clustering and legalization while simultaneously optimizing timing, power, area, and bin utilization. Our methodology includes three main features: (1) a force model to relocate flip-flops and reduce timing violations, (2) a clustering and legalization process to reduce timing degradation caused by displacement, and (3) a multi-objective function to identify flip-flop candidates suitable for MBFF clustering. Our methodology outperforms all participating teams in the 2024 CAD Contest at ICCAD on Power and Timing Optimization Using Multi-Bit Flip-Flops, based on exactly the same settings.
items.abstract_zh: 将单位触发器 (SBFF) 聚集为多位触发器 (MBFF) 可有效降低功耗和面积。然而，集群和合法化过程中的过度位移可能会导致严重的时间退化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个全面的 MBFF 放置方法，该方法解决了集群和合法化过程中预先放置的单元引起的过度位移，同时优化时序、功耗、面积和箱利用率。我们的方法包括三个主要特征：（1）用于重新定位触发器并减少时序违规的力模型，（2）用于减少位移引起的时序退化的聚类和合法化过程，以及（3）用于识别适合MBFF聚类的触发器候选者的多目标函数。基于完全相同的设置，我们的方法优于 ICCAD 2024 年 CAD 竞赛中使用多位触发器进行功耗和时序优化的所有参赛团队。

items.title: SmaRTLy: RTL Optimization with Logic Inferencing and Structural Rebuilding.
items.abstract: This paper proposes smaRTLy: a new optimization technique for multiplexers in Register-Transfer Level (RTL) logic synthesis. Multiplexer trees are very common in RTL designs, and traditional tools like Yosys optimize them by traversing the tree and monitoring control port values. However, this method does not fully exploit the intrinsic logical relationships among signals or the potential for structural optimization. To address these limitations, we develop innovative strategies to remove redundant multiplexer trees and restructure the remaining ones, significantly reducing the overall gate count. We evaluate smaRTLy on the IWLS-2005 and RISC-V benchmarks, achieving an additional 8.95% reduction in AIG area compared to Yosys. We also evaluate smaRTLy on an industrial benchmark in the scale of millions of gates, results show that smaRTLy can remove 47.2% more AIG area than Yosys. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our logic inferencing and structural rebuilding techniques in enhancing the RTL optimization process, leading to more efficient hardware designs.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 smaRTLy：一种用于寄存器传输级 (RTL) 逻辑综合中多路复用器的新优化技术。多路复用器树在 RTL 设计中非常常见，Yosys 等传统工具通过遍历树并监控控制端口值来优化它们。然而，该方法没有充分利用信号之间的内在逻辑关系或结构优化的潜力。为了解决这些限制，我们开发了创新策略来删除冗余的多路复用器树并重组剩余的多路复用器树，从而显着减少总体门数。我们在 IWLS-2005 和 RISC-V 基准上对 smaRTLy 进行了评估，与 Yosys 相比，AIG 面积额外减少了 8.95%。我们还在百万门规模的工业基准上对smaRTLy进行了评估，结果表明smaRTLy可以比Yosys多去除47.2%的AIG面积。这些结果证明了我们的逻辑推理和结构重建技术在增强 RTL 优化过程方面的有效性，从而实现更高效的硬件设计。

items.title: FineRR-ZNS: Enabling Fine-Granularity Read Refreshing for ZNS SSDs.
items.abstract: Zoned namespace (ZNS) SSDs are emerging storage devices offering low cost, high performance, and software definability. By adopting host-managed zone-based sequential programming, ZNS SSDs effectively eliminate the space overhead associated with on-board DRAM memory and garbage collection. However, while background read refreshing serves as a data protection mechanism in conventional block-interface SSDs, state-of-the-art ZNS SSDs lack read refreshing functionality to guarantee data reliability. Moreover, implementing zonelevel read refreshing in ZNS SSDs incurs significant overhead due to the large volume of valid data movements in a zone, leading to degraded I/O performance. To efficiently enable read refreshing for ZNS SSDs, this paper proposes FineRR-ZNS, a fine-granularity read refreshing mechanism for ZNS SSDs. FineRR-ZNS employs a host-controlled fine-granularity read refreshing scheme that selectively determines block-level read refreshing via metadata remapping. A zone reconstruction method is also designed to retrieve remapped data forming complete data during zone-level RR. Specifically, the remapped data after zone reconstruction are still available and prioritized for read access until their respective blocks need the next RR. Evaluation results show that FineRR-ZNS significantly enhances read refreshing efficiency and I/O throughput compared to zone-level read refreshing implemented in the state-of-the-art ZenFS file system.
items.abstract_zh: 分区命名空间 (ZNS) SSD 是新兴的存储设备，具有低成本、高性能和软件可定义性。通过采用主机管理的基于区域的顺序编程，ZNS SSD 有效地消除了与板载 DRAM 内存和垃圾收集相关的空间开销。然而，虽然后台读刷新作为传统块接口SSD中的数据保护机制，但最先进的ZNS SSD缺乏读刷新功能来保证数据可靠性。此外，由于区域中存在大量有效数据移动，在 ZNS SSD 中实施区域级读取刷新会产生大量开销，从而导致 I/O 性能下降。为了有效地实现ZNS SSD的读刷新，本文提出了FineRR-ZNS，一种针对ZNS SSD的细粒度读刷新机制。 FineRR-ZNS 采用主机控制的细粒度读取刷新方案，通过元数据重新映射选择性地确定块级读取刷新。还设计了区域重建方法来检索在区域级RR期间形成完整数据的重新映射的数据。具体来说，区域重建后的重新映射数据仍然可用，并优先进行读访问，直到它们各自的块需要下一个 RR。评估结果表明，与最先进的 ZenFS 文件系统中实现的区域级读取刷新相比，FineRR-ZNS 显着提高了读取刷新效率和 I/O 吞吐量。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: A Fast Nearest Neighbor Search Acceleration for 3D Point Cloud.
items.abstract: This paper presents FastNN, a novel accelerator architecture for efficient K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) search in point clouds. FastNN leverages a locality-sensitive E2LSH partitioning method and a precomparator module to significantly reduce the candidate search space and minimize the number of Euclidean distance calculations. Compared to octree-based partitioning methods, our approach reduces candidate points by 58.57% to 86.17% and achieves a $10.04 \times$ acceleration in processing throughput relative to the BitNN comparator subsystem. The proposed design effectively enhances search throughput, resource utilization, and precision, highlighting its potential for accelerating KNN search on FPGA platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 FastNN，这是一种新颖的加速器架构，用于在点云中进行高效的 K 最近邻 (KNN) 搜索。 FastNN 利用局部敏感的 E2LSH 划分方法和预比较器模块来显着减少候选搜索空间并最大限度地减少欧几里德距离计算的数量。与基于八叉树的划分方法相比，我们的方法将候选点减少了 58.57% 至 86.17%，并且相对于 BitNN 比较器子系统，处理吞吐量实现了 10.04 美元的加速。所提出的设计有效地提高了搜索吞吐量、资源利用率和精度，凸显了其在 FPGA 平台上加速 KNN 搜索的潜力。

items.title: Differentiable Net-Moving and Local Congestion Mitigation for Routability-Driven Global Placement.
items.abstract: Routability-driven global placement is a major challenge in modern VLSI physical design, for which mitigating routing congestion is a critical approach. Cell inflation can effectively address local routing congestion and is widely adopted, but with the issue of over-inflating or moving cells back into congested areas. Minimizing the congestion within a net bounding box is effective for alleviating global routing congestion, but the bounding box may be too large and contain congestion not contributed by the net. To address the first issue, we propose a momentum-based cell inflation technique that considers historical inflation ratios for mitigating local routing congestion. Then, we construct a differentiable global congestion function, developed from Poisson’s equation, and introduce virtual standard cells onto two-pin nets to accurately guide net movements for mitigating global routing congestion. Furthermore, to improve pin accessibility, we adjust placement density around power and ground rails according to the routing congestion in global placement. The proposed techniques are integrated into an electrostatic-based global placement framework. Experiments on the ISPD 2015 contest benchmarks show that our framework achieves better routability results, with an average of 40% DRVs reduction and comparable wirelength and via count, compared to the leading routability-driven placer.
items.abstract_zh: 可布线性驱动的全局布局是现代 VLSI 物理设计中的一个主要挑战，其中缓解布线拥塞是一个关键方法。小区膨胀可以有效解决本地路由拥塞问题，被广泛采用，但存在过度膨胀或将小区移回拥塞区域的问题。最小化网络边界框内的拥塞对于缓解全局路由拥塞是有效的，但是边界框可能太大并且包含不是由网络造成的拥塞。为了解决第一个问题，我们提出了一种基于动量的单元通胀技术，该技术考虑历史通胀率来缓解本地路由拥塞。然后，我们构建了一个从泊松方程发展而来的可微分全局拥塞函数，并将虚拟标准单元引入到两引脚网络上，以准确引导网络运动，从而缓解全局路由拥塞。此外，为了提高引脚可访问性，我们根据全局布局中的布线拥塞情况调整电源和接地轨周围的布局密度。所提出的技术被集成到基于静电的全局布局框架中。 ISPD 2015 竞赛基准实验表明，与领先的可布线性驱动的布局器相比，我们的框架实现了更好的可布线性结果，平均 DRV 减少了 40%，并且线长和过孔数量相当。

items.title: Rewire: Advancing CGRA Mapping Through a Consolidated Routing Paradigm.
items.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) balance the performance and power efficiency in computing systems. Effective compilers play a crucial role in fully realizing its potential. The compiler maps Data Flow Graphs (DFGs), which represent compute-intensive loop kernels, onto CGRAs. However, existing compilers often tackle DFG nodes individually, neglecting their intricate inter-dependencies. We introduce a novel mapping paradigm called Rewire that can place and route multiple nodes in one shot. Rewire first generates routing information that is shareable among multiple nodes via propagation. Then, Rewire intersects the routing information to generate individual placement candidates for each node. Finally, Rewire innovatively utilizes data dependencies as constraints to quickly find suitable placement for multiple nodes together. Our evaluation demonstrates that Rewire can generate more near-optimal mappings than prior works. Rewire achieves 2.1x and 1.3x performance improvement and 13.5x and 4.7x compilation time reduction, respectively, compared to two popular mappers.
