items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 可平衡计算系统的性能和功效。有效的编译器在充分发挥其潜力方面发挥着至关重要的作用。编译器将表示计算密集型循环内核的数据流图 (DFG) 映射到 CGRA 上。然而，现有的编译器经常单独处理 DFG 节点，忽略了它们复杂的相互依赖性。我们引入了一种称为 Rewire 的新颖映射范例，它可以一次放置和路由多个节点。 Rewire 首先生成可通过传播在多个节点之间共享的路由信息​​。然后，Rewire 与路由信息相交，为每个节点生成单独的布局候选。最后，Rewire 创新性地利用数据依赖关系作为约束，快速找到多个节点在一起的合适放置位置。我们的评估表明，Rewire 可以生成比之前的作品更接近最佳的映射。与两种流行的映射器相比，Rewire 的性能分别提高了 2.1 倍和 1.3 倍，编译时间缩短了 13.5 倍和 4.7 倍。

items.title: InfScaler: Enabling Efficient ML Inference Serving on Multi-Accelerator Edge Devices via Asymmetric Auto-Scaling.
items.abstract: Nowadays, there is a growing trend to deploy machine learning (ML) models on edge devices. To cope with the increasing resource requirements of current ML models, multi-accelerator edge devices that integrate CPU, GPU, NPU, or TPU in a single SoC gain popularity. However, we observe that existing ML inference serving frameworks are poor in utilizing the unique hardware architecture of these edge devices. In this paper, we present InFSCALER, an efficient ML inference serving framework tailored for multi-accelerator edge devices. InfSCALER discovers the architectural bottleneck of ML models and designs a bottleneck-aware asymmetric auto-scaling technique to facilitate efficient resource allocation for ML models on the edge. Furthermore, InfScaler capitalizes on the hardware’s unified memory feature inherent to edge devices, ensuring efficient data sharing between the asymmetrically scaled model partitions. Our experimental results show that InfScaler achieves up to $\mathbf{1 2 6. 5 9 \%}$ throughput improvement and $\mathbf{2 7. 3 2 \%}$ resource reduction while satisfying the latency requirements compared with the state-of-the-art inference serving approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，在边缘设备上部署机器学习（ML）模型的趋势日益明显。为了应对当前机器学习模型不断增长的资源需求，在单个 SoC 中集成 CPU、GPU、NPU 或 TPU 的多加速器边缘设备越来越受欢迎。然而，我们观察到现有的机器学习推理服务框架在利用这些边缘设备的独特硬件架构方面表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 InFSCALER，这是一种专为多加速器边缘设备量身定制的高效机器学习推理服务框架。 InfSCALER 发现了 ML 模型的架构瓶颈，并设计了一种瓶颈感知的非对称自动缩放技术，以促进边缘 ML 模型的高效资源分配。此外，InfScaler 利用边缘设备固有的硬件统一内存功能，确保非对称缩放模型分区之间的高效数据共享。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的推理服务方法相比，InfScaler 可实现高达 $\mathbf{1 2 6. 5 9 \%}$ 的吞吐量提升和 $\mathbf{2 7. 3 2 \%}$ 资源减少，同时满足延迟要求。

items.title: 3D-SubG: A 3D Stacked Hybrid Processing Near/In-Memory Accelerator for Subgraph GNNs.
items.abstract: Subgraph Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are emerging as a promising approach to enhance GNN expressiveness, but their more complex graph structures with numerous independent and irregular subgraphs pose significant hardware deployment challenges. In this work, we propose 3D-SubG, a 3D stacked hybrid processing-near/in-memory accelerator for subgraph GNNs. With hybrid bonding packaging technology, a logic die is 3D stacked with a DRAM die for highly parallel memory accesses. The logic die employs digital SRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM) macros to boost computation density and minimize data transfer. We further propose a bit-level non-zero gathering method to exploit graph sparsity for PIM, a workloadbalanced mapping strategy for subgraph allocation onto different logic-to-DRAM blocks, and a distributed global pooling approach to reduce inter-block data movements. Experimental results show that 3D-SubG achieves average improvements of $146.11 \times$ in performance, $934.18 \times$ in area efficiency, and $1171.80 \times$ in energy efficiency compared to RTX 3090Ti.
items.abstract_zh: 子图图神经网络 (GNN) 正在成为增强 GNN 表达能力的一种有前途的方法，但其更复杂的图结构以及大量独立和不规则的子图带来了重大的硬件部署挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-SubG，一种用于子图 GNN 的 3D 堆栈混合处理近/内存加速器。利用混合键合封装技术，逻辑芯片与 DRAM 芯片进行 3D 堆叠，以实现高度并行的内存访问。逻辑芯片采用基于数字 SRAM 的内存处理 (PIM) 宏来提高计算密度并最大限度地减少数据传输。我们进一步提出了一种位级非零收集方法来利用 PIM 的图稀疏性，一种用于将子图分配到不同逻辑到 DRAM 块的工作负载平衡映射策略，以及一种减少块间数据移动的分布式全局池方法。实验结果表明，与 RTX 3090Ti 相比，3D-SubG 的性能平均提升了 146.11 倍，面积效率平均提升了 934.18 倍，能效提升了 1171.80 美元。

items.title: Efficient Edge Vision Transformer Accelerator with Decoupled Chunk Attention and Hybrid Computing-In-Memory.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are new foundation models for vision applications. Edge-deploying ViTs to realize energy-saving, low-latency, and high-performance dense predictions have wide applications, such as autonomous driving and surveillance image analysis. However, the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism renders ViTs slow and resource-intensive, particularly for pixel-level dense predictions that involve long contexts. Additionally, the pyramid-like architecture of modern ViT variants leads to an unbalanced workload, further reducing hardware utilization and decreasing the throughput of conventional edge devices. To this end, we propose an algorithm-hardware co-optimized edge ViT accelerator tailored for efficient dense predictions. At the algorithm level, we propose a decoupled chunk attention (DCA) mechanism implemented in a pipelined manner to reduce off-chip memory access, thereby enabling efficient dense predictions within limited on-chip memory. At the architecture level, we introduce a hybrid architecture that combines SRAM-based computing-in-memory (CIM) and nonvolatile RRAM storage to eliminate extensive off-chip memory access, with a fusion scheduling to balance workloads and minimize intermediate on-chip memory access. At the circuit level, a bit/element two-way-reconfigurable CIM macro is proposed to improve hardware utilization across pyramidal ViT blocks with varied matrix sizes. The experimental results on object detection, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation tasks demonstrate that our design can efficiently process patch lengths up to 16384 with a speedup of 18.5×-217.1×, a reduction in memory accesses of 1.7×-7.4×, and an improvement in energy efficiency of 1.8×, under less than 1% performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 是视觉应用的新基础模型。边缘部署ViT可实现节能、低延迟和高性能的密集预测，具有广泛的应用，例如自动驾驶和监控图像分析。然而，自注意力机制的二次复杂度使得 ViT 速度缓慢且资源密集，特别是对于涉及长上下文的像素级密集预测。此外，现代 ViT 变体的金字塔式架构会导致工作负载不平衡，进一步降低硬件利用率并降低传统边缘设备的吞吐量。为此，我们提出了一种算法-硬件协同优化的边缘 ViT 加速器，专为高效密集预测而定制。在算法层面，我们提出了一种以流水线方式实现的解耦块注意力（DCA）机制，以减少片外存储器访问，从而在有限的片上存储器内实现高效的密集预测。在架构层面，我们引入了一种混合架构，该架构结合了基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 和非易失性 RRAM 存储，以消除大量的片外内存访问，并通过融合调度来平衡工作负载并最大限度地减少中间片上内存访问。在电路层面，提出了一种位/元素双向可重构 CIM 宏，以提高具有不同矩阵大小的金字塔 ViT 块的硬件利用率。目标检测、语义分割和深度估计任务的实验结果表明，我们的设计可以有效地处理高达16384的补丁长度，加速比为18.5×-217.1×，内存访问减少1.7×-7.4×，能源效率提高1.8×，性能下降不到1％。

items.title: Scaling Laws of Graph Neural Networks for Atomistic Materials Modeling.
items.abstract: Atomistic materials modeling is a critical task with wide-ranging applications, from drug discovery to materials science, where accurate predictions of the target material property can lead to significant advancements in scientific discovery. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) represent the state-of-the-art approach for modeling atomistic material data thanks to their capacity to capture complex relational structures. While machine learning performance has historically improved with larger models and datasets, GNNs for atomistic materials modeling remain relatively small compared to large language models (LLMs), which leverage billions of parameters and terabyte-scale datasets to achieve remarkable performance in their respective domains. To address this gap, we explore the scaling limits of GNNs for atomistic materials modeling by developing a foundational model with billions of parameters, trained on extensive datasets in terabytescale. Our approach incorporates techniques from LLM libraries to efficiently manage large-scale data and models, enabling both effective training and deployment of these large-scale GNN models. This work addresses three fundamental questions in scaling GNNs: the potential for scaling GNN model architectures, the effect of dataset size on model accuracy, and the applicability of LLM-inspired techniques to GNN architectures. Specifically, the outcomes of this study include (1) insights into the scaling laws for GNNs, highlighting the relationship between model size, dataset volume, and accuracy, (2) a foundational GNN model optimized for atomistic materials modeling, and (3) a GNN codebase enhanced with advanced LLM-based training techniques. Our findings lay the groundwork for large-scale GNNs with billions of parameters and terabyte-scale datasets, establishing a scalable pathway for future advancements in atomistic materials modeling.
items.abstract_zh: 原子材料建模是一项具有广泛应用的关键任务，从药物发现到材料科学，对目标材料特性的准确预测可以带来科学发现的重大进步。图神经网络 (GNN) 代表了原子材料数据建模的最先进方法，因为它们能够捕获复杂的关系结构。虽然机器学习性能历来随着较大的模型和数据集而有所提高，但与大型语言模型 (LLM) 相比，用于原子材料建模的 GNN 仍然相对较小，后者利用数十亿个参数和 TB 级数据集在各自的领域实现卓越的性能。为了解决这一差距，我们通过开发一个具有数十亿参数的基础模型，并在 TB 级的广泛数据集上进行训练，来探索原子材料建模的 GNN 的扩展限制。我们的方法结合了 LLM 库的技术来有效管理大规模数据和模型，从而实现这些大规模 GNN 模型的有效训练和部署。这项工作解决了扩展 GNN 的三个基本问题：扩展 GNN 模型架构的潜力、数据集大小对模型精度的影响以及受 LLM 启发的技术对 GNN 架构的适用性。具体来说，这项研究的成果包括（1）深入了解 GNN 的缩放法则，强调模型大小、数据集容量和准确性之间的关系，（2）针对原子材料建模优化的基础 GNN 模型，以及（3）通过基于 LLM 的先进训练技术增强的 GNN 代码库。我们的研究结果为具有数十亿参数和 TB 级数据集的大规模 GNN 奠定了基础，为原子材料建模的未来发展建立了可扩展的途径。

items.title: RE3: Finding Refinement Relations with Relational Mapping Abstraction.
items.abstract: A refinement relation captures the state equivalence between two sequential circuits. It finds applications in various tasks of VLSI design automation, including regression verification, behavioral model synthesis, assertion synthesis, and design space exploration. However, manually constructing a refinement relation requires an engineer to have both domain knowledge and expertise in formal methods, which is especially challenging for complex designs after significant transformations. This paper presents a rigorous and efficient sequential equivalence checking algorithm for non-cycle-accurate designs. The algorithm can automatically find a concise and human-comprehensible refinement relation between two designs, helping engineers understand the essence of design transformations. We demonstrate the usefulness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm with experiments and case studies. In particular, we showcase how refinement relations can facilitate error detection and correction for LLM-generated RTL designs.
items.abstract_zh: 细化关系捕获两个时序电路之间的状态等价性。它适用于 VLSI 设计自动化的各种任务，包括回归验证、行为模型综合、断言综合和设计空间探索。然而，手动构建细化关系需要工程师同时具备领域知识和形式化方法方面的专业知识，这对于经过重大转换后的复杂设计尤其具有挑战性。本文提出了一种针对非循环精确设计的严格且高效的顺序等价检查算法。该算法可以自动找到两个设计之间简洁且人类可理解的细化关系，帮助工程师理解设计转换的本质。我们通过实验和案例研究证明了所提出算法的实用性和效率。特别是，我们展示了细化关系如何促进 LLM 生成的 RTL 设计的错误检测和纠正。

items.title: BlockPIM: Optimizing Memory Management for PIM-enabled Long-Context LLM Inference.
items.abstract: Processing-In-Memory (PIM) architectures alleviate the memory bottleneck in the decode phase of large language model (LLM) inference by performing operations like GEMV and Softmax in memory. However, the fragmented data layout in current PIM architectures limits end-to-end acceleration for long-context LLMs. In this paper, we propose BlockPIM, a cross-channel block memory layout strategy that maximizes memory utilization and eliminates the context length constraint. Additionally, we introduce a cross-channel attention computation scheme that is compatible with the current architecture to support distributed attention operations on BlockPIM. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves a 62% average throughput increase compared to existing state-of-the-art PIM solutions, enabling efficient and scalable deployment of large language models on PIM architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构通过在内存中执行 GEMV 和 Softmax 等操作，缓解了大语言模型 (LLM) 推理解码阶段的内存瓶颈。然而，当前 PIM 架构中的碎片数据布局限制了长上下文 LLM 的端到端加速。在本文中，我们提出了 BlockPIM，一种跨通道块内存布局策略，可最大化内存利用率并消除上下文长度限制。此外，我们引入了一种与当前架构兼容的跨通道注意力计算方案，以支持 BlockPIM 上的分布式注意力操作。实验结果表明，与现有最先进的 PIM 解决方案相比，我们的方法平均吞吐量提高了 62%，从而能够在 PIM 架构上高效且可扩展地部署大型语言模型。

items.title: LEMOE: LLM-Enhanced Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization for Microarchitecture Exploration.
items.abstract: Designing processor microarchitectures is increasingly challenging due to a vast design space and the need to balance multiple metrics. Traditional algorithm-driven design space exploration (DSE) approaches often struggle to incorporate the extensive domain knowledge of expert architects. To address this, we introduce LEMOE, a multi-objective microarchitecture optimization framework that leverages large language model (LLM) to enhance an implicit Bayesian model. LEMOE features a program-aware warm-up phase utilizing LLM and LLVM to produce an initial design set with rich prior knowledge. By harnessing LLM’s contextual learning, our approach improves surrogate modeling and sampling under sparse data conditions. Experiment results show that LEMOE achieves a $22.8 \%$ improvement in energy efficiency with the same number of iterations and a $2.9 \times$ runtime speedup for the same target compared to prior works.
items.abstract_zh: 由于巨大的设计空间和平衡多个指标的需要，设计处理器微架构变得越来越具有挑战性。传统的算法驱动的设计空间探索 (DSE) 方法通常难以整合专家架构师的广泛领域知识。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 LEMOE，这是一种多目标微架构优化框架，它利用大语言模型 (LLM) 来增强隐式贝叶斯模型。 LEMOE 具有程序感知预热阶段，利用 LLM 和 LLVM 生成具有丰富先验知识的初始设计集。通过利用法学硕士的情境学习，我们的方法改进了稀疏数据条件下的代理建模和采样。实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，LEMOE 在相同迭代次数下实现了 $22.8 \%$ 的能源效率改进，并且针对相同目标实现了 $2.9 \times$ 的运行加速。

items.title: Decoupling Analog Circuit Representation from Technology for Behavior-Centric Optimization.
items.abstract: Analog IC design is mainly manual and implemented at the device level. A major reason is circuit behavior-extraction. Unlike its digital counterpart, analog IC design is strongly coupled with technology nodes and is difficult to represent by an abstract behavioral model. The lack of accurate and efficient analog modeling has become a bottleneck in analog design automation. This paper proposes a behavior-centric optimization framework for analog circuits that represents circuit behavior using transistor electrical properties instead of sizes, improving model generalization and reducing optimization complexity. To characterize the process, we propose a method for mapping transistor electrical properties to sizes. Moreover, we developed a radial basis functions-based Kolmogorov-Arnold network (RBF-KAN) to accurately approximate circuit nonlinear behavior with limited simulations. Compared to blackbox modeling, our approach enables constructing surrogate models via KAN under a set specification with just a few hundred simulations. Experiments on the testing suite showed our framework achieved a $1.76 \times$ to $2.64 \times$ improvement in large signal figure of merit (FOM) and $1.73 \times$ to $2.48 \times$ in small signal FOM over state-of-the-art methods, while also enabling $3.5 \times$ to $6.2 \times$ acceleration in design porting.
items.abstract_zh: 模拟IC设计主要是手动的并且在器件级实现。一个主要原因是电路行为提取。与数字设计不同，模拟 IC 设计与技术节点紧密耦合，很难用抽象的行为模型来表示。缺乏准确、高效的模拟建模已成为模拟设计自动化的瓶颈。本文提出了一种以行为为中心的模拟电路优化框架，该框架使用晶体管电气特性而不是尺寸来表示电路行为，从而提高模型泛化性并降低优化复杂性。为了表征该过程，我们提出了一种将晶体管电特性映射到尺寸的方法。此外，我们开发了基于径向基函数的柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络（RBF-KAN），可以通过有限的模拟准确地近似电路非线性行为。与黑盒建模相比，我们的方法只需几百次模拟就能在设定的规范下通过 KAN 构建代理模型。测试套件上的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的框架在大信号品质因数 (FOM) 方面实现了 1.76 美元到 2.64 美元的改进，在小信号 FOM 方面实现了 1.73 美元到 2.48 美元的改进，同时还在设计移植中实现了 3.5 美元到 6.2 美元的加速。

items.title: Sphinx: A High-Performance Hybrid Index for Disaggregated Memory With Succinct Filter Cache.
items.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) architecture physically separates computing and memory resources into distinct pools interconnected via high-speed networks within data centers, with the aim of improving resource utilization compared to traditional architectures. Most existing range indexes for DM that support variable-length keys are based on adaptive radix trees. However, these indexes exhibit suboptimal performance on DM due to excessive network round trips during tree traversal and inefficient node-based caching mechanisms.To address these issues, we propose Sphinx, a novel hybrid index for DM. Sphinx introduces an Inner Node Hash Table to minimize the network round trips during index operations by replacing the sequential tree traversal with parallel hash reads. Sphinx incorporates a Succinct Filter Cache to further minimize network overhead while keeping the computing-side cache small and coherent. Experimental results show that Sphinx outperforms state-of-the-art counterparts by up to 7.3 × in the YCSB benchmark.
items.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）架构在物理上将计算和内存资源分离到通过数据中心内的高速网络互连的不同池中，目的是与传统架构相比提高资源利用率。大多数支持可变长度密钥的现有 DM 范围索引都基于自适应基数树。然而，由于树遍历期间过多的网络往返和低效的基于节点的缓存机制，这些索引在 DM 上表现出次优性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Sphinx，一种新型的 DM 混合索引。 Sphinx 引入了内部节点哈希表，通过用并行哈希读取替换顺序树遍历来最大限度地减少索引操作期间的网络往返。 Sphinx 结合了简洁过滤器缓存，以进一步最小化网络开销，同时保持计算端缓存小而一致。实验结果表明，Sphinx 在 YCSB 基准测试中的性能比最先进的同类产品高出 7.3 倍。

items.title: A Cross-model Fusion-aware Framework for Optimizing (gather-matmul-scatter)s Workload.
items.abstract: Modern deep learning models, such as Relation Graph Convolutional Network (RGCN), Sparse Convolutional Networks (SpConv), and Mixture of Experts Networks (MoE), are significantly dependent on the (gather-matmul-scatter) (abbreviated as (g-mm-s) ${ }_{\mathrm{s}}$) workload as their fundamental computational pattern. While existing works have made optimization attempts, several critical challenges remain unsolved, including domain-specific optimization migration, time-consuming exploration, and inefficient dataflow with dynamic inputs.To address these challenges, we introduce Efficient-GMS, a comprehensive framework that enhances ($\mathrm{g}-\mathrm{mm}-\mathrm{s})_{\text {s }}$ workload across diverse input scenarios. Our framework introduces (1) A Fusion-aware framework enabling cross-model optimization migration. We propose a comprehensive dataflow analysis that identifies shared computational patterns across models, enabling the development of four optimized dataflow patterns with vertical and horizontal fusion strategies. (2) Performance model-guided configuration space reduction. We develop a performance model to predict the relative execution efficiency across configurations, thereby reducing the search space and minimizing search time while ensuring optimal configuration selection. (3) Adaptive dataflow selection mechanism. We implement a lightweight heuristic model that dynamically selects optimal dataflow patterns based on the characteristics of the input and the hardware. Experimental results demonstrate that Efficient-GMS achieves significant performance gains, delivering an average end-to-end speedup of $1.46 \times$ in RGCN model, $1.32 \times$ in Sp-Conv-based model, and $1.15 \times$ in MoE model compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 现代深度学习模型，例如关系图卷积网络 (RGCN)、稀疏卷积网络 (SpConv) 和混合专家网络 (MoE)，很大程度上依赖于 (gather-matmul-scatter)（缩写为 (g-mm-s) ${ }_{\mathrm{s}}$）工作负载作为其基本计算模式。虽然现有的工作已经做出了优化尝试，但仍有一些关键挑战尚未解决，包括特定领域的优化迁移、耗时的探索以及动态输入的低效数据流。为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了 Efficient-GMS，这是一个综合框架，可以增强跨不同输入场景的 ($\mathrm{g}-\mathrm{mm}-\mathrm{s})_{\text {s }}$ 工作负载。我们的框架引入了 (1) 支持跨模型优化迁移的融合感知框架。我们提出了一种全面的数据流分析，可以识别跨模型的共享计算模式，从而能够利用垂直和水平融合策略开发四种优化的数据流模式。 (2)性能模型引导配置空间缩减。我们开发了一个性能模型来预测跨配置的相对执行效率，从而减少搜索空间并最大限度地减少搜索时间，同时确保最佳配置选择。 (3)自适应数据流选择机制。我们实现了一个轻量级启发式模型，该模型根据输入和硬件的特征动态选择最佳数据流模式。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，Efficient-GMS 实现了显着的性能提升，在 RGCN 模型中实现了 1.46 美元的平均端到端加速，在基于 Sp-Conv 的模型中实现了 1.32 美元的端到端加速，在 MoE 模型中实现了 1.15 美元的平均端到端加速。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Less Sense Makes More Sense: In-Sensor Compressive Learning for Efficient Machine Vision.
items.abstract: Integrating deep learning and image sensors has significantly transformed machine vision applications. Yet, conventional highresolution image acquisition schemes enabled by imagers are energyinefficient for deep learning, as they involve excessive data quantization and transmission overhead. To address this challenge, we propose a lightweight in-sensor compressive learning framework that integrates a compressive learning-based encoder within image sensors for taskspecific feature extraction. Our framework encodes raw images into adaptive low-dimensional representations using only a 1-bit encoder by joint optimization with downstream machine vision tasks. It achieves $10 \times$ data compression, a minimum of 1.6% accuracy loss in the task, and $3.93 \times$ energy savings at the sensor-end, outperforming prior arts.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习和图像传感器的集成极大地改变了机器视觉应用。然而，由成像仪实现的传统高分辨率图像采集方案对于深度学习而言能源效率低下，因为它们涉及过多的数据量化和传输开销。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种轻量级传感器内压缩学习框架，该框架在图像传感器中集成了基于压缩学习的编码器，用于特定任务的特征提取。我们的框架通过与下游机器视觉任务的联合优化，仅使用 1 位编码器将原始图像编码为自适应低维表示。 It achieves $10 \times$ data compression, a minimum of 1.6% accuracy loss in the task, and $3.93 \times$ energy savings at the sensor-end, outperforming prior arts.

items.title: AutoClock: Automated Clock Management for Power-Efficient HLS Designs on FPGAs.
items.abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) tools streamline FPGA design by enabling engineers to implement hardware using $\mathrm{C} / \mathrm{C}++$ languages. However, while clock management serves as a critical stage in the FPGA EDA flow that affects system-level performance, area, and especially power consumption, existing commercial HLS tools lack comprehensive solutions for clock management. Specifically, the diversity of clock resources creates a vast design space for finding the optimal configuration, and the insufficient analysis of multiple clock domain scenarios hinders effective clock-oriented optimizations in HLS. This work introduces AutoClock, an open-source integrated clock management framework that complements AMD Vitis HLS. AutoClock allocates resources for clock generation, assigns modules to appropriate clock domains, addresses metastability and time division multiplexing (TDM) malfunctioning introduced by multiclock domain architectures, and hierarchically gates the clock of modules in a design. Experimental results demonstrate that AutoClock can fully utilize clock resources on FPGAs and help reduce dynamic power consumption by up to 74.38%.
items.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 工具使工程师能够使用 $\mathrm{C} / \mathrm{C}++$ 语言实现硬件，从而简化 FPGA 设计。然而，虽然时钟管理是 FPGA EDA 流程中的关键阶段，影响系统级性能、面积，尤其是功耗，但现有的商用 HLS 工具缺乏全面的时钟管理解决方案。具体来说，时钟资源的多样性为寻找最佳配置创造了巨大的设计空间，并且对多个时钟域场景的分析不充分阻碍了HLS中有效的面向时钟的优化。这项工作介绍了 AutoClock，这是一个开源集成时钟管理框架，可补充 AMD Vitis HLS。 AutoClock 为时钟生成分配资源，将模块分配到适当的时钟域，解决多时钟域架构引入的亚稳态和时分复用 (TDM) 故障，并分层门控设计中模块的时钟。实验结果表明，AutoClock可以充分利用FPGA上的时钟资源，并有助于降低动态功耗高达74.38%。

items.title: Harrow: Synthesis of Optical Logic Circuits via Harmonic Mean and Integer Partition.
items.abstract: With the advancement of high-speed and energyefficient optical interconnect and computation, photonic integrated circuits (PICs) have become a promising alternative to traditional CMOS circuits. A PIC can be synthesized by mapping the binary decision diagram (BDD) of target functions to optical switches and combiners. However, excessive signal attenuation along the light propagation may require extra optical-electrical signal conversion, thus introducing unwanted delays. In this paper, we aim to overcome this deficiency during logic synthesis: First, we optimize the signal efficiency factor by applying the concept of harmonic means to optimize DC combiners. Second, we eliminate redundant combiners by integer partition. Moreover, we properly arrange these proposed techniques in an optimal sequence of operations to form our main framework. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state of the art in terms of efficiency factor.
items.abstract_zh: 随着高速、节能光学互连和计算的进步，光子集成电路（PIC）已成为传统 CMOS 电路的有前途的替代品。可以通过将目标功能的二元决策图（BDD）映射到光开关和组合器来合成PIC。然而，沿光传播的过度信号衰减可能需要额外的光电信号转换，从而引入不需要的延迟。在本文中，我们的目标是克服逻辑综合过程中的这一缺陷：首先，我们通过应用谐波手段的概念来优化直流组合器来优化信号效率因子。其次，我们通过整数划分消除冗余组合器。此外，我们以最佳操作顺序正确排列这些提出的技术，以形成我们的主要框架。实验结果表明，我们的框架在效率因素方面优于现有技术。

items.title: ZK-Hammer: Leaking Secrets from Zero-Knowledge Proofs via Rowhammer.
items.abstract: Zero-knowledge succinct non-interactive arguments of knowledge (zk-SNARK) schemes have been a promising technique in verified computation. Zk-SNARK schemes were designed to be mathematically secure against cryptographic attacks and it remains unclear whether they are vulnerable to fault injection attacks. In this work, we provide a positive answer by presenting ZK-Hammer, which leaks secrets from zk-SNARK schemes via Rowhammer. We incur faults in the exponentiate variables in the Quadratic Arithmetic Program (QAP) problem. Then we analyze the faulty proof using the bilinear pairing technique and manage to recover the secret. We employ a Rowhammer fault evaluation in libsnark and identify 3 CVEs.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识简洁非交互式知识论证（zk-SNARK）方案一直是验证计算中一种有前途的技术。 Zk-SNARK 方案的设计目的是在数学上安全地抵御加​​密攻击，但目前尚不清楚它们是否容易受到故障注入攻击。在这项工作中，我们通过提出 ZK-Hammer 提供了肯定的答案，它通过 Rowhammer 泄露 zk-SNARK 方案中的秘密。我们在二次算术规划 (QAP) 问题中的指数变量中遇到了错误。然后我们使用双线性配对技术分析错误证明并设法恢复秘密。我们在 libsnark 中采用 Rowhammer 故障评估并识别出 3 个 CVE。

items.title: AutoRE: Bayesian-Optimization-based Automatic Reliability Enhancement Tool for Flow-based Microfluidic Biochips.
items.abstract: As an emerging platform for biochemical experiments, flow-based microfluidic biochips are currently suffering from malfunctions caused by manufacturing defects, thereby having low yield. While many related studies have been conducted and reliability quantification models have been published, layout optimization methods are yet lacking. In this paper, we propose AutoRE, the first tool to automatically enhance reliability by optimizing layouts. AutoRE varies the layout within a certain range without changing its topology, and adopts Bayesian optimization (BO) to identify the most reliable variant. Experimental results demonstrate that AutoRE can efficiently and effectively improve the reliability across all testcases by around 40% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种新兴的生化实验平台，基于流的微流控生物芯片目前因制造缺陷而导致故障，导致良率较低。尽管已经进行了许多相关研究并发表了可靠性量化模型，但仍缺乏布局优化方法。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoRE，这是第一个通过优化布局自动增强可靠性的工具。 AutoRE在不改变其拓扑的情况下在一定范围内改变布局，并采用贝叶斯优化（BO）来识别最可靠的变体。实验结果表明，AutoRE 可以高效、有效地将所有测试用例的可靠性平均提高约 40%。

items.title: All-in-Memory Stochastic Computing using ReRAM.
items.abstract: As the demand for efficient, low-power computing in embedded and edge devices grows, traditional computing methods are becoming less effective for handling complex tasks. Stochastic computing (SC) offers a promising alternative by approximating complex arithmetic operations, such as addition and multiplication, using simple bitwise operations, like majority or AND, on random bit-streams. While SC operations are inherently fault-tolerant, their accuracy largely depends on the length and quality of the stochastic bit-streams (SBS). These bit-streams are typically generated by CMOS-based stochastic bit-stream generators that consume over 80% of the SC system’s power and area. Current SC solutions focus on optimizing the logic gates but often neglect the high cost of moving the bit-streams between memory and processor. This work leverages the physics of emerging ReRAM devices to implement the entire SC flow in place: ❶ generating low-cost true random numbers and SBSs, ❷ conducting SC operations, and ❸ converting SBSs back to binary. Considering the low reliability of ReRAM cells, we demonstrate how SC’s robustness to errors copes with ReRAM’s variability. Our evaluation shows significant improvements in throughput (1.39 ×, 2.16 ×) and energy consumption (1.15 ×, 2.8 ×) over state-of-the-art (CMOS- and ReRAM-based) solutions, respectively, with an average image quality drop of 5% across multiple SBS lengths and image processing tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 随着嵌入式和边缘设备对高效、低功耗计算的需求不断增长，传统计算方法在处理复杂任务方面变得越来越无效。随机计算 (SC) 通过在随机比特流上使用简单的按位运算（如多数或 AND）来近似复杂的算术运算（例如加法和乘法），提供了一种有前途的替代方案。虽然 SC 操作本质上是容错的，但其准确性在很大程度上取决于随机比特流 (SBS) 的长度和质量。这些比特流通常由基于 CMOS 的随机比特流生成器生成，该生成器消耗 SC 系统 80% 以上的功率和面积。当前的 SC 解决方案侧重于优化逻辑门，但常常忽略在存储器和处理器之间移动比特流的高成本。这项工作利用新兴 ReRAM 设备的物理原理来实现整个 SC 流程：❶ 生成低成本的真随机数和 SBS，❷ 进行 SC 操作，以及 ❸ 将 SBS 转换回二进制。考虑到 ReRAM 单元的低可靠性，我们演示了 SC 的抗错误鲁棒性如何应对 ReRAM 的可变性。我们的评估显示，与最先进的（基于 CMOS 和 ReRAM 的）解决方案相比，吞吐量（1.39 ×、2.16 ×）和能耗（1.15 ×、2.8 ×）分别显着提高，多个 SBS 长度和图像处理任务的平均图像质量下降了 5%。

items.title: Synthesis of CFET Cell Library Leveraging Backside Metal Routing.
items.abstract: As technology nodes continue to shrink, Complementary FET (CFET) structures, which stack PMOS and NMOS together, have emerged as a promising candidate for next-generation technology. Due to the reduction in routing tracks, the insertion of dummy polys to increase routing resources and the use of M2 during the synthesis of CFET standard cells have become more inevitable. These two factors make block-level routing significantly more challenging. To address this, we introduce the methods to utilize the backside (BS) routing resources at the CFET standard cell synthesis stage and efficiently handle CFET transistor folding. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to consider BS routing resources at the cell synthesis stage and efficiently address transistor folding in the CFET stacked structure. In the transistor folding and placement stages, we utilize Euler paths to estimate the lower bound of contacted poly pitch (CPP) and apply dynamic programming (DP) to calculate the frontside minimum required tracks (FMRT) of BS-resource-aware placements. The subsequent satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) approach determines which tracks the devices occupy and completes cell routing. Experimental results show that compared to previous work [11], we achieve reductions of 1%, 45%, and 19% in #CPP, #M2 tracks, and runtime, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点不断缩小，将 PMOS 和 NMOS 堆叠在一起的互补 FET (CFET) 结构已成为下一代技术的有希望的候选者。由于布线轨道的减少，插入虚拟多晶硅以增加布线资源以及在CFET标准单元合成期间使用M2变得更加不可避免。这两个因素使得块级路由变得更具挑战性。 To address this, we introduce the methods to utilize the backside (BS) routing resources at the CFET standard cell synthesis stage and efficiently handle CFET transistor folding.据我们所知，这是第一个在单元合成阶段考虑 BS 布线资源并有效解决 CFET 堆叠结构中晶体管折叠问题的工作。在晶体管折叠和布局阶段，我们利用欧拉路径来估计接触多晶间距（CPP）的下限，并应用动态编程（DP）来计算BS资源感知布局的前端最小所需轨道（FMRT）。随后的可满足性模理论（SMT）方法确定设备占用哪些轨道并完成单元路由。实验结果表明，与之前的工作[11]相比，我们在#CPP、#M2 轨道和运行时间方面分别减少了 1%、45% 和 19%。

items.title: SSpMV: A Sparsity-aware SpMV Framework Empowered by Multimodal Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SpMV) is an essential sparse operation in scientific computing and artificial intelligence. Efficiently adapting SpMV algorithms to diverse matrices and architectures requires a framework capable of accurately recognizing sparse patterns and selecting the optimal implementation. In this work, we introduce Sparsity-aware SpMV (SSpMV), a framework that integrates expert-designed features with multimodal representations to adaptively predict the best-performing algorithm and parameters. For this purpose, we design a multimodal neural network called MM-Adapter, to capture diverse modalities to represent the computational features of SpMV. Experimental results demonstrate that MMAdapter achieves the highest accuracy of $81.05 \%$, outperforming existing SpMV prediction models. Furthermore, SSpMV consistently delivers substantial performance improvements over state-of-the-art sparse libraries across various multi-core platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法（SpMV）是科学计算和人工智能中必不可少的稀疏运算。有效地使 SpMV 算法适应不同的矩阵和架构需要一个能够准确识别稀疏模式并选择最佳实现的框架。在这项工作中，我们引入了稀疏感知 SpMV (SSpMV)，这是一个框架，它将专家设计的特征与多模态表示相结合，以自适应地预测性能最佳的算法和参数。为此，我们设计了一个名为 MM-Adapter 的多模态神经网络，以捕获不同的模态来表示 SpMV 的计算特征。实验结果表明，MMAdapter 的最高准确度达到 $81.05 \%$，优于现有的 SpMV 预测模型。此外，SSpMV 在各种多核平台上始终比最先进的稀疏库提供显着的性能改进。

items.title: Asymmetric Predictive Testing for Aging in SRAMs.
items.abstract: To avoid corruption of user data, predictive testing methods have been proposed to identify SRAMs likely to fail in the near future due to aging. These methods use aggressive operating conditions, e.g., adjustments to wordline voltages or the power supply voltage, that are calibrated to provide high coverage of SRAMs likely to fail in the near future, but end up with some over-testing, i.e., spuriously identifying some chips as likely to fail. We first present our study which discovered that a large fraction of over-tested chips fail due to read faults triggered during read-1 operations. Our analysis identifies asymmetric aging in SRAM cells, which are more likely to store zeros, as the root cause for this. We build on this discovery to propose an asymmetric predictive testing method which performs writes using normal voltages, read-0 at aggressive voltages, and read-1 at less aggressive voltages. We demonstrate that this method significantly reduces over-testing by over $3 \times$ to $5 \times$, for low limits on under-testing. We also propose and use a new statistical sampling and simulation method to enable fast convergence and accurate evaluation of asymmetric predictive testing.
items.abstract_zh: 为了避免用户数据损坏，人们提出了预测测试方法来识别 SRAM 在不久的将来可能因老化而发生故障的情况。这些方法使用激进的操作条件，例如对字线电压或电源电压进行调整，这些条件经过校准以提供可能在不久的将来发生故障的 SRAM 的高覆盖率，但最终会导致一些过度测试，即错误地将某些芯片识别为可能发生故障。我们首先介绍我们的研究，发现大部分经过过度测试的芯片由于在读 1 操作期间触发读故障而失败。我们的分析确定 SRAM 单元中的不对称老化（更有可能存储零）是造成这种情况的根本原因。我们在此发现的基础上提出了一种非对称预测测试方法，该方法使用正常电压执行写入操作，在高电压下执行读 0 操作，并在较低电压下执行读 1 操作。我们证明，这种方法可以显着减少过度测试，减少超过 3 美元到 5 美元，而测试不足的限制较低。我们还提出并使用一种新的统计采样和模拟方法来实现非对称预测测试的快速收敛和准确评估。

items.title: Re4PUF: A Reliable, Reconfigurable ReRAM-based PUF Resilient to DNN and Side Channel Attacks.
items.abstract: Resistive random-access memory (ReRAM) based Physical Unclonable Functions (PUFs) have emerged as an attractive hardware security primitive due to their low energy consumption and compact footprint. However, the reliability of existing ReRAM-based PUFs is challenged by read noise and temperature variations, as well as their resistance to Deep Neural Network (DNN) modeling attacks and Side Channel Attacks (SCAs). In this paper, we propose a novel 3T2R ReRAM-based reconfigurable PUF to address these challenges. By adopting the digital 3T2R voltage division cell design, we improve its reliability against ReRAM read noise and temperature variations, while the adjustable analog supply voltage of inverters enables quick, low-cost reconfigurability without reprogramming ReRAMs, effectively mitigating DNN modeling and SCA vulnerabilities. Our $\mathrm{Re}^{4}$ PUF chip has been experimentally validated, achieving a low Bit Error Rate (BER) of $1 \%$ at $85^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$, a 7.59 -fold reduction compared to existing ReRAM-based PUFs. It also demonstrates robust resistance to both DNN modeling attacks (MLP and Transformer) and SCAs, with success rates of approximately 50% and less than $70 \%$, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基于电阻式随机存取存储器 (ReRAM) 的物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 由于其低能耗和紧凑的占用空间而成为一种有吸引力的硬件安全原语。然而，现有基于 ReRAM 的 PUF 的可靠性受到读取噪声和温度变化及其对深度神经网络 (DNN) 建模攻击和侧通道攻击 (SCA) 的抵抗力的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 3T2R ReRAM 的可重构 PUF 来应对这些挑战。通过采用数字 3T2R 分压单元设计，我们提高了其针对 ReRAM 读取噪声和温度变化的可靠性，而逆变器的可调模拟电源电压可实现快速、低成本的可重新配置，而无需重新编程 ReRAM，从而有效缓解 DNN 建模和 SCA 漏洞。我们的 $\mathrm{Re}^{4}$ PUF 芯片经过实验验证，在 $85^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$ 的情况下实现了 $1 \%$ 的低误码率 (BER)，与现有基于 ReRAM 的 PUF 相比，降低了 7.59 倍。它还表现出对 DNN 建模攻击（MLP 和 Transformer）和 SCA 的强大抵抗力，成功率分别约为 50% 和低于 70%$。

items.title: Guarder: A Stable and Lightweight Reconfigurable RRAM-based PIM Accelerator for DNN IP Protection.
items.abstract: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) on conventional digital edge devices faces significant challenges due to high energy consumption. A promising solution is the processing-inmemory (PIM) architecture with resistive random-access memory (RRAM), but RRAM-based systems suffer from imprecise weights due to programming stochasticity and cannot effectively utilize conventional weight encryption/decryption intellectual property (IP) protection schemes. To address these issues, we propose a novel software-hardware co-design Guarder. On the hardware side, we introduce 3T2R cells to achieve reliable multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations and use reconfigurable inverter operating voltages to encode keys for encrypting DNNs on RRAM. On the software side, we implement a contrastive training method that ensures high model accuracy on authorized chips while degrading performance on unauthorized ones. This approach protects DNN IP with minimal hardware overhead while significantly mitigating the effects of RRAM programming stochasticity. Extensive experiments on tasks such as image classification (using MLP, ResNet, and ViT), segmentation (using SegFormer), and image generation (using DiT) validate the effectiveness of our method. The proposed contrastive training ensures negligible performance degradation on authorized chips, while performance on unauthorized chips drops to random guessing or generation. Compared to traditional RRAM accelerators, the 3T2R-based accelerator achieves a $1.41 \times$ reduction in area overhead and a $2.28 \times$ reduction in energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 由于高能耗，在传统数字边缘设备上部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 面临着重大挑战。一种有前景的解决方案是采用电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构，但基于 RRAM 的系统由于编程随机性而存在权重不精确的问题，并且无法有效利用传统的权重加密/解密知识产权 (IP) 保护方案。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的软硬件协同设计 Guarder。在硬件方面，我们引入 3T2R 单元来实现可靠的乘法累加 (MAC) 运算，并使用可重新配置的逆变器工作电压来编码密钥，以加密 RRAM 上的 DNN。在软件方面，我们实施了一种对比训练方法，可确保授权芯片上的高模型准确性，同时降低未授权芯片上的性能。这种方法以最小的硬件开销保护 DNN IP，同时显着减轻 RRAM 编程随机性的影响。对图像分类（使用 MLP、ResNet 和 ViT）、分割（使用 SegFormer）和图像生成（使用 DiT）等任务进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。所提出的对比训练确保授权芯片上的性能下降可以忽略不计，而未经授权的芯片上的性能下降到随机猜测或生成。与传统的 RRAM 加速器相比，基于 3T2R 的加速器面积开销减少了 1.41 美元，能耗减少了 2.28 美元。

items.title: SNAPPIX: Efficient-Coding-Inspired In-Sensor Compression for Edge Vision.
items.abstract: Energy-efficient image acquisition on the edge is crucial for enabling remote sensing applications where the sensor node has weak compute capabilities and must transmit data to a remote server/cloud for processing. To reduce the edge energy consumption, this paper proposes a sensor-algorithm co-designed system called SNAPPIX, which compresses raw pixels in the analog domain inside the sensor. We use coded exposure (CE) as the in-sensor compression strategy as it offers the flexibility to sample, i.e., selectively expose pixels, both spatially and temporally. SnapPix has three contributions. First, we propose a task-agnostic strategy to learn the sampling/exposure pattern based on the classic theory of efficient coding. Second, we codesign the downstream vision model with the exposure pattern to address the pixel-level non-uniformity unique to CE-compressed images. Finally, we propose lightweight augmentations to the image sensor hardware to support our in-sensor CE compression. Evaluating on action recognition and video reconstruction, SnapPix outperforms state-of-the-art video-based methods at the same speed while reducing the energy by up to $15.4 \times$. We have open-sourced the code at: https://github.com/horizonresearch/SnapPix.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘的节能图像采集对于实现遥感应用至关重要，在遥感应用中，传感器节点的计算能力较弱，必须将数据传输到远程服务器/云进行处理。为了减少边缘能耗，本文提出了一种名为 SNAPPIX 的传感器算法联合设计系统，该系统在传感器内部的模拟域中压缩原始像素。我们使用编码曝光（CE）作为传感器内压缩策略，因为它提供了采样的灵活性，即在空间和时间上选择性地曝光像素。 SnapPix 有三项贡献。首先，我们提出了一种与任务无关的策略来基于有效编码的经典理论来学习采样/曝光模式。其次，我们对下游视觉模型与曝光模式进行协同设计，以解决 CE 压缩图像特有的像素级不均匀性问题。最后，我们建议对图像传感器硬件进行轻量级增强，以支持我们的传感器内 CE 压缩。在对动作识别和视频重建进行评估时，SnapPix 在相同速度下优于最先进的基于视频的方法，同时将能耗降低高达 15.4 美元\times$。我们已将代码开源：https://github.com/horizo​​nresearch/SnapPix。

items.title: An Efficient Compute-in-Memory based Accelerator for Point-based Point Cloud Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Point-based point cloud neural networks (PNNs) have shown remarkable accuracy in various applications. However, the performance of PNNs is usually limited on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper presents Point-CIM, an efficient Compute-in-Memory (CIM) based accelerator for PNNs, with software and hardware co-optimization. A reconfigurable CIM unit, which exploits the inherent zero-bit-skipping capability of CIM array, is designed to efficiently process Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations on decomposed feature data with high bit sparsity. A Voxel-Morton-sorted Partitioning (VMP) method combined with Channel-wise Minimum (CM) base point selection is proposed to improve the decomposition bit sparsity further and reduce the hardware implementation overhead. Additionally, a detailed Bit-level Truncation Quantization (BTQ) method is proposed to directly compress the bit-width of the offset without incurring any additional hardware overhead. Based on this decomposition method, a Pre-decomposition (PD) data movement strategy is employed to reduce data transfers of intermediate features between the on-chip buffer and CIM array. Extensive evaluation experiments on multiple datasets show that Point-CIM achieves an average speedup of $1.69 \times$ to $9.63 \times$, and $3.11 \times$ to $17.32 \times$ improvement in energy efficiency, compared to state-of-the-art accelerators and general-purpose processors.
items.abstract_zh: 基于点的点云神经网络 (PNN) 在各种应用中都表现出了卓越的准确性。然而，PNN 的性能通常受限于资源受限的边缘设备。本文介绍了 Point-CIM，这是一种基于内存计算 (CIM) 的高效 PNN 加速器，具有软件和硬件协同优化功能。可重构 CIM 单元利用 CIM 阵列固有的零位跳跃功能，旨在有效地处理高位稀疏性分解特征数据的乘法累加 (MAC) 运算。提出了一种结合通道最小基点选择的体素-莫顿排序划分（VMP）方法，以进一步提高分解位稀疏性并减少硬件实现开销。此外，提出了一种详细的位级截断量化（BTQ）方法来直接压缩偏移的位宽，而不会产生任何额外的硬件开销。基于这种分解方法，采用预分解（PD）数据移动策略来减少片上缓冲区和CIM阵列之间中间特征的数据传输。对多个数据集进行的广泛评估实验表明，与最先进的加速器和通用处理器相比，Point-CIM 的平均加速率为 $1.69 \times$ 至 $9.63 \times$，能源效率提高了 $3.11 \times$ 至 $17.32 \times$。

items.title: LLMShare: Optimizing LLM Inference Serving with Hardware Architecture Exploration.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized language tasks but pose significant deployment challenges due to their substantial computational demands during inference. The hardware configurations of existing LLM serving systems do not optimize for the different computational and bandwidth needs of the prefill and decoding phases in LLM inference, leading to inefficient resource use and increased costs. In this paper, we systematically investigate promising hardware configurations for LLM inference serving. We develop a simulator that models the performance and cost across different hardware solutions and introduce a customized design space exploration framework to identify optimal setups efficiently. By aligning hardware capabilities with the specific demands of the prefill and decoding phases, we achieve $13 \%$ cost savings and over $4 \times$ throughput improvements compared to conventional serving system setups.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 彻底改变了语言任务，但由于推理过程中的大量计算需求，带来了重大的部署挑战。现有LLM服务系统的硬件配置并未针对LLM推理中预填充和解码阶段的不同计算和带宽需求进行优化，导致资源使用效率低下并增加成本。在本文中，我们系统地研究了用于 LLM 推理服务的有前途的硬件配置。我们开发了一个模拟器，可以对不同硬件解决方案的性能和成本进行建模，并引入定制的设计空间探索框架来有效地识别最佳设置。通过将硬件功能与预填充和解码阶段的特定需求相结合，与传统的服务系统设置相比，我们节省了 13 \%$ 的成本，并提高了超过 4 \times$ 的吞吐量。

items.title: SeIM: In-Memory Acceleration for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search.
items.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) is crucial in many applications to find semantically similar matches for user queries. Especially with the development of large language models (LLMs), ANNS is becoming increasingly important in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). An in-depth analysis of ANNS reveals that its diverse operations, from extensive memory access to intensive sorting, are key performance bottlenecks, imposing significant strain on both the memory system and computing resources. Based on these observations, we present SeIM, a hierarchical in-memory architecture to accelerate ANNS. SeIM is designed to accommodate the diverse operational characteristics of ANNS. Specifically, SeIM offloads highly parallel memorybound operations to the memory bank level and introduces a unified execution model to reuse hardware units, requiring only lightweight modifications to standard DRAM architecture. Additionally, SeIM places compute-bound sorting operations, which require cross-unit data access, at the memory controller level and employs an adaptive transmission filtering technique to reduce unnecessary data transfers and processing during sorting. Our evaluation shows that SeIM achieves $268 \times 22 \times$, and $5 \times$ higher throughput, $306 \times 59 \times$, and $4 \times$ lower latency, and $3081 \times$, $287 \times$, and $2 \times$ higher power efficiency than state-of-the-art CPU-, GPU-, and ASIC-based ANNS solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 在许多应用中，近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 对于查找用户查询的语义相似匹配至关重要。特别是随着大型语言模型（LLM）的发展，ANNS 在检索增强生成（RAG）中变得越来越重要。对ANNS的深入分析表明，其多样化的操作，从广泛的内存访问到密集的排序，是关键的性能瓶颈，给内存系统和计算资源带来了巨大的压力。基于这些观察，我们提出了 SeIM，一种用于加速 ANNS 的分层内存架构。 SeIM 旨在适应 ANNS 的不同操作特征。具体来说，SeIM 将高度并行的内存绑定操作卸载到存储体级别，并引入统一的执行模型来重用硬件单元，只需要对标准 DRAM 架构进行轻量级修改。此外，SeIM 将需要跨单元数据访问的计算密集型排序操作置于内存控制器级别，并采用自适应传输过滤技术来减少排序过程中不必要的数据传输和处理。我们的评估表明，与最先进的基于 CPU、GPU 和 ASIC 的 ANNS 解决方案相比，SeIM 的吞吐量提高了 268 美元 × 22 倍，吞吐量提高了 5 美元，延迟降低了 306 美元 × 59 美元，延迟降低了 4 美元，能效提高了 3081 美元、287 美元和 2 美元。

items.title: HoBBy: Hardening Unbalanced Branches against Control Flow Attacks on Intel SGX and AMD SEV.
items.abstract: This paper introduces HoBBy, a compiler-based tool that hardens unbalanced branches at the instruction level, making parallel control flows indistinguishable to state-of-theart attacks that bypass the source-code level balancing. To achieve this, we propose a single-step analysis method to identify unbalanced instructions in secret-dependent branches, and implement instruction shadowing, cogging, and spiraling techniques to protect them. We evaluate HoBBy by hardening secret-dependent branches in four real-world applications, validating its resilience against three state-of-the-art attacks targeting Intel SGX and AMD SEV. HoBBy achieves a runtime overhead of 2.8% for cryptographic libraries and a binary size overhead of $\mathbf{0. 6 \%}$.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 HoBBy，这是一种基于编译器的工具，可在指令级别强化不平衡分支，使并行控制流与绕过源代码级别平衡的最新攻击无法区分。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种单步分析方法来识别秘密相关分支中的不平衡指令，并实施指令阴影、齿槽和螺旋技术来保护它们。我们通过强化四个实际应用程序中的秘密相关分支来评估 HoBBy，验证其针对针对 Intel SGX 和 AMD SEV 的三种最先进攻击的弹性。 HoBBy 的加密库运行时开销为 2.8%，二进制大小开销为 $\mathbf{0. 6\%}$。

items.title: CXL-ECC: an Efficient LRC-based on-CXL-Memory-eXpander-Controller ECC to Enhance Reliability and Performance of DRAM Error Correction.
items.abstract: Compute eXpress Link (CXL) offers an effective interface for connecting CPUs with external computing and memory devices. CXL Memory eXpander Controller (CXL-MXC) is gaining attention for its ability to boost memory capacity and bandwidth more efficiently than traditional DDR DIMMs. Despite extensive research on MXC performance and adaptation, DRAM reliability in CXL architecture remains underexplored. Traditional fault tolerance mechanisms like replica or RAID-based systems would significantly increase bandwidth overhead in the CXL fabric, adversely affecting system performance. To address this, we propose the on-CXL-Memory-Expander-Controller ECC (CXL-ECC), by using Locally Recoverable Codes (LRC) as the Inter-Channel-ECC (IC-ECC) and offloading its process to the expander, we eliminate extra memory access requests in the CXL fabric. Consequently, we conduct several experiments to demonstrate that our approach enhances DRAM reliability by more than $10^{9}$, compared to state-of-the-art ECC methods. Relative to RAID-enabled CXL switch, it reduces additional bandwidth overhead from 63.5% to 3.4% and improves system performance by 12%.
items.abstract_zh: Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 提供了一个有效的接口，用于连接 CPU 与外部计算和存储设备。 CXL 内存扩展控制器 (CXL-MXC) 因其比传统 DDR DIMM 更有效地提高内存容量和带宽的能力而受到关注。尽管对 MXC 性能和适应性进行了广泛的研究，但 CXL 架构中的 DRAM 可靠性仍未得到充分探索。传统的容错机制（例如副本或基于 RAID 的系统）会显着增加 CXL 结构中的带宽开销，从而对系统性能产生不利影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CXL 内存扩展器控制器上 ECC (CXL-ECC)，通过使用本地可恢复代码 (LRC) 作为通道间 ECC (IC-ECC) 并将其进程卸载到扩展器，我们消除了 CXL 结构中的额外内存访问请求。因此，我们进行了多项实验来证明，与最先进的 ECC 方法相比，我们的方法将 DRAM 可靠性提高了 10^{9}$ 以上。相对于支持 RAID 的 CXL 交换机，它将额外带宽开销从 63.5% 减少到 3.4%，并将系统性能提高 12%。

items.title: Swift or Exact? Boosting Efficient Microarchitecture DSE via Multi-fidelity Partial Order Prediction.
items.abstract: A significant challenge in microarchitecture design space exploration (DSE) lies in the time-intensive synthesis and simulation process, making rapid design exploration infeasible. While the simulation tools offer reports on performance, power, and area (PPA) in the different stages, the PPA reports at early stages may fail to reflect the true relative qualities for various designs, i.e., with low fidelities. To address these limitations, we propose a novel multi-fidelity optimization algorithm tailored for multi-stage optimization problems. The proposed method employs a non-linear Gaussian process model to effectively fuse data from different stages with different fidelities, minimizing the need for expensive high-fidelity data while maximizing accuracy. Furthermore, a logical regression function and a multi-objective partial order relation are introduced to evaluate the reliability of low-fidelity data, mitigating their potential inaccuracies. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed multi-fidelity optimization algorithm can approximate the Pareto front of the direct design space in a shorter time with better performance.
items.abstract_zh: 微架构设计空间探索（DSE）的一个重大挑战在于耗时的综合和模拟过程，使得快速设计探索变得不可行。虽然仿真工具提供了不同阶段的性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 报告，但早期阶段的 PPA 报告可能无法反映各种设计的真实相对质量，即保真度较低。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种针对多阶段优化问题量身定制的新颖的多保真度优化算法。该方法采用非线性高斯过程模型来有效地融合来自不同阶段、不同保真度的数据，最大限度地减少对昂贵的高保真数据的需求，同时最大限度地提高准确性。此外，引入逻辑回归函数和多目标偏序关系来评估低保真度数据的可靠性，减少其潜在的不准确性。实验表明，我们提出的多保真度优化算法可以在更短的时间内逼近直接设计空间的Pareto前沿，并且性能更好。

items.title: MAS-ISP: A Proxy-Free Online Hyperparameter Optimization Framework for ISP Hardware System.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement of visual autonomous systems, especially in autonomous driving, underscores the critical role of Image Signal Processors (ISPs) as they convert RAW sensor data into RGB images suited for visual interpretation. Traditional ISPs rely on tuning hyperparameters to adapt to varying imaging conditions; however, the vast parameter space and intricate tuning process pose significant challenges for realtime autonomous applications. Existing autonomous ISP hyperparameter optimization methods rely largely on offline or proxybased online tuning, limiting their accuracy and responsiveness to real-time environmental changes. In response, we propose an online ISP hyperparameter optimization framework based on Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), marking the first proxyfree, real-time optimization approach. Our design exhibits a master-slave Multi-Agent System (MAS), enabling rapid and cooperative parameter optimization with improved inter-frame consistency. Furthermore, we design the MAS-ISP automated visual system, incorporating innovative hardware designs such as Strip Convolution Kernel and Stride-Aware Dual-Buffer Memory, which drastically reduce resource consumption in CNN hardware. MAS-ISP achieves 1080P@75FPS/240FPS on FPGA/ASIC platforms, supporting real-time and reliable visual systems.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉自主系统的快速发展，尤其是在自动驾驶领域，凸显了图像信号处理器 (ISP) 的关键作用，因为它们将原始传感器数据转换为适合视觉解释的 RGB 图像。传统的 ISP 依靠调整超参数来适应不同的成像条件；然而，巨大的参数空间和复杂的调整过程给实时自主应用带来了重大挑战。现有的自主 ISP 超参数优化方法很大程度上依赖于离线或基于代理的在线调整，限制了其准确性和对实时环境变化的响应能力。为此，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的在线 ISP 超参数优化框架，这标志着第一个无代理的实时优化方法。我们的设计展示了主从多代理系统（MAS），可实现快速、协作的参数优化，并提高帧间一致性。此外，我们设计了MAS-ISP自动化视觉系统，结合了Strip Convolution Kernel和Stride-Aware Dual-Buffer Memory等创新硬件设计，大大减少了CNN硬件的资源消耗。 MAS-ISP在FPGA/ASIC平台上实现1080P@75FPS/240FPS，支持实时可靠的视觉系统。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: An Efficient and Scalable Track Assignment with GPU Parallelism.
items.abstract: The track assignment has been introduced between global routing and detail routing. Based on the independence and divisibility of track assignment, we propose a GPU-accelerated parallel track assignment algorithm. To estimate routability more accurately, the proposed algorithm simultaneously considers global and local nets, and incorporates several strategies for optimization. Moreover, an asynchronous parallelism strategy is proposed to divide the computation of routing resources and the track assignment into fine-grained tasks. Experimental results show that, compared to related work, our algorithm achieves a significant speedup with a better routability estimation.
items.abstract_zh: 在全局布线和详细布线之间引入了轨道分配。基于轨道分配的独立性和可分性，我们提出了一种GPU加速的并行轨道分配算法。为了更准确地估计可路由性，所提出的算法同时考虑全局和局部网络，并结合多种优化策略。此外，提出了一种异步并行策略，将路由资源的计算和轨道分配划分为细粒度的任务。实验结果表明，与相关工作相比，我们的算法实现了显着的加速和更好的可路由性估计。

items.title: McPAL: Scaling Unstructured Sparse Inference with Multi-Chiplet HBM-PIM Architecture for LLMs.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have gained significant attention recently. However, executing LLM is memory-bound due to the extensive memory accesses. Process-in-memory (PIM) emerges as an energy-efficient solution for LLMs, delivering high memory bandwidth and compute parallelism. Nevertheless, the trend towards larger LLMs introduces escalating memory footprint challenges for monolithic PIM chips. This paper proposes McPAL, which tackles this challenge by emphasizing unstructured sparse compute within PIM and hierarchical multi-chiplet scaling. McPAL decomposes arbitrary sparse weight matrix into multiple irregular sparse vectors. The non-skipped computations in each vector are then routed via an in-memory butterfly network to the standard PIM array, enhancing the PIM utilization. In addition, we scale McPAL vertically by strategically organizing the 3D-HBM hierarchy to minimize the internal long-distance data travel. Meanwhile, a 2.5D IO chiplet scales McPAL horizontally, reducing die-to-die (D2D) data transfer and ensuring sparse workload balance. We conducted extensive experiments from Llama-7B to Llama-70B. The results show that McPAL achieves $1.57 \times$ to $3.12 \times$ speedup and $10.43 \times$ to $35.66 \times$ energy efficiency over Nvidia A100 GPU. Compared to SOTAs, McPAL also achieves $1.08 \times$ to $2.15 \times$ speedup and $1.65 \times$ to $5.14 \times$ energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）最近引起了极大的关注。然而，由于大量的内存访问，执行 LLM 是受内存限制的。内存中进程 (PIM) 作为法学硕士的节能解决方案而出现，可提供高内存带宽和计算并行性。然而，LLM 规模增大的趋势给单片 PIM 芯片带来了不断升级的内存占用挑战。本文提出了 McPAL，它通过强调 PIM 内的非结构化稀疏计算和分层多芯片扩展来应对这一挑战。 McPAL 将任意稀疏权重矩阵分解为多个不规则稀疏向量。然后，每个向量中的非跳过计算通过内存中蝶形网络路由到标准 PIM 阵列，从而提高 PIM 利用率。此外，我们通过战略性地组织 3D-HBM 层次结构来垂直扩展 McPAL，以最大程度地减少内部长距离数据传输。同时，2.5D IO 小芯片可水平扩展 McPAL，减少芯片间 (D2D) 数据传输并确保稀疏工作负载平衡。我们进行了从 Llama-7B 到 Llama-70B 的广泛实验。结果表明，与 Nvidia A100 GPU 相比，McPAL 实现了 1.57 美元到 3.12 美元的加速和 10.43 美元到 35.66 美元的能源效率。与 SOTA 相比，McPAL 还实现了 1.08 美元到 2.15 美元的加速和 1.65 美元到 5.14 美元的能源效率。

items.title: GTN-Path: Efficient Path Timing Prediction through Waveform Propagation with Graph Transformer.
items.abstract: As technology nodes shrink, static timing analysis (STA) must balance accuracy and efficiency to ensure circuit functionality. Graph-based analysis (GBA) is fast but pessimistic, while path-based analysis (PBA) offers higher accuracy with an expensive runtime cost. However, GBA and PBA rely on lookup table (LUT)-based standard cell libraries, introducing accuracy losses compared to accurate SPICE simulations at advanced technology nodes. This work presents GTN-Path, an efficient post-layout path timing prediction method based on waveform propagation and graph transformer network (GTN). GTN-Path captures structural information to accurately predict waveforms by modeling standard cells and interconnects as graphs. Compared to HSPICE simulations, GTN-Path predicts waveforms with $2.98 \%$ error and delay with $2.96 \%$ error, achieving a speedup of $3510 \times$. Additionally, compared with the sign-off STA tool, the GTN-Path achieves a speedup of $12 \times$.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点的缩小，静态时序分析 (STA) 必须平衡精度和效率，以确保电路功能。基于图形的分析 (GBA) 速度快但比较悲观，而基于路径的分析 (PBA) 提供更高的准确性，但运行时间成本昂贵。然而，GBA 和 PBA 依赖于基于查找表 (LUT) 的标准单元库，与先进技术节点上的精确 SPICE 模拟相比，会带来精度损失。这项工作提出了 GTN-Path，一种基于波形传播和图变换网络 (GTN) 的高效布局后路径时序预测方法。 GTN-Path 通过将标准单元和互连建模为图形来捕获结构信息，以准确预测波形。与 HSPICE 仿真相比，GTN-Path 预测波形的误差为 $2.98 \%$，延迟的误差为 $2.96 \%$，实现了 $3510 \times$ 的加速。此外，与 Sign-off STA 工具相比，GTN-Path 实现了 12 美元\times$的加速。

items.title: ALLMod: Exploring Area-Efficiency of LUT-based Large Number Modular Reduction via Hybrid Workloads.
items.abstract: Modular arithmetic, particularly modular reduction, is widely used in cryptographic applications such as homomorphic encryption (HE) and zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP). High-bit-width operations are crucial for enhancing security; however, they are computationally intensive due to the large number of modular operations required. The lookup-table-based (LUT-based) approach, a “space-for-time” technique, reduces computational load by segmenting the input number into smaller bit groups, pre-computing modular reduction results for each segment, and storing these results in LUTs. While effective, this method incurs significant hardware overhead due to extensive LUT usage. In this paper, we introduce ALLMod, a novel approach that improves the area efficiency of LUT-based largenumber modular reduction by employing hybrid workloads. Inspired by the iterative method, ALLMod splits the bit groups into two distinct workloads, achieving lower area costs without compromising throughput. We first develop a template to facilitate workload splitting and ensure balanced distribution. Then, we conduct design space exploration to evaluate the optimal timing for fusing workload results, enabling us to identify the most efficient design under specific constraints. Extensive evaluations show that ALLMod achieves up to $\lt sup\gt1\lt/sup\gt|.65 \times$ and $3 \times$ improvements in area efficiency over conventional LUT-based methods for bit-widths of 128 and 8,192, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 模运算，特别是模约简，广泛应用于同态加密（HE）和零知识证明（ZKP）等密码学应用中。高位宽操作对于增强安全性至关重要；然而，由于需要大量的模块化操作，它们的计算量很大。基于查找表（基于 LUT）的方法是一种“空间换时间”技术，通过将输入数字分段为更小的位组、预先计算每个分段的模块化缩减结果并将这些结果存储在 LUT 中来减少计算负载。该方法虽然有效，但由于大量使用 LUT，会产生大量硬件开销。在本文中，我们介绍了 ALLMod，这是一种通过采用混合工作负载来提高基于 LUT 的大量模块化缩减的面积效率的新颖方法。受迭代方法的启发，ALLMod 将位组分成两个不同的工作负载，在不影响吞吐量的情况下实现较低的面积成本。我们首先开发一个模板来促进工作负载分配并确保平衡分配。然后，我们进行设计空间探索，以评估融合工作负载结果的最佳时机，使我们能够在特定约束下确定最有效的设计。广泛的评估表明，对于位宽为 128 和 8,192 的情况，ALLMod 与基于 LUT 的传统方法相比，面积效率分别提高了 $\lt support\gt1\lt/sup\gt|.65 \times$ 和 $3 \times$。

items.title: CIM-BLAS: Computing-in-Memory Accelerator for BLAS.
items.abstract: Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS) is a foundational software library for linear algebra kernels, which is widely used in scientific and engineering computing. Existing BLAS accelerations mainly rely on CPUs and GPUs. Many operations in BLAS are data intensive, so they are constrained by the limited memory bandwidth of CPUs and GPUs. The computing-in-memory (CIM) technology can effectively alleviate the memory wall bottleneck and is particularly suitable for accelerating BLAS. In this paper, we propose the first CIM accelerator for BLAS, CIM-BLAS, based on non-volatile memory. CIM-BLAS includes a unified floating-point pipeline to support high-precision arithmetics. High efficiency of the accelerator is achieved by developing configurable data flows to support various BLAS functions. Compared with GPU implementations, CIMBLAS demonstrates several orders of magnitude performance and energy efficiency improvements for executing level-1 and level-2 BLAS functions, and can achieve an energy efficiency improvement of 2.6-24.1 $\times$ for executing level-3 BLAS functions. The improvement increases with the size of the matrix, indicating excellent scalability of CIM-BLAS. Application-level evaluations also demonstrate the potential of CIM for accelerating BLAS.
items.abstract_zh: 基本线性代数子程序 (BLAS) 是线性代数核的基础软件库，广泛应用于科学和工程计算。现有的BLAS加速主要依赖CPU和GPU。 BLAS 中的许多操作都是数据密集型的，因此它们受到 CPU 和 GPU 有限的内存带宽的限制。内存计算（CIM）技术可以有效缓解内存墙瓶颈，特别适合加速BLAS。在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于非易失性存储器的 BLAS CIM 加速器 CIM-BLAS。 CIM-BLAS 包括一个统一的浮点管道来支持高精度算术。通过开发可配置的数据流来支持各种 BLAS 功能，可以实现加速器的高效率。与 GPU 实现相比，CIMBLAS 在执行 1 级和 2 级 BLAS 函数时表现出几个数量级的性能和能效改进，并且在执行 3 级 BLAS 函数时可以实现 2.6-24.1 $\times$ 的能效改进。改进随着矩阵的大小而增加，表明 CIM-BLAS 具有出色的可扩展性。应用程序级评估还证明了 CIM 加速 BLAS 的潜力。

items.title: ClusterKV: Manipulating LLM KV Cache in Semantic Space for Recallable Compression.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely deployed in a variety of applications, and the context length is rapidly increasing to handle tasks such as long-document QA and complex logical reasoning. However, long context poses significant challenges for inference efficiency, including high memory costs of key-value (KV) cache and increased latency due to extensive memory accesses. Recent works have proposed compressing KV cache to approximate computation, but these methods either evict tokens permanently, never recalling them for later inference, or recall previous tokens at the granularity of pages divided by textual positions. Both approaches degrade the model accuracy and output quality. To achieve efficient and accurate recallable KV cache compression, we introduce ClusterKV, which recalls tokens at the granularity of semantic clusters. We design and implement efficient algorithms and systems for clustering, selection, indexing and caching. Experiment results show that ClusterKV attains negligible accuracy loss across various tasks with 32 k context lengths, using only a 1 k to 2 k KV cache budget, and achieves up to a $2 \times$ speedup in latency and a $2.5 \times$ improvement in decoding throughput. Compared to SoTA recallable KV compression methods, ClusterKV demonstrates higher model accuracy and output quality, while maintaining or exceeding inference efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/ClusterKV.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）已广泛部署在各种应用中，并且上下文长度正在迅速增加，以处理长文档 QA 和复杂逻辑推理等任务。然而，长上下文对推理效率提出了重大挑战，包括键值 (KV) 缓存的高内存成本以及由于大量内存访问而导致的延迟增加。最近的工作提出了压缩 KV 缓存以近似计算，但这些方法要么永久地逐出令牌，从不召回它们以供以后的推理，要么以按文本位置划分的页面粒度召回先前的令牌。这两种方法都会降低模型的准确性和输出质量。为了实现高效、准确的可召回 KV 缓存压缩，我们引入了 ClusterKV，它以语义簇的粒度召回 token。我们设计并实现高效的聚类、选择、索引和缓存算法和系统。实验结果表明，ClusterKV 仅使用 1 k 到 2 k KV 缓存预算，在 32 k 上下文长度的各种任务中实现了可忽略不计的精度损失，并实现了高达 2 美元的延迟加速和 2.5 美元的解码吞吐量改进。与 SoTA 可调用 KV 压缩方法相比，ClusterKV 表现出更高的模型精度和输出质量，同时保持或超过推理效率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/ClusterKV 获取。

items.title: DROIDFUZZ: Proprietary Driver Fuzzing for Embedded Android Devices.
items.abstract: Embedded Android Devices have proliferated in many security-critical embedded scenarios, requiring sufficient testing to root out vulnerabilities. Due to Android’s architecture, which uses a Hardware ion Layer (HAL) for vendor-specific driver implementations, traditional kernel testing techniques cannot detect such bugs within the actual driver logic, which are commonly proprietary and vendorspecific. In this paper, we propose DroidFuzz, an embedded Android system fuzzer that targets such vendor-specific driver implementations to find such bugs. Through leveraging pre-testing HAL driver probing, kernel-user relational payload generation, and cross-boundary execution state feedback, we effectively test the proprietary drivers in both the kernel and the HAL layer. We implemented DroidFuzz and evaluated its effectiveness on 7 embedded Android devices, and found 12 security-critical previously unknown bugs, all of which have been confirmed by the respective vendors.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式 Android 设备在许多安全关键型嵌入式场景中激增，需要充分的测试来根除漏洞。由于 Android 的架构使用硬件离子层 (HAL) 来实现特定于供应商的驱动程序，因此传统的内核测试技术无法检测实际驱动程序逻辑中的此类错误，这些错误通常是专有的和特定于供应商的。在本文中，我们提出了 DroidFuzz，这是一种嵌入式 Android 系统模糊器，它针对此类特定于供应商的驱动程序实现来查找此类错误。通过利用预测试 HAL 驱动程序探测、内核-用户关系有效负载生成和跨边界执行状态反馈，我们有效地测试了内核和 HAL 层中的专有驱动程序。我们实施了 DroidFuzz 并在 7 款嵌入式 Android 设备上评估了其有效性，发现了 12 个以前未知的安全关键漏洞，所有这些漏洞均已得到各自供应商的确认。

items.title: Efficient Weight Mapping and Resource Scheduling on Crossbar-based Multi-core CIM Systems.
items.abstract: Crossbar-based computing-in-memory (CIM) systems facilitate large-scale parallel multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operations, while a domain-specific compiler (DSC) plays a pivotal role in optimizing the deployment of neural network algorithms on such systems. With the development of multi-core and large-core architectures, some key compiler problems such as high parallel processing, resource utilization, and crossbar array assignment methods have not been solved. For low-latency application scenarios, we have designed a resource scheduling strategy for our hardware system based on stream data processing to reduce the latency caused by intra-core and intercore communication. Additionally, a weight mapping strategy has been developed to maximize the potential of crossbar arrays in convolutional neural networks (CNNs) deployment. Experimental results on our multi-core eFlash-based CIM system-on-chip (SoC) demonstrate that these two technologies help CNNs achieve a 76% reduction in latency, a 30% improvement in resource utilization, and the use rate of crossbar array that can reach up to 94.7%.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Crossbar 的内存计算 (CIM) 系统有利于大规模并行乘法累加 (MAC) 操作，而特定领域编译器 (DSC) 在优化此类系统上神经网络算法的部署方面发挥着关键作用。随着多核和大核架构的发展，一些关键的编译器问题，如高并行处理、资源利用率、交叉数组分配方法等尚未得到解决。针对低延迟的应用场景，我们为硬件系统设计了基于流数据处理的资源调度策略，以减少核内和核间通信带来的延迟。此外，还开发了权重映射策略，以最大限度地发挥交叉阵列在卷积神经网络 (CNN) 部署中的潜力。在我们基于eFlash的多核CIM片上系统（SoC）上的实验结果表明，这两种技术帮助CNN实现了76%的延迟降低、30%的资源利用率提升，并且Crossbar阵列的使用率可以达到94.7%。

items.title: Identifying System-on-Chip Security Assets with Structure-Based Analysis.
items.abstract: In the evolving field of hardware design, ensuring the security of System-on-Chips (SoCs) has become increasingly vital. As SoCs grow in complexity, integrating components from various sources, the identification and protection of security assets are crucial to prevent vulnerabilities. Traditional methods of identifying these assets are manual and time-intensive. To address this challenge, automated tools for security asset identification are essential, enabling faster and more accurate detection of critical assets early in the design process. In this paper, we propose a framework for the automated identification of security assets within SoCs. By transforming register-transfer level (RTL) code into graphs and leveraging deep neural networks (DNNs) to classify assets based on their structural patterns, our approach can effectively differentiate between security and non-security assets. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves high classification accuracy, with the model reaching up to 99% accuracy in identifying security assets, significantly reducing the need for manual intervention.
items.abstract_zh: 在不断发展的硬件设计领域，确保片上系统 (SoC) 的安全性变得越来越重要。随着 SoC 的复杂性不断增加，集成来自不同来源的组件，安全资产的识别和保护对于防止漏洞至关重要。识别这些资产的传统方法是手动且耗时的。为了应对这一挑战，用于安全资产识别的自动化工具至关重要，可以在设计过程的早期更快、更准确地检测关键资产。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于自动识别 SoC 内安全资产的框架。通过将寄存器传输级（RTL）代码转换为图形，并利用深度神经网络（DNN）根据资产的结构模式对资产进行分类，我们的方法可以有效地区分安全资产和非安全资产。实验结果表明，该方法实现了较高的分类准确率，模型识别安全资产的准确率高达99%，显着减少了人工干预的需要。

items.title: SynCircuit: Automated Generation of New Synthetic RTL Circuits Can Enable Big Data in Circuits.
items.abstract: In recent years, AI-assisted IC design methods have demonstrated great potential, but the availability of circuit design data is extremely limited, especially in the public domain. The lack of circuit data has become the primary bottleneck in developing AI-assisted IC design methods. In this work, we make the first attempt, SynCircuit, to generate new synthetic circuits with valid functionalities in the HDL format.SynCircuit automatically generates synthetic data using a framework with three innovative steps: 1) We propose a customized diffusion-based generative model to resolve the Directed Cyclic Graph (DCG) generation task, which has not been well explored in the AI community. 2) To ensure our circuit is valid, we enforce the circuit constraints by refining the initial graph generation outputs. 3) The Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) method further optimizes the logic redundancy in the generated graph. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SynCircuit can generate more realistic synthetic circuits and enhance ML model performance in downstream circuit design tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能辅助IC设计方法展现出了巨大的潜力，但电路设计数据的可用性极其有限，尤其是在公共领域。电路数据的缺乏已成为开发人工智能辅助IC设计方法的主要瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试 SynCircuit，以 HDL 格式生成具有有效功能的新合成电路。SynCircuit 使用具有三个创新步骤的框架自动生成合成数据：1）我们提出了一种定制的基于扩散的生成模型来解决有向循环图（DCG）生成任务，该任务在 AI 社区中尚未得到很好的探索。 2）为了确保我们的电路有效，我们通过细化初始图生成输出来强制电路约束。 3）蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）方法进一步优化了生成图中的逻辑冗余。实验结果表明，我们提出的 SynCircuit 可以生成更真实的合成电路，并增强下游电路设计任务中的 ML 模型性能。

items.title: UPVSS: Jointly Managing Vector Similarity Search with Near-Memory Processing Systems.
items.abstract: Vector similarity search plays a pivotal role in modern applications, including recommendation systems, image search, large language models (LLMs), and high-dimensional data retrieval. As data size scales, our research reveals that the search phase imposes substantial demands on DRAM bandwidth, leading to performance limitations in conventional von Neumann architecture with shared memory buses. This data movement bottleneck restricts the efficiency and scalability of vector similarity search due to insufficient memory bandwidth. To mitigate this issue, we leverage UPMEM, an off-the-shelf near-memory processing (NMP) system, to minimize the data movement between memory and compute units. However, UPMEM’s computing engine has certain limitations and requires thorough application integration to unleash its high-parallelism capabilities. In this work, we introduce UPMEM-aware Vector Similarity Search (UPVSS), an architecture-aware system that jointly manages vector similarity search and UPMEM’s NMP technology. UPVSS prioritizes offloading operations based on their strengths and capabilities, effectively alleviating the data movement bottleneck and improving overall system performance.
items.abstract_zh: 矢量相似性搜索在现代应用中发挥着关键作用，包括推荐系统、图像搜索、大语言模型（LLM）和高维数据检索。随着数据规模的扩大，我们的研究表明，搜索阶段对 DRAM 带宽提出了很高的要求，导致具有共享内存总线的传统冯诺依曼架构的性能限制。由于内存带宽不足，这种数据移动瓶颈限制了向量相似性搜索的效率和可扩展性。为了缓解这个问题，我们利用 UPMEM（一种现成的近内存处理 (NMP) 系统）来最大程度地减少内存和计算单元之间的数据移动。然而，UPMEM的计算引擎有一定的局限性，需要彻底的应用集成才能发挥其高并行能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 UPMEM 感知向量相似性搜索 (UPVSS)，这是一种架构感知系统，可联合管理向量相似性搜索和 UPMEM 的 NMP 技术。 UPVSS根据卸载操作的优势和能力确定优先级，有效缓解数据移动瓶颈，提高系统整体性能。

items.title: MIRACLE: Multimodal Information Retrieval via a Combined In-Memory Processing and Content Addressable Memory Approach.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement of information technology has brought multimodal information retrieval into the research spotlight. Neural networks, particularly Transformers, have emerged as the dominant solution for extracting multimodal feature vectors. While neural network acceleration has been extensively explored, the subsequent retrieval stage in multimodal scenarios remains under-optimized. Conventional retrieval approaches, such as cosine similarity sorting on von Neumann architectures, suffer from significant data migration and computational inefficiencies. Hashing methods enhance storage and computation efficiency but encounter challenges in energy-efficient implementation and mitigating accuracy losses due to modal heterogeneity. This paper presents a hybrid architecture that integrates in-memory processing (PIM) and content-addressable memory (CAM) to address these challenges. Transformer-extracted features are processed via in-memory random hashing leveraging device-intrinsic properties, with CAM facilitating parallel search space reduction. A final cosine similarity reranking stage refines the results while balancing accuracy with energy efficiency. Experimental evaluations validate that the proposed method, when compared to the baseline traditional CPU-based cosine similarity retrieval, 1) achieves almost identical level of accuracy, dramatically outperforming other pure CAMbased Hamming distance retrieval approaches; and 2) reduces latency by $9.45 \times$ and energy consumption by $30.20 \times$.
items.abstract_zh: 信息技术的快速进步使多模态信息检索成为研究热点。神经网络，特别是 Transformer，已成为提取多模态特征向量的主要解决方案。虽然神经网络加速已被广泛探索，但多模态场景中的后续检索阶段仍然没有得到优化。传统的检索方法（例如冯·诺依曼架构上的余弦相似度排序）存在严重的数据迁移和计算效率低下的问题。哈希方法提高了存储和计算效率，但在节能实施和减轻模态异构性造成的精度损失方面遇到了挑战。本文提出了一种集成内存处理（PIM）和内容寻址存储器（CAM）的混合架构来应对这些挑战。 Transformer 提取的特征通过内存中的随机散列处理，利用设备固有的属性，并且 CAM 有助于减少并行搜索空间。最终的余弦相似度重新排序阶段会细化结果，同时平衡准确性和能源效率。实验评估验证了所提出的方法与传统的基于 CPU 的余弦相似性检索的基线相比，1）达到了几乎相同的精度水平，显着优于其他纯基于 CAM 的汉明距离检索方法； 2) 将延迟减少 9.45 美元，能耗减少 30.20 美元。

items.title: Ensembler: Protect Collaborative Inference Privacy from Model Inversion Attack via Selective Ensemble.
items.abstract: For collaborative inference through a cloud computing platform, it is sometimes essential for the client to shield its sensitive information from the cloud provider. In this paper, we introduce Ensembler, an extensible framework designed to substantially increase the difficulty of conducting model inversion attacks by adversarial parties. Ensembler leverages selective model ensemble on the adversarial server to obfuscate the reconstruction of the client’s private information. Our experiments demonstrate that Ensembler can effectively shield input images from reconstruction attacks, even when the client only retains one layer of the network locally. Ensembler significantly outperforms baseline methods by up to $\mathbf{4 3. 5 \%}$ in structural similarity while only incurring 4.8% time overhead during inference.
items.abstract_zh: 对于通过云计算平台进行协作推理，客户端有时必须向云提供商屏蔽其敏感信息。在本文中，我们介绍了 Ensembler，这是一个可扩展的框架，旨在大幅增加对手进行模型反转攻击的难度。 Ensembler 利用对抗服务器上的选择性模型集成来混淆客户端私人信息的重建。我们的实验表明，即使客户端在本地仅保留一层网络，Ensembler 也可以有效地保护输入图像免受重建攻击。 Ensembler 在结构相似性方面明显优于基线方法高达 $\mathbf{4 3. 5 \%}$，而在推理过程中仅产生 4.8% 的时间开销。

items.title: Simulation-based Parallel Sweeping: A New Perspective on Combinational Equivalence Checking.
items.abstract: Combinational equivalence checking (CEC) is a fundamental task in the realization of digital designs which is unlikely to have universally efficient algorithms due to its co-NP-completeness. Recent researches of CEC have been focusing on SAT sweeping. This paper provides a new perspective other than SAT for tackling CEC, namely exhaustive simulation, and presents a simulation-based CEC engine constructed with fast GPU-parallel algorithms. The proposed engine can solve 4 out of the 9 large cases in the experiments on its own, with up to $88.11 \times$ speed-up compared with the checker in ABC. Moreover, a combination of the proposed engine with the ABC checker achieves averaged accelerations of $4.89 \times$ and $4.88 \times$ over the standalone ABC checker and a commercial checker, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 组合等价检查（CEC）是实现数字设计的一项基本任务，由于其 co-NP 完整性，不太可能具有普遍有效的算法。 CEC最近的研究重点是SAT扫除。本文提供了除 SAT 之外解决 CEC 的新视角，即穷举仿真，并提出了一种采用快速 GPU 并行算法构建的基于仿真的 CEC 引擎。所提出的引擎可以自行解决实验中 9 个大型案例中的 4 个，与 ABC 中的检查器相比，速度提升高达 88.11 美元 × 美元。此外，与独立的 ABC 检查器和商业检查器相比，所提出的引擎与 ABC 检查器的组合分别实现了 4.89 美元和 4.88 美元的平均加速度。

items.title: BLOOM: Bit-Slice Framework for DNN Acceleration with Mixed-Precision.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have revolutionized numerous AI applications, but their vast model sizes and limited hardware resources present significant deployment challenges. Model quantization offers a promising solution to bridge the gap between DNN size and hardware capacity. While INT8 quantization has been widely used, recent research has pushed for even lower precision, such as INT4. However, the presence of outliers-values with unusually large magnitudes-limits the effectiveness of current quantization techniques. Previous compression-based acceleration methods that incorporate outlieraware encoding introduce complex logic. A critical issue we have identified is that serialization and deserialization dominate the encoding/decoding time in these compression workflows, leading to substantial performance penalties during workflow execution. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel computing approach and a compatible architecture design named “BLOOM”. BLOOM leverages the strengths of the “bit-slicing” method, effectively combining structured mixed-precision and bit-level sparsity with adaptive dataflow techniques. The key insight of BLOOM is that outliers require higher precision, while normal values can be processed at lower precision. By interleaving 4-bit values, we efficiently exploit the inherent sparsity in the highprecision components. As a result, the BLOOM-based accelerator outperforms the existing outlier-aware accelerators by an average $1.2 \sim 4.0 \times$ speedup and $24.6 \% \sim 71.3 \%$ energy reduction, respectively, without model accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 彻底改变了众多人工智能应用，但其庞大的模型规模和有限的硬件资源带来了巨大的部署挑战。模型量化提供了一种很有前途的解决方案，可以弥补 DNN 大小和硬件容量之间的差距。虽然 INT8 量化已被广泛使用，但最近的研究推动了更低的精度，例如 INT4。然而，异常值（具有异常大的幅度的值）的存在限制了当前量化技术的有效性。以前基于压缩的加速方法结合了异常值编码，引入了复杂的逻辑。我们发现的一个关键问题是序列化和反序列化主导了这些压缩工作流程中的编码/解码时间，导致工作流程执行期间的性能大幅下降。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的计算方法和名为“BLOOM”的兼容架构设计。 BLOOM 利用“位切片”方法的优势，有效地将结构化混合精度和位级稀疏性与自适应数据流技术相结合。 BLOOM 的关键见解是异常值需要更高的精度，而正常值可以以较低的精度进行处理。通过交织 4 位值，我们有效地利用了高精度组件中固有的稀疏性。因此，基于 BLOOM 的加速器的性能优于现有的异常值感知加速器，分别平均加速 $1.2 \sim 4.0 \times$ 和减少 $24.6 \% \sim 71.3 \%$ 能量，且没有模型精度损失。

items.title: Gem5-AcceSys: Enabling System-Level Exploration of Standard Interconnects for Novel Accelerators.
items.abstract: The growing demand for efficient, high-performance processing in machine learning (ML) and image processing has made hardware accelerators, such as GPUs and Data Streaming Accelerators (DSAs), increasingly essential. These accelerators enhance ML and image processing tasks by offloading computation from the CPU to dedicated hardware. These accelerators rely on interconnects for efficient data transfer, making interconnect design crucial for system-level performance. This paper introduces Gem5-AcceSys, an innovative framework for system-level exploration of standard interconnects and configurable memory hierarchies. Using a matrix multiplication accelerator tailored for transformer workloads as a case study, we evaluate PCIe performance across diverse memory types (DDR4, DDR5, GDDR6, HBM2) and configurations, including host-side and device-side memory. Our findings demonstrate that optimized interconnects can achieve up to $80 \%$ of device-side memory performance and, in some scenarios, even surpass it. These results offer actionable insights for system architects, enabling a balanced approach to performance and cost in next-generation accelerator design.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 和图像处理领域对高效、高性能处理的需求不断增长，使得 GPU 和数据流加速器 (DSA) 等硬件加速器变得越来越重要。这些加速器通过将计算从 CPU 卸载到专用硬件来增强机器学习和图像处理任务。这些加速器依靠互连来实现高效的数据传输，因此互连设计对于系统级性能至关重要。本文介绍了 Gem5-AcceSys，这是一种用于系统级探索标准互连和可配置内存层次结构的创新框架。我们以专为变压器工作负载定制的矩阵乘法加速器作为案例研究，评估了不同内存类型（DDR4、DDR5、GDDR6、HBM2）和配置（包括主机端和设备端内存）的 PCIe 性能。我们的研究结果表明，优化的互连可以实现高达 80 \%$ 的设备端内存性能，在某些情况下，甚至超过它。这些结果为系统架构师提供了可行的见解，从而在下一代加速器设计中实现性能和成本的平衡方法。

items.title: Hardware-Software Co-design for Distributed Quantum Computing.
items.abstract: Distributed quantum computing (DQC) offers a pathway for scaling up quantum computing architectures beyond the confines of a single chip. Entanglement is a crucial resource for implementing nonlocal operations in DQC, and it is required to allow teleportation of quantum states and gates. Remote entanglement generation in practical systems is probabilistic, has longer duration than that of local operations, and is nondeterministic. Therefore, optimizing the performance of probabilistic remote entanglement generation is critically important for the performance of DQC architectures. In this paper we propose and study a new DQC architecture that combines (1) buffering of successfully generated entanglement, (2) asynchronously attempted entanglement generation, and (3) adaptive scheduling of remote gates based on the entanglement generation pattern. We show that our hardware-software co-design improves both the runtime and the output fidelity under a realistic model of DQC.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式量子计算 (DQC) 提供了一种突破单芯片限制的量子计算架构扩展途径。纠缠是在 DQC 中实现非定域操作的重要资源，并且需要它来允许量子态和门的隐形传输。实际系统中的远程纠缠生成是概率性的，比本地操作的持续时间更长，并且是不确定的。因此，优化概率远程纠缠生成的性能对于 DQC 架构的性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出并研究了一种新的 DQC 架构，该架构结合了（1）成功生成纠缠的缓冲，（2）异步尝试纠缠生成，以及（3）基于纠缠生成模式的远程门的自适应调度。我们展示了我们的硬件-软件协同设计在 DQC 的现实模型下提高了运行时间和输出保真度。

items.title: AcclMT: A Highly Resource-Efficient and Flexible Poseidon Hash-Based Merkle Tree Architecture.
items.abstract: Merkle Tree is a fundamental cryptographic primitive in Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) protocols, sharing significant computational workloads with the Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) in zkSTARK schemes. Merkle Tree is a tree structure where nodes are primarily generated through hash computations. Among them, Poseidon Hash, as a ZK-friendly hash function, has emerged as one of the most widely adopted choices. Therefore, hardware acceleration of building Merkle Tree based on Poseidon Hash can significantly enhance the performance of ZKP protocols. We propose AcclMT, a highly resourceefficient and flexible Poseidon Hash-based Merkle Tree architecture.
