Our design employs hardware-software co-design and optimizes the hashing data flow, resulting in an area-efficient Poseidon Hash engine that improves modular multiplication resource utilization. Furthermore, AcclMT uses these engines alongside hierarchical on-chip cache and optimized task scheduling for building large Merkle Trees. It also supports flexible parameter configurations for various requirements. Experimental results show that our proposed Poseidon Hash engine achieves a $14.3 \times$ speedup compared to the latest FPGA-based work. By improving resource utilization, it also reduces area usage by 14.8% compared to unoptimized design. AcclMT achieves up to $1665 \times$ speedup over software implementations in building Merkle tree, with average utilization of 95.9% and 99.2% for the two hash engines.
items.abstract_zh: Merkle Tree 是零知识证明 (ZKP) 协议中的基本加密原语，与 zkSTARK 方案中的数论变换 (NTT) 共享大量的计算工作负载。 Merkle Tree 是一种树结构，其中节点主要通过哈希计算生成。其中，Poseidon Hash作为ZK友好的哈希函数，已成为最广泛采用的选择之一。因此，基于Poseidon Hash构建Merkle Tree的硬件加速可以显着提升ZKP协议的性能。我们提出了 AcclMT，一种高度资源效率且灵活的基于波塞冬哈希的 Merkle Tree 架构。我们的设计采用硬件-软件协同设计并优化散列数据流，从而形成区域高效的 Poseidon 散列引擎，从而提高模乘资源利用率。此外，AcclMT 使用这些引擎以及分层片上缓存和优化的任务调度来构建大型 Merkle 树。它还支持灵活的参数配置，满足各种需求。实验结果表明，与最新的基于 FPGA 的工作相比，我们提出的 Poseidon 哈希引擎实现了 14.3 美元的加速。通过提高资源利用率，与未优化设计相比，还减少了 14.8% 的面积使用。 AcclMT 在构建 Merkle 树方面比软件实现实现了高达 1665 美元的加速，两个哈希引擎的平均利用率分别为 95.9% 和 99.2%。

items.title: Adora Compiler: End-to-End Optimization for High-Efficiency Dataflow Acceleration and Task Pipelining on CGRAs.
items.abstract: To fully harness emerging computing architectures, compilers must provide intuitive input handling alongside powerful code optimization to unlock maximum performance. Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) — highly energy-efficient for nested-loop applications — have lacked a compiler capable of meeting these objectives. This paper introduces the Adora compiler [1], which effectively bridges user-friendly, lightweight coding inputs with high-performance acceleration on the CGRA SoC. Adora utilizes CGRA-target loop transformations to achieve efficient data-flow level execution while optimizing data communication and task pipelining at the task-flow level. Additionally, it incorporates a comprehensive automated algorithm with a thoughtfully designed optimization sequence. A series of comprehensive experiments highlights the exceptional efficiency and scalability of the Adora compiler, demonstrating its transformative impact in leveraging CGRA capabilities for acceleration in edge computing.
items.abstract_zh: 为了充分利用新兴的计算架构，编译器必须提供直观的输入处理以及强大的代码优化，以释放最大的性能。粗粒度可重构数组（CGRA）——对于嵌套循环应用程序来说是高能效的——缺乏能够满足这些目标的编译器。本文介绍了 Adora 编译器 [1]，它有效地将用户友好的轻量级编码输入与 CGRA SoC 上的高性能加速连接起来。 Adora 利用 CGRA 目标循环转换来实现高效的数据流级执行，同时优化任务流级的数据通信和任务流水线。此外，它还结合了全面的自动化算法和精心设计的优化序列。一系列全面的实验凸显了 Adora 编译器卓越的效率和可扩展性，展示了其在利用 CGRA 功能加速边缘计算方面的变革性影响。

items.title: INSTA: An Ultra-Fast, Differentiable, Statistical Static Timing Analysis Engine for Industrial Physical Design Applications.
items.abstract: Prior GPU-accelerated Static Timing Analysis (GPU-STA) works all struggle to find industrial adoption, primarily because they aim to build standalone timing engines that can never emulate the proprietary delay models used in commercial tools. In this paper, we adopt a different philosophy by presenting INSTA, the first-ever differentiable, statistical GPU-STA engine that achieves unprecedented accuracy and scalability by a one-time initialization from any reference tool, bringing two transformative capabilities to Physical Design (PD): (1) rapid, high-fidelity timing analysis for incremental netlist update, and (2) gradient-based truly-global timing optimization at scale. Notably, INSTA demonstrates a near-perfect 0.999 correlation with an industryleading signoff tool on a 15 -million-pin design in a commercial 3 nm node with runtime under 0.1 seconds. Experimental results showcase INSTA’s capability through three PD applications: (1) serving as a fast evaluator in an industrial gate sizing flow, achieving $\mathbf{2 5 x}$ faster incremental update_timing runtime with almost no accuracy loss; (2) INSTA-Size, a gradient-based gate sizer that achieves up to $\mathbf{1 5 \%}$ better Total Negative Slack (TNS) than the reference signoff engine by sizing $68 \%$ fewer amount of cells; and (3) INSTA-Place, a differentiable timingdriven global placer that outperforms the state-of-the-art net-weighting placer by up to 16% in Half-Perimeter Wirelegnth (HPWL) and 59.4% in TNS on the ICCAD’15 benchmark [15].
items.abstract_zh: 之前的 GPU 加速静态时序分析 (GPU-STA) 都很难找到工业应用，主要是因为它们的目标是构建独立的时序引擎，而这些引擎永远无法模拟商业工具中使用的专有延迟模型。在本文中，我们采用了不同的理念，提出了 INSTA，这是第一个可微分的统计 GPU-STA 引擎，它通过任何参考工具的一次性初始化实现了前所未有的准确性和可扩展性，为物理设计 (PD) 带来了两种变革性功能：(1) 用于增量网表更新的快速、高保真时序分析，以及 (2) 基于梯度的真正大规模时序优化。值得注意的是，INSTA 在商业 3 nm 节点的 1500 万引脚设计上与行业领先的签核工具显示了近乎完美的 0.999 相关性，运行时间低于 0.1 秒。实验结果通过三个 PD 应用展示了 INSTA 的功能：(1) 在工业门选型流程中充当快速评估器，实现 $\mathbf{2 5 x}$ 更快的增量 update_timing 运行时间，几乎没有精度损失； (2) INSTA-Size，一种基于梯度的门调整器，通过减少 $68 \%$ 的单元数量，比参考签核引擎实现高达 $\mathbf{1 5 \%}$ 的总负裕度 (TNS)； (3) INSTA-Place，一种可微分时序驱动的全局布局器，在 ICCAD’15 基准上，其半周长线 (HPWL) 性能优于最先进的净加权布局器高达 16%，TNS 性能优于最先进的净加权布局器 59.4% [15]。

items.title: Versatile Cross-platform Compilation Toolchain for Schrödinger-style Quantum Circuit Simulation.
items.abstract: While existing quantum hardware resources have limited availability and reliability, there is a growing demand for exploring and verifying quantum algorithms. Efficient classical simulators for high-performance quantum simulation are critical to meeting this demand. However, due to the vastly varied characteristics of classical hardware, implementing hardware-specific optimizations for different hardware platforms is challenging. To address such needs, we propose CAST (Cross-platform Adaptive Schrödinger-style Simulation Toolchain), a novel compilation toolchain with cross-platform (CPU and Nvidia GPU) optimization and high-performance backend supports. CAST exploits a novel sparsity-aware gate fusion algorithm that automatically selects the best fusion strategy and backend configuration for targeted hardware platforms. CAST also aims to offer versatile and high-performance backend for different hardware platforms. To this end, CAST provides an LLVM IR-based vectorization optimization for various CPU architectures and instruction sets, and a PTX-based code generator for Nvidia GPU support. We benchmark CAST against IBM Qiskit, Google QSimCirq, Nvidia cuQuantum backend, and other high-performance simulators. On various 32-qubit CPU-based benchmarks, CAST achieves up to 8.03x speedup than Qiskit. On various 30-qubit GPU-based benchmarks, CAST achieves up to 39.3x speedup than Nvidia cuQuantum backend.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然现有量子硬件资源的可用性和可靠性有限，但探索和验证量子算法的需求不断增长。用于高性能量子模拟的高效经典模拟器对于满足这一需求至关重要。然而，由于经典硬件的特性千差万别，针对不同硬件平台实现特定于硬件的优化具有挑战性。为了满足这些需求，我们提出了 CAST（跨平台自适应薛定谔式模拟工具链），这是一种具有跨平台（CPU 和 Nvidia GPU）优化和高性能后端支持的新型编译工具链。 CAST 采用新颖的稀疏感知门融合算法，可自动为目标硬件平台选择最佳融合策略和后端配置。 CAST还旨在为不同的硬件平台提供多功能和高性能的后端。为此，CAST 为各种 CPU 架构和指令集提供了基于 LLVM IR 的矢量化优化，并为 Nvidia GPU 支持提供了基于 PTX 的代码生成器。我们针对 IBM Qiskit、Google QSimCirq、Nvidia cuQuantum 后端和其他高性能模拟器对 CAST 进行基准测试。在各种基于 32 量子位 CPU 的基准测试中，CAST 比 Qiskit 实现了高达 8.03 倍的加速。在各种基于 30 量子位 GPU 的基准测试中，CAST 比 Nvidia cuQuantum 后端实现了高达 39.3 倍的加速。

items.title: MambaOPU: An FPGA Overlay Processor for State-space-duality-based Mamba Models.
items.abstract: State-space models (SSMs), such as Mamba, have emerged as a promising alternative to Transformers. However, the recently developed Mamba2, based on state space duality (SSD), is highly memorybound and suffers from limited computation efficiency. This inefficiency arises from its irregular broadcast element-wise multiplications and structured sparse computations. In this work, we propose MambaOPU, an FPGA overlay processor, to accelerate SSD. First, to reduce memory overhead, we introduce a software-hardware co-optimized operator fusion framework. Specifically, operator merging combines adjacent broadcast multiplication and summation operations into a single descriptor, while operator backward shifting embeds segment multiplication into subsequent operations. Both techniques shorten the computation path and improve computation efficiency. Second, to enhance sparse computation efficiency, we skip zero-region computations using a tensor-reorder-and-group algorithm combined with a sparse-predefined data fetcher. Additionally, since Mamba integrates linear operations with SSD, we develop a reconfigurable systolic array to improve data reuse across different computation modes. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that MambaOPU achieves up to $1812 \times$ and $880.79 \times$ higher normalized throughput and up to $12908 \times$ and $24.27 \times$ higher energy efficiency over Intel Xeon Gold 6348 CPU and NVIDIA A100 GPU, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 状态空间模型 (SSM)，例如 Mamba，已成为 Transformer 的有前途的替代品。然而，最近开发的基于状态空间对偶性（SSD）的 Mamba2 受到高度内存限制，并且计算效率有限。这种低效率源于其不规则的广播逐元素乘法和结构化稀疏计算。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MambaOPU（一种 FPGA 叠加处理器）来加速 SSD。首先，为了减少内存开销，我们引入了软件-硬件协同优化的算子融合框架。具体来说，运算符合并将相邻的广播乘法和求和运算合并到单个描述符中，而运算符向后移位将段乘法嵌入到后续运算中。这两种技术都缩短了计算路径并提高了计算效率。其次，为了提高稀疏计算效率，我们使用张量重新排序和分组算法与稀疏预定义数据获取器相结合来跳过零区域计算。此外，由于 Mamba 将线性运算与 SSD 集成，我们开发了可重新配置的脉动阵列，以提高不同计算模式之间的数据重用。大量实验结果表明，与 Intel Xeon Gold 6348 CPU 和 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，MambaOPU 的归一化吞吐量分别提高了 1812 美元和 880.79 美元，能源效率分别提高了 12908 美元和 24.27 美元。

items.title: HeteroSVD: Efficient SVD Accelerator on Versal ACAP with Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
items.abstract: Singular value decomposition (SVD) is a matrix factorization technique widely used in signal processing and recommendation systems, etc. In general, the time complexity of SVD algorithms is cubic to the problem size, making SVD algorithms difficult to meet stringent performance requirements in real-time. However, existing FPGA and GPU solutions fall short of jointly optimizing latency, throughput, and power consumption. To settle this issue, this paper proposes HeteroSVD, a heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerator for SVD computation on the Versal ACAP platform. HeteroSVD introduces a system-level SVD decomposition mechanism and proposes an algorithm-hardware co-design method to optimize SVD ordering jointly and AI engine (AIE)-centric dataflow and placement with Versal. Furthermore, in order to improve the quality of results (QoR) and facilitate micro-architecture selection, we introduce an automatic optimization framework that performs accurate performance modeling and fast design space exploration. Experiment results demonstrate that HeteroSVD reduces the latency by $1.98 \times$ over existing FPGA accelerators and outperforms GPU solutions with an improvement of up to $7.22 \times$ in latency, $1.77 \times$ in throughput, and $13.18 \times$ in energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 奇异值分解（SVD）是一种广泛应用于信号处理、推荐系统等领域的矩阵分解技术。一般来说，SVD算法的时间复杂度与问题规模成三次方，使得SVD算法难以实时满足严格的性能要求。然而，现有的 FPGA 和 GPU 解决方案无法联合优化延迟、吞吐量和功耗。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 HeteroSVD，一种在 Versal ACAP 平台上用于 ​​SVD 计算的异构可重构加速器。 HeteroSVD 引入了系统级 SVD 分解机制，并提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计方法，以与 Versal 联合优化 SVD 排序以及以 AI 引擎 (AIE) 为中心的数据流和布局。此外，为了提高结果质量（QoR）并促进微架构选择，我们引入了自动优化框架，可以执行准确的性能建模和快速设计空间探索。实验结果表明，HeteroSVD 比现有 FPGA 加速器减少了 1.98 美元的延迟，并且优于 GPU 解决方案，延迟提高了 7.22 美元，吞吐量提高了 1.77 美元，能效提高了 13.18 美元。

items.title: Quorum: Zero-Training Unsupervised Anomaly Detection using Quantum Autoencoders.
items.abstract: Detecting mission-critical anomalous events and data is a crucial challenge across various industries, including finance, healthcare, and energy. Quantum computing has recently emerged as a powerful tool for tackling several machine learning tasks, but training quantum machine learning models remains challenging, particularly due to the difficulty of gradient calculation. The challenge is even greater for anomaly detection, where unsupervised learning methods are essential to ensure practical applicability. To address these issues, we propose Quorum, the first quantum anomaly detection framework designed for unsupervised learning that operates without requiring any training.
items.abstract_zh: 检测任务关键型异常事件和数据是各个行业（包括金融、医疗保健和能源）面临的重大挑战。量子计算最近已成为解决多种机器学习任务的强大工具，但训练量子机器学习模型仍然具有挑战性，特别是由于梯度计算的困难。异常检测面临的挑战更大，无监督学习方法对于确保实际适用性至关重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Quorum，这是第一个专为无监督学习而设计的量子异常检测框架，无需任何训练即可运行。

items.title: From Flatland to Forest: Exploring Pareto-optimal Design through RTL Hierarchy Trees.
items.abstract: The growing complexity of modern hardware has created vast design spaces that are difficult to explore efficiently. Current design space exploration (DSE) methods treat designs as flat parameter vectors, failing to leverage the rich structural information inherent in hardware architectures. This paper presents a novel RTL hierarchy aware approach to microarchitecture DSE that exploits the natural structure of hardware designs. We propose an RTL hierarchy aware kernel that enables direct comparison of RTL hierarchies, preserving their structural characteristics. Our method incorporates module importance derived from hierarchical synthesis reports through a weighted kernel extension. Additionally, we introduce a clustering method that leverages the proposed kernel to identify distinct architectural patterns, enabling efficient parallel evaluation. Experimental results and ablation studies on a Gemmini-based RISC-V SoC demonstrate the superiority of our approach.
items.abstract_zh: 现代硬件日益复杂，创造了巨大的设计空间，难以有效探索。当前的设计空间探索（DSE）方法将设计视为平面参数向量，未能利用硬件架构中固有的丰富结构信息。本文提出了一种新颖的 RTL 层次结构感知微体系结构 DSE 方法，该方法利用了硬件设计的自然结构。我们提出了一个 RTL 层次结构感知内核，可以直接比较 RTL 层次结构，保留其结构特征。我们的方法结合了通过加权内核扩展从分层综合报告中导出的模块重要性。此外，我们引入了一种聚类方法，利用所提出的内核来识别不同的架构模式，从而实现高效的并行评估。基于 Gemmini 的 RISC-V SoC 的实验结果和消融研究证明了我们方法的优越性。

items.title: Measurement-based uncomputation of quantum circuits for modular arithmetic.
items.abstract: Measurement-based uncomputation (MBU) is a technique used to perform probabilistic uncomputation of quantum circuits. We formalize this technique for the case of single-qubit registers, and we show applications to modular arithmetic. Using MBU, we reduce Toffoli count and depth by 10% to 15% for modular adders based on the architecture of [1], and by almost 25% for modular adders based on the architecture of [2]. Our results have the potential to improve other circuits for modular arithmetic, such as modular multiplication and modular exponentiation, and can find applications in quantum cryptanalysis.
items.abstract_zh: 基于测量的未计算（MBU）是一种用于执行量子电路概率未计算的技术。我们针对单量子位寄存器的情况形式化了这种技术，并展示了在模块化算术中的应用。使用 MBU，我们将基于 [1] 架构的模块化加法器的 Toffoli 数量和深度减少了 10% 到 15%，并且将基于 [2] 架构的模块化加法器的 Toffoli 数量和深度减少了近 25%。我们的结果有可能改进其他模运算电路，例如模乘和模幂，并且可以在量子密码分析中找到应用。

items.title: Optimizing windowed arithmetic for quantum attacks against RSA-2048.
items.abstract: Windowed arithmetic is a technique for reducing the cost of quantum arithmetic circuits with space-time trade-offs using memory queries to precomputed tables. It can reduce the asymptotic cost of modular exponentiation from $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$ to $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2} / \log ^{2} n\right)$ operations, resulting in the current state-of-the-art compilations of quantum attacks against modern cryptography. We introduce several optimizations to windowed arithmetic. Notably, we effect an approximate $50 \%$ reduction in the costs of uncomputing memory lookups in quantum factoring applications. We validate our optimizations by improving the gate count of quantum attacks against public-key cryptography by $1.5 \%$ to $3.4 \%$, depending on the key size. We also enable a $16 \%$ runtime reduction at the cost of a $12 \%$ increase in qubit count. Our techniques can be used to reduce the complexity of not only factoring algorithms but also a wide range of quantum algorithms that rely on windowed arithmetic.
items.abstract_zh: 窗口算术是一种通过使用内存查询预先计算表来进行时空权衡来降低量子算术电路成本的技术。它可以将模幂运算的渐近成本从 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$ 降低到 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2} / \log ^{2} n\right)$ 运算，从而产生针对现代密码学的当前最先进的量子攻击汇编。我们引入了对窗口算术的几种优化。值得注意的是，我们在量子因子分解应用程序中将不计算内存查找的成本降低了大约 50 \%$。我们通过将针对公钥加密的量子攻击的门数提高 1.5 美元到 3.4 美元来验证我们的优化，具体取决于密钥大小。我们还以量子比特数增加 12 \%$ 为代价，实现了 16 \%$ 运行时间减少。我们的技术不仅可用于降低因式分解算法的复杂性，还可用于降低依赖于窗口算术的各种量子算法的复杂性。

items.title: Tropical: Enhancing SLO Attainment in Disaggregated LLM Serving via SLO-Aware Multiplexing.
items.abstract: To guarantee service quality in transformer based large language model (LLM) serving, it is essential to meet the latency constraints of both the prefill phase (measured by Time-to-First-Token, TTFT) and the decode phase (measured by Time-per-Output-Token, TPOT). Non-disaggregated serving places prefill and decode on the same worker, while disaggregated serving places the prefill and decode on isolated workers. However, no single architecture excels in both TTFT and TPOT metrics. After conducting a root cause analysis, we concluded that in disaggregated LLM serving, prefill execution has minimal interference with decode execution but result in high queuing times. In contrast, non-disaggregated LLM serving effectively reduces queuing times but introduces significant interference between prefills and decodes. In order to leverage the best aspects of both non-disaggregated and disaggregated LLM serving, we have designed and implemented Tropical. Tropical introduces an sevice-level objectives (SLO)-aware multiplexing strategy that balances the queuing time and the interference, enabling the LLM serving to achieve high TTFT and TPOT SLOs simultaneously. Our evaluation of real-world datasets reveals that Tropical outperforms both state-of-the-art non-disaggregated and disaggregated LLM serving systems, achieving up to $2.09 \times$ more requests within a 90% SLO attainment. Specially, compared to the disaggregated LLM serving system, Tropical improves P90 TTFT performance by $9 \times$ with only an 15% reduction in P90 TPOT. Against the non-disaggregated LLM serving systems, Tropical delivers a $2.8 \times$ performance improvement in P90 TPOT while maintaining the same P90 TTFT.
items.abstract_zh: 为了保证基于 Transformer 的大语言模型 (LLM) 服务的服务质量，必须满足预填充阶段（通过首次令牌时间 (TTFT) 测量）和解码阶段（通过每个输出令牌时间 (TPOT) 测量）的延迟约束。非分类服务将预填充和解码放在同一个工作线程上，而分类服务将预填充和解码放在独立的工作线程上。然而，没有一种架构在 TTFT 和 TPOT 指标上都表现出色。在进行根本原因分析后，我们得出的结论是，在分解的 LLM 服务中，预填充执行对解码执行的干扰最小，但会导致排队时间较长。相比之下，非分解的 LLM 服务有效地减少了排队时间，但在预填充和解码之间引入了显着的干扰。为了充分利用非分类和分类 LLM 服务的最佳方面，我们设计并实施了 Tropical。 Tropical 引入了服务级目标 (SLO) 感知的复用策略，可平衡排队时间和干扰，使 LLM 服务能够同时实现高 TTFT 和 TPOT SLO。我们对现实世界数据集的评估表明，Tropical 的性能优于最先进的非分类和分类 LLM 服务系统，在 90% 的 SLO 实现范围内实现了高达 2.09 美元×$ 的请求。特别是，与分解的 LLM 服务系统相比，Tropical 将 P90 TTFT 性能提高了 9 美元，而 P90 TPOT 仅减少了 15%。与非分解的 LLM 服务系统相比，Tropical 在 P90 TPOT 中提供了 2.8 美元×$ 的性能改进，同时保持相同的 P90 TTFT。

items.title: FF-INT8: Efficient Forward-Forward DNN Training on Edge Devices with INT8 Precision.
items.abstract: Backpropagation has been the cornerstone of neural network training for decades, yet its inefficiencies in time and energy consumption limit its suitability for resource-constrained edge devices. While low-precision neural network quantization has been extensively researched to speed up model inference, its application in training has been less explored. Recently, the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm has emerged as a promising alternative to backpropagation, replacing the backward pass with an additional forward pass. By avoiding the need to store intermediate activations for backpropagation, FF can reduce memory footprint, making it well-suited for embedded devices. This paper presents an INT8 quantized training approach that leverages FF’s layer-by-layer strategy to stabilize gradient quantization. Furthermore, we propose a novel “look-ahead” scheme to address limitations of FF and improve model accuracy. Experiments conducted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano board demonstrate 4.6% faster training, 8.3% energy savings, and $\mathbf{2 7. 0 \%}$ reduction in memory usage, while maintaining competitive accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 几十年来，反向传播一直是神经网络训练的基石，但其时间和能耗效率低下限制了其对资源受限的边缘设备的适用性。虽然低精度神经网络量化已被广泛研究以加速模型推理，但其在训练中的应用却很少被探索。最近，前向-前向 (FF) 算法已成为反向传播的一种有前景的替代方案，用额外的前向传播代替后向传播。通过避免存储反向传播的中间激活，FF 可以减少内存占用，使其非常适合嵌入式设备。本文提出了一种 INT8 量化训练方法，利用 FF 的逐层策略来稳定梯度量化。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的“前瞻”方案来解决 FF 的局限性并提高模型准确性。在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 板上进行的实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，训练速度提高了 4.6%，节能 8.3%，内存使用量减少 $\mathbf{2 7. 0 \%}$，同时保持具有竞争力的准确性。

items.title: MiniWear: Minimizing Flash Wear via Hybrid Persistent Cache for Extended EF-SMR Lifetime.
items.abstract: As the huge discrepancy between traffic and capacity persists, the lifetime of flash in EF-SMR systems faces a grave issue. EF-SMR systems combine NAND flash with Shingled Magnetic Recording (SMR) disks to achieve both low cost and high performance. However, previous research has primarily focused on issues such as write amplification and tail-latency in EF-SMR disks, overlooking the critical issue of flash lifetime. Studying the durability of EF-SMR systems is essential for developing future high-performance, low-cost storage solutions.This paper presents MiniWear, a hybrid persistent cache (PC) design aimed at extending the lifetime of EF-SMR systems. MiniWear adopts a hybrid medium persistent cache and proposes a customized scheduling strategy to reduce flash wear without impacting the EF-SMR system performance. At the hardware level, the hybrid PC of EF-SMR, composed of flash and SMR disk, is organized into Flash-PC and SMR-PC. At the software level, a fine-grained scheduling strategy is proposed to better manage PC resources. Additionally, we introduce a proactive balancing strategy to address PC resource idleness. Experimental results show that, compared to existing methods, MiniWear can reduce flash wear by up to 66.67%.
items.abstract_zh: 由于流量和容量之间的巨大差异持续存在，EF-SMR系统中闪存的寿命面临着严重的问题。 EF-SMR 系统将 NAND 闪存与叠瓦式磁​​记录 (SMR) 磁盘相结合，实现低成本和高性能。然而，之前的研究主要集中在EF-SMR磁盘的写放大和尾延迟等问题上，而忽略了闪存寿命的关键问题。研究 EF-SMR 系统的耐用性对于开发未来的高性能、低成本存储解决方案至关重要。本文介绍了 MiniWear，这是一种混合持久性缓存 (PC) 设计，旨在延长 EF-SMR 系统的使用寿命。 MiniWear采用混合介质持久缓存，并提出定制的调度策略，以在不影响EF-SMR系统性能的情况下减少闪存磨损。在硬件层面，EF-SMR的混合PC由闪存和SMR磁盘组成，分为Flash-PC和SMR-PC。在软件层面，提出了细粒度的调度策略，以更好地管理PC资源。此外，我们引入了主动平衡策略来解决 PC 资源闲置问题。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，MiniWear可以减少飞边磨损高达66.67%。

items.title: LMM-IR: Large-Scale Netlist-Aware Multimodal Framework for Static IR-Drop Prediction.
items.abstract: Static IR drop analysis is a fundamental and critical task in the field of chip design. Nevertheless, this process can be quite time-consuming, potentially requiring several hours. Moreover, addressing IR drop violations frequently demands iterative analysis, thereby causing the computational burden. Therefore, fast and accurate IR drop prediction is vital for reducing the overall time invested in chip design. In this paper, we firstly propose a novel multimodal approach that efficiently processes SPICE files through large-scale netlist transformer (LNT). Our key innovation is representing and processing netlist topology as 3D point cloud representations, enabling efficient handling of netlist with up to hundreds of thousands to millions nodes. All types of data, including netlist files and image data, are encoded into latent space as features and fed into the model for static voltage drop prediction. This enables the integration of data from multiple modalities for complementary predictions. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve the best F1 score and the lowest MAE among the winning teams of the ICCAD 2023 contest and the state-of-theart algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 静态压降分析是芯片设计领域的一项基础且关键的任务。然而，这个过程可能非常耗时，可能需要几个小时。此外，解决 IR drop 违规问题经常需要迭代分析，从而造成计算负担。因此，快速、准确的 IR 压降预测对于减少芯片设计的总体时间投入至关重要。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的多模式方法，通过大规模网表转换器（LNT）有效地处理 SPICE 文件。我们的关键创新是将网表拓扑表示和处理为 3D 点云表示，从而能够有效处理多达数十万到数百万个节点的网表。所有类型的数据，包括网表文件和图像数据，都作为特征编码到潜在空间中，并输入到模型中以进行静态电压降预测。这使得能够整合来自多种模式的数据以进行补充预测。实验结果表明，我们提出的算法可以在 ICCAD 2023 竞赛的获胜团队和最先进的算法中获得最好的 F1 分数和最低的 MAE。

items.title: POLARIS: Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Mitigating Power Side-Channel Leakage.
items.abstract: Microelectronic systems are widely used in many sensitive applications (e.g., manufacturing, energy, defense). These systems increasingly handle sensitive data (e.g., encryption key) and are vulnerable to diverse threats, such as, power sidechannel attacks, which infer sensitive data through dynamic power profile. In this paper, we present a novel framework, POLARIS for mitigating power side channel leakage using an Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) guided masking approach. POLARIS uses an unsupervised process to automatically build a tailored training dataset and utilize it to train a masking model. The POLARIS framework outperforms state-of-the-art mitigation solutions (e.g., VALIANT) in terms of leakage reduction, execution time, and overhead across large designs.
items.abstract_zh: 微电子系统广泛应用于许多敏感应用（例如制造、能源、国防）。这些系统越来越多地处理敏感数据（例如加密密钥），并且容易受到各种威胁，例如电源侧信道攻击，这种攻击通过动态电源配置文件推断敏感数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 POLARIS，用于使用可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 引导屏蔽方法来减轻电源侧通道泄漏。 POLARIS 使用无监督流程自动构建定制的训练数据集，并利用它来训练掩蔽模型。 POLARIS 框架在减少泄漏、执行时间和大型设计的开销方面优于最先进的缓解解决方案（例如 VALIANT）。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Breaking Symmetry - Unconventional Placement of Analog Circuits using Multi-Level Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Layout-dependent effects (LDEs) significantly impact analog circuit performance. Traditionally, designers have relied on symmetric placement of circuit components to mitigate variations caused by LDEs. However, due to non-linear nature of these effects, conventional methods often fall short. We propose an objective-driven, multi-level, multi-agent Q-learning framework to explore unconventional design space of analog layout, opening new avenues for optimizing analog circuit performance. Our approach achieves better variation performance than the state-of-the-art layout techniques. Notably, this is the first application of multiagent RL in analog layout automation. The proposed approach is compared with non-ML approach based on simulated annealing.
items.abstract_zh: 布局相关效应 (LDE) 会显着影响模拟电路性能。传统上，设计人员依靠电路元件的对称放置来减轻 LDE 引起的变化。然而，由于这些效应的非线性性质，传统方法常常达不到要求。我们提出了一种目标驱动、多层次、多智能体 Q 学习框架，以探索模拟布局的非常规设计空间，为优化模拟电路性能开辟新途径。我们的方法比最先进的布局技术实现了更好的变化性能。值得注意的是，这是多智能体强化学习在模拟布局自动化中的首次应用。所提出的方法与基于模拟退火的非机器学习方法进行了比较。

items.title: CXL-INTERPLAY: Unraveling and Characterizing CXL Interference in Modern Computer Systems.
items.abstract: Compute Express Link (CXL) is a promising technology that addresses memory and storage challenges. Despite its advantages, CXL faces performance threats from external interference when coexisting with current memory and storage systems. This interference is under-explored in existing research. To address this, we develop CXL-Interplay, systematically characterizing and analyzing interference from memory and storage systems. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to characterize CXL interference on real CXL hardware. We also provide reverse-reasoning analysis with performance counters and kernel functions. In the end, we propose and evaluate mitigation solutions.
items.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link (CXL) 是一项很有前途的技术，可以解决内存和存储挑战。尽管有其优势，CXL 在与当前内存和存储系统共存时仍面临来自外部干扰的性能威胁。现有研究尚未充分探讨这种干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 CXL-Interplay，系统地表征和分析内存和存储系统的干扰。据我们所知，我们是第一个在真实 CXL 硬件上描述 CXL 干扰特征的人。我们还提供带有性能计数器和内核函数的逆向推理分析。最后，我们提出并评估缓解解决方案。

items.title: Easz: An Agile Transformer-based Image Compression Framework for Resource-constrained IoTs.
items.abstract: Neural image compression, necessary in various machine-to-machine communication scenarios, suffers from its heavy encode-decode structures and inflexibility in switching between different compression levels. Consequently, it raises significant challenges in applying the neural image compression to edge devices that are developed for powerful servers with high computational and storage capacities. We take a step to solve the challenges by proposing a new transformer-based edge-computefree image coding framework called Easz. Easz shifts the computational overhead to the server, and hence avoids the heavy encoding and model switching overhead on the edge. Easz utilizes a patch-erase algorithm to selectively remove image contents using a conditional uniform-based sampler. The erased pixels are reconstructed on the receiver side through a transformer-based framework. To further reduce the computational overhead on the receiver, we then introduce a lightweight transformer-based reconstruction structure to reduce the reconstruction load on the receiver side. Extensive evaluations conducted on a realworld testbed demonstrate multiple advantages of Easz over existing compression approaches, in terms of adaptability to different compression levels, computational efficiency, and image reconstruction quality.
items.abstract_zh: 神经图像压缩是各种机器对机器通信场景中必需的，但其编码解码结构繁重且在不同压缩级别之间切换不灵活。因此，将神经图像压缩应用于为具有高计算和存储能力的强大服务器开发的边缘设备提出了重大挑战。我们提出了一种名为 Easz 的新的基于 Transformer 的边缘计算免费图像编码框架来解决这些挑战。 Easz 将计算开销转移到服务器，从而避免了边缘的繁重编码和模型切换开销。 Easz 利用补丁擦除算法，使用基于条件均匀的采样器选择性地删除图像内容。擦除的像素通过基于变压器的框架在接收器侧重建。为了进一步减少接收器的计算开销，我们引入了一种轻量级的基于变压器的重建结构，以减少接收器侧的重建负载。在现实世界的测试平台上进行的广泛评估表明，Easz 相对于现有压缩方法在对不同压缩级别的适应性、计算效率和图像重建质量方面具有多种优势。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: On-the-Fly Hadamard Hypervector Processing for Efficient Hyperdimensional Computing.
items.abstract: Inspired by the human brain, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) processes information efficiently by operating in high-dimensional space using hypervectors. While previous works focus on optimizing pregenerated hypervectors in software, this study introduces a novel on-the-fly vector generation method in hardware with $O(1)$ complexity, compared to the $O(N)$ iterative search used in conventional approaches to find the best orthogonal hypervectors. Our approach leverages Hadamard binary coefficients and unary computing to simplify encoding into addition-only operations after the generation stage in ASIC, implemented using inmemory computing. The proposed design significantly improves accuracy and computational efficiency across multiple benchmark datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 受人脑的启发，超维计算 (HDC) 通过使用超向量在高维空间中运行来有效地处理信息。虽然之前的工作重点是在软件中优化预生成的超向量，但本研究引入了一种新颖的硬件即时向量生成方法，与传统方法中用于寻找最佳正交超向量的 $O(N)$ 迭代搜索相比，其复杂度为 $O(1)$。我们的方法利用 Hadamard 二进制系数和一元计算，在 ASIC 生成阶段之后将编码简化为仅加法运算，并使用内存计算实现。所提出的设计显着提高了多个基准数据集的准确性和计算效率。

items.title: An Enhanced Data Packing Method for General Matrix Multiplication in Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren Scheme.
items.abstract: General Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) stands as the most ubiquitous operation in machine learning applications. However, performing GEMM within Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is inefficient due to high computational demands and significant data migration constrained by limited bandwidth. Additionally, the inherent limitations of FHE schemes restrict the widespread application of machine learning, as standard activation functions are incompatible. This incompatibility necessitates alternative nonlinear functions, which lead to notable accuracy reductions. To address these challenges, we introduce a polynomial encoding methodology for GEMM under the Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren (BFV) scheme and extend the method to inference with packing inputs and weights for different sizes. Furthermore, we design specialized hardware to accelerate the inference process through optimized scheduling between the hardware and the host system. In experiments, we implemented our hardware on an FPGA U250 platform. Compared to existing solutions, our method achieves superior performance, achieving the highest $4.22 \times$ and $3.99 \times$ speedups on MNIST and CIFAR-10.
items.abstract_zh: 通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 是机器学习应用中最普遍的运算。然而，由于高计算需求和有限带宽限制的大量数据迁移，在完全同态加密 (FHE) 中执行 GEMM 效率低下。此外，FHE 方案的固有局限性限制了机器学习的广泛应用，因为标准激活函数不兼容。这种不兼容性需要替代的非线性函数，这会导致精度显着降低。为了应对这些挑战，我们在 Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren (BFV) 方案下引入了 GEMM 多项式编码方法，并将该方法扩展到不同大小的打包输入和权重的推理。此外，我们设计了专用硬件，通过硬件和主机系统之间的优化调度来加速推理过程。在实验中，我们在 FPGA U250 平台上实现了我们的硬件。与现有解决方案相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的性能，在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上实现了最高 4.22 美元和 3.99 美元的加速。

items.title: GLiTCH: GLiTCH induced Transitions for Secure Crypto-Hardware.
items.abstract: Conventionally, glitch reduction is well-studied in digital design to improve power, efficiency, and security. In contrast, this paper combines the addition and removal of glitches to minimize the power side-channel leakage. Glitch Manipulation is achieved through gate sizing-based arrival time control, which is cast as a Geometric Programming formulation. We develop a framework, GLiTCH, for glitch manipulation that is guided by functional and timing simulations. The framework is evaluated on popular cipher designs like AES, CLEFIA, and SM4. Our findings illustrate up to 52.82% improvement in the Guessing Entropy for a 38.74% area overhead on average across the evaluated ciphers.
items.abstract_zh: 传统上，数字设计中对减少故障进行了深入研究，以提高功耗、效率和安全性。相比之下，本文结合了毛刺的添加和消除，以最大限度地减少电源侧通道泄漏。毛刺操纵是通过基于门尺寸的到达时间控制来实现的，该控制被铸造为几何规划公式。我们开发了一个框架 GLiTCH，用于以功能和时序模拟为指导的故障处理。该框架在流行的密码设计（如 AES、CLEFIA 和 SM4）上进行评估。我们的研究结果表明，在评估的密码中，平均面积开销提高了 38.74%，猜测熵提高了 52.82%。

items.title: InterConFuzz: A Fuzzing-based Comprehensive NoC Verification Framework.
items.abstract: Security verification of Network-on-Chip (NoC) systems is essential due to their intricate and high-concurrency structures. Traditional methods often fail to cover all scenarios or scale effectively, leading to prolonged verification and overlooked vulnerabilities. Our proposed solution, InterConFuzz, a hybrid hardware fuzzing technique, uses symbolic execution for extensive coverage. Developed on Universal Verification Methodology (UVM), InterConFuzz discovered five security flaws in the NoC architecture of the OpenTitan SoC-surpassing existing techniques by three-while reducing memory and computational needs by 24.4% and 29.5%, respectively. Furthermore, InterConFuzz furnished comparable functional coverage compared to existing NoC fuzzing approaches, proving its efficiency and robustness.
items.abstract_zh: 由于片上网络（NoC）系统复杂且高并发的结构，其安全验证至关重要。传统方法往往无法覆盖所有场景或有效扩展，导致验证时间延长和漏洞被忽视。我们提出的解决方案 InterConFuzz 是一种混合硬件模糊技术，使用符号执行来实现广泛的覆盖范围。 InterConFuzz 基于通用验证方法 (UVM) 开发，在 OpenTitan SoC 的 NoC 架构中发现了 5 个安全缺陷，比现有技术高出 3 个，同时将内存和计算需求分别减少了 24.4% 和 29.5%。此外，与现有的 NoC 模糊方法相比，InterConFuzz 提供了可比的功能覆盖范围，证明了其效率和稳健性。

items.title: Replay4NCL: An Efficient Memory Replay-based Methodology for Neuromorphic Continual Learning in Embedded AI Systems.
items.abstract: Neuromorphic Continual Learning (NCL) paradigm leverages Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) to enable continual learning (CL) capabilities for AI systems to adapt to dynamically changing environments. Currently, the state-of-the-art employ a memory replay-based method to maintain the old knowledge. However, this technique relies on long timesteps and compressiondecompression steps, thereby incurring significant latency and energy overheads, which are not suitable for tightly-constrained embedded AI systems (e.g., mobile agents/robotics). To address this, we propose Replay4NCL, a novel efficient memory replaybased methodology for enabling NCL in embedded AI systems. Specifically, Replay4NCL compresses the latent data (old knowledge), then replays them during the NCL training phase with small timesteps, to minimize the processing latency and energy consumption. To compensate the information loss from reduced spikes, we adjust the neuron threshold potential and learning rate settings. Experimental results on the class-incremental scenario with the Spiking Heidelberg Digits (SHD) dataset show that Replay4NCL can preserve old knowledge with Top-1 accuracy of $\mathbf{9 0. 4 3 \%}$ compared to $\mathbf{8 6. 2 2 \%}$ from the state-of-the-art, while effectively learning new tasks, achieving 4.88x latency speed-up, $\mathbf{2 0 \%}$ latent memory saving, and 36.43% energy saving. These results highlight the potential of our Replay4NCL methodology to further advances NCL capabilities for embedded AI systems.
items.abstract_zh: 神经形态持续学习 (NCL) 范式利用尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 为 AI 系统提供持续学习 (CL) 功能，以适应动态变化的环境。目前，最先进的技术采用基于记忆重放的方法来维护旧知识。然而，该技术依赖于较长的时间步长和压缩解压步骤，从而产生显着的延迟和能量开销，这不适合严格约束的嵌入式人工智能系统（例如移动代理/机器人）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Replay4NCL，这是一种新型高效的基于内存重放的方法，用于在嵌入式 AI 系统中启用 NCL。具体来说，Replay4NCL 压缩潜在数据（旧知识），然后在 NCL 训练阶段以小时间步长重播它们，以最大限度地减少处理延迟和能耗。为了补偿尖峰减少造成的信息损失，我们调整神经元阈值电位和学习率设置。使用 Spiking Heidelberg Digits (SHD) 数据集在类增量场景上的实验结果表明，与最先进的 $\mathbf{8 6. 2 2 \%}$ 相比，Replay4NCL 可以以 $\mathbf{9 0. 4 3 \%}$ 的 Top-1 精度保留旧知识，同时有效地学习新任务，实现 4.88 倍的延迟加速， $\mathbf{2 0 \%}$ 潜在内存节省，节能 36.43%。这些结果凸显了我们的 Replay4NCL 方法在进一步提升嵌入式 AI 系统的 NCL 功能方面的潜力。

items.title: Multicore Environment State Representation for Agent-Directed Test Generation.
items.abstract: A crucial step in the design of multicore systems is to validate the interaction between cores. This involves test program generation and runtime analysis. We propose a novel reinforcement learning approach to directed test generation, where an agent induces a suite of programs, which are executed in a simulation environment for a multicore. It focuses on how to recover state information from raw observations of the environment such that the agent can learn from interaction how to improve coverage for any verification task. We evaluated our state representation for different verification tasks involving 16 and 32-core ARMv8 2-level MOESI designs.
items.abstract_zh: 多核系统设计中的一个关键步骤是验证内核之间的交互。这涉及到测试程序生成和运行时分析。我们提出了一种新颖的强化学习方法来生成定向测试，其中代理诱导一套程序，这些程序在多核模拟环境中执行。它侧重于如何从环境的原始观察中恢复状态信息，以便代理可以从交互中学习如何提高任何验证任务的覆盖范围。我们评估了涉及 16 核和 32 核 ARMv8 2 级 MOESI 设计的不同验证任务的状态表示。

items.title: "OOPS!": Out-Of-Band Remote Power Side-Channel Attacks on Intel SGX and TDX.
items.abstract: Prior work shows that remote power attacks on Intel processors are possible through two Model Specific Registers (MSRs): MSR_PKG_Energy_Status and MSR_PPO_Energy_Status. In response, Intel introduced a defense: a bit in MSR IA32_MISC_PACKAGE_CTLS allows users to enable/disable “filtering” mechanism that adds additional noise to energy measurements to harden against power side-channel attacks. In this work, we demonstrate that “filtering” does not cover all possible avenues of measuring power. On Intel server-grade platforms, components like out-of-band management interface (OOB) exist which also expose telemetric information like inband energy consumption. For this, we first reverse engineer the protocol structure over which OOB communicates with in-band components. We then show how OOB allows read-only access to the Package Configuration Space (PCS) and note that energy readings through PCS are outside the scope of filtering. Using this, we establish remote power side-channels on Intel SGX and TDX operational on Intel Sapphire Rapids. We first construct a synchronization mechanism to align in-band execution with out-of-band measurements by leveraging deliberately disabled MSRs. We then use energy readings through OOB PCS to recover 2048-bit RSA keys from MbedTLS operational within in-band Intel SGX (with generic single-stepping assumption). Finally, we also leak AESNI keys from within in-band Intel TDX (without any single-step assumption). Prior to our work, the literature on side-channels has been focused on attacks leveraging in-band interfaces. Our work establishes the importance of evaluating confidential computing architectures against attack vectors that combine abilities of both in-band and out-of-band interfaces to achieve adversarial objectives (that both in-band and out-of-band interfaces cannot independently achieve).
items.abstract_zh: 先前的工作表明，可以通过两个特定于型号的寄存器 (MSR) 对英特尔处理器进行远程电源攻击：MSR_PKG_Energy_Status 和 MSR_PPO_Energy_Status。作为回应，英特尔推出了一种防御措施：MSR IA32_MISC_PACKAGE_CTLS 中的一个位允许用户启用/禁用“过滤”机制，该机制会在能量测量中添加额外的噪声，以增强对电源侧通道攻击的防御能力。在这项工作中，我们证明“过滤”并没有涵盖所有可能的功率测量途径。在英特尔服务器级平台上，存在带外管理接口 (OOB) 等组件，这些组件还公开带内能耗等遥测信息。为此，我们首先对 OOB 与带内组件通信的协议结构进行逆向工程。然后，我们展示 OOB 如何允许对封装配置空间 (PCS) 进行只读访问，并注意通过 PCS 读取的能量读数超出了过滤范围。利用这一点，我们在英特尔 SGX 上建立了远程电源侧通道，并在英特尔 Sapphire Rapids 上运行的 TDX 上建立了远程电源侧通道。我们首先构建一个同步机制，通过利用故意禁用的 MSR 来使带内执行与带外测量保持一致。然后，我们通过 OOB PCS 使用能量读数，从带内 Intel SGX 内运行的 MbedTLS 恢复 2048 位 RSA 密钥（采用通用单步假设）。最后，我们还从带内 Intel TDX 中泄漏 AESNI 密钥（没有任何单步假设）。在我们的工作之前，有关侧通道的文献一直关注利用带内接口的攻击。我们的工作确立了针对攻击向量评估机密计算架构的重要性，这些攻击向量结合了带内和带外接口的能力以实现对抗性目标（带内和带外接口都无法独立实现）。

items.title: LLMs: A Driving Force in Next Generation Digital Design Automation.
items.abstract: Innovations in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI), particularly large language models (LLMs), are poised to revolutionize silicon design automation. This paper explores the transformative potential of LLMs in automating and enhancing various tasks within the silicon design process. It reviews the current applications of LLMs and their potential to automate silicon design tasks, proposing applications, providing a qualitative analysis of the readiness of the technology to support these applications and setting directions for future research.
items.abstract_zh: 生成人工智能 (GenAI) 的创新，特别是大型语言模型 (LLM)，有望彻底改变芯片设计自动化。本文探讨了法学硕士在自动化和增强芯片设计过程中各种任务方面的变革潜力。它回顾了法学硕士的当前应用及其自动化芯片设计任务的潜力，提出应用，对支持这些应用的技术准备情况进行定性分析，并为未来的研究设定方向。

items.title: LIO-DPC: Accurate and Fast LiDAR-Inertial Odometry with Dynamic Pose Chain.
items.abstract: LiDAR-inertial odometry is widely used in robotics navigation, autonomous driving, and drone operation to provide precise, low-latency motion estimation. Filter-based methods are fast but suffer from significant cumulative errors. Graph optimization methods reduce cumulative errors through loop closure detection but are computationally expensive. In this work, we propose LIO-DPC, a framework that combines the benefits of the filter-based approach and graph-based approach. First, we propose a dynamic pose chain optimization method. It generates an initial pose chain using the fast filter. This is followed by applying computationally efficient local graph optimization to a set of local pose chains to generate refined relative poses, which are then used to update the motion estimation. Second, we propose a loop sparsification approach to select representative loops that are both temporally and spatially proximate, to reduce the computational complexity in graph optimization and minimize loop errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LIO-DPC achieves real-time performance and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: LiDAR 惯性里程计广泛应用于机器人导航、自动驾驶和无人机操作，以提供精确、低延迟的运动估计。基于过滤器的方法速度很快，但会出现显着的累积误差。图优化方法通过闭环检测减少累积误差，但计算成本较高。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LIO-DPC，这是一个结合了基于过滤器的方法和基于图的方法的优点的框架。首先，我们提出了一种动态位姿链优化方法。它使用快速滤波器生成初始姿势链。接下来，将计算高效的局部图优化应用于一组局部姿势链，以生成精细的相对姿势，然后将其用于更新运动估计。其次，我们提出了一种循环稀疏化方法来选择时间和空间上接近的代表性循环，以降低图优化中的计算复杂性并最小化循环错误。大量实验表明，LIO-DPC 实现了实时性能，并且在准确性方面优于最先进的方法。

items.title: Efficient and Scalable Architectures for Multi-level Superconducting Qubit Readout.
items.abstract: Realizing the full potential of quantum computing requires large-scale quantum computers capable of running quantum error correction (QEC) to mitigate hardware errors and maintain quantum data coherence. While quantum computers operate within a two-level computational subspace, many processor modalities are inherently multi-level systems. This leads to occasional leakage into energy levels outside the computational subspace, complicating error detection and undermining QEC protocols. The problem is particularly severe in engineered qubit devices like superconducting transmons, a leading technology for fault-tolerant quantum computing. Addressing this challenge requires effective multi-level quantum system readout to identify and mitigate leakage errors. We propose a scalable, high-fidelity three-level readout that reduces FPGA resource usage by $60 \times$ compared to the baseline while reducing readout time by $20 \%$, enabling faster leakage detection. By employing matched filters to detect relaxation and excitation error patterns and integrating a modular lightweight neural network to correct crosstalk errors, the protocol significantly reduces hardware complexity, achieving a $100 \times$ reduction in neural network size. Our design supports efficient, real-time implementation on off-the-shelf FPGAs, delivering a $6.6 \%$ relative improvement in readout accuracy over the baseline. This innovation enables faster leakage mitigation, enhances QEC reliability, and accelerates the path toward faulttolerant quantum computing.
items.abstract_zh: 要充分发挥量子计算的潜力，需要能够运行量子纠错（QEC）的大型量子计算机，以减少硬件错误并保持量子数据的一致性。虽然量子计算机在两级计算子空间内运行，但许多处理器模式本质上是多级系统。这会导致偶尔泄漏到计算子空间之外的能级，从而使错误检测复杂化并破坏 QEC 协议。这个问题在工程量子位设备中尤其严重，例如超导传输器（容错量子计算的领先技术）。应对这一挑战需要有效的多级量子系统读出来识别和减轻泄漏错误。我们提出了一种可扩展、高保真三级读出，与基线相比，可将 FPGA 资源使用量减少 60 美元 \times$，同时将读出时间减少 20 美元 \%$，从而实现更快的泄漏检测。通过采用匹配滤波器来检测松弛和激励错误模式，并集成模块化轻量级神经网络来纠正串扰错误，该协议显着降低了硬件复杂性，实现了神经网络尺寸减少 100 倍的效果。我们的设计支持在现成的 FPGA 上进行高效、实时的实施，与基线相比，读出精度相对提高了 6.6 美元\%$。这项创新可以更快地缓解泄漏，增强 QEC 可靠性，并加速实现容错量子计算的道路。

items.title: PyraNet: A Multi-Layered Hierarchical Dataset for Verilog.
items.abstract: Recently, there has been a growing interest in leveraging Large Language Models for Verilog code generation. However, the current quality of the generated Verilog code remains suboptimal. This is largely due to the absence of well-defined, well-organized datasets with high-quality samples, as well as a lack of innovative fine-tuning methods and models specifically trained on Verilog. In this paper, we introduce a novel open-source dataset and a corresponding fine-tuning technique, which utilizes a multi-layered structure that we refer to as PyraNet. Our experiments demonstrate that employing the proposed dataset and fine-tuning approach leads to a more accurate fine-tuned model, producing syntactically and functionally correct Verilog code. The evaluation results show improvements by up-to 32.6% in comparison to the CodeLlama-7B baseline model and upto 16.7% in comparison to the state-of-the-art models using VerilogEval evaluation platform.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，人们对利用大型语言模型来生成 Verilog 代码越来越感兴趣。然而，当前生成的 Verilog 代码的质量仍然不够理想。这主要是由于缺乏定义明确、组织良好的高质量样本数据集，以及缺乏专门针对 Verilog 训练的创新微调方法和模型。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的开源数据集和相应的微调技术，该技术利用了我们称为 PyraNet 的多层结构。我们的实验表明，采用所提出的数据集和微调方法可以产生更准确的微调模型，从而生成语法和功能正确的 Verilog 代码。评估结果显示，与 CodeLlama-7B 基线模型相比，性能提升高达 32.6%，与使用 VerilogEval 评估平台的最先进模型相比，性能提升高达 16.7%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Novel Design of MTJ-Based Unified LIF Spiking Neuron and PUF.
items.abstract: Due to the higher energy and hardware efficiency of spiking neural networks (SNNs) compared to deep neural networks, they have attracted a lot of attention. However, their security must be investigated, given that they have access to private and confidential data. Physically unclonable functions (PUFs) are a class of circuits with security applications like device authentication, embedded licensing, device-specific cryptographic key generation, and anti-counterfeiting. Therefore, PUFs can be used to enhance the security of SNN. Accordingly, in this paper, an MTJ-based LIF Neuron/PUF has been proposed. The proposed design can function as both a LIF neuron and PUF. The results of the Monte Carlo simulation show that the proposed design has better uniqueness and uniformity values compared to its counterparts. These values for the proposed design are $50.07 \%$ and $49.66 \%$, which are close to their ideal value of $50 \%$. Also, the mean value of Shannon entropy for the 128-bit PUF response of the proposed design is 0.9974, which is close to its ideal value of 1.
items.abstract_zh: Due to the higher energy and hardware efficiency of spiking neural networks (SNNs) compared to deep neural networks, they have attracted a lot of attention.然而，鉴于他们可以访问私人和机密数据，因此必须对其安全性进行调查。物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 是一类具有设备身份验证、嵌入式许可、设备特定加密密钥生成和防伪等安全应用的电路。因此，PUF可以用来增强SNN的安全性。因此，本文提出了一种基于 MTJ 的 LIF Neuron/PUF。所提出的设计可以同时充当 LIF 神经元和 PUF 神经元。蒙特卡罗模拟的结果表明，与同类设计相比，所提出的设计具有更好的独特性和均匀性值。拟议设计的这些值为 $50.07 \%$ 和 $49.66 \%$，接近其理想值 $50 \%$。此外，所提出设计的 128 位 PUF 响应的香农熵平均值为 0.9974，接近其理想值 1。

items.title: ESM: A Framework for Building Effective Surrogate Models for Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search.
items.abstract: Hardware-aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is one of the most promising techniques for designing efficient Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) for resource-constrained devices. Surrogate models play a crucial role in hardware-aware NAS as they enable efficient prediction of performance characteristics (e.g., inference latency and energy consumption) of different candidate models on the target hardware device. In this paper, we focus on building hardware-aware latency prediction models. We study different types of surrogate models and highlight their strengths and weaknesses. We perform a systematic analysis to understand the impact of different factors that can influence the prediction accuracy of these models, aiming to assess the importance of each stage involved in the model designing process and identify methods and policies necessary for designing/training an effective estimation model, specifically for GPU-powered devices. Based on the insights gained from the analysis, we present a holistic framework that enables reliable dataset generation and efficient model generation, considering the overall costs of different stages of the model generation pipeline.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 是为资源受限设备设计高效深度神经网络 (DNN) 的最有前途的技术之一。代理模型在硬件感知 NAS 中发挥着至关重要的作用，因为它们能够有效预测目标硬件设备上不同候选模型的性能特征（例如，推理延迟和能耗）。在本文中，我们专注于构建硬件感知的延迟预测模型。我们研究不同类型的替代模型并强调它们的优点和缺点。我们进行系统分析，以了解影响这些模型预测准确性的不同因素的影响，旨在评估模型设计过程中涉及的每个阶段的重要性，并确定设计/训练有效估计模型（特别是针对 GPU 驱动的设备）所需的方法和策略。基于从分析中获得的见解，我们提出了一个整体框架，可以实现可靠的数据集生成和高效的模型生成，并考虑模型生成管道不同阶段的总体成本。

items.title: RAP-Track: Efficient Control Flow Attestation via Parallel Tracking in Commodity MCUs.
items.abstract: Control Flow Attestation (CFA) has emerged as an important security service to enable remote verification of control flow paths in safety-critical embedded systems. However, current CFA for commodity devices suffers performance penalties due to code instrumentation and frequent context switches required to securely log control flow paths at runtime. Our work introduces RAP-Track, a technique leveraging commodity hardware extensions, namely Micro Trace Buffer and Data Watchpoint and Trace Unit, to track control flow paths in parallel with the execution of the attested program, thus avoiding aforementioned overheads present in state-of-the-art CFA. Our evaluation (based on an open-source prototype of RAP-Track) demonstrates substantial performance gains, enhancing practicality and security of CFA.
items.abstract_zh: 控制流证明 (CFA) 已成为一项重要的安全服务，可远程验证安全关键型嵌入式系统中的控制流路径。然而，由于代码检测和在运行时安全地记录控制流路径所需的频繁上下文切换，当前商用设备的 CFA 遭受性能损失。我们的工作引入了 RAP-Track，这是一种利用商品硬件扩展（即微跟踪缓冲区、数据观察点和跟踪单元）的技术，在执行经过验证的程序的同时跟踪控制流路径，从而避免了最先进的 CFA 中存在的上述开销。我们的评估（基于 RAP-Track 的开源原型）展示了显着的性能提升，增强了 CFA 的实用性和安全性。

items.title: PICK: An SRAM-based Processing-in-Memory Accelerator for K-Nearest-Neighbor Search in Point Clouds.
items.abstract: K-nearest neighbor (kNN) search is a fundamental operation in various point cloud applications, such as autonomous driving. However, the heavy computational intensity and memory demands of kNN search pose significant challenges for efficient implementation, especially in resource-constrained scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PICK, a processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture designed to accelerate kNN search in point cloud applications. PICK leverages bit-serial-based PIM (BS-PIM) and customized circuits to efficiently handle key operations of kNN search: distance calculation and top-k selection. The run-time off-chip access is eliminated thanks to the large on-chip memory. For distance calculation, we introduce a bit-width clipping technique to reduce the latency of bit-serial execution with negligible accuracy degradation, providing flexible trade-offs between performance and precision. Besides, we propose a filtering-and-selection strategy that realizes approximately constant time complexity for arbitrary values of k. Furthermore, a two-stage pipeline is implemented to parallelize distance calculation and top-k search, effectively hiding latency and improving throughput. According to our experiments, PICK achieves $4.17 \times$ speedup and a $4.42 \times$ energy saving over the state-of-the-art design.
items.abstract_zh: K 最近邻 (kNN) 搜索是各种点云应用（例如自动驾驶）中的基本操作。然而，kNN 搜索的繁重计算强度和内存需求对高效实现提出了重大挑战，特别是在资源受限的场景中。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PICK，这是一种内存处理 (PIM) 架构，旨在加速点云应用中的 kNN 搜索。 PICK 利用基于位串行的 PIM (BS-PIM) 和定制电路来有效处理 kNN 搜索的关键操作：距离计算和 top-k 选择。由于具有大片上存储器，消除了运行时片外访问。对于距离计算，我们引入了位宽裁剪技术，以减少位串行执行的延迟，同时精度下降可以忽略不计，从而在性能和精度之间提供灵活的权衡。此外，我们提出了一种过滤和选择策略，可以实现任意 k 值的近似恒定的时间复杂度。此外，还实现了两级流水线来并行化距离计算和top-k搜索，有效隐藏延迟并提高吞吐量。根据我们的实验，与最先进的设计相比，PICK 实现了 4.17 美元的加速和 4.42 美元的节能。

items.title: ReChisel: Effective Automatic Chisel Code Generation by LLM with Reflection.
items.abstract: Coding with hardware description languages (HDLs) such as Verilog is a time-intensive and laborious task. With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), there is increasing interest in applying LLMs to assist with HDL coding. Recent efforts have demonstrated the potential of LLMs in translating natural language to traditional HDL Verilog. Chisel, a next-generation HDL based on Scala, introduces higher-level abstractions, facilitating more concise, maintainable, and scalable hardware designs. However, the potential of using LLMs for Chisel code generation remains largely unexplored. This work proposes ReChisel, an LLM-based agentic system designed to enhance the effectiveness of Chisel code generation. ReChisel incorporates a reflection mechanism to iteratively refine the quality of generated code using feedback from compilation and simulation processes, and introduces an escape mechanism to break free from non-progress loops. Experiments demonstrate that ReChisel significantly improves the success rate of Chisel code generation, achieving performance comparable to state-of-the-art LLM-based agentic systems for Verilog code generation.
items.abstract_zh: 使用 Verilog 等硬件描述语言 (HDL) 进行编码是一项耗时且费力的任务。随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展，人们越来越有兴趣应用 LLM 来辅助 HDL 编码。最近的努力证明了法学硕士在将自然语言转换为传统 HDL Verilog 方面的潜力。 Chisel 是基于 Scala 的下一代 HDL，引入了更高级别的抽象，有助于更简洁、可维护和可扩展的硬件设计。然而，使用 LLM 生成 Chisel 代码的潜力在很大程度上仍未被开发。这项工作提出了 ReChisel，这是一个基于 LLM 的代理系统，旨在增强 Chisel 代码生成的有效性。 ReChisel 结合了反射机制，利用编译和模拟过程的反馈迭代地改进生成代码的质量，并引入了转义机制来摆脱非进度循环。实验表明，ReChisel 显着提高了 Chisel 代码生成的成功率，其性能可与最先进的基于 LLM 的 Verilog 代码生成代理系统相媲美。

items.title: A Novel Image-Graph Heterogeneous Fusion Framework for Static IR Drop Prediction.
items.abstract: IR drop analysis is crucial for ensuring the reliability and performance of integrated circuits (ICs) but poses computational challenges as the IC designs grow larger, especially for ultra deep-submicron VLSI designs. Deep learnings (DL) as the efficiency-promising solutions, mainly employ various CNN-based networks to achieve image-to-image IR drop predictions. However, they neglect and lose the power delivery network (PDN) global spatial features and cell instance topological information. This paper proposes a novel image-graph heterogeneous fusion framework (IGHF), which integrates the effectiveness and complementarity of dual branches (CNN and GNN) for higher prediction performance. In the CNN-based Power ScaleFusion Unet branch, the proposed long-range and local-detail encoder (LLE) integrates seamlessly with the hierarchical and adjacent compensation group (HACG) module. This design facilitates effective multi-scale global-to-local spatial power feature extraction within the PDN and enables adaptive high-to-low-level feature fusion and compensation in the decoder. Moreover, a cell voltage aware (CVA) module in the GNN branch is designed to adaptively aggregate PDN topological features of heterogeneous neighbors of different orders. Comparative experiments demonstrate that the proposed IGHF achieves significant accuracy improvements, outperforming the state-of-the-art MAUNet and widely-used IREDGe methods by considerable margins of 24.6% and 55.0% reduction in prediction error, while the prediction maps possess higher structural fidelity. Transfer experiments indicate that IGHF with transfer learning can improve the accuracy in real circuits with the few-shot real circuit test cases.
items.abstract_zh: IR 压降分析对于确保集成电路 (IC) 的可靠性和性能至关重要，但随着 IC 设计变得越来越大，尤其是超深亚微米 VLSI 设计，也会带来计算挑战。深度学习（DL）作为有希望提高效率的解决方案，主要采用各种基于 CNN 的网络来实现图像到图像的 IR 降预测。然而，它们忽略并丢失了供电网络（PDN）全局空间特征和小区实例拓扑信息。本文提出了一种新颖的图像图异构融合框架（IGHF），它集成了双分支（CNN 和 GNN）的有效性和互补性，以实现更高的预测性能。在基于 CNN 的 Power ScaleFusion Unet 分支中，所提出的远程和局部细节编码器 (LLE) 与分层和相邻补偿组 (HACG) 模块无缝集成。该设计有利于 PDN 内有效的多尺度全局到局部空间功率特征提取，并在解码器中实现自适应高到低级别特征融合和补偿。此外，GNN 分支中的单元电压感知（CVA）模块旨在自适应聚合不同阶异构邻居的 PDN 拓扑特征。对比实验表明，所提出的 IGHF 实现了显着的精度提升，优于最先进的 MAUNet 和广泛使用的 IREDGe 方法，预测误差分别降低了 24.6% 和 55.0%，同时预测图具有更高的结构保真度。迁移实验表明，具有迁移学习的 IGHF 可以通过少样本真实电路测试用例提高真实电路的准确性。

items.title: Data Oblivious CPU: Microarchitectural Side-channel Leakage-Resilient Processor.
items.abstract: Mitigating microarchitectural side channels remains a central challenge in hardware security. Despite substantial research efforts, current defenses are often narrowly tailored to specific vulnerabilities, leaving systems exposed to a broader spectrum of microarchitectural side-channel attacks. In this paper, we propose a generic approach to mitigate side-channel attacks with minimal architectural changes. Unlike traditional approaches that focus on mitigating specific side channels, we propose a dynamic strategy that alters the decoding of the instructions into secure (side-channel resilient) or performance versions of the instructions, based on the data it is processing. Specifically, to minimize performance overhead, decoding to a secure version is selectively applied only when sensitive data are being processed, ensuring optimal performance for instructions operating on non-sensitive data.To evaluate our approach, we implement it on the RISC-V out-of-order BOOM processor. Our results demonstrate that the mechanism increases the utilization of FPGA resources by only 2% compared to the original design. Furthermore, it imposes 0% performance overhead for unprotected applications, while maintaining overhead between up to 25% for security-critical workloads. This work represents a scalable and efficient solution for defending against micro-architectural side-channel attacks without compromising system performance.
items.abstract_zh: 减少微架构侧通道仍然是硬件安全的核心挑战。尽管进行了大量的研究工作，但当前的防御措施通常针对特定的漏洞进行了狭隘的定制，使系统面临更广泛的微架构侧通道攻击。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用方法，以最小的架构更改来减轻侧信道攻击。与专注于减轻特定侧通道的传统方法不同，我们提出了一种动态策略，可根据正在处理的数据将指令的解码更改为指令的安全（侧通道弹性）或性能版本。具体来说，为了最大限度地减少性能开销，仅在处理敏感数据时才选择性地应用解码为安全版本，从而确保对非敏感数据进行操作的指令的最佳性能。为了评估我们的方法，我们在 RISC-V 乱序 BOOM 处理器上实现它。我们的结果表明，与原始设计相比，该机制仅将 FPGA 资源利用率提高了 2%。此外，它对未受保护的应用程序施加 0% 的性能开销，同时将安全关键型工作负载的开销维持在高达 25% 之间。这项工作代表了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案，可在不影响系统性能的情况下防御微架构侧信道攻击。

items.title: Constraint Graph-based PCB Legalization Considering Dense, Heterogeneous, Irregular-Shaped, and Any-oriented Components.
items.abstract: In modern printed circuit board (PCB) designs, the increasing complexity poses more challenges for automatic placement. Existing PCB placement methods cannot handle complex constraints with heterogeneous, irregular-shaped, and any-oriented components for double-sided PCB designs well. This paper proposes the first constraint graph-based legalization approach for these constraints. We use a slicing technique to model a component more accurately with a set of rectangles instead of resorting to the naive bounding box approximation. Unlike the commonly used linear programming method for macro placement in integrated circuit (IC) designs, we employ a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation to effectively expand the solution space for heterogeneous, irregular-shaped, and any-oriented components, particularly with high-density designs. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and the robustness of our work.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代印刷电路板 (PCB) 设计中，日益增加的复杂性给自动贴装带来了更多挑战。现有的 PCB 贴装方法无法很好地处理双面 PCB 设计中异构、不规则形状和任意方向元件的复杂约束。本文提出了第一个针对这些约束的基于约束图的合法化方法。我们使用切片技术通过一组矩形更准确地对组件进行建模，而不是诉诸简单的边界框近似。与集成电路 (IC) 设计中常用的宏布局线性规划方法不同，我们采用混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式来有效扩展异构、不规则形状和任意方向组件的解决方案空间，特别是高密度设计。实验结果证明了我们工作的有效性和稳健性。

items.title: Efficient Continuous Logic Optimization with Diffusion Model.
items.abstract: The logic synthesis optimization flow is crucial to the quality of results (QoR), which applies a sequence of transformations to a design. Recently, there has been a growing focus on the automatic optimization of synthesis flows to improve QoR, utilizing techniques such as Bayesian optimization and reinforcement learning, which may fall short in efficiency due to the exponentially large search space. In contrast, continuous optimization offers notable efficiency advantages by leveraging the explicit gradient. However, despite its potential, several significant concerns remain to be addressed. On one hand, it is essential to obtain a reliable gradient. On the other hand, a major challenge arises from the fact that searching within a continuous space can yield solutions that deviate from feasible ones. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach to optimize synthesis sequences within a continuous latent space. Specifically, the gradient information is derived from a QoR surrogate model, while the discrepancies between solutions and feasible transformations are minimized by a diffusion model. Experimental results on extensive benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method not only achieves lower area and delay but also improves efficiency by 5 X to 130 X, compared with previous methods.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑综合优化流程对于结果质量 (QoR) 至关重要，它将一系列转换应用于设计。最近，人们越来越关注综合流程的自动优化以提高 QoR，利用贝叶斯优化和强化学习等技术，但由于搜索空间呈指数级增长，这些技术可能会降低效率。相比之下，连续优化通过利用显式梯度提供了显着的效率优势。然而，尽管其潜力巨大，但仍有几个重大问题有待解决。一方面，获得可靠的梯度至关重要。另一方面，一个主要挑战来自于这样一个事实：在连续空间内搜索可能会产生偏离可行解决方案的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种在连续潜在空间内优化合成序列的有效方法。具体来说，梯度信息源自 QoR 代理模型，而解决方案与可行变换之间的差异则通过扩散模型最小化。大量基准测试的实验结果表明，与之前的方法相比，所提出的方法不仅实现了更低的面积和延迟，而且将效率提高了 5 倍至 130 倍。

items.title: ADVISOR: Approximate Computing-frienDly High-LeVel Synthesis DesIgn Space ExplORer.
items.abstract: Approximate computing is a relatively new computing paradigm that allows to trade-off area/power with accuracy. Another relatively new VLSI design trend is to raise the level of design abstraction from the Register-Transfer Level (RTL) to the behavioral level and use High-Level Synthesis (HLS) to synthesize these behavioral descriptions. HLS has one unique advantage over RTL design. It completely decouples the functional description from the implementation details. This allows to design and verify the behavioral description once, but then generate a large number of functional equivalent hardware implementations of unique area vs. performance trade-offs. This is typically achieved through synthesis directives in the form of pragmas that the HLS user annotates at the source code to mainly control how to synthesize arrays (RAM, registers), loops (unroll, pipeline) and functions (inline or not).In this work we leverage this uniqueness and build an automated HLS design space explorer to find the hardware circuit most amenable to approximate computing, this is, has the highest potential for area/power savings. We have coined this explorer ADVISOR. The main problem with traditional exploration approaches is their long run time, which is worse in this case because every new implementation needs to be approximated to fully understand the trade-offs in terms of area/power vs. error. Thus, in order to accelerate this exploration process, we propose to evaluate each new designs based on an Approximation Friendliness Index (AFI) that can be computed statically, very fast, and only fully approximate the designs recommended by our flow that have high AFI values. Experimental results show that this approach leads to basically the same results as exhaustively approximating every new design, while being on average 68 × faster.
items.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种相对较新的计算范例，可以在面积/功率与精度之间进行权衡。另一个相对较新的VLSI设计趋势是将设计抽象级别从寄存器传输级（RTL）提升到行为级，并使用高级综合（HLS）来综合这些行为描述。与 RTL 设计相比，HLS 具有一项独特的优势。它将功能描述与实现细节完全解耦。这允许设计和验证一次行为描述，然后生成大量功能等效的硬件实现，以实现独特的面积与性能的权衡。这通常是通过 HLS 用户在源代码中注释的编译指示形式的综合指令来实现的，这些指令主要控制如何综合数组（RAM、寄存器）、循环（展开、管道）和函数（内联或非内联）。在这项工作中，我们利用这种独特性并构建一个自动化 HLS 设计空间浏览器来找到最适合近似计算的硬件电路，即具有最大的面积/功耗节省潜力。我们创造了这个探险家顾问。传统探索方法的主要问题是运行时间长，在这种情况下情况更糟，因为每个新的实现都需要进行近似，以充分理解面积/功率与误差之间的权衡。因此，为了加速这一探索过程，我们建议基于近似友好指数（AFI）来评估每个新设计，该指数可以非常快速地静态计算，并且仅完全近似我们的流程推荐的具有高 AFI 值的设计。实验结果表明，这种方法得到的结果与详尽逼近每个新设计的结果基本相同，同时平均速度提高了 68 倍。

items.title: PoP-ECC: Robust and Flexible Error Correction against Multi-Bit Upsets in DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in safety-critical systems require high reliability. Many systems deploy Error Correction Codes (ECCs) to protect DNNs from memory errors. However, continuous process scaling increases memory errors in severity and frequency, necessitating strong protection against Multi-Bit Upsets (MBUs). This paper proposes Parities of Parities ECC (PoP-ECC), a novel two-tier memory protection scheme designed to provide robust, efficient, and flexible protection against MBUs. PoP-ECC generates Virtual Parities (VPs), which are used to compute secondlevel parities called Parities of Parities (PPs). This two-level ECC structure allows for dynamic error correction tailored to varying error patterns, ensuring system reliability with minimal memory overhead. Our evaluation demonstrates that PoP-ECC can tolerate significantly higher MBU ratios compared to state-of-the-art solutions, with negligible delay, area, and power overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 安全关键系统中的深度神经网络 (DNN) 需要高可靠性。许多系统部署纠错码 (ECC) 来保护 DNN 免受内存错误的影响。然而，持续的进程扩展会增加内存错误的严重性和频率，因此需要针对多位翻转 (MBU) 提供强有力的保护。本文提出了奇偶校验 ECC (PoP-ECC)，这是一种新颖的两层内存保护方案，旨在针对 MBU 提供强大、高效且灵活的保护。 PoP-ECC 生成虚拟奇偶校验 (VP)，用于计算称为奇偶校验 (PP) 的二级奇偶校验。这种两级 ECC 结构允许根据不同的错误模式进行动态纠错，从而以最小的内存开销确保系统可靠性。我们的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，PoP-ECC 可以承受明显更高的 MBU 比率，并且延迟、面积和功率开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: Precon: A Precision-Convertible Architecture for Accelerating Quantized Deep Learning Models across Various Domains Including LLMs.
items.abstract: The sensitivity of LLMs to quantization has driven the development of hardware accelerators tailored for specific low-precision configurations such as weight-only quantization and mixed-precision, which can introduce inefficiencies in dedicated hardware architecture. In this work, we propose Precon, a precision-convertible architecture designed to accelerate various quantized deep learning models, particularly LLMs, through a unified processing unit. By enabling on-the-fly switching between half-float (FP16) decoding and integer (INT) decomposition, the design effectively supports INT4-FP16, INT4-INT4, and INT4INT8 arithmetic within shared logic. Precon achieves up to $4.1 \times$ speedup and 81.4% reduction in energy consumption compared to the baseline across various domains, including the support of both accurate and efficient acceleration of quantized LLMs.
items.abstract_zh: LLM 对量化的敏感性推动了针对特定低精度配置（例如仅权重量化和混合精度）定制的硬件加速器的开发，这可能会导致专用硬件架构效率低下。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Precon，一种精度可转换的架构，旨在通过统一的处理单元加速各种量化深度学习模型，特别是法学硕士。通过在半浮点 (FP16) 解码和整数 (INT) 分解之间实现动态切换，该设计可有效支持共享逻辑内的 INT4-FP16、INT4-INT4 和 INT4INT8 算术。与各个领域的基准相比，Precon 实现了高达 4.1 美元的加速和 81.4% 的能耗降低，包括支持量化 LLM 的准确和高效加速。

items.title: RADiT: Redundancy-Aware Diffusion Transformer Acceleration Leveraging Timestep Similarity.
items.abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have demonstrated unprecedented performance across various generative tasks including image and video generation. However, a large amount of computations on the inference process and iterative sampling steps in the DiT models result in high computational costs, leading to substantial latency and energy consumption challenges. To address these issues, we propose a redundancy-aware DiT (RADiT), a novel software-hardware co-optimization accelerator for DiTs that minimizes redundant operations in the iterative sampling stages. We identify data redundancy by evaluating blockwise input features and skip redundant computations by reusing results from consecutive timesteps. Furthermore, to minimize accuracy degradation and maximize computational efficiency, the Dynamic Threshold Scaling Module (DTSM) and Compress and Compare Unit (CCU) are employed in the redundancy detection process. This approach enables DiTs to achieve up to $1.8 \times$ and $1.7 \times$ faster speeds for image and video generation, respectively, without compromising quality, along with 41% and 45.5% reductions in energy consumption. Our RADiT scheme improves throughput by $1.67 \times$ and $1.76 \times$ for image and video generation tasks, respectively, while maintaining output quality and significantly reducing energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散变压器 (DiT) 在各种生成任务（包括图像和视频生成）中表现出了前所未有的性能。然而，DiT 模型中推理过程和迭代采样步骤的大量计算导致计算成本高昂，从而带来巨大的延迟和能耗挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种冗余感知 DiT (RADiT)，这是一种新颖的 DiT 软硬件协同优化加速器，可最大限度地减少迭代采样阶段的冗余操作。我们通过评估分块输入特征来识别数据冗余，并通过重用连续时间步的结果来跳过冗余计算。此外，为了最大限度地减少精度下降并最大限度地提高计算效率，在冗余检测过程中采用了动态阈值缩放模块（DTSM）和压缩和比较单元（CCU）。这种方法使 DiT 的图像和视频生成速度分别提高了 1.8 美元和 1.7 美元，且不影响质量，同时能耗降低了 41% 和 45.5%。我们的 RADiT 方案将图像和视频生成任务的吞吐量分别提高了 1.67 美元和 1.76 美元，同时保持输出质量并显着降低能耗。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Test Stimuli Generation.
items.abstract: The understanding and reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) with text data have made them widely used for test stimuli generation. Existing studies have primarily focused on methods such as prompt engineering or providing feedback to the LLMs’ generated outputs to improve test stimuli generation. However, these approaches have not been successful in enhancing the LLMs’ domain-specific performance in generating test stimuli. In this paper, we introduce a framework for finetuning LLMs for test stimuli generation through dataset generation and reinforcement learning (RL). Our dataset generation approach creates a table-shaped test stimuli dataset, which helps ensure that the LLM produces consistent outputs. Additionally, our two-stage fine-tuning process involves training the LLMs on domain-specific data and using RL to provide feedback on the generated outputs, further enhancing the LLMs’ performance in test stimuli generation. Experimental results confirm that our framework improves syntax correctness and code coverage of test stimuli, outperforming commercial models.
items.abstract_zh: 具有文本数据的大型语言模型（LLM）的理解和推理能力使其广泛用于测试刺激生成。现有的研究主要集中在诸如即时工程或向法学硕士生成的输出提供反馈以改进测试刺激生成等方法。然而，这些方法并没有成功地提高法学硕士在生成测试刺激方面的特定领域表现。在本文中，我们介绍了一个通过数据集生成和强化学习（RL）微调LLM以生成测试刺激的框架。我们的数据集生成方法创建了一个表格状的测试刺激数据集，这有助于确保法学硕士产生一致的输出。此外，我们的两阶段微调过程包括在特定领域的数据上训练法学硕士，并使用强化学习为生成的输出提供反馈，进一步增强法学硕士在测试刺激生成方面的性能。实验结果证实，我们的框架提高了测试刺激的语法正确性和代码覆盖率，优于商业模型。

items.title: BS-PDN-Last: Towards Optimal Power Delivery Network Design With Multifunctional Backside Metal Layers.
items.abstract: The increasing demand to maximize PPA gains with backside metal layers has driven their function beyond power delivery. This study introduces a novel BS-PDN-last flow, crucial for leveraging multifunctional backside, by deferring power routing to the post-signal routing stage. This approach addresses the IR-drop and performance trade-offs inherent in conventional PDN-first flows. Experimental results show that the BS-PDN-last flow achieves a $90 \%$ reduction in Total Negative Slack and a $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ performance gain with BS-CDN. Additionally, our work presents the first comprehensive comparison of FS-PDN, BSPDN, and multifunctional backside designs, evaluated on both physical design and workload metrics leveraging accurate vector-based analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 通过背面金属层最大限度地提高 PPA 增益的需求不断增长，这推动了它们的功能超越了电力传输。本研究引入了一种新颖的 BS-PDN-last 流程，通过将电源路由推迟到后信号路由阶段，对于利用多功能背面至关重要。该方法解决了传统 PDN 优先流中固有的 IR 压降和性能权衡问题。实验结果表明，BS-PDN-last 流将总负裕度减少了 $90 \%$，并通过 BS-CDN 实现了 $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ 性能增益。此外，我们的工作首次对 FS-PDN、BSPDN 和多功能背面设计进行了全面比较，并利用基于矢量的精确分析对物理设计和工作负载指标进行了评估。

items.title: Towards Uncertainty-aware Robotic Perception via Mixed-signal BNN Engine Leveraging Probabilistic Quantum Tunneling.
items.abstract: Integrating deep learning with environmental perception enhances robotic adaptability to complex tasks. However, its “black-box” nature, such as the lack of uncertainty quantification, poses challenges for safety-critical applications, particularly in unstructured and noisy environments. Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) offer uncertainty quantification but are limited by high hardware overhead, restricting real-time implementation on resource-constrained robots. This paper presents a mixedsignal hardware accelerator for BNNs, utilizing probabilistic quantum tunneling in fully depleted silicon-on-insulator (FDSOI) transistors to enable efficient, real-time uncertainty quantification. Device measurements indicate high-quality Gaussian random variable generation, validated through quantile-quantile plot analysis, with a high correlation coefficient ($r=0.997$) at $200 \mathrm{fJ} /$ sample. Leveraging such compact randomness, the parallel architecture achieved $10^{3}-10^{4} \times$ latency reduction at less than $2 \times$ area cost. Finally, in uncertainty-aware visual localization application of autonomous underwater vehicles, the BNN model effectively distinguishes data noise from model uncertainty, yielding significant information gain and enhancing the resampling efficiency by $4.5 \times$ at same accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 将深度学习与环境感知相结合可以增强机器人对复杂任务的适应能力。然而，其“黑匣子”性质，例如缺乏不确定性量化，给安全关键型应用带来了挑战，特别是在非结构化和嘈杂的环境中。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 提供不确定性量化，但受到高硬件开销的限制，限制了资源受限机器人的实时实施。本文提出了一种 BNN 混合信号硬件加速器，利用全耗尽绝缘体上硅 (FDSOI) 晶体管中的概率量子隧道来实现高效、实时的不确定性量化。设备测量表明高质量的高斯随机变量生成，通过分位数-分位数图分析进行验证，在 $200 \mathrm{fJ} /$ 样本处具有高相关系数 ($r=0.997$)。利用这种紧凑的随机性，并行架构以低于 2 倍的面积成本实现了 10^{3}-10^{4} 倍的延迟减少。最后，在自主水下航行器的不确定性感知视觉定位应用中，BNN 模型有效地区分数据噪声和模型不确定性，产生显着的信息增益，并在相同精度下将重采样效率提高 4.5 倍。

items.title: Introducing Instruction-Accurate Simulators for Performance Estimation of Autotuning Workloads.
items.abstract: Accelerating Machine Learning (ML) workloads requires efficient methods due to their large optimization space. Autotuning has emerged as an effective approach for systematically evaluating variations of implementations. Traditionally, autotuning requires the workloads to be executed on the target hardware (HW). We present an interface that allows executing autotuning workloads on simulators. This approach offers high scalability when the availability of the target HW is limited, as many simulations can be run in parallel on any accessible HW.Additionally, we evaluate the feasibility of using fast instruction-accurate simulators for autotuning. We train various predictors to forecast the performance of ML workload implementations on the target HW based on simulation statistics.Our results demonstrate that the tuned predictors are highly effective. The best workload implementation in terms of actual run time on the target HW is always within the top 3% of predictions for the tested x86, ARM, and RISC-V-based architectures. In the best case, this approach outperforms native execution on the target HW for embedded architectures when running as few as three samples on three simulators in parallel.
items.abstract_zh: 由于机器学习 (ML) 工作负载的优化空间很大，因此需要有效的方法来加速。自动调整已成为系统评估实施变化的有效方法。传统上，自动调整需要在目标硬件 (HW) 上执行工作负载。我们提供了一个允许在模拟器上执行自动调整工作负载的界面。当目标硬件的可用性有限时，这种方法提供了高可扩展性，因为许多仿真可以在任何可访问的硬件上并行运行。此外，我们评估了使用快速指令精确模拟器进行自动调整的可行性。我们训练各种预测器，以根据模拟统计数据预测目标硬件上的 ML 工作负载实现的性能。我们的结果表明，调整后的预测器非常有效。对于经过测试的基于 x86、ARM 和 RISC-V 的架构，就目标硬件上的实际运行时间而言，最佳工作负载实现始终位于预测的前 3% 之内。在最好的情况下，当在三个模拟器上并行运行三个样本时，这种方法的性能优于嵌入式架构目标硬件上的本机执行。

items.title: ARCANE: Adaptive RISC-V Cache Architecture for Near-memory Extensions.
items.abstract: Modern data-driven applications expose limitations of von Neumann architectures-extensive data movement, low throughput, and poor energy efficiency. Accelerators improve performance but lack flexibility and require data transfers. Existing compute in- and nearmemory solutions mitigate these issues but face usability challenges due to data placement constraints. We propose a novel cache architecture that doubles as a tightly-coupled compute-near-memory coprocessor. Our RISC-V cache controller executes custom instructions from the host CPU using vector operations dispatched to near-memory vector processing units within the cache memory subsystem. This architecture abstracts memory synchronization and data mapping from application software while offering software-based Instruction Set Architecture extensibility. Our implementation shows $30 \times$ to $84 \times$ performance improvement when operating on 8-bit data over the same system with a traditional cache when executing a worst-case 32-bit CNN workload, with only 41.3% area overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据驱动的应用程序暴露了冯·诺依曼架构的局限性——大量的数据移动、低吞吐量和低能源效率。加速器可以提高性能，但缺乏灵活性并且需要数据传输。现有的计算内存和近内存解决方案可以缓解这些问题，但由于数据放置限制而面临可用性挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的缓存架构，它兼作紧密耦合的计算近内存协处理器。我们的 RISC-V 缓存控制器使用分配到缓存子系统内的近内存向量处理单元的向量运算来执行来自主机 CPU 的自定义指令。该架构从应用软件中抽象出内存同步和数据映射，同时提供基于软件的指令集架构可扩展性。我们的实现显示，在执行最坏情况的 32 位 CNN 工作负载时，在具有传统缓存的同一系统上操作 8 位数据时，性能提高了 30 美元到 84 美元，而区域开销仅为 41.3%。

items.title: Assessing Quantum Layout Synthesis Tools via Known Optimal-SWAP Cost Benchmarks.
items.abstract: Quantum layout synthesis (QLS) is a critical step in quantum program compilation for superconducting quantum computers, involving the insertion of SWAP gates to satisfy hardware connectivity constraints. While previous works have introduced SWAP-free benchmarks with known-optimal depths for evaluating QLS tools, these benchmarks overlook SWAP count-a key performance metric. Real-world applications often require SWAP gates, making SWAP-free benchmarks insufficient for fully assessing QLS tool performance. To address this limitation, we introduce QUBIKOS, a benchmark set with provableoptimal SWAP counts and non-trivial circuit structures. For the first time, we are able to quantify the optimality gaps of SWAP gate usages of the leading QLS algorithms, which are surprisingly large: LightSabre from IBM delivers the best performance with an optimality gap of $63 x$, followed by ML-QLS with an optimality gap of 117 x. Similarly, QMAP and $\mathrm{t} \mid$ ket $\rangle$ exhibit significantly larger gaps of 250 x and 330 x, respectively. This highlights the need for further advancements in QLS methodologies. Beyond evaluation, QUBIKOS offers valuable insights for guiding the development of future QLS tools, as demonstrated through an analysis of a suboptimal case in LightSABRE. This underscores QUBIKOS’s utility as both an evaluation framework and a tool for advancing QLS research.
items.abstract_zh: 量子布局综合（QLS）是超导量子计算机量子程序编译的关键步骤，涉及插入交换门以满足硬件连接约束。虽然之前的工作引入了具有已知最佳深度的无 SWAP 基准来评估 QLS 工具，但这些基准忽略了 SWAP 计数——一个关键的性能指标。现实世界的应用程序通常需要 SWAP 门，这使得无 SWAP 基准不足以全面评估 QLS 工具的性能。为了解决这个限制，我们引入了 QUBIKOS，这是一个具有可证明的最佳交换计数和重要电路结构的基准测试集。我们第一次能够量化领先 QLS 算法的 SWAP 门使用的最优性差距，该差距惊人地大：IBM 的 LightSabre 提供了最佳性能，最优性差距为 63 x 美元，其次是 ML-QLS，最优性差距为 117 x。类似地，QMAP 和 $\mathrm{t} \mid$ ket $\rangle$ 分别表现出更大的差距，分别为 250 x 和 330 x。这凸显了 QLS 方法进一步发展的必要性。除了评估之外，QUB​​IKOS 还为指导未来 QLS 工具的开发提供了宝贵的见解，正如通过对 LightSABRE 中次优案例的分析所证明的那样。这强调了 QUBIKOS 作为评估框架和推进 QLS 研究的工具的实用性。

items.title: INSIGHT: A Universal Neural Simulator Framework for Analog Circuits with Autoregressive Transformers.
items.abstract: The compute-intensive nature of SPICE simulations hinders effective analog design automation. This paper introduces INSIGHT, a data-efficient, adaptive, high-fidelity, technologyagnostic universal neural simulator framework that formulates analog performance prediction as an autoregressive sequence generation task to accurately predict performance across diverse circuits. INSIGHT achieves test $\mathbf{R}^{\mathbf{2}}$ scores $\geq \mathbf{0. 9 5}$, outperforming existing neural surrogates. Cross-technology transfer learning experiments show that INSIGHT can preserve model performance with $\sim \mathbf{6 0 \%}$ less training data. Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) integration further reduces memory footprint by $\sim 42 \%$ and training time by $\sim 25 \%$, maintaining high performance. Our experiments show that INSIGHT-based RL sizing framework achieves $100-1000 \times$ lower simulation costs over existing sizing methods for identical benchmarks and target specifications.
