items.abstract_zh: SPICE 仿真的计算密集型特性阻碍了有效的模拟设计自动化。本文介绍了 INSIGHT，这是一种数据高效、自适应、高保真、技术无关的通用神经模拟器框架，它将模拟性能预测制定为自回归序列生成任务，以准确预测不同电路的性能。 INSIGHT 测试 $\mathbf{R}^{\mathbf{2}}$ 得分为 $\geq \mathbf{0。 9 5}$，优于现有的神经替代品。跨技术迁移学习实验表明，INSIGHT 可以在训练数据减少 $\sim \mathbf{6 0 \%}$ 的情况下保持模型性能。低秩适应 (LoRA) 集成进一步将内存占用量减少 $\sim 42 \%$，将训练时间减少 $\sim 25 \%$，从而保持高性能。我们的实验表明，对于相同的基准和目标规格，与现有的规模调整方法相比，基于 INSIGHT 的 RL 规模调整框架的模拟成本降低了 100-1000 倍。

items.title: Invited: SambaNova SN40L: Unleashing Agentic AI with Dataflow.
items.abstract: AI inference clouds are increasingly being tasked with running a diverse set of models to support interactive, agentic workloads such as LLM-powered assistants, chatbots, and autonomous agents. Efficient AI cloud inference requires producing tokens during the memory-bound decode phase at peak performance, as well as economically hosting and rapidly switching between a vast array of models. We describe the SambaNova SN40L Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) that combines dataflow with a three-tier memory system with SRAM, HBM, and DDR. Dataflow enables peak token generation performance with aggressive fusion of large compute graphs into a single kernel. HBM and high-capacity DDR drastically lower hardware footprint to host and serve trillions of parameters at scale. The SN40L RDU produce tokens over $\mathbf{3} \times$ faster, consume $3 \times$ less energy, and lower model hosting costs by up to $19 \times$ over a DGX H100.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能推理云越来越多地承担运行各种模型的任务，以支持交互式代理工作负载，例如法学硕士驱动的助手、聊天机器人和自主代理。高效的人工智能云推理需要在峰值性能的内存限制解码阶段生成令牌，以及经济地托管和在大量模型之间快速切换。我们描述了 SambaNova SN40L 可重配置数据流单元 (RDU)，它将数据流与具有 SRAM、HBM 和 DDR 的三层内存系统相结合。 Dataflow 通过将大型计算图积极融合到单个内核中，实现峰值令牌生成性能。 HBM 和高容量 DDR 大大降低了大规模托管和服务数万亿参数的硬件占用空间。与 DGX H100 相比，SN40L RDU 生成代币的速度快了 $\mathbf{3} \times$，消耗的能源减少了 $3 \time$，并且模型托管成本降低了高达 $\times$19 \times$。

items.title: MHDiff: Memory- and Hardware-Efficient Diffusion Acceleration via Focal Pixel Aware Quantization.
items.abstract: Diffusion models have demonstrated superior performance in image generation tasks, thus becoming the mainstream model for generative visual tasks. Diffusion models need to execute multiple timesteps sequentially, resulting in a dramatic increase in workload. Existing accelerators leverage the data similarity between adjacent timesteps and perform mixed-precision differential quantization to accelerate diffusion models. However, merging differential values with raw inputs in each layer of each timestep to ensure computational correctness requires significant memory access for loading raw inputs, which creates a heavy memory burden. Moreover, mixed-precision computations may lead to low hardware utilization if not well designed. Unlike these works, we propose MHDiff, a tailored framework that identifies the focal pixels at the first layer and finetunes them to fit all layers, then represents focal pixels with high-precision while using low-precision for others, thereby accelerating diffusion models while minimizing memory burden. To improve hardware utilization, MHDiff employs a packing module that merges low-precision values into high-precision values to create full high-precision matrices and designs a processing element (PE) array to efficiently process the packed matrices. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that MHDiff can achieve satisfactory performance with negligible quality loss.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散模型在图像生成任务中表现出了优越的性能，从而成为生成视觉任务的主流模型。扩散模型需要顺序执行多个时间步，导致工作量急剧增加。现有的加速器利用相邻时间步之间的数据相似性并执行混合精度差分量化来加速扩散模型。然而，将每个时间步的每一层中的差分值与原始输入合并以确保计算正确性需要大量的内存访问来加载原始输入，这会造成沉重的内存负担。此外，如果设计不当，混合精度计算可能会导致硬件利用率低。与这些工作不同的是，我们提出了 MHDiff，这是一个定制的框架，可以识别第一层的焦点像素并对其进行微调以适应所有层，然后以高精度表示焦点像素，同时对其他层使用低精度，从而加速扩散模型，同时最大限度地减少内存负担。为了提高硬件利用率，MHDiff 采用打包模块，将低精度值合并为高精度值，以创建完整的高精度矩阵，并设计处理元素 (PE) 阵列来高效处理打包矩阵。大量的实验结果表明，MHDiff 可以在质量损失可忽略不计的情况下实现令人满意的性能。

items.title: CIMFlow: An Integrated Framework for Systematic Design and Evaluation of Digital CIM Architectures.
items.abstract: Digital Compute-in-Memory (CIM) architectures have shown great promise in Deep Neural Network (DNN) acceleration by effectively addressing the “memory wall” bottleneck. However, the development and optimization of digital CIM accelerators are hindered by the lack of comprehensive tools that encompass both software and hardware design spaces. Moreover, existing design and evaluation frameworks often lack support for the capacity constraints inherent in digital CIM architectures. In this paper, we present CIMFlow, an integrated framework that provides an out-of-the-box workflow for implementing and evaluating DNN workloads on digital CIM architectures. CIMFlow bridges the compilation and simulation infrastructures with a flexible instruction set architecture (ISA) design, and addresses the constraints of digital CIM through advanced partitioning and parallelism strategies in the compilation flow. Our evaluation demonstrates that CIMFlow enables systematic prototyping and optimization of digital CIM architectures across diverse configurations, providing researchers and designers with an accessible platform for extensive design space exploration.
items.abstract_zh: 内存数字计算 (CIM) 架构通过有效解决“内存墙”瓶颈，在深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速方面展现出了巨大的前景。然而，数字 CIM 加速器的开发和优化因缺乏涵盖软件和硬件设计空间的综合工具而受到阻碍。此外，现有的设计和评估框架通常缺乏对数字 CIM 架构固有的容量限制的支持。在本文中，我们提出了 CIMFlow，这是一个集成框架，它提供了开箱即用的工作流程，用于在数字 CIM 架构上实施和评估 DNN 工作负载。 CIMFlow 通过灵活的指令集架构 (ISA) 设计连接编译和仿真基础设施，并通过编译流程中的高级分区和并行策略解决数字 CIM 的限制。我们的评估表明，CIMFlow 能够跨不同配置对数字 CIM 架构进行系统原型设计和优化，为研究人员和设计人员提供一个可进行广泛设计空间探索的可访问平台。

items.title: X-SAT: An Efficient Circuit-Based SAT Solver.
items.abstract: In modern digital circuit design, verifying the equivalence of arithmetic circuits is a significant and challenging task. This paper introduces a new circuit solver based on the Conflict-Driven Clause Learning (CDCL) algorithm, which integrates structural elimination techniques to reduce the number of variables and clauses while maintaining the circuit structure. Additionally, branching heuristics have been enhanced specifically for the structure of arithmetic circuits. Experimental results demonstrate that X-SAT significantly outperforms best previous circuit solver could be found on all benchmarks. Further, X-SAT performs better than the state-of-the-art CNF-based SAT solvers on complex arithmetic circuits, underscoring its significant potential in the field of circuit design verification.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代数字电路设计中，验证算术电路的等效性是一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。本文介绍了一种基于冲突驱动子句学习（CDCL）算法的新型电路求解器，该算法集成了结构消除技术，在保持电路结构的同时减少变量和子句的数量。此外，专门针对算术电路的结构增强了分支启发式。实验结果表明，X-SAT 在所有基准测试中均明显优于之前最好的电路求解器。此外，X-SAT 在复杂算术电路上的性能优于最先进的基于 CNF 的 SAT 求解器，凸显了其在电路设计验证领域的巨大潜力。

items.title: Device-Algorithm Co-Design of Ferroelectric Compute-in-Memory In-Situ Annealer for Combinatorial Optimization Problems.
items.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) are crucial in many applications but are computationally demanding. Traditional Ising annealers address COPs by directly converting them into Ising models (known as direct-E transformation) and solving them through iterative annealing. However, these approaches require vector-matrix-vector (VMV) multiplications with a complexity of $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ for Ising energy computation and complex exponential annealing factor calculations during annealing process, thus significantly increasing hardware costs. In this work, we propose a ferroelectric compute-in-memory (CiM) in-situ annealer to overcome aforementioned challenges. The proposed device-algorithm co-design framework consists of (i) a novel transformation method (first to our known) that converts COPs into an innovative incremental-E form, which reduces the complexity of VMV multiplication from $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ to $O(n)$, and approximates exponential annealing factor with a much simplified fractional form; (ii) a double gate ferroelectric FET (DG FeFET)-based CiM crossbar that efficiently computes the in-situ incremental-E form by leveraging the unique structure of DG FeFETs; (iii) a CiM annealer that approaches the solutions of COPs via iterative incremental-E computations within a tunable back gate-based in-situ annealing flow. Evaluation results show that our proposed CiM annealer significantly reduces hardware overhead, reducing energy consumption by $1503 / 1716 \times$ and time cost by $8.08 / 8.15 \times$ in solving 3000 -node Max-Cut problems compared to two state-of-the-art annealers. It also exhibits high solving efficiency, achieving a remarkable average success rate of $98 \%$, whereas other annealers show only $50 \%$ given the same iteration counts.
items.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题 (COP) 在许多应用中至关重要，但计算量要求很高。传统的 Ising 退火器通过直接将 COP 转换为 Ising 模型（称为直接 E 变换）并通过迭代退火来解决它们来解决 COP。然而，这些方法在退火过程中需要进行复杂度为$O\left(n^{2}\right)$的向量-矩阵-向量(VMV)乘法来计算Ising能量和计算复杂的指数退火因子，从而显着增加了硬件成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种铁电内存计算（CiM）原位退火器来克服上述挑战。所提出的设备算法协同设计框架包括（i）一种新颖的转换方法（我们已知的第一个），它将 COP 转换为创新的增量 E 形式，从而将 VMV 乘法的复杂性从 $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ 降低到 $O(n)$，并以简化得多的分数形式近似指数退火因子； (ii) 基于双栅铁电 FET (DG FeFET) 的 CiM 交叉开关，可利用 DG FeFET 的独特结构有效计算原位增量 E 形式； (iii) CiM 退火器，通过基于可调背栅的原位退火流程中的迭代增量 E 计算来逼近 COP 的解决方案。评估结果表明，我们提出的 CiM 退火器显着降低了硬件开销，与两种最先进的退火器相比，在解决 3000 节点最大切割问题时，能耗降低了 1503 美元/1716 倍，时间成本降低了 8.08 美元/8.15 倍。它还表现出很高的求解效率，实现了 98 美元 \%$ 的显着平均成功率，而在相同迭代次数下，其他退火器仅显示 50 美元 \%$。

items.title: Multi-Agent Yield Analysis For Circuit Design.
items.abstract: Semiconductor yield estimation presents a critical challenge in modern manufacturing, directly impacting production costs and market competitiveness. Traditional estimation methods, particularly Monte Carlo simulation, while reliable, become computationally prohibitive for complex modern circuits. Contemporary approaches, including importance sampling and machine learning techniques, face fundamental limitations in consistency across circuit topologies and practical validation. This work introduces YieldAgent, a novel Large Language Model (LLM)-powered framework that revolutionizes yield estimation through dynamic integration of multiple analytical strategies. YieldAgent employs a three-layer agent architecture to analyze circuit characteristics and historical data, optimizing estimation methods while balancing computational efficiency and precision. The framework incorporates Retrieval-Augmented Generation for domain knowledge integration and Tree-structured Parzen Estimators for dynamic hyperparameter optimization. Experimental validation across 12nm and 40nm technology nodes demonstrates that YieldAgent reduces computational overhead by up to $2.9 \times$ while maintaining or exceeding state-of-the-art accuracy. The system’s ability to adapt across different circuit topologies and technology nodes establishes a new paradigm for scalable, intelligent yield estimation in electronic design automation.
items.abstract_zh: 半导体良率估算对现代制造业提出了严峻的挑战，直接影响生产成本和市场竞争力。传统的估计方法，特别是蒙特卡罗模拟，虽然可靠，但对于复杂的现代电路来说，计算量却太大了。现代方法，包括重要性采样和机器学习技术，在电路拓扑和实际验证的一致性方面面临着根本限制。这项工作介绍了 YieldAgent，这是一种新型大型语言模型 (LLM) 支持的框架，它通过动态集成多种分析策略彻底改变了产量估计。 YieldAgent采用三层代理架构来分析电路特性和历史数据，优化估计方法，同时平衡计算效率和精度。该框架结合了用于领域知识集成的检索增强生成和用于动态超参数优化的树结构 Parzen 估计器。跨 12 纳米和 40 纳米技术节点的实验验证表明，YieldAgent 可将计算开销降低高达 2.9 美元\倍$，同时保持或超过最先进的精度。该系统能够适应不同的电路拓扑和技术节点，为电子设计自动化中的可扩展、智能良率估算建立了新的范例。

items.title: Me-MPK: Accelerating Krylov Subspace Solvers via Memory-efficient Matrix-Power Kernel.
items.abstract: This paper focuses on optimizing the Matrix-Power Kernel (MPK), which relies on a series of Sparse Matrix-Vector multiplications (SpMVs) using the same sparse matrix. MPK is a crucial component of Krylov subspace methods for solving large sparse linear systems in various fields, including circuit simulations. MPK offers a potential for matrix reuse in cache, which can accelerate memory-bound sparse solvers. Additionally, many sparse matrices encountered in applications are symmetric, allowing us to reduce the memory footprint for SpMVs by half. However, reusing the matrix introduces data dependencies between subsequent SpMVs, and symmetric SpMVs can result in data conflicts during shared-memory parallelization. Previous research has often focused on either matrix reuse or symmetry, failing to leverage both aspects effectively. This paper proposes a unified, memory-efficient approach called Me-MPK that takes advantage of both cache reuse and matrix symmetry for MPK on shared-memory multi-core systems. We first introduce a unified dependency graph for a sparse matrix, which represents all potential data dependencies and conflicts. Next, we perform architecture-aware recursive partitioning on this graph to create subgraphs and formulate a separating subgraph that decouples all dependencies and conflicts among the subgraphs. These independent subgraphs are then scheduled for parallel execution of SpMV or symmetric SpMV in a specified order to optimize cache reuse. We apply Me-MPK in two s-Step Krylov subspace solvers, and our evaluations show that Me-MPK significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art solutions, delivering an average speedup of up to 2.00X and 1.86X on X86 and ARM CPUs, respectively. As a result, we achieve overall speedup in the sparse solvers of up to $\mathbf{1. 6 5 X}$ and $\mathbf{1. 5 8 X}$.
items.abstract_zh: 本文重点关注优化矩阵幂核 (MPK)，该核依赖于使用相同稀疏矩阵的一系列稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV)。 MPK 是 Krylov 子空间方法的重要组成部分，用于求解各个领域（包括电路仿真）中的大型稀疏线性系统。 MPK 提供了缓存中矩阵重用的潜力，这可以加速内存限制的稀疏求解器。此外，应用程序中遇到的许多稀疏矩阵都是对称的，这使我们能够将 SpMV 的内存占用量减少一半。然而，重用矩阵会引入后续 SpMV 之间的数据依赖性，并且对称 SpMV 可能会导致共享内存并行化期间的数据冲突。以前的研究通常集中在矩阵重用或对称性上，未能有效地利用这两个方面。本文提出了一种称为 Me-MPK 的统一、内存高效方法，该方法利用共享内存多核系统上 MPK 的缓存重用和矩阵对称性。我们首先引入稀疏矩阵的统一依赖图，它表示所有潜在的数据依赖关系和冲突。接下来，我们对该图执行架构感知递归分区以创建子图并制定一个分离子图，以解耦子图之间的所有依赖关系和冲突。然后将这些独立的子图安排为按指定顺序并行执行 SpMV 或对称 SpMV，以优化缓存重用。我们在两个 s-Step Krylov 子空间求解器中应用 Me-MPK，我们的评估表明 Me-MPK 显着优于当前最先进的解决方案，在 X86 和 ARM CPU 上分别实现高达 2.00 倍和 1.86 倍的平均加速。因此，我们在稀疏求解器中实现了高达 $\mathbf{1 的整体加速。 6 5 X}$ 和 $\mathbf{1. 5 8 X}$。

items.title: ADVeRL-ELF: ADVersarial ELF Malware Generation using Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Deep learning models are now pervasive in the malware detection domain owing to their high accuracy and performance efficiency. However, it is critical to analyze the robustness of these models by introducing adversarial attacks that can expose their vulnerabilities. Nevertheless, adversarial malware generation problem for Linux has not been well-investigated. In this work, we propose a novel reinforcement learning framework, ADVeRL-ELF to generate adversarial ELF malware by adding semantic NOPs within the executable region. Experimental results show that ADVeRL-ELF achieved an attack success rate of 59.5%. These adversarial malware can be leveraged to harden the Linux based malware detection systems.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型由于其高精度和性能效率而在恶意软件检测领域中普遍存在。然而，通过引入可能暴露其漏洞的对抗性攻击来分析这些模型的稳健性至关重要。然而，Linux 的对抗性恶意软件生成问题尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的强化学习框架 ADVeRL-ELF，通过在可执行区域内添加语义 NOP 来生成对抗性 ELF 恶意软件。实验结果表明ADVeRL-ELF取得了59.5%的攻击成功率。这些对抗性恶意软件可用于强化基于 Linux 的恶意软件检测系统。

items.title: In-Memory Arithmetic: Enabling Division with Stochastic Logic.
items.abstract: Designing an efficient arithmetic division circuit has long been a major challenge. Traditional binary computation methods rely on complex algorithms that require multiple cycles, complex control logic, and substantial hardware resources. Implementing division with emerging in-memory computing technologies is even more challenging due to susceptibility to noise, process variation, and the complexity of binary division. In this work, we propose an in-memory division architecture leveraging stochastic computing (SC), an emerging technology known for its high fault tolerance and low-cost design. Our approach utilizes a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ)-based memory architecture to efficiently execute logic-in-memory operations. Experimental results across various process variation conditions demonstrate the robustness of our method against hardware variations. To assess its practical effectiveness, we apply our approach to the Retinex Algorithm for image enhancement, demonstrating its viability in real-world applications.
items.abstract_zh: 设计高效的算术除法电路长期以来一直是一个重大挑战。传统的二进制计算方法依赖于复杂的算法，需要多个周期、复杂的控制逻辑和大量的硬件资源。由于对噪声、过程变化和二进制除法的复杂性的敏感性，使用新兴内存计算技术实现除法更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用随机计算（SC）的内存划分架构，这是一种以其高容错性和低成本设计而闻名的新兴技术。我们的方法利用基于磁隧道结 (MTJ) 的内存架构来高效执行内存中逻辑操作。各种过程变化条件下的实验结果证明了我们的方法针对硬件变化的鲁棒性。为了评估其实际有效性，我们将我们的方法应用于 Retinex 算法进行图像增强，展示了其在实际应用中的可行性。

items.title: A Scalable and Robust Compilation Framework for Emitter-Photonic Graph State.
items.abstract: Quantum graph states are critical resources for various quantum algorithms, and also determine essential interconnections in distributed quantum computing. There are two schemes for generating graph states - probabilistic scheme and deterministic scheme. While the all-photonic probabilistic scheme has garnered significant attention, the emitter-photonic deterministic scheme has been proved to be more scalable and feasible across several hardware platforms. This paper studies the GraphState-to-Circuit compilation problem in the context of the deterministic scheme. Previous research has primarily focused on optimizing individual circuit parameters, often neglecting the characteristics of quantum hardware, which results in impractical implementations. Additionally, existing algorithms lack scalability for larger graph sizes. To bridge these gaps, we propose a novel compilation framework that partitions the target graph state into subgraphs, compiles them individually, and subsequently combines and schedules the circuits to maximize emitter resource utilization. Furthermore, we incorporate local complementation to transform graph states and minimize entanglement overhead. Evaluation of our framework on various graph types demonstrates significant reductions in CNOT gates and circuit duration, up to 52% and 56%. Moreover, it enhances the suppression of photon loss, achieving improvements of up to $\times 1.9$.
items.abstract_zh: 量子图状态是各种量子算法的关键资源，也决定了分布式量子计算中的基本互连。有两种生成图状态的方案——概率方案和确定性方案。虽然全光子概率方案引起了广泛关注，但发射器光子确定性方案已被证明在多个硬件平台上更具可扩展性和可行性。本文研究了确定性方案背景下的 GraphState-to-Circuit 编译问题。先前的研究主要集中于优化单个电路参数，往往忽略了量子硬件的特性，这导致了不切实际的实现。此外，现有算法缺乏针对较大图尺寸的可扩展性。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了一种新颖的编译框架，该框架将目标图状态划分为子图，单独编译它们，然后组合和调度电路以最大化发射器资源利用率。此外，我们结合局部互补来转换图状态并最小化纠缠开销。对各种图类型的框架进行的评估表明 CNOT 门和电路持续时间显着减少，分别高达 52% 和 56%。此外，它还增强了对光子损失的抑制，实现了高达$\times 1.9$的改进。

items.title: LA-MTL: Latency-Aware Automated Multi-Task Learning.
items.abstract: Multi-Task Learning (MTL) aims to unify a variety of tasks into a single network for improved training and inference efficiency. This is particularly attractive for real-time applications that require simultaneous execution of multiple workloads in resource-constrained embedded environments. However, most MTL approaches focus on enhancing parameters efficiency and overall tasks metrics, often lacking explicit inference latency awareness in the optimization loop. The design space exploration should not compromise on the parameters efficiency or task accuracy objectives in order to meet latency requirements. To address this, we propose LA-MTL, an automated layer-level MTL policy search that incorporates a novel analytical latency factor (ALF). By accounting for local and global latencies during the MTL policy search, we derive solutions that balance task metrics, parameters efficiency and latency constraints. LA-MTL search on ResNet34 yields solutions with up to 50% lower latency on the Jetson AGX Orin while maintaining competitive metrics in semantic segmentation and depth estimation tasks with a +/-2 p.p., on the CityScapes dataset. Additionally, we achieve a superior parameters efficiency, surpassing the state-of-theart MTL parameters reduction by over 20 p.p. Experiments on benchmark datasets (CityScapes, NYUv2) demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various backbones including ResNet34, MobileNetV2, and MobileOne in its expanded form. Code is available at https://github.com/shamvbs/LA-MTL.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>
items.abstract_zh: 多任务学习（MTL）旨在将各种任务统一到单个网络中，以提高训练和推理效率。这对于需要在资源受限的嵌入式环境中同时执行多个工作负载的实时应用程序尤其有吸引力。然而，大多数 MTL 方法专注于提高参数效率和总体任务指标，通常在优化循环中缺乏明确的推理延迟感知。设计空间探索不应为了满足延迟要求而牺牲参数效率或任务准确性目标。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LA-MTL，这是一种自动化的层级 MTL 策略搜索，其中包含一种新颖的分析延迟因子（ALF）。通过在 MTL 策略搜索过程中考虑本地和全局延迟，我们得出了平衡任务指标、参数效率和延迟约束的解决方案。 ResNet34 上的 LA-MTL 搜索产生的解决方案在 Jetson AGX Orin 上的延迟降低了 50%，同时在 CityScapes 数据集上以 +/-2 p.p. 保持语义分割和深度估计任务中的竞争指标。此外，我们还实现了卓越的参数效率，比最先进的 MTL 参数减少了 20 个百分点以上。对基准数据集（CityScapes、NYUv2）的实验证明了我们的方法在各种主干网络上的有效性，包括 ResNet34、MobileNetV2 和 MobileOne 的扩展形式。代码可在 https://github.com/shamvbs/LA-MTL 获取。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>

items.title: AutoSkewBMT: Autonomously Synthesizing Optimized Integrity Authentication Mechanism for DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: As domain-specific accelerators for deep neural network (DNN) inference gain popularity due to their performance and flexibility advantages over general-purpose systems, the security of accelerator data in memory has emerged as a significant concern. However, the overhead associated with standard memory security measures, such as encryption and integrity authentication, presents a major challenge for accelerators, particularly given the high throughput demands of typical DNN applications [1]. In this work, we present AutoSkewBMT, a security framework that autonomously generates optimized integrity system configurations to enhance the Bonsai Merkle Tree (BMT)-based integrity authentication workflow for DNN accelerators. The framework leverages a novel and efficient design space generation algorithm to optimally skew the BMT for specific workloads. Configurations generated by AutoSkewBMT outperform recent state-of-the-art solutions by up to 32% on general DNN workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 随着用于深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理的领域特定加速器因其相对于通用系统的性能和灵活性优势而受到欢迎，内存中加速器数据的安全性已成为一个重要问题。然而，与标准内存安全措施（例如加密和完整性验证）相关的开销给加速器带来了重大挑战，特别是考虑到典型 DNN 应用的高吞吐量需求 [1]。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AutoSkewBMT，这是一个安全框架，可以自动生成优化的完整性系统配置，以增强 DNN 加速器基于 Bonsai Merkle Tree (BMT) 的完整性身份验证工作流程。 The framework leverages a novel and efficient design space generation algorithm to optimally skew the BMT for specific workloads. Configurations generated by AutoSkewBMT outperform recent state-of-the-art solutions by up to 32% on general DNN workloads.

items.title: Approximate SMT Counting Beyond Discrete Domains.
items.abstract: Satisfiability Modulo Theory (SMT) solvers have advanced automated reasoning, solving complex formulas across discrete and continuous domains. Recent progress in propositional model counting motivates extending SMT capabilities toward model counting, especially for hybrid SMT formulas. Existing approaches, like bit-blasting, are limited to discrete variables, highlighting the challenge of counting solutions projected onto the discrete domain in hybrid formulas. We introduce pact, an SMT model counter for hybrid formulas that uses hashing-based approximate model counting to estimate solutions with theoretical guarantees. pact makes a logarithmic number of SMT solver calls relative to the projection variables, leveraging optimized hash functions. pact achieves significant performance improvements over baselines on a large suite of benchmarks. In particular, out of $\mathbf{1 4, 2 0 2}$ instances, pact successfully finished on 603 instances, while Baseline could only finish on 13 instances.
items.abstract_zh: 可满足性模理论 (SMT) 求解器具有先进的自动推理功能，可求解离散和连续域中的复杂公式。命题模型计数的最新进展促使 SMT 功能扩展到模型计数，特别是对于混合 SMT 公式。现有的方法（例如位爆破）仅限于离散变量，这凸显了在混合公式中对投影到离散域的解决方案进行计数的挑战。我们引入了 pact，一种用于混合公式的 SMT 模型计数器，它使用基于散列的近似模型计数来估计具有理论保证的解决方案。 pact 利用优化的哈希函数，相对于投影变量进行对数数量的 SMT 求解器调用。 pact 在大量基准测试中实现了比基线显着的性能改进。特别是，在 $\mathbf{1 4, 2 0 2}$ 实例中，pact 成功完成了 603 个实例，而 Baseline 只能完成 13 个实例。

items.title: Few-shot Learning on AMS Circuits and Its Application to Parasitic Capacitance Prediction.
items.abstract: Graph representation learning is a powerful method to extract features from graph-structured data, such as analog/mixed-signal (AMS) circuits. However, training deep learning models for AMS designs is severely limited by the scarcity of integrated circuit design data. In this work, we present CircuitGPS, a few-shot learning method for parasitic effect prediction in AMS circuits. The circuit netlist is represented as a heterogeneous graph, with the coupling capacitance modeled as a link. CircuitGPS is pre-trained on link prediction and fine-tuned on edge regression. The proposed method starts with a small-hop sampling technique that converts a link or a node into a subgraph. Then, the subgraph embeddings are learned with a hybrid graph Transformer. Additionally, CircuitGPS integrates a low-cost positional encoding that summarizes the positional and structural information of the sampled subgraph. CircuitGPS improves the accuracy of coupling existence by at least 20% and reduces the MAE of capacitance estimation by at least 0.067 compared to existing methods. Our method demonstrates strong inherent scalability, enabling direct application to diverse AMS circuit designs through zero-shot learning. Furthermore, the ablation studies provide valuable insights into graph models for representation learning.
items.abstract_zh: 图表示学习是从图结构数据（例如模拟/混合信号（AMS）电路）中提取特征的强大方法。然而，由于集成电路设计数据的稀缺，AMS 设计的深度学习模型训练受到严重限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CircuitGPS，这是一种用于 AMS 电路中寄生效应预测的几次学习方法。电路网表表示为异构图，耦合电容建模为链路。 CircuitGPS 针对链路预测进行了预训练，并针对边缘回归进行了微调。所提出的方法从小跳采样技术开始，将链接或节点转换为子图。然后，使用混合图 Transformer 学习子图嵌入。此外，CircuitGPS 还集成了一种低成本位置编码，可总结采样子图的位置和结构信息。与现有方法相比，CircuitGPS将耦合存在的精度提高了至少20%，并将电容估计的MAE降低了至少0.067。我们的方法展示了强大的固有可扩展性，能够通过零样本学习直接应用于各种 AMS 电路设计。此外，消融研究为表示学习的图模型提供了有价值的见解。

items.title: VSpGEMM: Exploiting Versal ACAP for High-Performance SpGEMM Acceleration.
items.abstract: Sparse general matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) serves as a fundamental operation in real-world applications such as deep learning. Different from general matrix multiplication, matrices in SpGEMM are highly sparse and therefore require a compact representation. This places an additional burden on data preprocessing and exchanging and also causes irregular memory access patterns, which can in turn lead to communication and computation bottlenecks. To break these bottlenecks, we present VSpGEMM, a hardware accelerator for SpGEMM that is tailored and optimized on Versal ACAP. Firstly, a new storage format called BCSX is proposed in VSpGEMM, which offers a unified and block-wise compression strategy to deal with both row-major and columnmajor representation of non-zero data, enabling fixed-pattern memory accesses and effective data preloading. Secondly, a multi-level tiling mechanism is introduced to decompose the holistic SpGEMM into multiple computation granularities that fit into the AI Engines (AIEs) on Versal in a hierarchical manner, enhancing data reuse. Thirdly, a hybrid partitioning scheme is presented to orchestrate both the AIEs and programmable logic (PL) for intermediate product merging, which together resolve the issues of high memory utilization and communication demand. Experimental results demonstrate a $2.65 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art (SOTA) GEMM design on Versal and an average $33.62 \times$ improvement in energy efficiency compared to cuSPARSE on RTX 4090 GPU, showing the efficacy of VSpGEMM.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是深度学习等现实应用中的基本运算。与一般的矩阵乘法不同，SpGEMM 中的矩阵高度稀疏，因此需要紧凑的表示。这给数据预处理和交换带来了额外的负担，并且还导致不规则的内存访问模式，进而导致通信和计算瓶颈。为了打破这些瓶颈，我们推出了 VSpGEMM，这是一款在 Versal ACAP 上定制和优化的 SpGEMM 硬件加速器。首先，VSpGEMM 中提出了一种名为 BCSX 的新存储格式，它提供了统一的分块压缩策略来处理非零数据的行优先和列优先表示，从而实现固定模式内存访问和有效的数据预加载。其次，引入多级平铺机制，将整体 SpGEMM 分解为多个计算粒度，以分层方式融入 Versal 上的 AI 引擎（AIE），增强数据重用。第三，提出了一种混合分区方案来编排AIE和可编程逻辑（PL）以进行中间产品合并，共同解决高内存利用率和通信需求的问题。实验结果表明，与 RTX 4090 GPU 上的 cuSPARSE 相比，Versal 上的速度比最先进 (SOTA) GEMM 设计提高了 2.65 美元，能源效率平均提高了 33.62 美元，这显示了 VSpGEMM 的功效。

items.title: ReMaP: Macro Placement by Recursively Prototyping and Periphery-Guided Relocating.
items.abstract: We introduce the ReMaP framework, which generates expert-quality macro placements through recursively prototyping and periphery-guided relocating. A key innovation is ABPlace, an angle-based analytical method that arranges macros along an ellipse to facilitate a rough distribution near the periphery, while optimizing dataflow, minimizing overlap, and ensuring convergence. Based on the results of ABPlace, an efficient heuristic is proposed to position macros along the chip’s periphery, mirroring practices often employed by experts. Our framework outperforms three leading macro placers in both WNS and TNS across eight test cases, achieving improvements up to 34.15% in WNS and 65.39% in TNS, as tested on the popular OpenROAD-flow-scripts infrastructure. Additionally, our parameter autotuning method further improves timing by 8.75%.
items.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 ReMaP 框架，该框架通过递归原型设计和外围引导重定位生成专家质量的宏布局。一项关键创新是 ABPlace，这是一种基于角度的分析方法，可沿椭圆排列宏，以促进外围附近的粗略分布，同时优化数据流、最小化重叠并确保收敛。根据 ABPlace 的结果，提出了一种有效的启发式方法，将宏沿芯片外围定位，这反映了专家经常采用的做法。在八个测试用例中，我们的框架在 WNS 和 TNS 中的性能优于三个领先的宏放置器，在流行的 OpenROAD-flow-scripts 基础设施上进行测试时，WNS 中实现了高达 34.15% 的改进，TNS 中实现了 65.39% 的改进。此外，我们的参数自动调整方法进一步将时序提高了 8.75%。

items.title: Logic Optimization Meets SAT: A Novel Framework for Circuit-SAT Solving.
items.abstract: The Circuit Satisfiability (CSAT) problem, a variant of the Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) problem, plays a critical role in integrated circuit design and verification. However, existing SAT solvers, optimized for Conjunctive Normal Form (CNF), often struggle with the intrinsic complexity of circuit structures when directly applied to CSAT instances. To address this challenge, we propose a novel preprocessing framework that leverages advanced logic synthesis techniques and a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to optimize CSAT problem instances. The framework introduces a cost-customized Look-Up Table (LUT) mapping strategy that prioritizes solving efficiency, effectively transforming circuits into simplified forms tailored for SAT solvers. Our method achieves significant runtime reductions across diverse industrial-scale CSAT benchmarks, seamlessly integrating with state-of-the-art SAT solvers. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate up to $63 \%$ reduction in solving time compared to conventional approaches, highlighting the potential of EDAdriven innovations to advance SAT-solving capabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 电路可满足性（CSAT）问题是布尔可满足性（SAT）问题的变体，在集成电路设计和验证中起着至关重要的作用。然而，针对合取范式 (CNF) 进行优化的现有 SAT 求解器在直接应用于 CSAT 实例时，常常会遇到电路结构固有的复杂性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的预处理框架，该框架利用先进的逻辑综合技术和强化学习（RL）代理来优化 CSAT 问题实例。该框架引入了成本定制的查找表（LUT）映射策略，优先考虑求解效率，有效地将电路转换为为 SAT 求解器量身定制的简化形式。我们的方法在各种工业规模的 CSAT 基准测试中显着缩短了运行时间，并与最先进的 SAT 求解器无缝集成。广泛的实验评估表明，与传统方法相比，求解时间最多可减少 63 \%$，凸显了 EDA 驱动的创新在提高 SAT 求解能力方面的潜力。

items.title: Grasp: Group-based Prediction of Activation Sparsity for Fast LLM Inference.
items.abstract: Optimizing LLM inference has become increasingly important as the demand for efficient on-device deployments grows. To reduce the computational overhead in the MLP components, which account for a significant portion of LLM inference, ReLU-fied LLMs have been introduced to maximize activation sparsity. Several sparsity prediction methods have been developed to efficiently skip unnecessary memory accesses and computations by predicting activation sparsity. In this paper, we propose a novel magnitude-based, training-free sparsity prediction technique called Grasp that builds on the existing sign bitbased method for ReLU-fied LLMs. The proposed method enhances prediction accuracy by grouping values considering the distribution within vectors and explicitly accounting for statistical outliers. This allows us to estimate the impact of each element more accurately yet in an efficient way, improving both activation sparsity prediction accuracy and computational efficiency. Compared to the-state-of-the-art technique, Grasp achieves higher sparsity prediction accuracy and $11 \%$ higher skipping efficiency, which corresponds to $1.85 \times$ speedup against the dense inference.
items.abstract_zh: 随着对高效设备上部署的需求不断增长，优化 LLM 推理变得越来越重要。为了减少 MLP 组件（占 LLM 推理的很大一部分）的计算开销，引入了 ReLU 化的 LLM 来最大化激活稀疏性。已经开发了几种稀疏性预测方法，通过预测激活稀疏性来有效地跳过不必要的内存访问和计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Grasp 的新颖的基于幅度、免训练的稀疏性预测技术，该技术建立在现有的基于符号位的 ReLU-fied LLM 方法的基础上。所提出的方法通过考虑向量内的分布对值进行分组并明确考虑统计异常值来提高预测准确性。这使我们能够更准确、更有效地估计每个元素的影响，从而提高激活稀疏性预测的准确性和计算效率。与最先进的技术相比，Grasp 实现了更高的稀疏性预测精度和 $11 \%$ 高的跳跃效率，相当于针对密集推理的 $1.85 \times$ 加速。

items.title: Contention-Aware Forecasting of Energy Efficiency through Sequence-Based Models in Modern Heterogeneous Processors.
items.abstract: We present EffiCast, the first methodology for contentionaware energy efficiency forecasting in clustered heterogeneous processors using sequence-based models. Through extensive experimental analysis of energy efficiency sensitivities across core types, voltage/frequency (V/f) levels, application phases, and resource contention scenarios, EffiCast uncovers key factors driving energy efficiency variability in modern heterogeneous processors. Leveraging structured data generation and advanced LSTM- and Transformer-based models, EffiCast achieves unprecedented accuracy while outperforming state-of-the-art predictive techniques. Deployed on a real heterogenous processor with Intel’s oneDNN acceleration, EffiCast delivers inference latencies as low as 1.82 ms per sequence, enabling seamless integration into proactive resource management frameworks. With the ability to forecast future system states under dynamic workloads, EffiCast sets a new standard for energy efficiency optimization in energy-constrained application domains.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 EffiCast，这是第一个使用基于序列的模型在集群异构处理器中进行竞争感知能源效率预测的方法。通过对跨核心类型、电压/频率 (V/f) 级别、应用阶段和资源争用场景的能效敏感性进行广泛的实验分析，EffiCast 揭示了现代异构处理器中驱动能效变化的关键因素。利用结构化数据生成以及基于 LSTM 和 Transformer 的先进模型，EffiCast 实现了前所未有的准确性，同时超越了最先进的预测技术。 EffiCast 部署在具有英特尔 oneDNN 加速功能的真正异构处理器上，每个序列的推理延迟低至 1.82 毫秒，从而能够无缝集成到主动资源管理框架中。凭借预测动态工作负载下的未来系统状态的能力，EffiCast 为能源受限应用领域的能效优化设立了新标准。

items.title: Invited: Enhancing Test Quality by Targeting Timing Marginalities Due to Process Variations.
items.abstract: IC test methodologies all generate scan tests based on logical stuck-at and timing fault models that assume only a single passive physical defect localized at some circuit node. However, transistors fabricated in advanced technologies are subject to increasing random process variations that can significantly impact multiple devices, and result in highly nonlinear circuit behavior under specific circuit operating conditions. These changes can cause failures missed by current test methods that mostly target passive defects. We make the case for “variation aware” testing of high-performance digital circuits that prioritizes targeting changes in the most performance sensitive device parameters. Our specific focus in this paper is on developing reliable tests for timing failures caused by random variations in transistor threshold voltages.
items.abstract_zh: IC 测试方法均基于逻辑固定和时序故障模型生成扫描测试，这些模型假设仅存在位于某个电路节点的单个无源物理缺陷。然而，采用先进技术制造的晶体管会受到越来越多的随机工艺变化的影响，这些变化可能会严重影响多个器件，并导致特定电路工作条件下的高度非线性电路行为。 These changes can cause failures missed by current test methods that mostly target passive defects.我们提出了对高性能数字电路进行“变化感知”测试的理由，该测试优先考虑对性能最敏感的设备参数的变化。我们在本文中的具体重点是针对晶体管阈值电压随机变化引起的时序故障开发可靠的测试。

items.title: WISEDRAM: A Reliable Bitwise In-DRAM Accelerator.
items.abstract: Processing-in-Memory (PIM) aims to address the costly data movement between processing elements and memory subsystem, by computing simple operations inside DRAM in parallel. The large capacity, wide activation size during cell access, and the maturity of DRAM technology, make this technology a great choice for PIM techniques. Nonetheless, vulnerability to process variation and noises, internal leakage of the cells, and high latency in cell access, limit the utilization of processing in DRAMs for real-world applications. This work proposes a fast PIM technique, called WISEDRAM, which leverages one row of special cells, called X-cells, to enable in-DRAM bulk-bitwise operations. Unlike previous approaches, WISEDRAM retains the conventional DRAM cell access procedure, thereby ensuring the reliability of cell access for reads and writes at a level equivalent to that of conventional DRAMs. Compared with the state-of-the-art, WISEDRAM exhibits $22 \%$ reduction in average bitwise computation latency and a $71 \%$ improvement in XOR operation execution speed, while imposing an area overhead of $1.6 \%$.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 旨在通过在 DRAM 内并行计算简单操作来解决处理元件和内存子系统之间成本高昂的数据移动问题。大容量、单元存取期间的宽激活尺寸以及DRAM技术的成熟，使得该技术成为PIM技术的绝佳选择。尽管如此，易受工艺变化和噪声影响、单元的内部泄漏以及单元访问的高延迟限制了 DRAM 处理在实际应用中的利用。这项工作提出了一种称为 WISEDRAM 的快速 PIM 技术，它利用一排称为 X 单元的特殊单元来实现 DRAM 中的批量按位操作。与之前的方法不同，WISEDRAM保留了传统DRAM单元访问流程，从而确保了单元读写访问的可靠性与传统DRAM相当。与最先进的技术相比，WISEDRAM 的平均按位计算延迟降低了 22 \%$，异或运算执行速度提高了 71 \%$，同时带来了 $1.6 \%$ 的面积开销。

items.title: ACRS: Adjacent Computation Resource Sharing among Partitioned GPU Sub-Cores.
items.abstract: Modern GPUs typically segment Streaming Multiprocessors (SMs) into sub-cores (e.g. 4 sub-cores) to reduce power consumption and chip area. However, this partitioned design prevents potential task distributions across sub-cores, impairing overall execution efficiency. In this paper, we explore the performance benefit of sharing hardware resources among sub-cores and identify functional units (FUs) as critical components for compute-intensive applications. Moreover, our observations reveal that instructions residing in operand collectors can be obstructed by back-end FUs, but there is a high probability that unoccupied FUs are available in adjacent sub-cores during such blockages. In response, we introduce the adjacent computation resource sharing (ACRS) framework to efficiently utilize these unoccupied units among sub-cores. ACRS has two key modules: Shared FU Issue (SF_ISSUE) and Shared FU Write Back (SF_WriteBack). SF_ISSUE monitors the status of operand collectors and functional units, and offloads instructions from blocked sub-cores to unoccupied resources. Meanwhile, SF_WriteBack routes results back to the original sub-core.To minimize wiring overhead, each sub-core is assigned a fixed target core for sharing. We design a series of matching policies and finally filter out the most effective sequential method. Evaluation results show that ACRS improves performance by up to $46.4 \%$, with an average of $14.1 \%$ over the traditional partitioned architecture, while reducing energy consumption by $8.3 \%$. Besides, ACRS achieves an additional 12.3% performance improvement compared with the SOTA method.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 GPU 通常将流式多处理器 (SM) 分割为子核（例如 4 个子核），以减少功耗和芯片面积。然而，这种分区设计阻止了潜在的跨子核心的任务分配，从而损害了整体执行效率。在本文中，我们探讨了在子核之间共享硬件资源的性能优势，并将功能单元（FU）确定为计算密集型应用程序的关键组件。此外，我们的观察表明，驻留在操作数收集器中的指令可能会被后端 FU 阻塞，但在这种阻塞期间，相邻子核中很可能存在未占用的 FU。为此，我们引入了相邻计算资源共享（ACRS）框架，以有效地利用子核之间的这些未占用单元。 ACRS 有两个关键模块：共享 FU 发布 (SF_ISSUE) 和共享 FU 写回 (SF_WriteBack)。 SF_ISSUE 监视操作数收集器和功能单元的状态，并将指令从阻塞的子核卸载到未占用的资源。同时，SF_WriteBack将结果路由回原始子核。为了最小化布线开销，每个子核被分配一个固定的目标核来共享。我们设计了一系列的匹配策略，最终筛选出最有效的顺序方法。评估结果显示，ACRS 性能提升高达 $46.4 \%$，比传统分区架构平均提升 $14.1 \%$，同时降低能耗 $8.3 \%$。此外，与SOTA方法相比，ACRS额外实现了12.3%的性能提升。

items.title: A Cutting-Edge Parallel Solver for Scalable Power Grid Analysis Using Nested Domain Decomposition.
items.abstract: As transistor scaling approaches sub-5 nm technologies, power distribution networks (PDNs) in integrated circuits have grown increasingly complex, with billions to trillions of nodes. Simultaneously, reduced noise margins and increased power density necessitate more accurate and efficient power grid analysis. Traditional methods for solving large-scale PDNs, especially those requiring the solution of sparse linear systems, face significant challenges due to high computational costs. Although domain decomposition methods (DDM) allow for efficient parallel computation, the size of the dense global Schur complement grows excessively large as the number of partitions increases, limiting scalability and imposing substantial computational burdens. This paper introduces an efficient parallel nested domain decomposition solver that incorporates a parallel Schur complement computation strategy and intermediate Schur complement to address these challenges. Experimental results demonstrate that by introducing an intermediate Schur complement, the size of the global Schur complement is significantly reduced, achieving an average $1.70 \times$ speedup in computation, which results in a $1.30 \times$ speedup for the entire solver compared to the conventional DDM parallel solver.
items.abstract_zh: 随着晶体管尺寸接近 5 nm 以下技术，集成电路中的配电网络 (PDN) 变得越来越复杂，拥有数十亿到数万亿个节点。同时，噪声容限的降低和功率密度的提高需要更准确、更高效的电网分析。求解大规模 PDN 的传统方法，尤其是那些需要求解稀疏线性系统的方法，由于高计算成本而面临重大挑战。尽管域分解方法 (DDM) 允许高效的并行计算，但随着分区数量的增加，密集全局 Schur 补集的大小会变得过大，从而限制了可扩展性并带来了巨大的计算负担。本文介绍了一种高效的并行嵌套域分解求解器，该求解器结合了并行 Schur 补计算策略和中间 Schur 补来解决这些挑战。实验结果表明，通过引入中间Schur补集，全局Schur补集的大小显着减小，计算速度平均提高了$1.70\times$，与传统的DDM并行求解器相比，整个求解器的速度提高了$1.30\times$。

items.title: Property-driven Parallel Symbolic Model Checking of LTL.
items.abstract: Model checking is an automated method used to formally verify systems by checking them against properties. However, a major problem in model checking is the state explosion. To overcome this challenge, one approach is to utilize parallel processing capabilities to either speed up computations or handle larger-scale problems. Explicit model checking has lower computational complexity and can be easily parallelized. There are numerous parallel explicit model checking algorithms available in the literature. Symbolic model checking offers significant advantages over explicit model checking in terms of problem scalability and verification speed. However, treating states encountered during the search as sets poses a challenge in devising efficient parallel algorithms. As a result, current research on parallelizing symbolic model checking has primarily focused on reachability analysis or safety properties, rather than attempting to parallelize the nested fixpoint calculations. In this paper, we propose a novel property-driven approach for parallel symbolic model checking of full LTL. Our algorithm introduces a fair model state labelling function that forms a partition of the nested fixpoint across the product combining the model and the property Büchi automaton. The experimental results demonstrate significant speedup, ranging from 2.81 to 17.19 times compared to sequential approaches on a 32-core machine. Moreover, in comparison to existing parallel model checking methods, our approach not only surpasses those relying on BDD libraries with a maximum improvement of up to 134% and an average improvement of 33.1% but also demonstrates significant superiority over the state-of-theart parallel explicit model checker.
items.abstract_zh: 模型检查是一种自动化方法，用于通过根据属性检查系统来正式验证系统。然而，模型检查的一个主要问题是状态爆炸。为了克服这一挑战，一种方法是利用并行处理能力来加速计算或处理更大规模的问题。显式模型检查计算复杂度较低，并且可以轻松并行化。文献中有许多并行显式模型检查算法。就问题可扩展性和验证速度而言，符号模型检查比显式模型检查具有显着优势。然而，将搜索过程中遇到的状态视为集合对设计高效的并行算法提出了挑战。因此，当前关于并行化符号模型检查的研究主要集中在可达性分析或安全属性上，而不是尝试并行化嵌套固定点计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的属性驱动方法，用于完整 LTL 的并行符号模型检查。我们的算法引入了公平模型状态标记函数，该函数形成了产品中嵌套固定点的划分，结合了模型和属性 Büchi 自动机。实验结果表明，与 32 核机器上的顺序方法相比，速度显着提高，范围为 2.81 至 17.19 倍。此外，与现有的并行模型检查方法相比，我们的方法不仅超越了依赖 BDD 库的方法，最大改进高达 134％，平均改进为 33.1％，而且还表现出优于最先进的并行显式模型检查器的显着优势。

items.title: To Tackle Cost-Skew Tradeoff: An Adaptive Learning Approach for Hub Node Selection.
items.abstract: In chip design, skew is a pivotal factor that significantly influences the overall performance for routing. A major challenge is how to achieve an appropriate trade-off between the total wire-length cost and skew. Selecting hub nodes is an effective method to improve this cost-skew trade-off. In this paper, we propose a novel reinforcement learning-based method for hub node selection, where our key idea is leveraging an effective adaptive learning strategy. Moreover, our approach is particularly suitable for solving large-scale routing instances. The empirical results suggest that our method can achieve promising performance on both small-scale and large-scale clock nets, implying its potential practical significance in EDA.
items.abstract_zh: 在芯片设计中，时滞是显着影响布线整体性能的关键因素。主要挑战是如何在总线长成本和偏斜之间实现适当的权衡。选择中心节点是改善这种成本倾斜权衡的有效方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的新型中心节点选择方法，其中我们的关键思想是利用有效的自适应学习策略。此外，我们的方法特别适合解决大规模路由实例。实证结果表明，我们的方法可以在小规模和大规模时钟网络上实现良好的性能，这意味着它在 EDA 中具有潜在的实际意义。

items.title: HiSpTRSV: Exploring Tile-Level Parallelism for SpTRSV Acceleration on FPGAs.
items.abstract: Sparse Triangular Solve (SpTRSV) is a critical level2 kernel in sparse Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS). While Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) accelerators for SpTRSV focus on optimizing individual tiles, they overlook intertile parallelism. Designing an inter-tile parallelism accelerator poses challenges, including constructing fine-grained dependency graph, handling communication overhead, and balancing workloads. HiSpTRSV addresses these challenges through dependency graph parsing, tile-based highly parallel algorithm, filtering mechanisms, and bidirectional matching with modular indexing. Experiments show that HiSpTRSV outperforms the state-of-the-art SpTRSV accelerator in terms of a 34.3% performance improvement. HiSpTRSV achieves a $3.58 \times$ speedup and $9.59 \times$ higher energy efficiency compared to GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏三角求解 (SpTRSV) 是稀疏基本线性代数子程序 (BLAS) 中的关键 2 级内核。虽然 SpTRSV 的现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 加速器专注于优化各个图块，但它们忽略了图块间的并行性。设计瓦片间并行加速器提出了挑战，包括构建细粒度依赖图、处理通信开销和平衡工作负载。 HiSpTRSV 通过依赖图解析、基于图块的高度并行算法、过滤机制以及模块化索引的双向匹配来解决这些挑战。实验表明，HiSpTRSV 的性能优于最先进的 SpTRSV 加速器，性能提升了 34.3%。与 GPU 相比，HiSpTRSV 实现了 3.58 美元的加速和 9.59 美元的能源效率。

items.title: ChipletEM: Physics-Based 2.5D and 3D Chiplet Heterogeneous Integration Electromigration Signoff Tool Using Coupled Stress and Thermal Simulation.
items.abstract: A review of recent studies on up-to-date IC shows that electromigration (EM) has become one of the major challenges for 2.5D and 3D chiplet heterogeneous integration (CHI) systems. However, most existing researches on EM are focusing on 2D power delivery network without taking Through Silicon Via (TSV) and non-uniformly thermal distribution condition between dies into consideration. To address this problem, this article proposes a novel EM simulation tool ChipletEM for 2.5D and 3D CHI systems. A finite volume method (FVM) based electrical-thermal co-simulation model is employed to get initial temperature and current density inside TSV. And a finite difference time domain (FDTD) solver is used for hydrostatic stress simulation for both nucleation and postvoiding phases. Thermal migration (TM) effect is also considered in the solver. An analytical TSV thermal solver is employed for temperature distribution simulation and thermal dependent current simulation. The FDTD EM solver and TSV thermal solver are coupled together at each time step so that the interaction among EM stress, thermal stress, void growth, resistance change, IR drop and Joule heating effects can be simulated within a single simulation framework. Simulation results show that compared with Finite Element Method (FEM) tool, average error is 0.61% in nucleation phase and 2.4% in growth phase. And the error of proposed method is reduced from 22.22% to 5.24% compared with state of art atomic flux divergence (AFD) method.
items.abstract_zh: 对最新 IC 研究的回顾表明，电迁移 (EM) 已成为 2.5D 和 3D 小芯片异构集成 (CHI) 系统的主要挑战之一。然而，大多数现有的 EM 研究都集中在 2D 电力传输网络上，而没有考虑硅通孔 (TSV) 和芯片之间的不均匀热分布条件。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于 2.5D 和 3D CHI 系统的新型电磁仿真工具 ChipletEM。采用基于有限体积法 (FVM) 的电热联合仿真模型来获得 TSV 内部的初始温度和电流密度。时域有限差分 (FDTD) 求解器用于成核和空洞后阶段的静水应力模拟。求解器中还考虑了热迁移 (TM) 效应。采用分析 TSV 热解算器进行温度分布仿真和热相关电流仿真。 FDTD EM 求解器和 TSV 热求解器在每个时间步耦合在一起，以便可以在单个仿真框架内模拟 EM 应力、热应力、空洞生长、电阻变化、IR 降和焦耳热效应之间的相互作用。仿真结果表明，与有限元法（FEM）工具相比，形核阶段平均误差为0.61%，生长阶段平均误差为2.4%。与现有的原子通量散度（AFD）方法相比，该方法的误差从 22.22% 降低到 5.24%。

items.title: BPUFuzzer: Effective Fuzz Testing for Branching Transient Execution Vulnerabilities of RISC-V CPU.
items.abstract: This paper presents BPUFuzzer, a fuzz testing tool for detecting branching transient execution vulnerabilities in CPU RTL design. BPUFuzzer addresses two key challenges: generating testcases that capture complex control flows, and extracting essential data from vast hardware states to guide testcase selection. Utilizing a control flow graph-based testcase generation strategy with anomaly detection and employing fitness and coverage metrics, BPUFuzzer works on testcases that cover broader program flows and deliberately selects testcases to discover transient execution vulnerabilities effectively. When applied on RISC-V Boom v3, BPUFuzzer uncovered more Spectre types than the state-of-the-arts, including a previously unidentified variant, named Spectre-LOOP.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BPUFuzzer，这是一种模糊测试工具，用于检测 CPU RTL 设计中的分支瞬态执行漏洞。 BPUFuzzer 解决了两个关键挑战：生成捕获复杂控制流的测试用例，以及从大量硬件状态中提取基本数据以指导测试用例选择。 BPUFuzzer 利用基于控制流图的测试用例生成策略和异常检测，并采用适应度和覆盖率指标，处理覆盖更广泛程序流的测试用例，并故意选择测试用例以有效发现瞬态执行漏洞。当应用于 RISC-V Boom v3 时，BPUFuzzer 发现了比最先进技术更多的 Spectre 类型，包括之前未识别的变体，名为 Spectre-LOOP。

items.title: Local-GS: An Order-Independent Gaussian Splatting Training Accelerator Exploiting Splat Locality.
items.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting has emerged as the SOTA approach for 3D representation and view synthesis. While Gaussian Splatting has demonstrated impressive capability and rendering quality on desktop GPUs, achieving on-demand training on resource-constrained edge devices is still challenging. In this work, we identified the training bottleneck from a few perspectives including algorithm splat locality and the limited memory and hardware under-utilization. To address these problems, we present Local-GS, a 3D Gaussian Splatting training accelerator with order-independent rendering to break the depth-wise data dependency between overlapping Gaussians. We further incorporate a parallel pixel intersection test unit to schedule thread workload based on Gaussian splat locality and improve hardware utilization. A set of unified training-rendering cores are designed to achieve efficient splat-level parallel rendering and gradient propagation. Our Local-GS is implemented in 7 nm and is evaluated by several real-world 3D scenes. Compared to edge Jetson NX GPU, Local-GS achieve 26.9-53 $\times$ training speedup and three orders of magnitude efficiency boost.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯分布已成为 3D 表示和视图合成的 SOTA 方法。虽然 Gaussian Splatting 在桌面 GPU 上展示了令人印象深刻的功能和渲染质量，但在资源受限的边缘设备上实现按需训练仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们从几个角度确定了训练瓶颈，包括算法局部性以及有限的内存和硬件利用率不足。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Local-GS，这是一种 3D 高斯泼溅训练加速器，具有与顺序无关的渲染功能，可以打破重叠高斯之间的深度数据依赖性。我们进一步结合了并行像素交叉测试单元，以基于高斯分布局部性来调度线程工作负载并提高硬件利用率。设计了一组统一的训练渲染核心来实现高效的splat级并行渲染和梯度传播。我们的 Local-GS 在 7 nm 中实现，并通过几个真实的 3D 场景进行评估。与边缘 Jetson NX GPU 相比，Local-GS 实现了 26.9-53 $\times$ 的训练加速和三个数量级的效率提升。

items.title: Libra: A Hybrid-Sparse Attention Accelerator Featuring Multi-Level Workload Balance.
items.abstract: Transformers have delivered exceptional performance and are widely used across various natural language processing (NLP) tasks, owing to their powerful attention mechanism. However, the high computational complexity and substantial memory usage pose significant challenges to inference efficiency. Numerous quantization and value-level sparsification methods have been proposed to overcome these challenges. Since higher sparsity leads to greater acceleration efficiency, leveraging both value-level and bit-level sparsity (hybrid sparsity) can effectively exploit the acceleration potential of the attention mechanism. However, increased sparsity exacerbates load imbalance across compute units, potentially limiting the extent of acceleration benefits. To fully exploit the acceleration potential of hybrid sparsity, we propose Libra, an attention accelerator developed through algorithm-hardware co-design. At the algorithm level, we design the bit-group-based algorithm consisting of filtered bit-group sparsification (FBS) and dynamic bit-group quantization (DBQ) to maximize the utilization of sparsity in attention. FBS imposes structured sparsity on weights, while DBQ introduces dynamic sparsification during the computation of activations. At the hardware level, we design task pool to achieve multi-level workload balance, effectively mitigating the load imbalance among compute units induced by hybrid sparsity. Additionally, different stages in DBQ can be executed in parallel, with each stage operating at distinct bit-widths. To support this, we design an adaptive bit-width architecture that enables simultaneous computations at varying bitwidths. Our experiments demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, Libra achieves up to $1.49 \times \sim 5.89 \times$ speedup and $2.65 \times \sim 10.82 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其强大的注意力机制，Transformer 具有卓越的性能，并广泛应用于各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务。然而，高计算复杂度和大量内存使用对推理效率提出了重大挑战。人们提出了许多量化和值级稀疏方法来克服这些挑战。由于更高的稀疏性会带来更高的加速效率，因此利用值级和比特级稀疏性（混合稀疏性）可以有效地挖掘注意力机制的加速潜力。然而，稀疏性的增加会加剧计算单元之间的负载不平衡，从而可能限制加速优势的程度。为了充分利用混合稀疏性的加速潜力，我们提出了 Libra，这是一种通过算法-硬件协同设计开发的注意力加速器。在算法层面，我们设计了基于位组的算法，包括过滤位组稀疏化（FBS）和动态位组量化（DBQ），以最大限度地利用注意力中的稀疏性。 FBS 对权重施加结构化稀疏性，而 DBQ 在激活计算过程中引入动态稀疏性。在硬件层面，我们设计任务池来实现多级工作负载平衡，有效缓解混合稀疏引起的计算单元之间的负载不平衡。此外，DBQ 中的不同阶段可以并行执行，每个阶段以不同的位宽运行。为了支持这一点，我们设计了一种自适应位宽架构，能够以不同的位宽同时进行计算。我们的实验表明，与最先进（SOTA）的注意力加速器相比，Libra 实现了高达 $1.49 \times \sim 5.89 \times$ 的加速，以及 $2.65 \times \sim 10.82 \times$ 的能源效率提升。

items.title: ResISC: Residue Number System-Based Integrated Sensing and Computing for Efficient Edge AI.
items.abstract: This paper presents ResISC, an RNS-based integrated sensing and computing architecture enabling efficient edge AI. ResISC platform features (i) an in-sensor residue encoder converting images directly to RNS in the analog domain, (ii) an energy-efficient RNS-based processing-near-sensor CNN accelerator utilizing SOT-MRAM, and (iii) an innovative mixed-radix unit for efficient activation operations. By employing selective channel deactivation, ResISC reduces computation overhead by up to $89 \%$, while achieving a $3.4 \times$ improvement in power efficiency and up to a $71 \times$ reduction in execution time compared to processing-in-MRAM platforms. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that ResISC achieves competitive accuracy levels (up to $94.63 \%$ on CIFAR-10) with minimal degradation, making it an ideal solution for power-constrained, real-time edge applications.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 ResISC，一种基于 RNS 的集成传感和计算架构，可实现高效的边缘人工智能。 ResISC 平台具有 (i) 传感器内残差编码器，在模拟域中将图像直接转换为 RNS，(ii) 利用 SOT-MRAM 的基于 RNS 的节能处理近传感器 CNN 加速器，以及 (iii) 用于高效激活操作的创新混合基数单元。通过采用选择性通道停用，与 MRAM 平台中的处理相比，ResISC 可将计算开销减少高达 89 $%$，同时实现功率效率提高 3.4 \times$，并将执行时间减少高达 $71 \times$。对各种数据集的实验表明，ResISC 实现了具有竞争力的准确度水平（在 CIFAR-10 上高达 94.63 $%$），并且降级最小，使其成为功率受限的实时边缘应用的理想解决方案。

items.title: Automated Generation of Decoders for Irregular Instruction Sets Using Information-Theoretic Decision Tree Construction Algorithms.
items.abstract: Instruction decoders are indispensable components of the System-on-Chip design flow and major constituents of instruction set simulators and processor toolchains. The complex and lengthy process of manual decoder design can be greatly alleviated by automated decoder generation tools based on high level instruction definitions. Unfortunately, automatic generation is challenged by the rising complexity of instruction sets as well as irregularities such as non-uniform opcodes, logic propositions on bit fields and multiple or nested specializations. The few available state-of-the-art decoder generation tools either cannot handle irregularities altogether or produce inadequate results, either functionally or w.r.t. performance. Moreover, they are largely ad hoc and do not bear on any of the well-established work on decision tree generation. This paper presents a sophisticated decision-tree algorithm for the problem of generating decoders for irregular instruction sets. Our algorithm has produced fully automated, functionally correct and cost-aware decoders for the SPARC, MIPS32 and ARMv7 instruction sets. Our results prove the application of information-theoretic concepts to decoder generation a most promising approach.
items.abstract_zh: 指令解码器是片上系统设计流程中不可或缺的组件，也是指令集模拟器和处理器工具链的主要组成部分。基于高级指令定义的自动解码器生成工具可以大大减轻手动解码器设计的复杂而漫长的过程。不幸的是，自动生成面临着指令集复杂性不断增加以及不规则性的挑战，例如不一致的操作码、位域上的逻辑命题以及多重或嵌套的专业化。 The few available state-of-the-art decoder generation tools either cannot handle irregularities altogether or produce inadequate results, either functionally or w.r.t.表现。此外，它们很大程度上是临时的，与决策树生成方面的任何成熟工作无关。本文提出了一种复杂的决策树算法，用于解决不规则指令集解码器的生成问题。我们的算法已经为 SPARC、MIPS32 和 ARMv7 指令集生成了全自动、功能正确且具有成本意识的解码器。我们的结果证明，将信息论概念应用于解码器生成是最有前途的方法。

items.title: Lookup Table-based Multiplication-free All-digital DNN Accelerator Featuring Self-Synchronous Pipeline Accumulation.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely applied in our society, yet reducing power consumption due to large-scale matrix computations remains a critical challenge. MADDNESS is a known approach to improving energy efficiency by substituting matrix multiplication with table lookup operations. Previous research has employed large analog computing circuits to convert inputs into LUT addresses, which presents challenges to area efficiency and computational accuracy. This paper proposes a novel MADDNESS-based all-digital accelerator featuring a self-synchronous pipeline accumulator, resulting in a compact, energy-efficient, and PVT-invariant computation. Post-layout simulation using a commercial 22nm process showed that 2.5 × higher energy efficiency (174 TOPS/W) and 5× higher area efficiency (2.01 TOPS/mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>) can be achieved compared to the conventional accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已在我们的社会中广泛应用，但降低大规模矩阵计算带来的功耗仍然是一个严峻的挑战。 MADDNESS 是一种通过用查表操作代替矩阵乘法来提高能源效率的已知方法。先前的研究采用大型模拟计算电路将输入转换为 LUT 地址，这对面积效率和计算精度提出了挑战。本文提出了一种新型的基于 MADDNESS 的全数字加速器，具有自同步流水线累加器，从而实现紧凑、节能和 PVT 不变的计算。使用商用 22nm 工艺进行的布局后仿真表明，与传统工艺相比，可以实现 2.5 倍高的能源效率 (174 TOPS/W) 和 5 倍高的面积效率 (2.01 TOPS/mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>)加速器。

items.title: APSQ: Additive Partial Sum Quantization with Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
items.abstract: DNN accelerators, significantly advanced by model compression and specialized dataflow techniques, have marked considerable progress. However, the frequent access of highprecision partial sums (PSUMs) leads to excessive memory demands in architectures utilizing input/weight stationary dataflows. Traditional compression strategies have typically overlooked PSUM quantization, which may account for 69% of power consumption. This study introduces a novel Additive Partial Sum Quantization (APSQ) method, seamlessly integrating PSUM accumulation into the quantization framework. A grouping strategy that combines APSQ with PSUM quantization enhanced by a reconfigurable architecture is further proposed. The APSQ performs nearly lossless on NLP and CV tasks across BERT, Segformer, and EfficientViT models while compressing PSUMs to INT8. This leads to a notable reduction in energy costs by $\mathbf{2 8-8 7 \%}$. Extended experiments on LLaMA2-7B demonstrate the potential of APSQ for large language models. Code is available at https://github.com/Yonghao-Tan/APSQ.
items.abstract_zh: DNN 加速器通过模型压缩和专门的数据流技术显着进步，取得了长足的进步。然而，频繁访问高精度部分和 (PSUM) 会导致使用输入/权重固定数据流的架构中内存需求过多。传统的压缩策略通常忽略了 PSUM 量化，它可能占功耗的 69%。本研究引入了一种新颖的加法部分和量化 (APSQ) 方法，将 PSUM 累加无缝集成到量化框架中。进一步提出了一种将 APSQ 与通过可重构架构增强的 PSUM 量化相结合的分组策略。 APSQ 在跨 BERT、Segformer 和 EfficientViT 模型的 NLP 和 CV 任务上几乎无损地执行，同时将 PSUM 压缩为 INT8。这导致能源成本显着降低 $\mathbf{2 8-8 7 \%}$。 LLaMA2-7B 上的扩展实验证明了 APSQ 对于大型语言模型的潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/Yonghao-Tan/APSQ 获取。

items.title: New Time-Domain Preconditioners for HB Jacobian of RF Circuits.
items.abstract: Harmonic balance (HB) method is a powerful frequency-domain method used in RF circuit simulations. The key point of HB method is efficiently solving the Jacobian system in Newton’s method. In this paper, we first introduce a new time-domain preconditioner for HB Jacobian. Unlike existing time-domain preconditioners, which cannot balance the efficiency of solving the linear system corresponding to the preconditioner with the reduction in iteration step for strongly nonlinear circuit, the proposed preconditioner successfully addresses both aspects. We also present a new preconditioning method that extends time-domain preconditioners to circuit with distributed devices, which was previously unattainable. Finally, a matrix norm-based metric is proposed to measure the strength of circuit nonlinearity, which can help us a priori choose the appropriate preconditioner.
items.abstract_zh: 谐波平衡 (HB) 方法是射频电路仿真中使用的一种强大的频域方法。 HB方法的关键在于高效求解牛顿法中的雅可比系统。在本文中，我们首先介绍一种新的 HB 雅可比行列式时域预处理器。现有的时域预处理器无法平衡求解与该预处理器相对应的线性系统的效率与减少强非线性电路迭代步数，而与此不同的是，所提出的预处理器成功地解决了这两方面问题。我们还提出了一种新的预处理方法，将时域预处理器扩展到具有分布式设备的电路，这在以前是无法实现的。最后，提出了一种基于矩阵范数的度量来衡量电路非线性的强度，这可以帮助我们先验地选择合适的预处理器。

items.title: DAWN: Accelerating Point Cloud Object Detection via Object-Aware Partitioning and 3D Similarity-Based Filtering.
items.abstract: As a fundamental perception task, 3D point cloud detection has become essential for applications in autonomous driving and robotics. However, point cloud detection faces significant challenges of high computational cost due to complex point processing operations. To address this issue, we propose DAWN, an acceleration framework for point cloud object detection that identifies partial similarities between adjacent frames and reduces computational cost by filtering redundant points. DAWN uses object-aware partitioning that defines boundaries based on previous detection results for localized similarity analysis. Additionally, it applies axis-sorted point selection to refine partitioning for point clouds with non-uniform distribution. An efficient 3D similarity algorithm then filters redundant points to reduce computational load. DAWN enables flexible latencyaccuracy trade-offs by tuning point filtering ratios. Experimental results show that DAWN achieves a $1.59 \times$ average speedup and up to $1.70 \times$ on state-of-the-art detection networks by filtering more than $50 \%$ of points on average, with negligible impact on accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一项基本的感知任务，3D 点云检测对于自动驾驶和机器人技术的应用至关重要。然而，由于复杂的点处理操作，点云检测面临着计算成本高的重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DAWN，一种用于点云对象检测的加速框架，它可以识别相邻帧之间的部分相似性，并通过过滤冗余点来降低计算成本。 DAWN 使用对象感知分区，根据先前的检测结果定义边界，以进行局部相似性分析。此外，它应用轴排序点选择来细化具有非均匀分布的点云的分区。然后，高效的 3D 相似性算法会过滤冗余点以减少计算负载。 DAWN 通过调整点过滤比率来实现灵活的延迟精度权衡。实验结果表明，DAWN 通过平均过滤超过 $50 \%$ 的点，在最先进的检测网络上实现了 $1.59 \times$ 的平均加速，最高可达 $1.70 \times$，对准确性的影响可以忽略不计。

items.title: HIVE: A High-Priority Victim Cache for Accelerating GPU Memory Accesses.
items.abstract: The victim cache was originally designed as a secondary cache to handle misses in the L1 data (L1D) cache in CPUs. However, this design is often sub-optimal for GPUs. Accessing the high-latency L1D cache and its victim cache can lead to significant latency overhead, severely degrading the performance of certain applications. We introduce HIVE, a high-priority victim cache designed to accelerate GPU memory accesses. HIVE handles memory requests first, before they reach the L1D cache. Our experimental results show that HIVE achieves an average performance improvement of $\mathbf{7 7. 1 \%}$ and $\mathbf{2 1. 7 \%}$ compared to the baseline and the state-of-the-art architecture, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 受害者缓存最初被设计为二级缓存，用于处理 CPU 中 L1 数据 (L1D) 缓存中的未命中情况。然而，这种设计对于 GPU 来说通常不是最佳的。访问高延迟 L1D 缓存及其受害者缓存可能会导致显着的延迟开销，从而严重降低某些应用程序的性能。我们引入 HIVE，这是一种高优先级受害者缓存，旨在加速 GPU 内存访问。 HIVE 首先处理内存请求，然后再到达 L1D 缓存。我们的实验结果表明，与基线和最先进的架构相比，HIVE 的平均性能分别提高了 $\mathbf{7 7. 1 \%}$ 和 $\mathbf{2 1. 7 \%}$。

items.title: EDGE: DBMS-Empowered Boolean Decomposition for GIG Synthesis.
items.abstract: Boolean decomposition is a powerful technique in logic synthesis that breaks down Boolean functions into simpler components. Decomposition-based logic synthesis yields high-quality results and is particularly effective when combined with small-window optimization methods in Gate-Inverter Graphs (GIG). However, the efficiency limitations of current methods have constrained their applicability in handling large and complex logic. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework, called EDGE, which leverages modern database techniques to accelerate Boolean decomposition, thereby achieving improved synthesis results while maintaining high efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate a runtime speedup of up to $21 \times$ and an overall reduction in node count of at least $15 \%$ compared to state-of-the-art synthesis methods.
items.abstract_zh: 布尔分解是逻辑综合中的一种强大技术，可将布尔函数分解为更简单的组件。基于分解的逻辑综合可产生高质量的结果，并且与门逆变器图 (GIG) 中的小窗口优化方法结合使用时特别有效。然而，当前方法的效率限制限制了它们在处理大型复杂逻辑时的适用性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种名为 EDGE 的新颖框架，它利用现代数据库技术来加速布尔分解，从而在保持高效率的同时实现改进的合成结果。实验结果表明，与最先进的综合方法相比，运行时加速高达 $21 \times$，节点数量总体减少至少 $15 \%$。

items.title: SuperFast: Fast Supernet Training Using Initial Knowledge.
items.abstract: Once-for-all based neural architecture search (NAS) proposes to train a supernet once and extract specialized subnets from it for efficient deployment. This decoupling between training and search enables easy multi-target deployment without retraining. Nevertheless, the initial training cost has remained extremely high, with SOTA approaches like ElasticViT and NASViT taking more than 72 and 83 GPU days respectively. While other approaches have tried to accelerate the training by warming up the largest model in the search space, we argue that this is suboptimal, and knowledge is easier scaled upward than downward. Hence, we propose SuperFast, a simple, plug and play workflow, that (I.) pretrains a subnet of the supernet search space, and (II.) distributes its knowledge within the supernet before the training. SuperFast offers a substantial acceleration in the supernet training, resulting in a significantly better accuracy vs. training-cost trade-off. Using SuperFast on both ElasticViT and NASViT supernets achieves the baseline’s accuracy $1.4 \times$ and $\mathbf{1. 8} \times$ faster on the ImageNet dataset. Moreover, for a given time budget, SuperFast improves accuracy vs. latency trade-offs for subnets, gaining 4.0 p.p. for the $20-50 \mathrm{~ms}$ range on Pixel 6. Code available in https://github.com/MoritzTho/SuperFast.
items.abstract_zh: 基于一劳永逸的神经架构搜索（NAS）提出一次性训练超级网络并从中提取专门的子网以实现高效部署。训练和搜索之间的这种解耦可以轻松实现多目标部署，而无需重新训练。尽管如此，初始训练成本仍然非常高，ElasticViT 和 NASViT 等 SOTA 方法分别需要超过 72 和 83 个 GPU 天。虽然其他方法试图通过预热搜索空间中最大的模型来加速训练，但我们认为这是次优的，并且知识向上扩展比向下扩展更容易。因此，我们提出了 SuperFast，一种简单的即插即用工作流程，它 (I.) 预训练超网搜索空间的子网，并且 (II.) 在训练之前在超网内分发其知识。 SuperFast 显着加速了超网训练，从而实现了显着更好的准确性与训练成本权衡。在 ElasticViT 和 NASViT 超网上使用 SuperFast 可实现基线精度 $1.4 \times$ 和 $\mathbf{1。 8} 在 ImageNet 数据集上速度快了 8 倍。此外，对于给定的时间预算，SuperFast 提高了子网的准确性与延迟权衡，获得了 4.0 个百分点。 Pixel 6 上的 $20-50 \mathrm{~ms}$ 范围。代码可在 https://github.com/MoritzTho/SuperFast 中找到。

items.title: BlasPart: A Deterministic Parallel Partitioner for Balanced Large-Scale Hypergraph Partitioning.
items.abstract: Balanced hypergraph partitioning is a fundamental problem in applications like VLSI design, high-performance computing, etc. Nowadays, large-scale hypergraphs become more common due to the increasing complexity of modern systems. Thus, fast and high-quality deterministic partitioning algorithms are largely in demand. Regarding the quality of partitioning, balance is a critical concern when the number of partitions increases. In this paper, we propose BlasPart, a deterministic parallel algorithm for balanced large-scale hypergraph partitioning. BlasPart leverages a recursive multilevel bisection framework to achieve high-quality partitions while ensuring deterministic outcomes. A level-dependent balance constraint is also proposed to further improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed partitioner. Extensive experiments, with comparisons to the state-of-the-art partitioners (hMETIS, BiPart, and Mt-KaHyParSDet), demonstrate that BlasPart achieves better balance and scalability while maintaining competitive partitioning quality and efficiency. BlasPart runs $3.33 \times$ faster than Mt-KaHyPar-SDet on average for a 4096-way partitioning task on six benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 平衡超图划分是超大规模集成电路设计、高性能计算等应用中的一个基本问题。如今，由于现代系统的复杂性不断增加，大规模超图变得更加普遍。因此，迫切需要快速且高质量的确定性划分算法。关于分区的质量，当分区数量增加时，平衡是一个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了 BlasPart，一种用于平衡大规模超图划分的确定性并行算法。 BlasPart 利用递归多级二分框架来实现高质量分区，同时确保确定性结果。还提出了与级别相关的平衡约束，以进一步提高所提出的分区器的效率和有效性。大量实验与最先进的分区器（hMETIS、BiPart 和 Mt-KaHyParSDet）进行比较，表明 BlasPart 实现了更好的平衡和可扩展性，同时保持了具有竞争力的分区质量和效率。对于 6 个基准上的 4096 路分区任务，BlasPart 的平均运行速度比 Mt-KaHyPar-SDet 快 3.33 美元。

items.title: ELF: Efficient Logic Synthesis by Pruning Redundancy in Refactoring.
items.abstract: In electronic design automation, logic optimization operators play a crucial role in minimizing the gate count of logic circuits. However, their computation demands are high. Operators such as refactor conventionally form iterative cuts for each node, striving for a more compact representation - a task which often fails $98 \%$ on average. Prior research has sought to mitigate computational cost through parallelization. In contrast, our approach leverages a classifier to prune unsuccessful cuts preemptively, thus eliminating unnecessary resynthesis operations. Experiments on the refactor operator using the EPFL benchmark suite and 10 large industrial designs demonstrate that this technique can speedup logic optimization by $3.9 \times$ on average compared with the state-of-the-art ABC implementation.
items.abstract_zh: 在电子设计自动化中，逻辑优化算子在最小化逻辑电路的门数方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，他们的计算要求很高。诸如重构之类的运算符通常会为每个节点形成迭代削减，力求更紧凑的表示 - 这项任务通常会平均失败 98 \%$。先前的研究试图通过并行化来降低计算成本。相比之下，我们的方法利用分类器预先修剪不成功的剪切，从而消除不必要的重新合成操作。使用 EPFL 基准套件和 10 个大型工业设计对重构算子进行的实验表明，与最先进的 ABC 实现相比，该技术平均可以将逻辑优化速度加快 3.9 美元。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Advanced PCB Placement with Irregular Components for Efficient Collision Detection and Routability Optimization.
items.abstract: This paper introduces an automated placement framework to optimize component positioning on modern printed circuit boards (PCBs), addressing challenges posed by heterogeneous components, irregular geometries, and complex design rules. The framework employs three key techniques to enhance placement quality and efficiency: (1) a global placement approach integrating collision detection via the Separating Axis Theorem to handle exact component contours and board shapes, (2) a multi-stage force-directed method that dynamically adjusts attractive and repulsive forces to meet clearance and routability constraints, and (3) a scanline-based legalization technique to resolve overlaps and enforce spacing requirements. Our methodology effectively adapts to diverse design limitations and accelerates the process while preserving placement quality. Experimental results demonstrate that our placer significantly improves routability over state-of-the-art solutions, demonstrating robust performance on industrial PCB designs with complex and irregular constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种自动布局框架，用于优化现代印刷电路板 (PCB) 上的组件定位，解决异构组件、不规则几何形状和复杂设计规则带来的挑战。该框架采用三种关键技术来提高贴装质量和效率：(1) 通过分离轴定理集成碰撞检测的全局贴装方法，以处理精确的元件轮廓和电路板形状；(2) 动态调整吸引力和排斥力以满足间隙和可布线性约束的多级力导向方法；(3) 基于扫描线的合法化技术，以解决重叠并强制执行间距要求。我们的方法有效地适应不同的设计限制并加速流程，同时保持贴装质量。实验结果表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，我们的布局器显着提高了可布线性，在具有复杂和不规则约束的工业 PCB 设计中展示了强大的性能。

items.title: Enabling Data-Deduplication-Assisted Data Relocation for Interlaced Magnetic Recording.
items.abstract: Interlaced Magnetic Recording (IMR) drives have been regarded as promising hard disk drives (HDDs) to meet the ever-growing storage demand in the post-AI era. Among various technologies, IMR drives achieve increased storage capacity by overlapping tracks in an interlaced fashion; however, updating data on overlapped tracks necessitates rewriting up to two tracks, which can degrade performance. Previous strategies have attempted to reduce track rewrites by either delaying the timing of overlapping based on storage space usage or relocating frequently updated data to non-overlapped tracks through update-frequency-based hot/cold data separation. In contrast, this paper proposes a novel approach that leverages data deduplication as a natural solution to the rewrite challenge in IMR drives. Unlike conventional hot/cold separation, this paper utilizes deduplication metadata, specifically reference counts, as a direct indicator for data relocation. The rationale behind the proposed approach is that deduplicated data, which remains static unless reference counts drop to one, can be stored or migrated to overlapped tracks without inducing future track rewrites. The proposed approach diverges from traditional frequency tracking methods by leveraging data deduplication information to guide data placement and reduce rewriting. Evaluation results show that the proposed scheme effectively reduces the accumulated read/write latency by $37.57 \%$ on average compared with state-of-the-art data management on IMR drives with data deduplication enabled.
items.abstract_zh: 隔行磁记录（IMR）驱动器被认为是有前途的硬盘驱动器（HDD），可以满足后人工智能时代不断增长的存储需求。在各种技术中，IMR 驱动器通过以交错方式重叠磁道来实现存储容量的增加；然而，更新重叠磁道上的数据需要重写最多两个磁道，这会降低性能。先前的策略试图通过基于存储空间使用情况延迟重叠的时间或通过基于更新频率的热/冷数据分离将频繁更新的数据重新定位到非重叠磁道来减少磁道重写。相比之下，本文提出了一种新颖的方法，利用重复数据删除作为 IMR 驱动器重写挑战的自然解决方案。与传统的热/冷分离不同，本文利用重复数据删除元数据，特别是引用计数，作为数据重定位的直接指标。所提出的方法背后的基本原理是，除非引用计数降至一，否则重复数据删除的数据将保持静态，可以将其存储或迁移到重叠磁道，而不会引起未来的磁道重写。所提出的方法与传统的频率跟踪方法不同，它利用重复数据删除信息来指导数据放置并减少重写。评估结果表明，与启用重复数据删除的 IMR 驱动器上最先进的数据管理相比，所提出的方案有效地将累积读/写延迟平均降低了 $37.57 \%$。

items.title: Efficient Rectification Signal Validation for Optimal Functional ECO Patch Generation.
items.abstract: Synthesis-based functional Engineering Change Order (ECO) algorithms, as classified in [1], are particularly effective for addressing functional bugs. These algorithms typically involve two primary steps: (1) identifying rectification signals to address functional mismatches, and (2) generating patch circuits based on these signals. While much of the existing research focuses on enhancing step (2), step (1) often remains somewhat ad hoc and inefficient.In this paper, we propose a novel approach for systematically collecting and validating all possible sets of rectification signals from a given set of candidates. Leveraging a heuristic for grouping and ranking rectification signals, our ECO flow efficiently identifies minimal patches while achieving a highly competitive runtime. Our contributions include three key innovations: a heuristic for identifying high-quality rectification candidates, an efficient algorithm for validating all feasible sets of rectification signals, and a signal grouping and ranking technique that ensures minimal patch size. When integrated with an open-source patch generation tool, our method demonstrates an average reduction of 44% in patch sizes compared to a leading commercial ECO tool on benchmark circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 基于综合的功能工程变更指令 (ECO) 算法（如 [1] 中所分类）对于解决功能错误特别有效。这些算法通常涉及两个主要步骤：(1) 识别整流信号以解决功能不匹配问题，以及 (2) 基于这些信号生成补丁电路。虽然现有的许多研究都集中在增强步骤（2）上，但步骤（1）通常仍然有些临时性和低效。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，用于系统地收集和验证来自给定候选集的所有可能的整改信号集。利用启发式对纠正信号进行分组和排名，我们的 ECO 流程可以有效识别最少的补丁，同时实现高度竞争的运行时间。我们的贡献包括三项关键创新：用于识别高质量校正候选的启发式方法、用于验证所有可行的校正信号集的有效算法，以及确保最小补丁大小的信号分组和排序技术。当与开源补丁生成工具集成时，与基准电路上领先的商业 ECO 工具相比，我们的方法显示补丁大小平均减少了 44%。

items.title: A Novel Covert Timing Channel for Cloud FPGAs.
items.abstract: This paper presents a novel covert timing channel (CTC) that enables a malicious entity to exfiltrate data from a benign cloud FPGA user without requiring dedicated outgoing messages from the cloud FPGA, minimizing the detection risk by both the victim and the cloud service provider. The proposed CTC exploits the handshake signals of the Advanced eXtensible Interface (AXI) protocol and interpacket delay of the Internet to establish the CTC from a cloud FieldProgrammable Gate Array (FPGA) to an off-cloud computer. This paper analyzes the bit-error rate (BER) of the AXI-based CTC under varying conditions and demonstrates its effectiveness in truly enabling remote power analysis attacks on cloud services, such as Amazon Web Services Elastic Compute Cloud (AWS EC2). The proposed CTC achieves a BER as low as 0.01988%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的隐蔽定时通道 (CTC)，使恶意实体能够从良性云 FPGA 用户中窃取数据，而无需从云 FPGA 发送专用的传出消息，从而最大限度地降低受害者和云服务提供商的检测风险。所提出的 CTC 利用高级可扩展接口 (AXI) 协议的握手信号和互联网的数据包间延迟来建立从云现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 到云外计算机的 CTC。本文分析了基于 AXI 的 CTC 在不同条件下的误码率 (BER)，并展示了其在真正实现对云服务（例如 Amazon Web Services 弹性计算云 (AWS EC2)）的远程功耗分析攻击方面的有效性。拟议的 CTC 实现了低至 0.01988% 的 BER。

items.title: LLMs Meet Post-Silicon Test Engineering: A New Era (Invited).
items.abstract: The transformative power of Large Language Models (LLMs) is reshaping the role of AI in post-silicon test engineering. This paper summarizes our experience in leveraging LLMs to develop AI agents specifically tailored for this domain. Central to our approach is a two-stage process: first, we utilize the reasoning capabilities of LLMs to systematically interpret user queries; second, we invoke a grounding process to execute tasks as directed by these queries. This grounding ensures seamless integration of the LLM with existing test engineering infrastructure, enabling the AI agent to autonomously perform tasks within an established framework. Using the Intelligent Engineering Assistant (IEA) as a case study, we demonstrate how domain-specific, LLM-powered AI agents can automate critical aspects of test engineering, and highlight the potential of LLMs to revolutionize post-silicon test engineering through intelligent, context-aware automation.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的变革力量正在重塑人工智能在硅后测试工程中的作用。本文总结了我们利用法学硕士开发专门针对该领域的人工智能代理的经验。我们方法的核心是一个两阶段的过程：首先，我们利用法学硕士的推理能力来系统地解释用户查询；其次，我们调用一个基础过程来执行这些查询指示的任务。这种基础确保了法学硕士与现有测试工程基础设施的无缝集成，使人工智能代理能够在既定框架内自主执行任务。我们以智能工程助理 (IEA) 作为案例研究，展示了特定领域、由 LLM 驱动的 AI 代理如何实现测试工程关键方面的自动化，并强调了 LLM 通过智能、上下文感知自动化彻底改变投片后测试工程的潜力。

items.title: BitPattern: Enabling Efficient Bit-Serial Acceleration of Deep Neural Networks through Bit-Pattern Pruning.
items.abstract: Bit-serial computation shows promise for accelerating deep neural networks (DNNs) by exploiting inherent bit sparsity. However, the original unstructured bit sparsity poses two major challenges for existing bit-serial accelerators (BSA): (1) workload imbalance from irregular bit distribution, and (2) inefficient memory access due to unpredictable non-zero bit locations. To address these issues, this paper proposes BitPattern, an algorithm/hardware co-design to efficiently accelerate bitserial computation through bit-pattern pruning. At the algorithm level, we employ bit-pattern pruning to identify optimal combinations of predefined patterns and apply compression encoding to minimize weight storage. We further devise a pattern-similaritybased merging method to balance the bit-serial workload. At the hardware level, we co-design a bit-serial accelerator with a dedicated bit-pattern decoder and PE to leverage the potential of structured bit-pattern sparsity. The evaluation on several deep learning benchmarks shows that BitPattern can achieve $1.72 \times$ memory reduction with negligible accuracy loss, and up to $2.11 \times$ speedup and $1.86 \times$ energy saving compared to state-of-the-art bit-serial accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 位串行计算有望通过利用固有的位稀疏性来加速深度神经网络 (DNN)。然而，原始的非结构化位稀疏性给现有的位串行加速器（BSA）带来了两个主要挑战：（1）不规则位分布导致的工作负载不平衡，以及（2）由于不可预测的非零位位置导致的低效内存访问。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了 BitPattern，一种算法/硬件协同设计，可通过位模式修剪有效加速位串行计算。在算法层面，我们采用位模式修剪来识别预定义模式的最佳组合，并应用压缩编码来最小化权重存储。我们进一步设计了一种基于模式相似性的合并方法来平衡位串行工作负载。在硬件层面，我们共同设计了一个带有专用位模式解码器和 PE 的位串行加速器，以利用结构化位模式稀疏性的潜力。对多个深度学习基准的评估表明，与最先进的位串行加速器相比，BitPattern 可以减少 1.72 美元的内存，而精度损失可以忽略不计，并实现高达 2.11 美元的加速和 1.86 美元的节能。

items.title: VEDA: Efficient LLM Generation Through Voting-based KV Cache Eviction and Dataflow-flexible Accelerator.
