items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in natural language processing tasks but pose significant computational and memory challenges for edge deployment due to their intensive resource demands. This work addresses the efficiency of LLM inference by algorithm-hardwaredataflow tri-optimizations. We propose a novel voting-based KV cache eviction algorithm, balancing hardware efficiency and algorithm accuracy by adaptively identifying unimportant kv vectors. From a dataflow perspective, we introduce a flexible-product dataflow and a runtime reconfigurable PE array for matrix-vector multiplication. The proposed approach effectively handles the diverse dimensional requirements and solves the challenges of incrementally varying sequence lengths. Additionally, an element-serial scheduling scheme is proposed for nonlinear operations, such as softmax and layer normalization (layernorm). Results demonstrate a substantial reduction in latency, accompanied by a significant decrease in hardware complexity, from $O(N)$ to $O(1)$. The proposed solution is realized in a custom-designed accelerator, VEDA, which outperforms existing hardware platforms. This research represents a significant advancement in LLM inference on resource-constrained edge devices, facilitating real-time processing, enhancing data privacy, and enabling model customization.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在自然语言处理任务中表现出色，但由于其密集的资源需求，给边缘部署带来了巨大的计算和内存挑战。这项工作通过算法-硬件数据流三重优化来解决 LLM 推理的效率。我们提出了一种新颖的基于投票的 KV 缓存驱逐算法，通过自适应识别不重要的 KV 向量来平衡硬件效率和算法准确性。从数据流的角度来看，我们引入了灵活的乘积数据流和用于矩阵向量乘法的运行时可重构PE阵列。所提出的方法有效地处理了不同的尺寸要求，并解决了序列长度增量变化的挑战。此外，还提出了一种用于非线性操作的元素串行调度方案，例如softmax和层归一化（layernorm）。结果表明，延迟显着减少，同时硬件复杂性也显着降低，从 $O(N)$ 降至 $O(1)$。所提出的解决方案是在定制设计的加速器 VEDA 中实现的，该加速器的性能优于现有的硬件平台。这项研究代表了资源受限边缘设备上的 LLM 推理的重大进步，促进了实时处理、增强了数据隐私并支持模型定制。

items.title: FPGA-TrustZone: Security Extension of TrustZone to FPGA for SoC-FPGA Heterogeneous Architecture.
items.abstract: To address the growing security issues faced by ARM-based mobile devices today, TrustZone was adopted to provide a trusted execution environment (TEE) to protect sensitive data. Such TrustZone-based models have been proven to be effective, but they target CPU architectures and do not work for the security of widely used heterogeneous computing platforms such as FPGAs. To solve this issue, we propose a comprehensive SoC-FPGA security framework, FPGA-TrustZone, to support FPGA TEE by extending the security of ARM TrustZone. Experiments on real SoC-FPGA hardware development boards show that FPGA-TrustZone provides high security with low performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 为了解决当今基于 ARM 的移动设备面临的日益严重的安全问题，采用 TrustZone 来提供可信执行环境 (TEE) 来保护敏感数据。这种基于 TrustZone 的模型已被证明是有效的，但它们针对的是 CPU 架构，不适用于广泛使用的异构计算平台（例如 FPGA）的安全性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个全面的SoC-FPGA安全框架FPGA-TrustZone，通过扩展ARM TrustZone的安全性来支持FPGA TEE。在真实 SoC-FPGA 硬件开发板上的实验表明，FPGA-TrustZone 提供了高安全性和低性能开销。

items.title: Graph-Guided Transfer Learning to Boost the Efficiency of System-Level Optimization of Analog/Mixed-Signal Circuits.
items.abstract: This paper introduces a novel graph-guided transfer learning approach to boost the efficiency of system-level optimization of analog/mixed-signal circuits. The system-level optimization is based on Reinforcement Learning (RL) in combination with Graph Attention Networks (GAT). The results surpass state-of-the-art in efficiency and optimality. The key innovation is a graph similarity detection method that leverages embedded design knowledge to identify electrical similarities and trade-offs, enhancing knowledge transferability, even between dissimilar circuit architectures. Applied to the case study of 4th-order continuoustime Delta-Sigma analog-to-digital converters, the graph-based transfer learning framework enhances the RL sampling efficiency, reducing the amount of simulations by up to 11x, and improves the optimization results by 12.4% compared to optimization from scratch. As the framework accelerates knowledge transfer across different architectures, it can boost the optimization efficiency and improve the performance towards a broad range of analog/mixed-signal systems.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的图形引导迁移学习方法，以提高模拟/混合信号电路的系统级优化的效率。系统级优化基于强化学习（RL）与图注意网络（GAT）的结合。结果在效率和优化方面超越了最先进的水平。关键的创新是图形相似性检测方法，该方法利用嵌入式设计知识来识别电气相似性和权衡，从而增强知识的可转移性，甚至在不同的电路架构之间也是如此。基于图的迁移学习框架应用于4阶连续时间Delta-Sigma模数转换器的案例研究，提高了RL采样效率，将模拟量减少了11倍，与从头优化相比，优化结果提高了12.4%。由于该框架加速了不同架构之间的知识转移，因此可以提高优化效率并提高各种模拟/混合信号系统的性能。

items.title: Can Short Hypervectors Drive Feature-Rich GNNs? Strengthening the Graph Representation of Hyperdimensional Computing for Memory-efficient GNNs.
items.abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) based GNNs are significantly advancing the brain-like cognition in terms of mathematical rigorousness and computational tractability. However, the researches in this field seem to have a “long vector consensus” that the length of HDC-hypervectors must be designed to mimic that of cerebellar cortex, i.e., ten thousands of bits, to express human’s feature-rich memory. To system architects, this choice presents a formidable challenge that the combination of numerous nodes and ultra-long hypervectors could create a new memory bottleneck that undermines the operational brevity from HDC. To overcome above problem, in this work, we shift our focus to rebuilding a set of more GNN-friendly HDC-operations, by which, short hypervectors are sufficient to encode rich features via enjoining the strong error tolerance of neural cognition. To achieve that, three behavioral incompatibilities of HDC with general GNNs, i.e., feature distortion, structural bias, and central-node vacancy, are found and successfully resolved for more efficient feature-extraction in graphs. Taken as a whole, a memory-efficient HDC-based GNN framework, called CiliaGraph, is designed to drive one-shot graph classifying tasks with only hundreds of bits in hypervector aggregation, which offers 1 to 2 orders of memory savings. The results show that, compared to the SOTA GNNs, CiliaGraph reduces the memory access and training latency by an average of $292 \times$ (up to $2341 \times$) and $103 \times$ (up to $313 \times$), respectively, while maintaining the competitively accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 基于超维计算（HDC）的 GNN 在数学严谨性和计算易处理性方面显着提高了类脑认知能力。然而，该领域的研究似乎有一个“长向量共识”，即HDC超向量的长度必须设计成模仿小脑皮层的长度，即一万位，以表达人类特征丰富的记忆。对于系统架构师来说，这种选择提出了一个巨大的挑战，即众多节点和超长超向量的组合可能会产生新的内存瓶颈，从而破坏 HDC 的操作简洁性。为了克服上述问题，在这项工作中，我们将重点转向重建一组更适合 GNN 的 HDC 操作，通过这些操作，短的超向量足以通过要求神经认知的强容错能力来编码丰富的特征。为了实现这一目标，我们发现并成功解决了 HDC 与一般 GNN 的三个行为不兼容性，即特征失真、结构偏差和中心节点空缺，以实现更高效的图中特征提取。总体而言，一种名为 CiliaGraph 的基于 HDC 的内存高效 GNN 框架旨在驱动一次性图形分类任务，在超向量聚合中仅使用数百位，可节省 1 到 2 个数量级的内存。结果表明，与 SOTA GNN 相比，CiliaGraph 分别将内存访问和训练延迟平均减少了 292 美元（高达 2341 美元）和 103 美元（高达 313 美元），同时保持了有竞争力的准确性。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Opera: An Open and Efficient Platform for Data-driven Synthesis of Analog Circuits.
items.abstract: The front-end synthesis of analog circuits has been a long-standing challenge since the advent of integrated circuits. Many methods, ranging from conventional optimization-based techniques to emerging learning-based approaches, have been extensively explored to address this challenge. Yet, these methods are data-driven and often suffer from low design efficiency, due to their heavy reliance on time-consuming circuit simulators, which are frequently used in the synthesis loop for real-time evaluation of the evolving circuit design. In addition, benchmarking these methods is also largely unachievable due to their exclusive use of commercial semiconductor technology for evaluation. This “Late Breaking Results” introduces Opera, an open and efficient platform for the data-driven synthesis of analog circuits. Specifically, Opera develops efficient surrogate models for various circuits and integrates them into open-source OpenAI Gym-like environments to enable efficient synthesis. Case studies on exemplary circuits show that this platform can accelerate the conventional data-driven synthesis flow by up to $40 \times$. It also enables the benchmarking of various synthesis methods with standardized environments built upon an open-source semiconductor process.
items.abstract_zh: 自集成电路出现以来，模拟电路的前端综合一直是一个长期存在的挑战。人们已经广泛探索了许多方法来应对这一挑战，从传统的基于优化的技术到新兴的基于学习的方法。然而，这些方法是数据驱动的，并且由于严重依赖耗时的电路模拟器而常常面临设计效率低的问题，而电路模拟器经常在综合循环中用于实时评估不断发展的电路设计。此外，由于这些方法仅使用商业半导体技术进行评估，因此对这些方法进行基准测试在很大程度上也是无法实现的。这一“最新成果”介绍了 Opera，这是一个开放且高效的平台，用于数据驱动的模拟电路综合。具体来说，Opera 为各种电路开发了高效的代理模型，并将它们集成到类似开源 OpenAI Gym 的环境中，以实现高效的合成。对示例电路的案例研究表明，该平台可以将传统的数据驱动综合流程加速高达 40 倍。它还可以使用基于开源半导体工艺的标准化环境对各种合成方法进行基准测试。

items.title: TetrisLock: Quantum Circuit Split Compilation with Interlocking Patterns.
items.abstract: In quantum computing, quantum circuits are fundamental representations of quantum algorithms, which are compiled into executable functions for quantum solutions. Quantum compilers transform algorithmic quantum circuits into one compatible with target quantum computers, bridging quantum software and hardware. However, untrusted quantum compilers pose significant risks. They can lead to the theft of quantum circuit designs and compromise sensitive intellectual property (IP). In this paper, we propose TetrisLock, a split compilation method for quantum circuit obfuscation that uses an interlocking splitting pattern to effectively protect IP with minimal resource overhead. Our approach divides the quantum circuit into two interdependent segments, ensuring that reconstructing the original circuit functionality is possible only by combining both segments and eliminating redundancies. This method makes reverse engineering by an untrusted compiler unrealizable, as the original circuit is never fully shared with any single entity. Also, our approach eliminates the need for a trusted compiler to process the inserted random circuit, thereby relaxing the security requirements. Additionally, it defends against colluding attackers with mismatched numbers of qubits, while maintaining low overhead by preserving the original depth of the quantum circuit. We demonstrate our method by using established RevLib benchmarks, showing that it achieves a minimal impact on functional accuracy (less than 1%) while significantly reducing the likelihood of IP inference.
items.abstract_zh: 在量子计算中，量子电路是量子算法的基本表示，它被编译成量子解决方案的可执行函数。量子编译器将算法量子电路转换为与目标量子计算机兼容的电路，从而桥接量子软件和硬件。然而，不受信任的量子编译器会带来巨大的风险。它们可能导致量子电路设计被盗并损害敏感的知识产权 (IP)。在本文中，我们提出了TetrisLock，一种用于量子电路混淆的分割编译方法，它使用互锁分割模式以最小的资源开销有效地保护IP。我们的方法将量子电路分为两个相互依赖的部分，确保只有通过组合两个部分并消除冗余才能重建原始电路功能。这种方法使得不受信任的编译器无法实现逆向工程，因为原始电路永远不会与任何单个实体完全共享。此外，我们的方法不需要可信编译器来处理插入的随机电路，从而放宽了安全要求。此外，它还可以防御量子位数量不匹配的合谋攻击者，同时通过保留量子电路的原始深度来保持较低的开销。我们通过使用已建立的 RevLib 基准来演示我们的方法，表明它对功能准确性的影响最小（小于 1%），同时显着降低了 IP 推断的可能性。

items.title: Mr.TPL: A Method for Multi-Pin Net Router in Triple Patterning Lithography.
items.abstract: Triple patterning lithography (TPL) has been recognized as one of the most promising solutions to print critical features in advanced technology nodes. A critical challenge within TPL is the effective assignment of the layout to masks. Recently, various layout decomposition methods and TPL-aware routing methods have been proposed to consider TPL. However, these methods typically result in numerous conflicts and stitches, and are mainly designed for 2-pin nets. This paper proposes a multipin net routing method in triple patterning lithography, called Mr.TPL. Experimental results demonstrate that Mr.TPL reduces color conflicts by 81.17%, decreases stitches by 76.89%, and achieves up to $5.4 \times$ speed improvement compared to the state-of-the-art TPL-aware routing method.
items.abstract_zh: 三重图案光刻 (TPL) 已被公认为是在先进技术节点打印关键特征的最有前途的解决方案之一。 TPL 中的一个关键挑战是将布局有效分配给掩模。最近，已经提出了各种布局分解方法和TPL感知布线方法来考虑TPL。然而，这些方法通常会导致大量冲突和缝合，并且主要是为 2 引脚网络设计的。本文提出了一种三重图案光刻中的多引脚网络布线方法，称为Mr.TPL。实验结果表明，与最先进的 TPL 感知路由方法相比，Mr.TPL 减少了 81.17% 的颜色冲突，减少了 76.89% 的针迹，并实现了高达 5.4 美元的速度提升。

items.title: NoiseZO: RRAM Noise-Driven Zeroth-Order Optimization for Efficient Forward-Only Training.
items.abstract: Compute-in-memory using emerging resistive random-access memory (RRAM) demonstrates significant potential for building energy-efficient deep neural networks. However, RRAM-based network training faces challenges from computational noise and gradient calculation overhead. In this study, we introduce NoiseZO, a forward-only training framework that leverages intrinsic RRAM noise to estimate gradients via zeroth-order (ZO) optimization. The framework maps neural networks onto dual RRAM arrays, utilizing their inherent write noise as $\mathbf{Z O}$ perturbations for training. This enables network updates through only two forward computations. A fine-grained perturbation control strategy is further developed to enhance training accuracy. Extensive experiments on vowel and image datasets, implemented with typical networks, showcase the effectiveness of our framework. Compared to conventional complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) implementations, our approach achieves a 21-fold reduction in energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 使用新兴电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的内存计算展示了构建节能深度神经网络的巨大潜力。然而，基于 RRAM 的网络训练面临着计算噪声和梯度计算开销的挑战。在本研究中，我们引入了 NoiseZO，这是一种仅前向训练框架，它利用固有的 RRAM 噪声通过零阶 (ZO) 优化来估计梯度。该框架将神经网络映射到双 RRAM 阵列上，利用其固有的写入噪声作为 $\mathbf{Z O}$ 扰动进行训练。这使得网络更新只需两次前向计算即可。进一步开发了细粒度扰动控制策略以提高训练精度。使用典型网络实现的对元音和图像数据集的广泛实验展示了我们框架的有效性。与传统的互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 实现相比，我们的方法实现了 21 倍的能耗降低。

items.title: Synergistic Die-Level Router for Multi-FPGA System with Time-Division Multiplexing Optimization.
items.abstract: Modern multi-FPGA systems featuring multi-die devices connected through time-division multiplexing (TDM) techniques have become increasingly common as the scale of designs increases rapidly. FPGA designs are meticulously partitioned at die-level for prototyping in modern emulation systems. Conventional FPGA-level routers often result in a large critical connection delay that impacts the whole design’s frequency. Additionally, the excessive use of super long lines (SLLs) between neighboring dies leads to substantial routing congestion, causing the failure of the routing progress. To tackle these issues, we propose an effective and efficient die-level router for multi-FPGA systems, optimizing routing topology and the TDM ratio. Experimental results on the benchmarks from the die-level routing contest 2023 demonstrate 7.6% better critical connection delay with a $5.761 \times$ speed-up compared to the state-of-the-art router.
items.abstract_zh: 随着设计规模的迅速增加，采用时分复用 (TDM) 技术连接的多芯片器件的现代多 FPGA 系统已变得越来越普遍。 FPGA 设计在芯片级进行了精心划分，以便在现代仿真系统中进行原型设计。传统的 FPGA 级路由器通常会导致严重的关键连接延迟，从而影响整个设计的频率。此外，相邻芯片之间过度使用超长线（SLL）会导致严重的布线拥塞，从而导致布线进度失败。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种适用于多 FPGA 系统的有效且高效的芯片级路由器，优化了路由拓扑和 TDM 比率。 2023 年裸片级路由竞赛基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的路由器相比，关键连接延迟提高了 7.6%，速度提升了 5.761 美元。

items.title: FlexStep: Enabling Flexible Error Detection in Multi/Many-core Real-time Systems.
items.abstract: Reliability and real-time responsiveness in safety-critical systems have traditionally been achieved using error detection mechanisms, such as LockStep, which require pre-configured checker cores, strict synchronisation, static error detection regions, or limited preemptions. However, these core-bound hardware mechanisms often lead to significant resource over-provisioning and diminished real-time performance in modern systems where tasks with varying reliability requirements are consolidated on shared processors for efficiency and cost reduction. To address these challenges, this work presents FlexStep, a systematic solution that integrates hardware and software across the SoC, ISA, and OS scheduling layers. FlexStep features a novel microarchitecture that supports dynamic core configuration and asynchronous, preemptive error detection. The FlexStep architecture naturally allows for flexible task scheduling and error detection, enabling new scheduling algorithms that enhance both resource efficiency and real-time schedulability.
items.abstract_zh: 安全关键系统中的可靠性和实时响应传统上是通过错误检测机制来实现的，例如 LockStep，它需要预先配置的检查器核心、严格同步、静态错误检测区域或有限的抢占。然而，这些受核心限制的硬件机制通常会导致现代系统中严重的资源过度配置和实时性能下降，在现代系统中，具有不同可靠性要求的任务被整合到共享处理器上，以提高效率并降低成本。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作提出了 FlexStep，这是一种跨 SoC、ISA 和操作系统调度层集成硬件和软件的系统解决方案。 FlexStep 采用新颖的微架构，支持动态核心配置和异步、抢占式错误检测。 FlexStep架构自然地允许灵活的任务调度和错误检测，从而实现新的调度算法，从而提高资源效率和实时可调度性。

items.title: Leopard: Hardware Pass-Through Remote Storage Access with Queue Concurrency for Edge Intelligent Workstations.
items.abstract: Edge intelligent workstations load (store) massive empirical data from (to) remote cloud storage due to limited local storage. However, current remote storage access frameworks are complex. They use expensive computing resources to manipulate multiple concurrent request queues in modern high-speed storage devices for saturating performance. Complex software stacks and limited CPUs on edge intelligent workstations hinder saturating concurrent request queues, thus resulting in up to $75 \%$ performance degradation for remote storage. We propose Leopard, a hardware pass-through remote storage access framework with queue concurrency, which provides lossless remote storage access for edge intelligence. Leopard proposes a custom NVMe controller using SmartNIC’s FPGA core to emulate it as an NVMe device, which eliminates complex remote storage stacks for edge workstations. Operations for remote storage access are implemented as hardware circuits inside the controller to eliminate CPU cycles. Parallelized and pipelined workflows are proposed for hardware circuits to accelerate remote storage access operations. Our evaluation presents that Leopard exhibits $1.09 \times \sim 6.04 \times$ lower remote storage access latency than SOTA solutions for realistic workloads in edge intelligent workstations.
items.abstract_zh: 由于本地存储有限，边缘智能工作站从远程云存储加载（存储）大量经验数据。然而，当前的远程存储访问框架很复杂。他们使用昂贵的计算资源来操纵现代高速存储设备中的多个并发请求队列，以达到饱和性能。边缘智能工作站上复杂的软件堆栈和有限的 CPU 阻碍了并发请求队列的饱和，从而导致远程存储性能下降高达 $75 \%$。我们提出Leopard，一种具有队列并发性的硬件直通远程存储访问框架，它为边缘智能提供无损远程存储访问。 Leopard 提出了一种定制 NVMe 控制器，使用 SmartNIC 的 FPGA 内核将其模拟为 NVMe 设备，从而消除了边缘工作站的复杂远程存储堆栈。远程存储访问操作作为控制器内部的硬件电路实现，以消除 CPU 周期。为硬件电路提出了并行和流水线工作流程，以加速远程存储访问操作。我们的评估表明，对于边缘智能工作站中的实际工作负载，Leopard 的远程存储访问延迟比 SOTA 解决方案低 1.09 美元\times \sim 6.04 \times$。

items.title: DenSparSA: A Balanced Systolic Array Approach for Dense and Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: Numerous studies have proposed hardware architectures to accelerate sparse matrix multiplication, but these approaches often incur substantial area and power overhead, significantly compromising their usage in dense scenarios. On the other hand, systolic arrays deliver high efficiency for dense matrix operations, but their application to sparse matrices remains challenging. An ideal design should process both dense and sparse matrices with high efficiency to satisfy performance and versatility requirements.In this paper, we introduce DenSparSA, a balanced systolic array centralized architecture that can execute sparse matrix computations with minimal overhead to original dense matrix computations. DenSparSA supports both single-side and dual-side unstructured sparse matrix multiplications with high efficiency. At the same time, the additional hardware required for managing sparsity is compact and decoupled from the conventional systolic array, allowing for minimal power overhead when switched back to dense matrix operations via circuit gating. The proposed design is implemented with Nangate 45 nm. Implementation results show that DenSparSA achieves a speedup ranging from $1.9 \times$ to $22 \times$ compared to the classic systolic array for sparse workloads, while maintaining relatively low area and power overhead. For dense workloads, the power overhead can be reduced to $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ for BF16 and 5% for FP32. Compared with existing solutions for sparse acceleration, DenSparSA delivers competitive ($0.82 \times-1.32 \times$) efficiency in sparse scenarios and $1.17 \times-2.28 \times$ better efficiency for dense scenarios, indicating a better balance between both situations.
items.abstract_zh: 许多研究提出了硬件架构来加速稀疏矩阵乘法，但这些方法通常会产生大量的面积和功耗开销，严重影响了它们在密集场景中的使用。另一方面，脉动阵列为密集矩阵运算提供了高效率，但其在稀疏矩阵中的应用仍然具有挑战性。理想的设计应该高效地处理稠密矩阵和稀疏矩阵，以满足性能和多功能性要求。在本文中，我们介绍了 DenSparSA，一种平衡脉动阵列集中式架构，可以以最小的原始稠密矩阵计算开销执行稀疏矩阵计算。 DenSparSA 高效支持单边和双边非结构化稀疏矩阵乘法。同时，管理稀疏性所需的额外硬件非常紧凑，并且与传统脉动阵列分离，从而在通过电路门控切换回密集矩阵操作时可以实现最小的功率开销。所提出的设计是使用 Nangate 45 nm 实现的。实施结果表明，与稀疏工作负载的经典脉动阵列相比，DenSparSA 实现了从 1.9 美元到 22 美元的加速，同时保持相对较低的面积和功耗。对于密集工作负载，BF16 的功耗开销可降低至 $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$，FP32 的功耗开销可降低至 5%。与现有的稀疏加速解决方案相比，DenSparSA 在稀疏场景下提供了具有竞争力的效率（$0.82 \times-1.32 \times$），在密集场景下提供了 $1.17 \times-2.28 \times$ 更高的效率，这表明两种情况之间取得了更好的平衡。

items.title: MOSS: Multi-Modal Representation Learning on Sequential Circuits.
items.abstract: Deep learning has significantly advanced Electronic Design Automation (EDA), with circuit representation learning emerging as a key area for modeling the relationship between a circuit’s structure and functionality. Existing methods primarily use either Large Language Models (LLMs) for Register Transfer Level (RTL) code analysis or Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for netlist modeling. While LLMs excel at high-level functional understanding, they struggle with detailed netlist behavior. GNNs, however, face challenges when scaling to larger sequential circuits due to long-range information dependencies and insufficient functional supervision, leading to decreased accuracy and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose MOSS, a multimodal framework that integrates GNNs with LLMs for sequential circuit modeling. By enhancing D-type Flip-Flop (DFF) node features with embeddings from fine-tuned LLMs on RTL code, we focus the GNN on critical anchor points, reducing reliance on long-range dependencies. The LLM also provides global circuit embeddings, offering efficient supervision for functionality-related tasks. Additionally, MOSS introduces an adaptive aggregation method and a two-phase propagation mechanism in the GNN to better model signal propagation and sequential feedback within the circuit. Experimental results demonstrate that MOSS significantly improves the accuracy of functionality and performance predictions for sequential circuits compared to existing methods, particularly in larger circuits where previous models struggle. Specifically, MOSS achieves a $\mathbf{9 5. 2 \%}$ accuracy in arrival time prediction.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习显着推进了电子设计自动化 (EDA)，电路表示学习成为对电路结构和功能之间关系进行建模的关键领域。现有方法主要使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 进行寄存器传输级 (RTL) 代码分析，或使用图神经网络 (GNN) 进行网表建模。虽然法学硕士擅长高级功能理解，但他们在详细的网表行为方面遇到了困难。然而，由于长程信息依赖性和功能监督不足，GNN 在扩展到更大的时序电路时面临挑战，导致准确性下降和泛化能力有限。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 MOSS，这是一种将 GNN 与 LLM 集成以进行时序电路建模的多模态框架。通过使用 RTL 代码上经过微调的 LLM 的嵌入来增强 D 型触发器 (DFF) 节点功能，我们将 GNN 集中在关键锚点上，减少对远程依赖性的依赖。法学硕士还提供全局电路嵌入，为功能相关任务提供有效的监督。此外，MOSS 在 GNN 中引入了自适应聚合方法和两阶段传播机制，以更好地对电路内的信号传播和顺序反馈进行建模。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，MOSS 显着提高了时序电路的功能和性能预测的准确性，特别是在以前的模型难以实现的较大电路中。具体来说，MOSS 在到达时间预测方面实现了 $\mathbf{9 5. 2 \%}$ 准确度。

items.title: ZenLeak: Practical Last-Level Cache Side-Channel Attacks on AMD Zen Processors.
items.abstract: While Last-Level Cache (LLC) side-channel attacks often target inclusive caches, directory-based attacks on noninclusive caches have been demonstrated on Intel and ARM processors. However, the vulnerability of AMD’s non-inclusive caches to such attacks has remained uncertain, primarily due to challenges in reverse-engineering cache addressing, constructing eviction sets, and evicting private cache lines. This paper addresses these challenges and demonstrates the feasibility of conducting LLC side-channel attacks on AMD’s non-inclusive caches. We first reverse-engineer the cache addressing functions for the L2 set index, L3 slice, and L3 set index. Leveraging this insight, we construct the first eviction sets on AMD processors. We then introduce the first LLC sidechannel attack on AMD’s Zen series CPUs. The effectiveness of our approach is validated by attacking OpenSSL’s AES T-table.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然末级缓存 (LLC) 侧通道攻击通常针对包含式缓存，但针对非包含式缓存的基于目录的攻击已在 Intel 和 ARM 处理器上得到验证。然而，AMD 的非包容性缓存对此类攻击的脆弱性仍然不确定，主要是由于逆向工程缓存寻址、构建逐出集和逐出私有缓存行方面的挑战。本文解决了这些挑战，并演示了对 AMD 非包容性缓存进行 LLC 旁道攻击的可行性。我们首先对 L2 集合索引、L3 切片和 L3 集合索引的缓存寻址函数进行逆向工程。利用这一见解，我们在 AMD 处理器上构建了第一个驱逐集。然后我们介绍了针对 AMD Zen 系列 CPU 的第一个 LLC 旁道攻击。我们的方法的有效性通过攻击 OpenSSL 的 AES T 表得到验证。

items.title: PacTrain: Pruning and Adaptive Sparse Gradient Compression for Efficient Collective Communication in Distributed Deep Learning.
items.abstract: Large-scale deep neural networks (DNN) exhibit excellent performance for various tasks. As DNNs and datasets grow, distributed training becomes extremely time-consuming and demands larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting gradient aggregation overhead. While gradient compression and sparse collective communication techniques are commonly employed to alleviate network load, many gradient compression schemes do not achieve acceleration of the training process while also preserving accuracy. This paper introduces PacTrain, a novel framework that accelerates distributed training by combining pruning with sparse gradient compression. Active pruning of the neural network makes the model weights and gradients sparse. By ensuring the global knowledge of the gradient sparsity among all distributed training workers, we can perform lightweight compression communication without harming accuracy. We show that the PacTrain compression scheme achieves a near-optimal compression strategy while remaining compatible with the allreduce primitive. Experimental evaluations show that PacTrain improves training throughput by 1.25 to $8.72 \times$ compared to state-of-the-art compression-enabled systems for representative vision and language models training tasks under bandwidth-constrained conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模深度神经网络（DNN）在各种任务中表现出出色的性能。随着 DNN 和数据集的增长，分布式训练变得极其耗时并且需要更大的集群。主要瓶颈是由此产生的梯度聚合开销。虽然梯度压缩和稀疏集体通信技术通常用于减轻网络负载，但许多梯度压缩方案无法在保持准确性的同时实现训练过程的加速。本文介绍了 PacTrain，这是一种新颖的框架，它通过将剪枝与稀疏梯度压缩相结合来加速分布式训练。神经网络的主动剪枝使得模型权重和梯度稀疏。通过确保所有分布式训练工作者对梯度稀疏性的全局了解，我们可以在不损害准确性的情况下执行轻量级压缩通信。我们表明，PacTrain 压缩方案实现了接近最优的压缩策略，同时保持与 allreduce 原语兼容。实验评估表明，对于带宽受限条件下的代表性视觉和语言模型训练任务，与最先进的压缩系统相比，PacTrain 将训练吞吐量提高了 1.25 至 8.72 倍。

items.title: EPICS: Efficient Parallel Pattern Fault Simulation for Sequential Circuits via Strongly Connected Components.
items.abstract: As functional safety of electronic chips gains importance in autonomous vehicles and aerospace, standards like ISO 26262 mandate high diagnostic coverage, requiring extensive gate-level fault simulations. However, for large-scale industrial sequential circuits, these simulations are time-consuming, creating a significant bottleneck in chip development. Prior approaches have focused on reducing computational complexity and optimizing CPU hardware usage by minimizing redundant computations during fault propagation and leveraging bit-level parallel processing capabilities. Techniques like parallel-pattern and event-driven simulations have improved performance in combinational circuits but face limitations in sequential circuits due to timing dependencies within loops. The challenge lies in parallelizing simulations across different cycles without violating these dependencies, which is exacerbated by the complex feedback structures in SCCs. In this work, we propose a novel parallel-pattern fault simulation framework that combines loop fusion with efficient event traversal to accelerate sequential circuit simulations. By compiling simple loops into larger nodes, we reduce the number of feedback events without introducing excessive redundancy. For larger SCCs, we develop specialized algorithms for selecting loop entrance nodes based on indegree analysis and implement the lazy propagation strategy for internal nodes. This approach minimizes simulation events caused by inaccurate predictions and reduces overhead associated with false event propagation. We integrate these techniques into our simulation framework, EPICS, which strategically mixes compiled and event-driven simulations to optimize performance. Experimental results demonstrate that EPICS achieves a $5.94 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art commercial tool while maintaining the same fault coverage.
items.abstract_zh: 随着电子芯片的功能安全在自动驾驶汽车和航空航天领域变得越来越重要，ISO 26262 等标准要求高诊断覆盖率，需要广泛的门级故障模拟。然而，对于大规模工业时序电路，这些模拟非常耗时，给芯片开发造成了重大瓶颈。先前的方法侧重于通过最大限度地减少故障传播期间的冗余计算并利用位级并行处理功能来降低计算复杂性并优化 CPU 硬件使用。并行模式和事件驱动仿真等技术提高了组合电路的性能，但由于循环内的时序依赖性，在时序电路中面临着限制。挑战在于在不违反这些依赖性的情况下跨不同周期并行模拟，而 SCC 中复杂的反馈结构加剧了这种依赖性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的并行模式故障仿真框架，该框架将循环融合与高效事件遍历相结合，以加速顺序电路仿真。通过将简单的循环编译成更大的节点，我们减少了反馈事件的数量，而不会引入过多的冗余。对于较大的SCC，我们开发了专门的算法来基于入度分析选择循环入口节点，并为内部节点实现惰性传播策略。这种方法最大限度地减少了由不准确的预测引起的模拟事件，并减少了与错误事件传播相关的开销。我们将这些技术集成到我们的模拟框架 EPICS 中，该框架战略性地混合编译模拟和事件驱动模拟以优化性能。实验结果表明，EPICS 比最先进的商业工具实现了 5.94 美元的加速，同时保持相同的故障覆盖率。

items.title: ZION: A Practical Confidential Virtual Machine Architecture on Commodity RISC-V Processors.
items.abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide robust hardware-based isolation to mitigate data breaches and privacy risks. Confidential Virtual Machines (confidential VMs or CVMs) extend these capabilities by using VMs as their execution abstraction, offering superior compatibility over process-based TEEs like Intel SGX. The rising demand for Confidential VMs has spurred innovations from major chip manufacturers, such as AMD SEV, Intel TDX, and Arm CCA, and their integration into leading cloud platforms, including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. On the RISC-V platform, however, existing TEE architectures rely on process-level abstractions or custom hardware, leading to limited compatibility and scalability.This paper presents ZION, a confidential VM architecture for commodity RISC-V hardware that operates without custom extensions. ZION ensures security, flexibility, and efficiency through a short-path CVM mode and a secure vCPU mechanism for protecting and efficiently updating vCPU states, enhancing context-switching performance. It combines Physical Memory Protection (PMP) with paging for scalable memory isolation, employs a hierarchical memory structure for efficient management, and introduces a split-page-table-based mechanism for secure memory sharing with virtio devices. Evaluations show ZION achieves under 5% overhead in real-world applications, demonstrating its practicality.
items.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境 (TEE) 提供强大的基于硬件的隔离，以减轻数据泄露和隐私风险。机密虚拟机（机密 VM 或 CVM）通过使用 VM 作为执行抽象来扩展这些功能，提供比 Intel SGX 等基于流程的 TEE 更高的兼容性。对机密虚拟机不断增长的需求刺激了 AMD SEV、Intel TDX 和 Arm CCA 等主要芯片制造商的创新，并将其集成到领先的云平台（包括 AWS、Azure 和 Google Cloud）中。然而，在 RISC-V 平台上，现有的 TEE 架构依赖于进程级抽象或自定义硬件，导致兼容性和可扩展性有限。本文提出了 ZION，一种用于商用 RISC-V 硬件的机密 VM 架构，无需自定义扩展即可运行。 ZION通过短路径CVM模式和安全vCPU机制确保安全性、灵活性和效率，保护和高效更新vCPU状态，增强上下文切换性能。它将物理内存保护 (PMP) 与可扩展内存隔离的分页相结合，采用分层内存结构进行高效管理，并引入基于拆分页表的机制来与 virtio 设备安全共享内存。评估显示，ZION 在实际应用中实现了低于 5% 的开销，证明了其实用性。

items.title: MILLION: MasterIng Long-Context LLM Inference Via Outlier-Immunized KV Product QuaNtization.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized for complex tasks requiring longer context lengths, with some models supporting up to 128 K or 1 M tokens. This trend, however, presents significant challenges in inference speed and memory management. The primary bottleneck in long-context LLM inference is the quadratic computational complexity of attention mechanisms, causing substantial slowdowns as sequence length increases. KV cache mechanism alleviates this issue by storing pre-computed data, but introduces memory requirements that scale linearly with context length, hindering efficient LLM deployment. Quantization emerges as a promising approach to address the widening gap between LLM size and memory capacity. However, traditional quantization schemes often yield suboptimal compression results for KV caches due to two key factors: i) On-the-fly quantization and de-quantization, causing significant performance overhead; ii) Prevalence of outliers in KV values, challenging low-bitwidth uniform quantization. To this end, we propose MILLION, a novel quantization framework achieving low-bitwidth KV cache through product quantization. First, we conduct a thorough analysis of KV cache distribution, revealing the limitations of existing quantization schemes. Second, we introduce a non-uniform quantization algorithm based on product quantization, which efficiently compresses data while preserving accuracy. Third, we develop a high-performance GPU inference framework with efficient attention kernel and pipeline design for MILLION that leverages sparse computation and asynchronous quantization, significantly enhancing inference speed. Comprehensive evaluation results demonstrate that MILLION can achieve 4 bits quantization with trivial perplexity and accuracy loss, and achieve 2.09 x end-to-end performance gains at 32 K context length. Code is released at https://github.com/ZongwuWang/MILLION.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地用于需要更长上下文长度的复杂任务，某些模型支持多达 128 K 或 1 M 令牌。然而，这种趋势在推理速度和内存管理方面提出了重大挑战。长上下文 LLM 推理的主要瓶颈是注意力机制的二次计算复杂性，随着序列长度的增加，导致速度大幅减慢。 KV 缓存机制通过存储预先计算的数据缓解了这个问题，但引入了随上下文长度线性扩展的内存需求，阻碍了高效的 LLM 部署。量化成为解决 LLM 大小和内存容量之间不断扩大的差距的一种有前景的方法。然而，由于两个关键因素，传统的量化方案通常会为 KV 缓存产生次优的压缩结果： i) 动态量化和反量化，导致显着的性能开销； ii) KV 值中异常值的普遍存在，对低位宽均匀量化提出了挑战。为此，我们提出了 MILLION，一种新颖的量化框架，通过乘积量化实现低位宽 KV 缓存。首先，我们对 KV 缓存分布进行彻底分析，揭示现有量化方案的局限性。其次，我们引入了一种基于乘积量化的非均匀量化算法，该算法可以在保持准确性的同时有效地压缩数据。第三，我们为 MILLION 开发了一个高性能 GPU 推理框架，具有高效的注意力内核和管道设计，利用稀疏计算和异步量化，显着提高推理速度。综合评估结果表明，MILLION 可以实现 4 位量化，且困惑度和精度损失很小，并在 32 K 上下文长度下实现 2.09 倍的端到端性能增益。代码发布于https://github.com/ZongwuWang/MILLION。

items.title: The Unwritten Contract of Cloud-based Elastic Solid-State Drives.
items.abstract: Elastic block storage (EBS) with the storagecompute disaggregated architecture stands as a pivotal piece in today’s cloud. EBS furnishes users with storage capabilities through the elastic solid-state drive (ESSD). Nevertheless, despite the widespread integration into cloud services, the absence of a thorough ESSD performance characterization raises critical doubt: when more and more services are shifted onto the cloud, can ESSD satisfactorily substitute the storage responsibilities of the local SSD and offer comparable performance? In this paper, we for the first time target this question by characterizing two ESSDs from Amazon AWS and Alibaba Cloud. We present an unwritten contract of cloud-based ESSDs, encapsulating four observations and five implications for cloud storage users. Specifically, the observations are counter-intuitive and contrary to the conventional perceptions of what one would expect from the local SSD. The implications we hope could guide users in revisiting the designs of their deployed cloud software, i.e., harnessing the distinct characteristics of ESSDs for better system performance.
items.abstract_zh: 具有存储计算分解架构的弹性块存储 (EBS) 是当今云的关键部分。 EBS通过弹性固态硬盘（ESSD）为用户提供存储能力。然而，尽管广泛集成到云服务中，但缺乏全面的 ESSD 性能特征引发了严重质疑：当越来越多的服务转移到云上时，ESSD 能否令人满意地替代本地 SSD 的存储职责并提供可比的性能？在本文中，我们首次通过描述来自 Amazon AWS 和阿里云的两款 ESSD 来解决这个问题。我们提出了一份基于云的 ESSD 的不成文合同，其中包含了四项观察结果和对云存储用户的五项影响。具体来说，这些观察结果是反直觉的，并且与人们对本地 SSD 的期望相反。我们希望这些影响能够引导用户重新审视其部署的云软件的设计，即利用 ESSD 的独特特征来获得更好的系统性能。

items.title: Hypnos: Memory Efficient Homomorphic Processing Unit.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) introduces a novel paradigm in privacy-preserving computation, extending its applicability to various scenarios. However, Operating on encrypted data imposes significant computational challenges, particularly elevating data transmission and memory access demands. Consequently, developing an efficient system storage architecture becomes vital for FHE-specific architectures. Traditional FHE accelerators use a Host+ACC topology, often focusing on enhancing computational performance and efficient using of on-chip caches, with the assumption that very large volumes of encrypted data are already present in the accelerator’s memory while neglecting the inefficiencies of the unavoidable PCIe bus. In this paper, we propose Hypnos—a memory-efficient homomorphic encryption processing unit. In Hypnos, we abstract operators from FHE schemes into commands suitable for memory-efficient processing units and combine them with a homomorphic encryption paged memory management system designed for memory access, significantly reducing the memory access and execution time of homomorphic encryption applications. We implement Hypnos on the QianKun FPGA Card and highlight the following results: (1) outperforms SOTA ASIC and FPGA solutions by 2.58× and 4.43× (2) the communication overhead is reduced by 3.78 × compared to traditional architectures; (3) up to 27.6× and 19.06× energy efficiency improvement compared to ASIC-based CraterLake and FPGA-based Poseidon for ResNet-20 respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 全同态加密（FHE）在隐私保护计算中引入了一种新颖的范式，将其适用性扩展到各种场景。然而，对加密数据进行操作带来了巨大的计算挑战，特别是提高了数据传输和内存访问需求。因此，开发高效的系统存储架构对于 FHE 特定架构至关重要。传统的FHE加速器采用Host+ACC拓扑，通常专注于增强计算性能和片上缓存的高效使用，假设加速器内存中已经存在大量加密数据，而忽略了不可避免的PCIe总线的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 Hypnos——一种内存高效的同态加密处理单元。在Hypnos中，我们将FHE方案中的运算符抽象为适合内存高效处理单元的命令，并将它们与专为内存访问而设计的同态加密分页内存管理系统相结合，显着减少了同态加密应用程序的内存访问和执行时间。我们在QianKun FPGA卡上实现了Hypnos，并强调了以下结果：（1）性能优于SOTA ASIC和FPGA解决方案2.58倍和4.43倍（2）与传统架构相比，通信开销减少了3.78倍； (3) 与 ResNet-20 的基于 ASIC 的 CraterLake 和基于 FPGA 的 Poseidon 相比，能效分别提高了 27.6 倍和 19.06 倍。

items.title: Ares: High Performance Near-Storage Accelerator for FHE-based Private Set Intersection.
items.abstract: Nowadays, the importance of data privacy protection has grown significantly. Privacy Set Intersection (PSI) based on Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is widely applied in various privacy protection scenarios, such as federated learning and password verification. Nevertheless, the substantial computational demands of FHE and the vast scale of databases in PSI result in inefficient processing, thereby necessitating specialized accelerator architectures to enhance usability. Current general-purpose FHE accelerators do not adequately address the unique requirements of PSI applications, leading to suboptimal data handling and underutilization of hardware, which impedes their effective deployment for PSI acceleration. This paper introduces Ares, a practical hardware-software co-designed FHE-based PSI FPGA accelerator. We propose Lazy Relinearization to optimize redundant calculations in PSI and reduce computational complexity without changing the PSI protocol. At the same time, through the analysis and decoupling of the PSI computing pattern, we design an efficient hardware acceleration architecture that fully utilizes the bandwidth and computing resources of the hardware to achieve excellent acceleration performance. We highlight the following result: (1) a $47.99 \times$ speedup relative to CPU; (2) performance improvements of $1.79 \times$ and $1.93 \times$ over the state-of-theart FPGA FHE accelerators, Poseidon and FAB, respectively; (3) achieves $7.96 \times$ and $10.95 \times$ energy efficiency improvement compared to Poseidon and FAB, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，数据隐私保护的重要性显着增长。基于全同态加密（FHE）的隐私集交集（PSI）广泛应用于联邦学习、密码验证等各种隐私保护场景。然而，FHE 的大量计算需求和 PSI 中的庞大数据库导致处理效率低下，因此需要专门的加速器架构来增强可用性。当前的通用 FHE 加速器不能充分满足 PSI 应用的独特要求，导致数据处理不理想和硬件利用率不足，从而阻碍了 PSI 加速的有效部署。本文介绍了Ares，一种实用的软硬件协同设计的基于FHE的PSI FPGA加速器。我们提出惰性重新线性化来优化 PSI 中的冗余计算并在不改变 PSI 协议的情况下降低计算复杂度。同时，通过对PSI计算模式的分析和解耦，我们设计了高效的硬件加速架构，充分利用硬件的带宽和计算资源，实现优异的加速性能。我们强调以下结果：(1) 相对于 CPU 的加速为 $47.99 \times$； (2) 与最先进的 FPGA FHE 加速器 Poseidon 和 FAB 相比，性能分别提高了 1.79 美元和 1.93 美元； (3) 与 Poseidon 和 FAB 相比，分别实现了 7.96 美元和 10.95 美元的能效提升。

items.title: NVR: Vector Runahead on NPUs for Sparse Memory Access.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks are increasingly leveraging sparsity to reduce the scaling up of model parameter size. However, reducing wall-clock time through sparsity and pruning remains challenging due to irregular memory access patterns, leading to frequent cache misses. In this paper, we present NPU Vector Runahead (NVR), a prefetching mechanism tailored for NPUs to address cache miss problems in sparse DNN workloads. Rather than optimising memory patterns with high overhead and poor portability, NVR adapts runahead execution to the unique architecture of NPUs. NVR provides a general micro-architectural solution for sparse DNN workloads without requiring compiler or algorithmic support, operating as a decoupled, speculative, lightweight hardware sub-thread alongside the NPU, with minimal hardware overhead (under 5%). NVR achieves an average 90% reduction in cache misses compared to SOTA prefetching in general-purpose processors, delivering 4 x average speedup on sparse workloads versus NPUs without prefetching. Moreover, we investigate the advantages of incorporating a small cache (16 KB) into the NPU combined with NVR. Our evaluation shows that expanding this modest cache delivers 5x higher performance benefits than increasing the $\mathbf{L 2}$ cache size by the same amount.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络越来越多地利用稀疏性来减少模型参数大小的扩大。然而，由于不规则的内存访问模式，导致频繁的缓存未命中，通过稀疏性和修剪来减少挂钟时间仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 NPU Vector Runahead (NVR)，这是一种专为 NPU 定制的预取机制，用于解决稀疏 DNN 工作负载中的缓存未命中问题。 NVR 不是以高开销和较差的可移植性来优化内存模式，而是根据 NPU 的独特架构调整超前执行。 NVR 为稀疏 DNN 工作负载提供通用微架构解决方案，无需编译器或算法支持，与 NPU 一起作为解耦、推测、轻量级硬件子线程运行，硬件开销极低（低于 5%）。与通用处理器中的 SOTA 预取相比，NVR 的缓存缺失平均减少了 90%，与不使用预取的 NPU 相比，稀疏工作负载的平均加速速度提高了 4 倍。此外，我们还研究了将小型缓存 (16 KB) 合并到 NPU 中并与 NVR 结合的优势。我们的评估表明，与增加相同数量的 $\mathbf{L 2}$ 缓存大小相比，扩展这种适度的缓存可带来 5 倍的性能优势。

items.title: Monolithic 3D FPGA Design and Synthesis with Back-End-of-Line Configuration Memories.
items.abstract: This work presents a novel monolithic 3D (M3D) FPGA architecture that leverages stackable back-end-of-line (BEOL) transistors to implement configuration memory and pass gates, significantly improving area, latency, and power efficiency. By integrating n-type (W -doped In<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf>) and p-type (SnO) amorphous oxide semiconductor (AOS) transistors in the BEOL, Si SRAM configuration bits are substituted with a less leaky equivalent that can be programmed at logic-compatible voltages. BEOL-compatible AOS transistors are currently under extensive research and development in the device community, with investment by leading foundries, from which reported data is used to develop robust physics-based models in TCAD that enable circuit design. The use of AOS pass gates reduces the overhead of reconfigurable circuits by mapping FPGA switch block (SB) and connection block (CB) matrices above configurable logic blocks (CLBs), thereby increasing the proximity of logic elements and reducing latency. By interfacing with the latest Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) suite, an AOS-based M3D FPGA implemented in 7 nm technology is demonstrated with $3.4 \times$ lower area-time squared product ($\mathbf{A T}^{2}$), 27% lower critical path latency, and 26% lower reconfigurable routing block power on benchmarks including hyperdimensional computing and large language models (LLMs).
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的单片 3D (M3D) FPGA 架构，该架构利用可堆叠后端 (BEOL) 晶体管来实现配置存储器和传输门，从而显着改善面积、延迟和功率效率。通过集成 n 型 (W 掺杂 In<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" BEOL、Si SRAM 配置位中的 xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf>）和 p 型 (SnO) 非晶氧化物半导体 (AOS) 晶体管被替换为可在逻辑兼容电压下编程的泄漏较少的等效器件。与 BEOL 兼容的 AOS 晶体管目前正在器件界进行广泛的研究和开发，并得到了领先代工厂的投资，其中报告的数据用于在 TCAD 中开发基于物理的强大模型，从而实现电路设计。 AOS 传输门的使用通过将 FPGA 开关块 (SB) 和连接块 (CB) 矩阵映射到可配置逻辑块 (CLB) 上方来减少可重构电路的开销，从而增加逻辑元件的接近度并减少延迟。通过与最新的 Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) 套件接口，采用 7 nm 技术实现的基于 AOS 的 M3D FPGA 在包括超维计算和大语言模型 (LLM) 在内的基准测试中，面积时间平方乘积 ($\mathbf{A T}^{2}$) 降低了 3.4 美元，关键路径延迟降低了 27%，可重构路由模块功耗降低了 26%。

items.title: Buffer Prospector: Discovering and Exploiting Untapped Buffer Resources in Many-Core DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: In large-scale DNN inference accelerators, the many-core architecture has emerged as a predominant design, with layer-pipeline (LP) mapping being a mainstream mapping approach. However, our experimental findings and theoretical justifications uncover a hardware-independent and prevalent flaw in employing layer-pipeline mapping on many-core accelerators: a significant underutilization of buffer space across numerous cores, indicating substantial potential for optimization. Building on this discovery, we develop a universal and efficient buffer allocation strategy, BufferProspector, which includes a Buffer Requirement Calculator and Buffer Allocator, to capitalize on these unused buffers, addressing the timing mismatch challenge inherent in LP mapping. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) open-source LP mapping framework Tangram, BufferProspector averages a simultaneous increase in energy efficiency and performance by 1.44× and 2.26×, respectively. Moreover, we conduct some case studies on architecture and mapping. BufferProspector will be open-sourced.
items.abstract_zh: 在大规模DNN推理加速器中，众核架构已成为主流设计，层管道（LP）映射成为主流映射方法。然而，我们的实验结果和理论论证揭示了在多核加速器上使用层管道映射时存在的一个与硬件无关且普遍存在的缺陷：跨多个核心的缓冲区空间利用率明​​显不足，这表明优化的巨大潜力。基于这一发现，我们开发了一种通用且高效的缓冲区分配策略 BufferProspector，其中包括缓冲区需求计算器和缓冲区分配器，以利用这些未使用的缓冲区，解决 LP 映射中固有的时序不匹配挑战。与最先进（SOTA）的开源LP映射框架Tangram相比，BufferProspector平均能效和性能分别同步提高了1.44倍和2.26倍。此外，我们还进行了一些关于建筑和绘图的案例研究。 BufferProspector 将开源。

items.title: SpecASR: Accelerating LLM-based Automatic Speech Recognition via Speculative Decoding.
items.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) has recently attracted a lot of attention due to its high recognition accuracy and enhanced multi-dialect support. However, the high decoding latency of LLMs challenges the real-time ASR requirements. Although speculative decoding has been explored for better decoding efficiency, they usually ignore the key characteristics of the ASR task and achieve limited speedup. To further reduce the real-time ASR latency, in this paper, we propose a novel speculative decoding framework specialized for ASR, dubbed SpecASR. SpecASR is developed based on our core observation that ASR decoding is audio-conditioned, which results in high output alignment between small and large ASR models, even given output mismatches in intermediate decoding steps. Therefore, SpecASR features an adaptive draft sequence generation process that dynamically modifies the draft sequence length to maximize the token acceptance length. SpecASR further proposes a draft sequence recycling strategy that reuses the previously generated draft sequence to reduce the draft ASR model latency. Moreover, a two-pass sparse token tree generation algorithm is also proposed to balance the latency of draft and target ASR models. With extensive experimental results, we demonstrate SpecASR achieves $3.04 \times-3.79 \times$ and $1.25 \times-1.84 \times$ speedup over the baseline autoregressive decoding and speculative decoding, respectively, without any loss in recognition accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动语音识别（ASR）由于其高识别精度和增强的多方言支持而最近引起了广泛关注。然而，LLM 的高解码延迟对实时 ASR 要求提出了挑战。尽管人们已经探索了推测解码来提高解码效率，但它们通常忽略了 ASR 任务的关键特征，并且实现的加速有限。为了进一步减少实时 ASR 延迟，在本文中，我们提出了一种专门用于 ASR 的新型推测解码框架，称为 SpecASR。 SpecASR 是基于我们的核心观察而开发的，即 ASR 解码是音频调节的，这会导致小型和大型 ASR 模型之间的高输出对齐，即使在中间解码步骤中输出不匹配也是如此。因此，SpecASR 具有自适应草稿序列生成过程，可动态修改草稿序列长度以最大化令牌接受长度。 SpecASR进一步提出了草案序列回收策略，重用之前生成的草案序列以减少草案ASR模型延迟。此外，还提出了一种两遍稀疏令牌树生成算法来平衡草稿和目标 ASR 模型的延迟。通过大量的实验结果，我们证明 SpecASR 比基线自回归解码和推测解码分别实现了 $3.04 \times-3.79 \times$ 和 $1.25 \times-1.84 \times$ 加速，并且识别精度没有任何损失。

items.title: Generative Model Based Standard Cell Timing Library Characterization.
items.abstract: Accurate cell timing characterization is essential, on which static timing analysis relies to verify timing performance and ensure design robustness across various PVT conditions (corners). The corner explosion in modern design amplifies the efficiency and scalability challenge for accurate characterization. However, the conventional characterization approach of SPICE simulation alone becomes prohibitively expensive due to the increasing computational complexity and the amount of characterized data. In this paper, we view the characterization problem from a generative modeling perspective to tackle the efficiency and scalability challenge. With a hybrid of generative adversarial network (GAN) and autoencoder, our generative model learns and generalizes among various timing arcs and corners. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves high accuracy and extensibility while reducing the runtime significantly.
items.abstract_zh: 准确的单元时序表征至关重要，静态时序分析依靠它来验证时序性能并确保跨各种 PVT 条件（角点）的设计稳健性。现代设计中的角点爆炸加剧了精确表征的效率和可扩展性挑战。然而，由于计算复杂性和表征数据量的增加，仅采用 SPICE 仿真的传统表征方法就变得极其昂贵。在本文中，我们从生成建模的角度看待表征问题，以解决效率和可扩展性挑战。通过生成对抗网络（GAN）和自动编码器的混合，我们的生成模型可以在各种时序弧和角之间进行学习和泛化。实验结果表明，所提出的框架实现了高精度和可扩展性，同时显着减少了运行时间。

items.title: LVM-MO: A Large Vision Model Pioneer on Full-Chip Mask Optimization.
items.abstract: Moving toward the post-Moore era, full-chip mask optimization (MO) has become a pivotal step for semiconductor designers and manufacturers in extending current resolution enhancement techniques. The majority of recent research efforts have focused on clip-level restoration, employing a divide-and-conquer approach to mitigate the impacts of optical proximity and process bias across entire chips. Nevertheless, when confronted with industrial full-chip mask optimization challenges, these works exhibit limited correction capabilities, struggle with generalization, and are time-inefficient. In this paper, we propose a novel full-chip mask optimization paradigm based on a massive lithography data-driven large vision model. Our approach features a foundation layout feature extractor, which is aware of the mutual influence of polygons in long-range pattern perception as well as optical physics and chemical characteristics of lithography, matters. Compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) works, our work demonstrates significant advantages in terms of resolution fidelity, correction speed, and the ability to handle full-chip scale layouts.
items.abstract_zh: 迈向后摩尔时代，全芯片掩模优化（MO）已成为半导体设计人员和制造商扩展当前分辨率增强技术的关键一步。最近的大多数研究工作都集中在剪辑级恢复上，采用分而治之的方法来减轻整个芯片上光学邻近度和工艺偏差的影响。然而，当面临工业全芯片掩模优化挑战时，这些工作表现出有限的校正能力，难以泛化，并且时间效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于海量光刻数据驱动的大视觉模型的新型全芯片掩模优化范例。我们的方法具有基础布局特征提取器，它能够意识到多边形在远程图案感知中的相互影响以及光刻的光学物理和化学特性。与最先进的（SOTA）工作相比，我们的工作在分辨率保真度、校正速度和处理全芯片规模布局的能力方面表现出显着的优势。

items.title: EPIC: Error PredIction and Correction for Power-Efficient Voltage Underscaling Multiply-Accumulate Unit.
items.abstract: Matrix multiplication dominates the power consumption in compute-intensive applications such as deep neural networks (DNNs), spurring intensive investigations into power-efficient multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. Among the mainstream low-power design methodologies, voltage underscaling can achieve effective power savings yet induce timing errors that may lead to catastrophic accuracy loss. In this paper, we propose an error prediction and correction framework (denoted as EPIC) for arbitrary MAC unit under voltage underscaling, which predicts the timing errors and samples the correct output by using a delay-tunable clock. A prediction bits searching algorithm is proposed to enhance the prediction accuracy with low hardware cost, resulting in up to 100% accuracy. While preserving the accuracy, EPIC achieves up to 52% power savings over the corresponding MAC operating at nominal voltage. With transistor-level optimizations, EPIC incurs only 8% area and 1% power overheads, achieving 100% error correction under a voltage underscaling ratio of $\mathbf{0. 7 4}$. Compared to state-of-the-art error resilient circuit designs, EPIC consumes 60%-88% less area. Additionally, to achieve the accuracy performance of EPIC in error-resilient applications, we propose a simulation workflow involving precise timing features, enabling an accurate simulation of voltage underscaling MAC in large-scale applications. The experimental results show that, under voltage-underscaling, the MAC with EPIC consumes 11% less power than the one without EPIC, when a same accuracy as exact implementation is required in multi-layer perceptron (MLP).
items.abstract_zh: 矩阵乘法在深度神经网络 (DNN) 等计算密集型应用中的功耗占主导地位，这促使人们对节能乘法累加 (MAC) 单元进行深入研究。在主流的低功耗设计方法中，电压降标可以实现有效的节能，但会引起时序错误，从而可能导致灾难性的精度损失。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对电压下缩放下的任意MAC单元的错误预测和校正框架（表示为EPIC），该框架使用延迟可调时钟来预测时序错误并采样正确的输出。提出了一种预测位搜索算法，以较低的硬件成本提高预测精度，准确率高达100%。在保持精度的同时，EPIC 比在标称电压下运行的相应 MAC 节能高达 52%。通过晶体管级优化，EPIC 仅产生 8% 的面积和 1% 的功率开销，在 $\mathbf{0 的电压降标比下实现 100% 的纠错。 7 4}$。与最先进的错误恢复电路设计相比，EPIC 占用的面积减少了 60%-88%。此外，为了在容错应用中实现 EPIC 的精确性能，我们提出了一种涉及精确时序功能的仿真工作流程，从而能够在大规模应用中精确仿真电压下标度 MAC。实验结果表明，在电压降低的情况下，当多层感知器 (MLP) 需要与精确实现相同的精度时，带有 EPIC 的 MAC 比没有 EPIC 的 MAC 消耗的功率减少 11%。

items.title: GoPTX: Fine-grained GPU Kernel Fusion by PTX-level Instruction Flow Weaving.
items.abstract: GPUs have been heavily utilized in diverse applications, and numerous approaches, including kernel fusion, have been proposed to boost GPU efficiency through concurrent kernel execution. However, these approaches generally overlook the opportunities to mitigate warp stalls and improve instruction level parallelism (ILP) in inter-kernel resource sharing. To address this issue, we introduce GOPTX, a novel design for kernel fusion that improves ILP through deliberate weaving instructions at the PTX level. GOPTX establishes a merged control flow graph (CFG) from original kernels, enabling to interleaving of instructions that were sequentially executed by default and minimizing pipeline stalls on data hazards. We further propose a latency-aware instruction weaving algorithm for more efficient instruction scheduling and an adaptive code slicing method to enlarge the scheduling space. Experimental evaluation demonstrates that GOPTX achieves an average speedup of $\mathbf{1 1. 2 \%}$ over the baseline concurrent execution, with a maximum improvement of 23%. The hardware resource utilization statistics show significant enhancements in eligible warps per cycle and resource use.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 已在各种应用中得到大量使用，并且已经提出了包括内核融合在内的多种方法来通过并发内核执行来提高 GPU 效率。然而，这些方法通常忽视了在内核间资源共享中减轻扭曲停顿和提高指令级并行性 (ILP) 的机会。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 GOPTX，这是一种新颖的内核融合设计，通过在 PTX 级别精心编织指令来改进 ILP。 GOPTX 从原始内核建立了一个合并的控制流图 (CFG)，从而能够交错默认顺序执行的指令，并最大限度地减少数据危险造成的管道停顿。我们进一步提出了一种用于更有效指令调度的延迟感知指令编织算法和一种用于扩大调度空间的自适应代码切片方法。实验评估表明，GOPTX 比基线并发执行平均加速 $\mathbf{1 1. 2 \%}$，最大提升 23%。硬件资源利用率统计数据显示每个周期的合格扭曲和资源使用显着增强。

items.title: SSDTrain: An Activation Offloading Framework to SSDs for Faster Large Language Model Training.
items.abstract: The growth rate of the GPU memory capacity has not been able to keep up with that of the size of large language models (LLMs), hindering the model training process. In particular, activations-the intermediate tensors produced during forward propagation and reused in backward propagation-dominate the GPU memory use. This leads to high training overheads such as expensive weight update costs due to the small micro-batch size. To address this challenge, we propose SSDTrain, an adaptive activation offloading framework to high-capacity NVMe SSDs. SSDTrain reduces GPU memory usage without impacting performance by fully overlapping data transfers with computation. SSDTrain is compatible with popular deep learning frameworks like PyTorch, Megatron, and DeepSpeed, and it employs techniques such as tensor deduplication and forwarding to further enhance efficiency. We extensively experimented with popular LLMs like GPT, BERT, and T5. Results demonstrate that SSDTrain reduces 47% of the activation peak memory usage. At the same time, SSDTrain perfectly overlaps the I/O with the computation and incurs negligible overhead. Compared with keeping activations in GPU memory and layerwise full recomputation, SSDTrain achieves the best memory savings with negligible throughput loss. We further analyze how the reduced activation memory use may be leveraged to increase throughput by increasing micro-batch size and reducing pipeline parallelism bubbles.
items.abstract_zh: GPU内存容量的增长速度无法跟上大型语言模型（LLM）规模的增长速度，阻碍了模型训练过程。特别是，激活（前向传播过程中产生并在后向传播中重用的中间张量）主导了 GPU 内存的使用。这会导致较高的训练开销，例如由于微批量大小较小而导致昂贵的权重更新成本。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 SSDTrain，这是一种针对高容量 NVMe SSD 的自适应激活卸载框架。 SSDTrain 通过将数据传输与计算完全重叠来减少 GPU 内存使用，而不影响性能。 SSDTrain兼容PyTorch、Megatron、DeepSpeed等流行的深度学习框架，并采用张量去重、转发等技术进一步提升效率。我们对 GPT、BERT 和 T5 等流行的法学硕士进行了广泛的实验。结果表明 SSDTrain 减少了 47% 的激活峰值内存使用量。同时，SSDTrain 将 I/O 与计算完美重叠，并且产生的开销可以忽略不计。与将激活保留在 GPU 内存中和逐层完全重新计算相比，SSDTrain 实现了最佳的内存节省，吞吐量损失可以忽略不计。我们进一步分析了如何通过增加微批量大小和减少管道并行性气泡来利用减少的激活内存使用来提高吞吐量。

items.title: BirdMoE: Reducing Communication Costs for Mixture-of-Experts Training Using Load-Aware Bi-random Quantization.
items.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model parallelism is prevalent in training Large Language Models (e.g., ChatGPT). However, the intensive all-to-all collective communication of the MoE layer’s intermediate computing results substantially degrades MoE training efficiency. In this paper, we propose BirdMoE, a novel load-aware communication compression technique with Bi-random quantization for MoE training with two core modules. Specifically, BirdMoE employs a lightweight Random Quantization (RQ) with expectation invariance property to efficiently map the floating-point intermediate computing results into integers while maintaining the MoE training quality. Additionally, BirdMoE utilizes a Mixed Precision (MP) strategy to dynamically balance the communication loads among expert nodes, significantly improving all-to-all communication efficiency for the MoE training system. Experiments on four typical MoE training tasks demonstrate that BirdMoE achieves higher $4.06 \times- 10.44 \times$ total communication compression ratios and $1.18 \times-5.27 \times$ training speedup compared with the state-of-the-art compression techniques while maintaining the MoE training quality.
items.abstract_zh: 混合专家 (MoE) 模型并行性在训练大型语言模型（例如 ChatGPT）中很普遍。然而，MoE层中间计算结果的密集的全对所有集体通信极大地降低了MoE的训练效率。在本文中，我们提出了 BirdMoE，一种新颖的负载感知通信压缩技术，具有双随机量化功能，用于具有两个核心模块的 MoE 训练。具体来说，BirdMoE 采用具有期望不变性的轻量级随机量化（RQ）来有效地将浮点中间计算结果映射为整数，同时保持 MoE 训练质量。此外，BirdMoE利用混合精度（MP）策略动态平衡专家节点之间的通信负载，显着提高MoE训练系统的全面通信效率。对四个典型 MoE 训练任务的实验表明，与最先进的压缩技术相比，BirdMoE 在保持 MoE 训练质量的同时，实现了更高的 $4.06 \times- 10.44 \times$ 总通信压缩比和 $1.18 \times-5.27 \times$ 训练加速。

items.title: PIMoE: Towards Efficient MoE Transformer Deployment on NPU-PIM System through Throttle-Aware Task Offloading.
items.abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) technique holds significant promise for scaling up Transformer models. However, the data transfer overhead and imbalanced workload hinder efficient deployment. This work presents PIMoE, a heterogeneous system combining processing-in-memory (PIM) and neural-processing-unit (NPU) to facilitate efficient MoE Transformer inference. We propose a throttle-aware task offloading method that addresses workload imbalance between NPU and PIM, achieving optimal task distribution. Furthermore, we design a near-memory-controller data condenser to address the mismatch of sparse data layout between NPU and PIM, enhancing data transfer efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that PIMoE achieves $4.5 \times$ speedup and $13.7 \times$ greater energy efficiency compared to the A 100, and $1.4 \times$ speedup over a state-of-the-art MoE platform.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 技术对于扩展 Transformer 模型具有重大前景。然而，数据传输开销和工作负载不平衡阻碍了高效部署。这项工作提出了 PIMoE，这是一种结合内存处理 (PIM) 和神经处理单元 (NPU) 的异构系统，以促进高效的 MoE Transformer 推理。我们提出了一种节流感知任务卸载方法，解决 NPU 和 PIM 之间的工作负载不平衡问题，实现最佳任务分配。此外，我们设计了一种近内存控制器数据冷凝器来解决 NPU 和 PIM 之间稀疏数据布局的不匹配问题，从而提高数据传输效率。实验结果表明，与 A 100 相比，PIMoE 实现了 4.5 美元的加速和 13.7 美元的能源效率，比最先进的 MoE 平台实现了 1.4 美元的加速。

items.title: Cayman: Custom Accelerator Generation with Control Flow and Data Access Optimization.
items.abstract: Custom accelerators enhance System-on-Chips’ performance through hardware specialization. High-level synthesis (HLS) can automatically synthesize accelerators for given kernels but requires manual selection and extraction of kernels from applications. This paper proposes Cayman, the first end-to-end framework to synthesize high-performance custom accelerators with both control flow and data access optimization. Cayman automatically selects kernels for hardware acceleration based on a hierarchical program representation, which captures kernel candidates with general control flows. Besides, Cayman optimizes accelerators with specialized processor-accelerator interfaces for data access acceleration. Cayman further introduces a novel accelerator merging mechanism to synthesize reusable accelerators. Experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that Cayman outperforms two state-of-the-art frameworks by $8.0 \times$ and $14.4 \times$.
items.abstract_zh: 定制加速器通过硬件专业化增强片上系统的性能。高级综合 (HLS) 可以自动综合给定内核的加速器，但需要从应用程序中手动选择和提取内核。本文提出了 Cayman，这是第一个综合具有控制流和数据访问优化的高性能定制加速器的端到端框架。 Cayman 根据分层程序表示自动选择用于硬件加速的内核，该表示捕获具有通用控制流的内核候选者。此外，Cayman 通过专门的处理器加速器接口优化加速器，以实现数据访问加速。开曼进一步引入了一种新颖的加速器合并机制来合成可重复使用的加速器。各种基准的实验表明，Cayman 的性能优于两个最先进的框架 $8.0 \times$ 和 $14.4 \times$。

items.title: Exploiting Power Side-Channel Vulnerabilities in XGBoost Accelerator.
items.abstract: XGBoost (eXtreme Gradient Boosting), a widelyused decision tree algorithm, plays a crucial role in applications such as ransomware and fraud detection. While its performance is well-established, its security against model extraction on hardware platforms like Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) has not been fully explored. In this paper, we demonstrate a significant vulnerability where sensitive model data can be leaked from an XGBoost implementation through side-channel attacks (SCAs). By analyzing variations in power consumption, we show how an attacker can infer node features within the XGBoost model, leading to the extraction of critical data. We conduct an experiment using the XGBoost accelerator FAXID on the Sakura-X platform, demonstrating a method to deduce model decisions by monitoring power consumptions. The results show that on average 367k tests are sufficient to leak sensitive values. Our findings underscore the need for improved hardware and algorithmic protections to safeguard machine learning models from these types of attacks.
items.abstract_zh: XGBoost（eXtreme Gradient Boosting）是一种广泛使用的决策树算法，在勒索软件和欺诈检测等应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然其性能已得到证实，但其针对现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等硬件平台上模型提取的安全性尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们演示了一个重大漏洞，其中敏感模型数据可能通过旁道攻击 (SCA) 从 XGBoost 实现中泄露。通过分析功耗的变化，我们展示了攻击者如何推断 XGBoost 模型中的节点特征，从而提取关键数据。我们在 Sakura-X 平台上使用 XGBoost 加速器 FAXID 进行了实验，演示了一种通过监控功耗来推断模型决策的方法。结果表明，平均 367k 次测试足以泄漏敏感值。我们的研究结果强调需要改进硬件和算法保护，以保护机器学习模型免受此类攻击。

items.title: ACIM-QMM: Efficient Analog Computing-in-Memory Accelerator for QC-MDPC McEliece Cryptosystem.
items.abstract: Quasi-cyclic moderate density parity-check McEliece (QMM) cryptosystem is designed to mitigate the security threat posed by quantum computers, and is considered to be a promising candidate for post-quantum cryptography (PQC). However, the growing requirement of data encryption pose severe challenges for QMM implementation in terms of latency and hardware overhead. In this work, we firstly propose ACIM-QMM, an analog computing-in-memory (CIM) accelerator design for QMM cryptosystem. The use of analog circuits and CIM enables the design to efficiently generate key and encrypt ciphertext while breaking the performance bottleneck constrained by digital computing paradigm in PQC. In the experiment, ACIM-QMM can work in low relative error, and it can achieve $31.4 \times \sim 288.1 \times$ speedup compared with SOTA hardware of QMM cryptosystem. Furthermore, the results indicate that ACIM-QMM can achieve a maximum of $3.12 \times$ area efficiency and $20.32 \times$ energy efficiency compared to other PQC hardware for 256-bit security.
items.abstract_zh: 准循环中等密度奇偶校验 McEliece (QMM) 密码系统旨在减轻量子计算机带来的安全威胁，被认为是后量子密码学 (PQC) 的有前途的候选者。然而，不断增长的数据加密需求在延迟和硬件开销方面对 QMM 实施提出了严峻的挑战。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了 ACIM-QMM，一种用于 QMM 密码系统的模拟内存计算（CIM）加速器设计。模拟电路和CIM的使用使设计能够高效地生成密钥并加密密文，同时突破PQC中数字计算范式所限制的性能瓶颈。实验中，ACIM-QMM可以在较低的相对误差下工作，与QMM密码系统的SOTA硬件相比，可以实现$31.4 \times \sim 288.1 \times$加速。此外，结果表明，与其他 256 位安全性的 PQC 硬件相比，ACIM-QMM 可以实现最大 3.12 美元的面积效率和 20.32 美元的能源效率。

items.title: DSPlacer: DSP Placement for FPGA-based CNN Accelerator.
items.abstract: Deploying convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on hardware platforms like Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) has garnered significant attention due to their inherent flexibility and parallelism. Achieving optimal timing closure remains a critical challenge, as placement directly impacts clock frequency and throughput. Existing approaches often face scalability issues with large designs or fail to formalize placement rules into automated algorithms. In this paper, we propose DSPlacer, a novel DSP placement framework designed for diverse CNN accelerator architectures in the context of FPGA design. The proposed approach iteratively optimizes the placement of datapath DSPs to enhance timing performance. To achieve this, DSPlacer integrates several advanced techniques, including graph convolutional network-based datapath DSP identification, DSP graph construction, min-cost-flow DSP assignment, and integer linear programming (ILP)-based cascade constraint legalization. These techniques collectively address two key requirements for datapath DSP placement: (1) cascading datapath DSPs to achieve a compact layout, and (2) preserving direct datapath information between the processing system and programmable logic. The framework has been evaluated on multiple academic benchmarks and compared against AMD Xilinx Vivado 2020.2 and AMF-Placer 2.0. Experimental results demonstrate that DSPlacer improves Worst Negative Slack (WNS) by 32% and 65%, respectively, highlighting its efficacy and superiority.
items.abstract_zh: 在现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等硬件平台上部署卷积神经网络 (CNN) 由于其固有的灵活性和并行性而引起了广泛关注。实现最佳时序收敛仍然是一个关键挑战，因为布局直接影响时钟频率和吞吐量。现有方法通常面临大型设计的可扩展性问题，或者无法将布局规则形式化为自动化算法。在本文中，我们提出了 DSPlacer，这是一种新颖的 DSP 放置框架，专为 FPGA 设计背景下的各种 CNN 加速器架构而设计。所提出的方法迭代地优化数据路径 DSP 的布局以增强时序性能。为了实现这一目标，DSPlacer 集成了多种先进技术，包括基于图卷积网络的数据路径 DSP 识别、DSP 图构建、最小成本流 DSP 分配以及基于整数线性规划 (ILP) 的级联约束合法化。这些技术共同满足了数据路径 DSP 布局的两个关键要求：(1) 级联数据路径 DSP 以实现紧凑布局，以及 (2) 保留处理系统和可编程逻辑之间的直接数据路径信息。该框架已根据多个学术基准进行评估，并与 AMD Xilinx Vivado 2020.2 和 AMF-Placer 2.0 进行比较。实验结果表明，DSPlacer 将最差负裕度 (WNS) 分别改善了 32% 和 65%，凸显了其功效和优越性。

items.title: ReaLM: Reliable and Efficient Large Language Model Inference with Statistical Algorithm-Based Fault Tolerance.
items.abstract: The demand for efficient large language model (LLM) inference has propelled the development of dedicated accelerators. As accelerators are vulnerable to hardware faults due to aging, variation, etc, existing accelerator designs often reserve a large voltage margin or leverage algorithm-based fault tolerance (ABFT) techniques to ensure LLM inference correctness. However, previous methods often overlook the inherent fault tolerance of LLMs, leading to high computation and energy overhead. To enable reliable yet efficient LLM inference, in this paper, we propose a novel algorithm/circuit co-design framework, dubbed ReaLM. For the first time, we systematically characterize the fault tolerance of LLMs by performing a large-scale error injection study of representative LLMs and natural language understanding tasks. Then, we propose a statistical ABFT algorithm that fully leverages the error robustness to minimize error recovery as much as possible. We also customize the error detection circuits to enable a low-cost online collection of error statistics. Extensive experiments show that with only 1.42% circuit area and 1.79% power overhead, our ReaLM can reduce perplexity degradation from 18.54 to 0.29. Compared to existing methods, ReaLM consistently reduces recovery costs across different operating voltages and improves energy efficiency by up to 35.83% without compromising LLM performance. Our error injection code is available at https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/ReaLM_DAC25/.
items.abstract_zh: 对高效大语言模型 (LLM) 推理的需求推动了专用加速器的开发。由于加速器容易因老化、变异等原因而出现硬件故障，现有的加速器设计通常会保留较大的电压裕度或利用基于算法的容错（ABFT）技术来确保LLM推理的正确性。然而，以前的方法往往忽视了 LLM 固有的容错能力，导致计算量和能量开销较高。为了实现可靠而高效的 LLM 推理，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法/电路协同设计框架，称为 ReaLM。我们首次通过对代表性 LLM 和自然语言理解任务进行大规模错误注入研究，系统地表征了 LLM 的容错能力。然后，我们提出了一种统计 ABFT 算法，该算法充分利用错误鲁棒性来尽可能减少错误恢复。我们还定制了错误检测电路，以实现低成本的在线错误统计收集。大量实验表明，仅需要 1.42% 的电路面积和 1.79% 的功耗，我们的 ReaLM 就可以将困惑度从 18.54 降低到 0.29。与现有方法相比，ReaLM 在不同工作电压下持续降低恢复成本，并将能效提高高达 35.83%，而不会影响 LLM 性能。我们的错误注入代码位于 https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/ReaLM_DAC25/。

items.title: Ragnar: Exploring Volatile-Channel Vulnerabilities on RDMA NIC.
items.abstract: With the surge in data computation, Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) becomes crucial to offering low-latency and highthroughput communication for data centers, but it faces new security threats. This paper presents RAGNAR, a comprehensive suite of hardware-contention-based volatile-channel attacks leveraging the underexplored security vulnerabilities in RDMA hardware. Through comprehensive microbenchmark reverse engineering, we analyze RDMA NICs at multiple granularity levels and then construct covert-channel attacks, achieving 3.2x the bandwidth of state-of-the-art RDMA-targeted attacks on CX-5. We apply side-channel attacks on real-world distributed databases and disaggregated memory, where we successfully fingerprint operations and recover sensitive address data with 95.6% accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据计算量的激增，远程直接内存访问（RDMA）对于为数据中心提供低延迟和高吞吐量通信变得至关重要，但它面临着新的安全威胁。本文介绍了 RAGNAR，这是一套基于硬件争用的易失性通道攻击的综合套件，利用 RDMA 硬件中尚未开发的安全漏洞。通过全面的微基准逆向工程，我们在多个粒度级别分析 RDMA NIC，然后构建隐蔽通道攻击，在 CX-5 上实现了最先进的 RDMA 目标攻击的 3.2 倍带宽。我们对现实世界的分布式数据库和分解内存应用侧通道攻击，成功进行指纹操作并以 95.6% 的准确度恢复敏感地址数据。

items.title: Speculative Decoding for Verilog: Speed and Quality, All in One.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) has revolutionized code generation tasks across various programming languages. However, the unique characteristics of programming languages, particularly those like Verilog with specific syntax and lower representation in training datasets, pose significant challenges for conventional tokenization and decoding approaches. In this paper, we introduce a novel application of speculative decoding for Verilog code generation, showing that it can improve both inference speed and output quality, effectively achieving speed and quality all in one. Unlike standard LLM tokenization schemes, which often fragment meaningful code structures, our approach aligns decoding stops with syntactically significant tokens, making it easier for models to learn the token distribution. This refinement addresses inherent tokenization issues and enhances the model’s ability to capture Verilog’s logical constructs more effectively. Our experimental results show that our method achieves up to a $5.05 \times$ speedup in Verilog code generation and increases pass@10 functional accuracy on RTLLM by up to $\mathbf{1 7. 1 9 \%}$ compared to conventional training strategies. These findings highlight speculative decoding as a promising approach to bridge the quality gap in code generation for specialized programming languages.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展彻底改变了各种编程语言的代码生成任务。然而，编程语言的独特特征，特别是像 Verilog 这样具有特定语法和训练数据集中较低表示的语言，对传统的标记化和解码方法提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 Verilog 代码生成的推测解码的新颖应用，表明它可以提高推理速度和输出质量，有效地实现速度和质量的结合。与标准 LLM 标记化方案（通常会分割有意义的代码结构）不同，我们的方法将解码停止与语法上重要的标记对齐，使模型更容易学习标记分布。这种改进解决了固有的标记化问题，并增强了模型更有效地捕获 Verilog 逻辑结构的能力。我们的实验结果表明，与传统训练策略相比，我们的方法在 Verilog 代码生成中实现了高达 $5.05 \times$ 的加速，并将 RTLLM 上的 pass@10 功能准确性提高了 $\mathbf{1 7. 1 9 \%}$。这些发现强调推测解码是一种有前途的方法，可以弥补专业编程语言代码生成的质量差距。

items.title: CMFuzz: Parallel Fuzzing of IoT Protocols by Configuration Model Identification and Scheduling.
items.abstract: IoT protocols are essential for the communication among diverse devices. In real-world scenarios, IoT protocols utilize flexible configurations to meet various use cases. These configurations can significantly impact the protocols’ execution paths, with many bugs emerging only under specific configurations. Fuzzing has become a prominent technique for uncovering vulnerabilities in IoT protocol implementations. However, traditional fuzzing approaches are typically conducted using fixed or default configurations, overlooking potential issues that might arise in different settings. This limitation can lead to missing critical bugs that appear only under alternative configurations.In this paper, we propose CMFuzz, a parallel fuzzing framework designed to improve fuzzing effectiveness of IoT protocols through configuration identification and scheduling. CMFuzz first constructs a generalized protocol configuration model by systematically extracting configuration items from protocol implementations. Then, based on this model, CMFUZZ defines the relations among configuration items and introduces a relation-aware allocation mechanism to distribute them across parallel fuzzing instances. For evaluation, We implement CMFuzz on top of the widely-used protocol fuzzer Peach and conduct experiments on six popular IoT protocols. Compared to the original parallel mode of Peach and state-of-the-art parallel protocol fuzzer SPFuzz, CMFuzz covers an average of 34.4% and 28.5% more branches within 24 hours. Additionally, CMFuzz has detected 14 previously-unknown bugs in these real-world IoT protocols.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网协议对于不同设备之间的通信至关重要。在现实场景中，物联网协议利用灵活的配置来满足各种用例。这些配置可以显着影响协议的执行路径，许多错误仅在特定配置下出现。模糊测试已成为发现物联网协议实施中漏洞的一项重要技术。然而，传统的模糊测试方法通常使用固定或默认配置进行，忽略了不同设置中可能出现的潜在问题。这种限制可能会导致丢失仅在替代配置下出现的关键错误。在本文中，我们提出了 CMFuzz，这是一种并行模糊测试框架，旨在通过配置识别和调度来提高物联网协议的模糊测试有效性。 CMFuzz首先通过从协议实现中系统地提取配置项来构建通用的协议配置模型。然后，基于该模型，CMFUZZ 定义了配置项之间的关系，并引入了关系感知分配机制将它们分布在并行模糊测试实例中。为了进行评估，我们在广泛使用的协议模糊器 Peach 之上实现了 CMFuzz，并对六种流行的 IoT 协议进行了实验。与 Peach 的原始并行模式和最先进的并行协议模糊器 SPFuzz 相比，CMFuzz 在 24 小时内平均多覆盖 34.4% 和 28.5% 的分支。此外，CMFuzz 还在这些现实世界的 IoT 协议中检测到了 14 个以前未知的错误。

items.title: REMU: Memory-aware Radiation Emulation via Dual Addressing for In-orbit Deep Learning System.
items.abstract: The deployment of commercial-off-the-shelf (COTS) GPUs in space has emerged as a promising approach for supporting inorbit deep neural network (DNN) inference. However, unlike terrestrial environments, understanding the impact of space radiation on COTS GPU-enabled DNNs is critical. This is challenging because existing methods, such as real-world radiation testing and software emulation, fail to link radiation-induced memory errors to runtime DNN behaviors. In this paper, we propose REMU, a memory-aware Radiation EMUlator to fill this gap. REMU introduces a dual addressing mechanism across virtual, physical, and DRAM memory spaces, enabling precise mapping and efficient injection of radiation-induced errors from DRAM to runtime DNN inference. Extensive evaluations across 10 well-known DNN models and 2 typical in-orbit computing tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of REMU, providing valuable insights for understanding the resilience of runtime DNN inferences on space radiations.
items.abstract_zh: 在太空中部署商用现成 (COTS) GPU 已成为支持在轨深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理的一种有前途的方法。然而，与陆地环境不同，了解空间辐射对 COTS GPU 支持的 DNN 的影响至关重要。这是具有挑战性的，因为现有的方法（例如现实世界的辐射测试和软件模拟）无法将辐射引起的内存错误与运行时 DNN 行为联系起来。在本文中，我们提出了 REMU，一种内存感知的辐射仿真器来填补这一空白。 REMU 引入了跨虚拟、物理和 DRAM 内存空间的双重寻址机制，实现了从 DRAM 到运行时 DNN 推理的精确映射和辐射引起的错误的有效注入。对 10 个著名的 DNN 模型和 2 个典型在轨计算任务的广泛评估证明了 REMU 的有效性，为理解运行时 DNN 推断对空间辐射的弹性提供了宝贵的见解。

items.title: SSDL-ILT: Efficient ILT utilizing a self-supervised deep learning model.
items.abstract: Inverse lithography technology (ILT) is an advanced resolution enhancement technique that achieves mask optimization at the pixel level. However, application of ILT is hindered by time-intensive physical simulation. Herein, we propose an efficient ILT algorithm leveraging a deep learning model. A novel loss function is constructed to guide the model training in a self-supervised manner, eliminating the requirement of labelled data that might be nontrivial to acquire. The trained model outputs final mask patterns without further ILT optimization. Sub-resolution assist features (SRAFs) are generated automatically, the complexity of which can be adjusted during the training process to control mask manufacturability. The model was trained and validated on ICCAD-2013 CAD contest dataset. Better pattern fidelity and up to 12,000 times speedup are observed compared to other SOTA models. The trained model also shows good generalization ability to geometrically-different design patterns from another dataset, via a few-shot learning approach.
items.abstract_zh: 逆光刻技术（ILT）是一种先进的分辨率增强技术，可实现像素级掩模优化。 However, application of ILT is hindered by time-intensive physical simulation.在此，我们提出了一种利用深度学习模型的高效 ILT 算法。构建了一种新颖的损失函数，以自监督的方式指导模型训练，消除了获取可能并不容易的标记数据的要求。训练后的模型输出最终掩模图案，无需进一步 ILT 优化。子分辨率辅助特征（SRAF）是自动生成的，其复杂性可以在训练过程中进行调整，以控制掩模的可制造性。该模型在 ICCAD-2013 CAD 竞赛数据集上进行了训练和验证。与其他 SOTA 模型相比，我们观察到更好的模式保真度和高达 12,000 倍的加速。经过训练的模型还通过几次学习方法对来自另一个数据集的几何上不同的设计模式表现出良好的泛化能力。

items.title: Efficient Recycling Subspace Truncation Method for Periodic Small-Signal Analysis.
items.abstract: Periodic small-signal analysis is crucial but timeconsuming in RF simulation, since it may deal with many frequency points. While the Krylov subspace recycling method has greatly accelerated the simulation, the increasing memory cost in large-scale RF simulation has become a new bottleneck. A remedy for memory shortage is to restart the recycling algorithm, but may cause excessive extra iterations. To address this issue, this paper outlines a framework of recycling subspace truncation method for periodic small-signal analysis, provided with an efficient initial guess choice method and a Floquet-based subspace truncation strategy. Numerical results show that compared to the existing methods, the proposed method achieves up to $2.5 \times$ speedup in the same memory cost.
items.abstract_zh: 定期小信号分析在射频仿真中至关重要，但也很耗时，因为它可能处理许多频率点。虽然Krylov子空间回收方法大大加快了仿真速度，但大规模射频仿真中不断增加的内存成本已成为新的瓶颈。内存不足的补救方法是重新启动回收算法，但可能会导致过多的额外迭代。为了解决这个问题，本文概述了用于周期性小信号分析的循环子空间截断方法的框架，提供了有效的初始猜测选择方法和基于Floquet的子空间截断策略。数值结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法在相同的内存成本下实现了高达 2.5 美元的加速。

items.title: Principle-based Dataflow Optimization for Communication Lower Bound in Operator-Fused Tensor Accelerator.
items.abstract: Although design space exploration (DSE) is good at finding dataflow for optimal memory access in tensor accelerators, it is very timing-consuming and lacks architecture insight. In this study, we for the first time propose several principles for dataflow optimization that provides lower bound of memory communication for tensor operators such as matrix multiplication. Through these principles we can calculate the best tiling, scheduling and mapping for both intra- and inter-operator dataflow. In addition, we can identify all the tensor-wise opertor fusion that are profitable in memory communication, so we propose FuseCU, a new architecture that supports these profitable fusion which can be applied to existing spatial architectures for data movement saving. Experimental results show that FuseCU delivers 63.6%, 62.4% and 38.7% data movement saving and $1.33 \times, 1.25 \times$ and $1.14 \times$ speedup compared to the TPUv4i, Gemmini and Planaria designs without increasing buffer size or bandwidth. Additionally, FuseCU is open-sourced.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管设计空间探索（DSE）擅长在张量加速器中寻找最佳内存访问的数据流，但它非常耗时且缺乏架构洞察力。在这项研究中，我们首次提出了数据流优化的几个原则，为矩阵乘法等张量运算符提供了内存通信的下限。通过这些原则，我们可以计算运营商内部和运营商之间数据流的最佳切片、调度和映射。此外，我们可以识别所有在内存通信中有利可图的张量算子融合，因此我们提出了 FuseCU，一种支持这些有利可图的融合的新架构，可以应用于现有的空间架构以节省数据移动。实验结果表明，与 TPUv4i、Gemmini 和 Planaria 设计相比，在不增加缓冲区大小或带宽的情况下，FuseCU 可节省 63.6%、62.4% 和 38.7% 的数据移动，并实现 1.33 美元、1.25 美元和 1.14 美元的加速。此外，FuseCU 是开源的。

items.title: UniCAIM: A Unified CAM/CIM Architecture with Static-Dynamic KV Cache Pruning for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference.
items.abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive performance in various natural language processing (NLP) applications. However, the high memory and computation cost induced by the KV cache limits the inference efficiency, especially for long input sequences.
