The reconfigurable platform offers possibilities for identifying the bitlevel unstructured redundancy during inference with different DNN models. Researchers noticed significant progress in valueaware accelerators on ASICs, yet we are concerned about the few studies on FPGAs. This paper observed the limitations of implementing bit-level sparsity optimizations using FPGA and proposed a software/architecture co-design solution. Specifically, by introducing LUT-friendly encoding with adaptable granularity and hardware structure supporting multiplication time uncertainty, we achieved a better trade-off between potential redundancy and accuracy with compatibility and scalability. Experiments show that under accurate calculation, PEs are up to $2.2 \times$ smaller than bit-parallel ones, and our design boosts performance by $1.04 \times$ to $1.74 \times$ and $1.40 \times$ to $2.79 \times$ over bitparallel and Booth-based designs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 探索MAC过程中的位级稀疏性已被证明是提高神经网络前馈处理效率的重要方法。可重构平台提供了在使用不同 DNN 模型进行推理期间识别位级非结构化冗余的可能性。研究人员注意到 ASIC 上的价值感知加速器取得了重大进展，但我们对 FPGA 上的研究很少感到担忧。本文观察了使用 FPGA 实现位级稀疏性优化的局限性，并提出了一种软件/架构协同设计解决方案。具体来说，通过引入具有自适应粒度的 LUT 友好编码和支持乘法时间不确定性的硬件结构，我们在潜在冗余和准确性与兼容性和可扩展性之间实现了更好的权衡。实验表明，在精确计算下，PE 比位并行设计小 2.2 美元，而我们的设计比位并行和基于 Booth 的设计分别将性能提高了 1.04 美元到 1.74 美元和 1.40 美元到 2.79 美元。

items.title: Towards Secure Data Management using Multi-Cryptographic Solutions (Invited).
items.abstract: Several secure data outsourcing systems incorporate various cryptographic techniques to balance security, functionalities, and efficiency. However, their security properties can be ad hoc and sometimes obscure. Our recent work, Secure Normal Form (SNF) [ICDE’24], presents a principled approach that allows data owners to define acceptable leakages of nonsensitive aspects of their data. This approach enables efficient processing of queries while ensuring no unintended leakage of sensitive information. In this paper, we discuss the benefits and challenges of implementing SNF within advanced computational environments and modern data management architectures. We argue that its applicability may extend beyond merely offloading secure query execution to the cloud.
items.abstract_zh: 一些安全数据外包系统采用了各种加密技术来平衡安全性、功能和效率。然而，它们的安全属性可能是临时的，有时甚至是模糊的。我们最近的工作，安全范式（SNF）[ICDE'24]，提出了一种原则性方法，允许数据所有者定义其数据的非敏感方面的可接受的泄漏。 This approach enables efficient processing of queries while ensuring no unintended leakage of sensitive information.在本文中，我们讨论了在高级计算环境和现代数据管理架构中实施 SNF 的好处和挑战。我们认为，它的适用性可能不仅仅限于将安全查询执行卸载到云端。

items.title: AutoPower: Automated Few-Shot Architecture-Level Power Modeling by Power Group Decoupling.
items.abstract: Power efficiency is a critical design objective in modern CPU design. Architects need a fast yet accurate architecture-level power evaluation tool to perform early-stage power estimation. However, traditional analytical architecture-level power models are inaccurate. The recently proposed machine learning (ML)-based architecture-level power model requires sufficient data from known configurations for training, making it unrealistic. In this work, we propose AutoPower targeting fully automated architecture-level power modeling with limited known design configurations. We have two key observations: (1) The clock and SRAM dominate the power consumption of the processor, and (2) The clock and SRAM power correlate with structural information available at the architecture level. Based on these two observations, we propose the power group decoupling in AutoPower. First, AutoPower decouples across power groups to build individual power models for each group. Second, AutoPower designs power models by further decoupling the model into multiple sub-models within each power group. In our experiments, AutoPower can achieve a low mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of $4.36 \%$ and a high $R^{2}$ of 0.96 even with only two known configurations for training. This is $5 \%$ lower in MAPE and 0.09 higher in $R^{2}$ compared with McPAT-Calib, the representative ML-based power model.
items.abstract_zh: 功效是现代 CPU 设计中的一个关键设计目标。架构师需要快速而准确的架构级功耗评估工具来执行早期功耗估计。然而，传统的分析架构级功耗模型并不准确。最近提出的基于机器学习（ML）的架构级功耗模型需要来自已知配置的足够数据进行训练，这使其不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出 AutoPower，其目标是使用有限的已知设计配置进行全自动架构级功耗建模。我们有两个关键观察结果：(1) 时钟和 SRAM 主导处理器的功耗，(2) 时钟和 SRAM 功耗与架构级别可用的结构信息相关。基于这两个观察，我们提出了 AutoPower 中的电源组解耦。首先，AutoPower 解耦各个电源组，为每个组构建单独的电源模型。其次，AutoPower 通过将模型进一步解耦为每个电源组内的多个子模型来设计电源模型。在我们的实验中，即使只有两种已知的训练配置，AutoPower 也可以实现 4.36 \%$ 的低平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE) 和 0.96 的高 $R^{2}$。与基于 ML 的代表性功率模型 McPAT-Calib 相比，MAPE 低 $5 \%$，$R^{2}$ 高 0.09。

items.title: DCDiff: Enhancing JPEG Compression via Diffusion-based DC Coefficients Estimation.
items.abstract: JPEG is the most widely-used image compression method on low-cost cameras which cannot support learning-based compressors. One promising approach to enhance JPEG aims to drop DC coefficients at the cameras’ ends (without extra computation) and reconstruct those DC coefficients after receiving them. They all face the challenge that their DC reconstruction relies on a statistical property, which will cause deviationintroduced errors and propagate. In this paper, we propose DCDiff, a novel end-to-end DC estimation method to tackle the above challenge. Instead of using statistical methods to recover DC coefficients and then fix errors, we directly leverage a generative model to estimate DC coefficients in an end-to-end manner. In the meantime, we generate masks to correct certain image locations that do not satisfy the statistical distribution to suppress error propagation. Extensive experiments show that DCDiff not only outperforms all baselines on compression performance but also introduces a tiny impact on downstream tasks and is fully compatible with 2 typical low-cost processors with JPEG support.
items.abstract_zh: JPEG 是低成本相机上最广泛使用的图像压缩方法，无法支持基于学习的压缩器。一种有前途的增强 JPEG 的方法旨在丢弃相机末端的 DC 系数（无需额外计算）并在接收到这些 DC 系数后重建它们。他们都面临着这样的挑战：他们的 DC 重建依赖于统计特性，这会导致偏差引入误差并传播。在本文中，我们提出了 DCDiff，一种新颖的端到端 DC 估计方法来应对上述挑战。我们没有使用统计方法来恢复 DC 系数然后修复错误，而是直接利用生成模型以端到端的方式估计 DC 系数。同时，我们生成掩模来纠正某些不满足统计分布的图像位置，以抑制错误传播。大量实验表明，DCDiff 不仅在压缩性能方面优于所有基准，而且对下游任务影响很小，并且与 2 个支持 JPEG 的典型低成本处理器完全兼容。

items.title: NN-AdderNet: Nonnegative and Sparse Weight Optimization Towards Ultra-Low Bitwidth AdderNet Quantization and Compression.
items.abstract: Emerging efficient deep neural network (DNN) models, such as AdderNet, have shown great promise in significantly improving hardware efficiency compared to traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, achieving low bitwidth quantization and effective model compression remains a major challenge. To this end, we introduce Nonnegative AdderNet (NNAdderNet), a quantization- and compression-friendly AdderNet variant that enables model compression down to 4 bits or even lower. We begin by proposing an equivalent transformation of the sum-of-absolute-difference (SAD) kernel in AdderNet, which allows for the formulation of nonnegative weights. This transformation effectively eliminates the need for a sign bit, thus saving 1 bit per weight. Next, we propose to exploit the dual-sparsity pattern in the weights of the activation-oriented NN-AdderNet quantized model. This inherent sparsity enhances the lossless compression performance over NN-AdderNet. Experimental results show that NN-AdderNet can achieve an average compressed weight bitwidth down to 4 bits or even lower, while achieving negligible accuracy loss as compared to full-precision AdderNet models. Such benefits are further illustrated with hardware-level energy and latency improvements in designing DNN inference accelerators. Consequently, the NN-AdderNet model exhibits both algorithmic and hardware efficiency, thus making it a promising candidate for resource-limited applications.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相比，新兴的高效深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型（例如 AdderNet）在显着提高硬件效率方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，实现低位宽量化和有效的模型压缩仍然是一个重大挑战。为此，我们引入了非负 AdderNet (NNAdderNet)，这是一种量化和压缩友好的 AdderNet 变体，可将模型压缩至 4 位甚至更低。我们首先提出了 AdderNet 中绝对差和 (SAD) 内核的等效变换，它允许制定非负权重。这种转换有效地消除了对符号位的需要，从而每个权重节省了 1 位。接下来，我们建议在面向激活的 NN-AdderNet 量化模型的权重中利用双稀疏模式。这种固有的稀疏性增强了 NN-AdderNet 的无损压缩性能。 Experimental results show that NN-AdderNet can achieve an average compressed weight bitwidth down to 4 bits or even lower, while achieving negligible accuracy loss as compared to full-precision AdderNet models.设计 DNN 推理加速器时的硬件级能耗和延迟改进进一步说明了这些优势。因此，NN-AdderNet 模型表现出算法和硬件效率，从而使其成为资源有限应用程序的有希望的候选者。

items.title: Blaze: An Efficient Bit-Sparse Attention Architecture With Workload Orchestration Optimization.
items.abstract: The attention mechanism is a core neural network primitive widely utilized in state-of-the-art models of Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications. However, the high computational complexity and substantial power consumption hinder its deployment and efficient inference. To address these challenges, various methods leveraging sparsity and quantization have been proposed. Compared to these methods, the exploitation of abundant bit-level sparsity in attention-based models presents great potential for the performance enhancement of attention inference. Existing bit-sparsity optimization methods primarily focus on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), which are not ideally suitable for the attention mechanism, and they have not effectively solved the workload imbalance and hardware under-utilization issues caused by the irregular distribution of non-zero bits in tensor data. In this work, we introduce Blaze, an efficient attention architecture that leverages both value and bit-level sparsity in tensor data along with workload orchestration optimization. To mitigate the workload imbalance issues often encountered by sparse bit-serial architecture, we propose an Approximate-Computing-Based (ACB) workload orchestration mechanism. Additionally, to fully exploit the redundancy in the attention mechanism, we propose a Leading-Booth mechanism to further enhance the performance of attention computation. We also design a reconfigurable computing engine to support both mechanisms. Experimental results indicate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, our Blaze can achieve $2.37 \times \sim 6.18 \times$ improvement in performance and $9.69 \times \sim 43.96 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency. Our accelerator can reach up to $1.58 \times$ speedup in attention computing performance compared with the SOTA bit-sparse accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 注意力机制是核心神经网络原语，广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）应用的最先进模型中。 However, the high computational complexity and substantial power consumption hinder its deployment and efficient inference. To address these challenges, various methods leveraging sparsity and quantization have been proposed.与这些方法相比，在基于注意力的模型中利用丰富的位级稀疏性为注意力推理的性能增强提供了巨大的潜力。现有的位稀疏性优化方法主要集中在卷积神经网络（CNN）上，它们不太适合注意力机制，并且没有有效解决张量数据中非零位的不规则分布引起的工作负载不平衡和硬件利用率不足的问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Blaze，这是一种高效的注意力架构，它利用张量数据中的值和位级稀疏性以及工作负载编排优化。为了缓解稀疏位串行架构经常遇到的工作负载不平衡问题，我们提出了一种基于近似计算（ACB）的工作负载编排机制。此外，为了充分利用注意力机制中的冗余，我们提出了一种Leading-Booth机制来进一步增强注意力计算的性能。 We also design a reconfigurable computing engine to support both mechanisms. Experimental results indicate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, our Blaze can achieve $2.37 \times \sim 6.18 \times$ improvement in performance and $9.69 \times \sim 43.96 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency. Our accelerator can reach up to $1.58 \times$ speedup in attention computing performance compared with the SOTA bit-sparse accelerator.

items.title: On Design Space Exploration of Cache System in Multi-Chiplet Systems.
items.abstract: While multi-chiplet based many-core systems have emerged as a viable solution for heterogeneous integration and addressing manufacturing and technological challenges in the post-Moore’s Law era, their design and optimization remain highly complex and challenging. Among the various subsystems, the cache hierarchy has significant implications for overall system performance, yet its vast design space presents substantial optimization challenges. This complexity arises from factors such as the large number of chiplets in the system, the number of cores per chiplet, memory hierarchy variations, cache size variability, caching strategies, and inter-chiplet interconnection networks. Existing design space exploration methods, such as NN-Baton and IntLP, fail to optimize cache subsystem performance or thoroughly explore the design space. To address these limitations, we propose a novel design space exploration method for cache subsystem optimization. Our approach models cache miss rates and network latency as functions of cache hierarchy and inter-/intra-chiplet interconnection network parameters. We then define an optimization problem to minimize the concurrent average memory access time (C-AMAT) under cost and power consumption constraints. This problem is addressed using a bilevel optimization algorithm, which iteratively solves two independent subproblems: (1) cache subsystem optimization, and (2) inter-chiplet interconnection network optimization. Experimental results show that our method reduces the application execution time by 39.7% and 39.2%, on average, compared to architectures similar to AMD Zen 4 and Intel Sapphire Rapids, respectively, and by $\mathbf{2 5 . 9 1 \%}$ over IntLP. These results underscore the potential of the proposed method for optimizing cache subsystems in future multi-chiplet based many-core systems.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然基于多芯片的众核系统已成为异构集成的可行解决方案，并解决后摩尔定律时代的制造和技术挑战，但其设计和优化仍然高度复杂和具有挑战性。在各种子系统中，缓存层次结构对整体系统性能具有重大影响，但其巨大的设计空间带来了巨大的优化挑战。这种复杂性源于系统中大量小芯片、每个小芯片的内核数量、内存层次结构变化、缓存大小变化、缓存策略和小芯片间互连网络等因素。现有的设计空间探索方法，例如NN-Baton和IntLP，无法优化缓存子系统性能或彻底探索设计空间。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种用于缓存子系统优化的新颖的设计空间探索方法。我们的方法将缓存未命中率和网络延迟建模为缓存层次结构和小芯片间/小芯片内互连网络参数的函数。然后，我们定义一个优化问题，以在成本和功耗限制下最小化并发平均内存访问时间（C-AMAT）。该问题使用双层优化算法来解决，该算法迭代地解决两个独立的子问题：(1) 缓存子系统优化，以及 (2) 小芯片间互连网络优化。实验结果表明，与 AMD Zen 4 和 Intel Sapphire Rapids 类似的架构相比，我们的方法平均将应用程序执行时间分别减少了 39.7% 和 39.2%，以及 $\mathbf{2 5 。 9 1 \%}$ 超过 IntLP。这些结果强调了所提出的方法在未来基于多芯片的众核系统中优化缓存子系统的潜力。

items.title: LearnGraph: A Learning-Based Architecture for Dynamic Graph Processing.
items.abstract: Dynamic graph processing systems using conventional array-based architectures face significant throughput limitations due to inefficient memory access and index management. While learned indexes improve data structure access, they struggle with interconnected graph data. We present LearnGraph, a novel architecture with an adaptive tree-based memory manager that dynamically optimizes for graph topology and access patterns. Our design integrates two key components: a hierarchical learned index optimized for graph topology to predict vertex and edge locations, and an adaptive tree structure that automatically reorganizes memory regions based on access patterns. Evaluation results demonstrate that LearnGraph outperforms state-of-theart dynamic graph systems, achieving $3.4 \times$ higher throughput on average and reducing processing time by $1.7 \times$ to $11 \times$ across standard graph workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 由于内存访问和索引管理效率低下，使用传统的基于阵列的架构的动态图形处理系统面临着巨大的吞吐量限制。虽然学习索引改善了数据结构访问，但它们在处理互连的图形数据时遇到了困难。我们提出了 LearnGraph，这是一种新颖的架构，具有基于树的自适应内存管理器，可以动态优化图形拓扑和访问模式。我们的设计集成了两个关键组件：针对图拓扑优化的分层学习索引以预测顶点和边缘位置，以及根据访问模式自动重新组织内存区域的自适应树结构。评估结果表明，LearnGraph 的性能优于最先进的动态图形系统，在标准图形工作负载中平均吞吐量提高了 3.4 美元，并将处理时间减少了 1.7 美元到 11 美元。

items.title: CAE-DFKD: Bridging the Transferability Gap in Data-Free Knowledge Distillation.
items.abstract: Data-Free Knowledge Distillation (DFKD) enables the knowledge transfer from the given pre-trained teacher network to the target student model without access to the real training data. Existing DFKD methods focus primarily on improving image recognition performance on associated datasets, often neglecting the crucial aspect of the transferability of learned representations. In this paper, we propose Category-Aware Embedding Data-Free Knowledge Distillation (CAE-DFKD), which addresses at the embedding level the limitations of previous rely on image-level methods to improve model generalization but fail when directly applied to DFKD. The superiority and flexibility of CAE-DFKD are extensively evaluated, including: i.) Significant efficiency advantages resulting from altering the generator training paradigm; ii.) Competitive performance with existing DFKD state-of-the-art methods on image recognition tasks; iii.) Remarkable transferability of data-free learned representations demonstrated in downstream tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）可以将知识从给定的预训练教师网络转移到目标学生模型，而无需访问真实的训练数据。现有的 DFKD 方法主要侧重于提高相关数据集上的图像识别性能，通常忽略了学习表示的可迁移性这一关键方面。在本文中，我们提出了类别感知嵌入无数据知识蒸馏（CAE-DFKD），它在嵌入层面解决了先前依赖图像级方法来提高模型泛化能力但直接应用于 DFKD 时失败的局限性。 CAE-DFKD 的优越性和灵活性得到了广泛的评估，包括： i.) 改变生成器训练范式带来的显着效率优势； ii.) 在图像识别任务上与现有 DFKD 最先进方法的竞争性能； iii.) 在下游任务中展示了无数据学习表征的显着可迁移性。

items.title: AmpereBleed: Exploiting On-chip Current Sensors for Circuit-Free Attacks on ARM-FPGA SoCs.
items.abstract: FPGAs offer superior energy efficiency and performance in parallel computing but are vulnerable to remote power side-channel attacks. Existing attacks rely on assumptions of coresident crafted circuits and shared power delivery networks, limiting their practicality in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we present AmpereBleed, a novel current-based side-channel attack that exploits widely available INA226 sensors in ARMFPGA SoCs, bypassing the aforementioned two assumptions. AmpereBleed achieves $261 \times$ greater variations to victim activities compared to the popular ring oscillator (RO) circuit, fingerprints DNN models on the Xilinx Deep Learning Processor Unit (DPU) with $\mathbf{9 9. 7 \%}$ accuracy, and distinguishes the Hamming weights of RSA-1024 keys.
items.abstract_zh: FPGA 在并行计算中提供卓越的能源效率和性能，但容易受到远程电源旁道攻击。现有的攻击依赖于共驻设计的电路和共享电力传输网络的假设，限制了它们在现实场景中的实用性。在本文中，我们提出了 AmpereBleed，这是一种新颖的基于电流的旁道攻击，它利用 ARMFPGA SoC 中广泛使用的 INA226 传感器，绕过上述两个假设。与流行的环形振荡器 (RO) 电路相比，AmpereBleed 的受害者活动变化达到了 $261 \times$，在 Xilinx 深度学习处理器单元 (DPU) 上以 $\mathbf{9 9. 7 \%}$ 精度对 DNN 模型进行指纹识别，并区分 RSA-1024 密钥的汉明权重。

items.title: zkVC: Fast Zero-Knowledge Proof for Private and Verifiable Computing.
items.abstract: In the context of cloud computing, services are held on cloud servers, where the clients send their data to the server and obtain the results returned by server. However, the computation, data and results are prone to tampering due to the vulnerabilities on the server side. Thus, verifying the integrity of computation is important in the client-server setting. The cryptographic method known as Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) is renowned for facilitating private and verifiable computing. ZKP allows the client to validate that the results from the server are computed correctly without violating the privacy of the server’s intellectual property. Zero-Knowledge Succinct NonInteractive Argument of Knowledge (zkSNARKs), in particular, has been widely applied in various applications like blockchain and verifiable machine learning. Despite their popularity, existing zkSNARKs approaches remain highly computationally intensive. For instance, even basic operations like matrix multiplication require an extensive number of constraints, resulting in significant overhead. In addressing this challenge, we introduce $z k V C$, which optimizes the ZKP computation for matrix multiplication, enabling rapid proof generation on the server side and efficient verification on the client side. zkVC integrates optimized ZKP modules, such as Constraint-reduced Polynomial Circuit (CRPC) and Prefix-Sum Query (PSQ), collectively yielding a more than $\mathbf{1 2}$-fold increase in proof speed over prior methods. The code is available at https://github.com/UCF-Lou-Lab-PET/zkformer.
items.abstract_zh: 在云计算的背景下，服务保存在云服务器上，客户端将数据发送到服务器并获取服务器返回的结果。然而，由于服务器端存在漏洞，计算、数据和结果容易被篡改。因此，验证计算的完整性在客户端-服务器设置中非常重要。被称为零知识证明（ZKP）的加密方法以促进私密和可验证计算而闻名。 ZKP 允许客户端验证服务器的结果是否正确计算，而不会侵犯服务器知识产权的隐私。特别是零知识简洁非交互式知识论证（zkSNARKs）已广泛应用于区块链和可验证机器学习等各种应用中。尽管很受欢迎，现有的 zkSNARKs 方法仍然是高度计算密集型的。例如，即使像矩阵乘法这样的基本运算也需要大量的约束，从而导致大量的开销。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 $z k V C$，它优化了矩阵乘法的 ZKP 计算，从而能够在服务器端快速生成证明并在客户端进行高效验证。 zkVC 集成了优化的 ZKP 模块，例如约束减少多项式电路 (CRPC) 和前缀求和查询 (PSQ)，与之前的方法相比，总体证明速度提高了 $\mathbf{1 2}$ 倍以上。代码可在 https://github.com/UCF-Lou-Lab-PET/zkformer 获取。

items.title: LeakyDSP: Exploiting Digital Signal Processing Blocks to Sense Voltage Fluctuations in FPGAs.
items.abstract: In recent years, cloud providers are dedicated to enabling FPGA multi-tenancy to improve resource utilization, but this new sharing model introduces power side-channel threats, where attackers detect voltage fluctuations from colocated circuits. This paper proposes LeakyDSP, a novel onchip sensor that maliciously configures DSP blocks to sense fine-grained voltage fluctuations but is overlooked by existing studies. Our experimental results show that LeakyDSP achieves high sensitivity to voltage fluctuations and strong robustness to different placements. Besides, we apply LeakyDSP to extract full AES keys with $25 \mathrm{k}-78 \mathrm{k}$ traces and build covert channels with a high transmission rate of 247.94 bit/s.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，云提供商致力于实现 FPGA 多租户以提高资源利用率，但这种新的共享模型引入了电源侧通道威胁，攻击者可以检测到同一位置电路的电压波动。本文提出了 LeakyDSP，这是一种新型片上传感器，可恶意配置 DSP 模块来感测细粒度电压波动，但现有研究忽视了这一点。我们的实验结果表明，LeakyDSP 实现了对电压波动的高灵敏度和对不同放置的强鲁棒性。此外，我们应用 LeakyDSP 来提取具有 $25 \mathrm{k}-78 \mathrm{k}$ 迹线的完整 AES 密钥，并构建具有 247.94 bit/s 高传输速率的隐蔽通道。

items.title: Hardware Generation with High Flexibility using Reinforcement Learning Enhanced LLMs.
items.abstract: The increasing complexity of integrated circuit design requires customizing Power, Performance, and Area (PPA) metrics according to different application demands. However, most engineers cannot anticipate requirements early in the design process, often discovering mismatches only after synthesis, necessitating iterative optimization or redesign. Some works have shown the promising capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in hardware design generation tasks, but they fail to tackle the PPA trade-off problem. In this work, we propose an LLM-based reinforcement learning framework, PPA-RTL, aiming to introduce LLMs as a cutting-edge automation tool by directly incorporating post-synthesis metrics PPA into the hardware design generation phase. We design PPA metrics as reward feedback to guide the model in producing designs aligned with specific optimization objectives across various scenarios. The experimental results demonstrate that PPARTL models, optimized for Power, Performance, Area, or their various combinations, significantly improve in achieving the desired trade-offs, making PPA-RTL applicable to a variety of application scenarios and project constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 集成电路设计的复杂性日益增加，需要根据不同的应用需求定制功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 指标。然而，大多数工程师无法在设计过程的早期预测需求，通常只有在综合后才发现不匹配，从而需要迭代优化或重新设计。一些工作已经展示了大型语言模型（LLM）在硬件设计生成任务中的有前景的能力，但它们未能解决 PPA 权衡问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 LLM 的强化学习框架 PPA-RTL，旨在通过将综合后指标 PPA 直接纳入硬件设计生成阶段，将 LLM 作为尖端自动化工具引入。我们将 PPA 指标设计为奖励反馈，以指导模型生成与各种场景中的特定优化目标相一致的设计。实验结果表明，针对功耗、性能、面积或其各种组合进行优化的 PPARTL 模型在实现所需权衡方面显着改进，使得 PPA-RTL 适用于各种应用场景和项目约束。

items.title: Harnessing Conventional Video Processing Insights for Emerging 3D Video Generation Models: A Comprehensive Attention-aware Way.
items.abstract: Video Generation Models based on 3D full attention (3D-VGMs) have significantly enhanced video quality. However, their inference overhead remains substantial, primarily due to the high computational cost of the attention mechanism, which accounts for over 75% of computations. Inspired by the success of conventional video processing, where video compression exploits similarities among patches, we point out that the attention mechanism can also harness the benefits from similarities among tokens. Nonetheless, two critical problems arise: (1) How can similarities be efficiently acquired in real-time? (2) How can workload balance be maintained when similar tokens are randomly distributed? To address these problems and leverage similarities for 3DVGMs, we propose Simpicker, a comprehensive attentionaware algorithm-hardware co-design for 3D-VGMs. Our core methodology is to fully utilize similarities in attention through both coarse-grained and fine-grained approaches while adopting dynamic adaptive strategies to leverage them. From the algorithm perspective, we propose a speculation-based similarity exploitation algorithm, allowing real-time importance speculation on the frame level, which is coarse-grained, and the token level, which is fine-grained. From the micro-architecture perspective, we propose a buffered lookup table-based (LUT-based) multiplication architecture for FP-INT multiplication and further eliminate potential bank conflicts to accelerate unimportant attention computation. From the mapping perspective, SimPicker proposes an adaptive grouping strategy in speculation to tame workload imbalance caused by randomly distributed similar tokens and allow seamless integration of our algorithms. Extensive experiments show that Simpicker achieves an average of $5.21 \times 1.45 \times$ speedup and $17.92 \times 1.63 \times$ energy efficiency compared to the NVIDIA A100 GPU and the state-of-the-art accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 3D 全注意力 (3D-VGM) 的视频生成模型显着提高了视频质量。然而，它们的推理开销仍然很大，主要是由于注意力机制的计算成本很高，占计算量的 75% 以上。受到传统视频处理成功的启发，视频压缩利用了补丁之间的相似性，我们指出注意力机制也可以利用令牌之间相似性的好处。尽管如此，还是出现了两个关键问题：（1）如何实时有效地获取相似性？ （2）当类似的代币随机分布时，如何保持工作量平衡？为了解决这些问题并利用 3DVGM 的相似性，我们提出了 Simpicker，这是一种针对 3D-VGM 的全面注意力感知算法-硬件协同设计。 Our core methodology is to fully utilize similarities in attention through both coarse-grained and fine-grained approaches while adopting dynamic adaptive strategies to leverage them.从算法的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于推测的相似性利用算法，允许在粗粒度的帧级别和细粒度的令牌级别进行实时重要性推测。从微架构的角度来看，我们提出了一种用于 FP-INT 乘法的基于缓冲查找表（基于 LUT）的乘法架构，并进一步消除潜在的存储体冲突，以加速不重要的注意力计算。从映射的角度来看，SimPicker 在推测中提出了一种自适应分组策略，以克服随机分布的相似令牌造成的工作负载不平衡，并允许我们的算法无缝集成。大量实验表明，与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 和最先进的加速器相比，Simpicker 平均实现了 5.21 美元 × 1.45 美元的加速和 17.92 美元 × 1.63 美元的能源效率。

items.title: 3D-TokSIM: Stacking 3D Memory with Token-Stationary Compute-in-Memory for Speculative LLM Inference.
items.abstract: The LLM decoding process poses a significant challenge for memory bandwidth due to its autoregressive nature. Prior 2D memory solutions fail to overcome this memory bottleneck due to limited memory-to-logic bandwidth. In this work, we propose 3D-TokSIM, a cross-stack solution by stacking 3D memory on logic die with a specially designed token-stationary compute-in-memory (CIM) to efficiently accelerate speculative decoding. Our CIM is developed with novel token-stationary dataflow to reduce data movement on logic die to save power and balance computation and memory access. To further reduce the buffer requirements, we perform architecture exploration and allocate notable CIM resources for achieving higher decoding parallelism. Compared to RTX 3090 GPU, 3D-TokSIM achieves 15.1 $\times$ throughput and $324 \times$ energy efficiency improvements on speculative Llama2-7B decoding.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其自回归性质，LLM 解码过程对内存带宽提出了重大挑战。由于内存到逻辑带宽有限，先前的 2D 内存解决方案无法克服此内存瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-TokSIM，这是一种跨堆栈解决方案，通过将 3D 内存堆叠在逻辑芯片上，并使用专门设计的令牌固定计算内存 (CIM) 来有效加速推测解码。我们的 CIM 采用新颖的令牌固定数据流开发，可减少逻辑芯片上的数据移动，从而节省功耗并平衡计算和内存访问。为了进一步减少缓冲区要求，我们进行架构探索并分配显着的 CIM 资源以实现更高的解码并行性。与 RTX 3090 GPU 相比，3D-TokSIM 在推测性 Llama2-7B 解码上实现了 15.1 $\times$ 吞吐量和 324 \times$ 能效改进。

items.title: 3D-Flow: Flow-based Standard Cell Legalization for 3D ICs.
items.abstract: The standard-cell placement legalization is a critical step in the physical design. The emerging 3D ICs have brought challenges to traditional legalizers on efficiency and effectiveness. In this work, we present a fast flow-based legalization algorithm, 3D-Flow, that minimizes cell displacement in a 3D solution space. Our legalizer resolves overflowed bins by finding the shortest augmenting path on a 3D grid graph, utilizing an effective branch-and-bound algorithm. Moreover, a post-optimization with a cycle-canceling algorithm is proposed to minimize the maximum displacement. Our approach leverages the global perspective inherent in network flow methods, considering multiple dies in 3D ICs to minimize cell displacement. Experimental results on ICCAD 2022 and 2023 contest benchmarks demonstrate our proposed algorithm achieves up to 13% and 43% less average and maximum cell displacement compared to state-of-the-art legalizers in a similar runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 标准单元布局合法化是物理设计中的关键步骤。新兴的3D IC给传统合法化者带来了效率和有效性的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于流的快速合法化算法 3D-Flow，它可以最大限度地减少 3D 解空间中的单元位移。我们的合法化器通过利用有效的分支定界算法在 3D 网格图上找到最短的增广路径来解决溢出的容器。此外，提出了一种采用循环取消算法的后优化来最小化最大位移。我们的方法利用网络流方法固有的全局视角，考虑 3D IC 中的多个芯片以最大限度地减少单元位移。 ICCAD 2022 和 2023 竞赛基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的合法器相比，在相似的运行时间内，我们提出的算法的平均和最大单元位移分别减少了 13% 和 43%。

items.title: A Data-Centric Hardware Accelerator for Efficient Adaptive Radix Tree.
items.abstract: Adaptive Radix Tree (ART) is a widely used tree index structure prevalent in various domains such as databases and key-value stores. Despite many solutions have been proposed to improve the performance of ART, they still suffer from significant redundant tree traversals and serious synchronization cost when concurrently performing the operations (e.g., read/write) over ART. In this work, we observe that most operations of realworld workloads tend to target a small subset of ART nodes frequently, exhibiting strong temporal and spatial similarities among the operations. Based on this observation, we propose a data-centric hardware accelerator, called DCART, to efficiently support the operations over ART. Specifically, DCART proposes a novel data-centric processing model into the accelerator design to coalesce the operations associated with the same ART nodes and adaptively cache the frequently traversed ART nodes and their search results, thereby fully exploiting the similarities among the operations for lower tree traversal and synchronization overhead. We implemented DCART on the Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card and compared it with the cutting-edge solutions, DCART achieves $21.1 \times-44.2 \times$ speedups and $71.1 \times-148.9 \times$ energy savings.
items.abstract_zh: 自适应基数树（ART）是一种广泛使用的树索引结构，普遍存在于数据库和键值存储等各个领域。尽管已经提出了许多解决方案来提高 ART 的性能，但当通过 ART 并发执行操作（例如，读/写）时，它们仍然遭受大量冗余树遍历和严重的同步成本。在这项工作中，我们观察到现实世界工作负载的大多数操作往往经常针对一小部分 ART 节点，在操作之间表现出很强的时间和空间相似性。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种以数据为中心的硬件加速器，称为 DCART，以有效支持 ART 上的操作。具体来说，DCART在加速器设计中提出了一种新颖的以数据为中心的处理模型，以合并与相同ART节点相关的操作，并自适应地缓存频繁遍历的ART节点及其搜索结果，从而充分利用操作之间的相似性来降低树遍历和同步开销。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现了 DCART，并将其与尖端解决方案进行了比较，DCART 实现了 21.1 × 44.2 × 美元的加速和 71.1 × 148.9 × 美元的节能。

items.title: MAGE: A Multi-Agent Engine for Automated RTL Code Generation.
items.abstract: The automatic generation of RTL code (e.g., Verilog) through natural language instructions has emerged as a promising direction with the advancement of large language models (LLMs). However, producing RTL code that is both syntactically and functionally correct remains a significant challenge. Existing single-LLM-agent approaches face substantial limitations because they must navigate between various programming languages and handle intricate generation, verification, and modification tasks. To address these challenges, this paper introduces MAGE, the first open-source<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> multi-agent AI system designed for robust and accurate Verilog RTL code generation. We propose a novel high-temperature RTL candidate sampling and debugging system that effectively explores the space of code candidates and significantly improves the quality of the candidates. Furthermore, we design a novel Verilog-state checkpoint checking mechanism that enables early detection of functional errors and delivers precise feedback for targeted fixes, significantly enhancing the functional correctness of the generated RTL code. MAGE achieves a 95.7% rate of syntactic and functional correctness code generation on VerilogEval-Human v2 benchmark, surpassing the state-of-the-art Claude-3.5-sonnet by 23.3%, demonstrating a robust and reliable approach for AIdriven RTL design workflows.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>MAGE is open-sourced at https://github.com/stable-lab/ MAGE-A-Multi-Agent-Engine-for-Automated-RTL-Code-Generation
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的进步，通过自然语言指令自动生成 RTL 代码（例如 Verilog）已成为一个有前途的方向。然而，生成语法和功能正确的 RTL 代码仍然是一个重大挑战。现有的单 LLM 代理方法面临很大的限制，因为它们必须在各种编程语言之间导航并处理复杂的生成、验证和修改任务。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 MAGE，这是第一个开源<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 多代理 AI 系统，专为稳健且准确的 Verilog RTL 代码生成而设计。我们提出了一种新颖的高温 RTL 候选采样和调试系统，可以有效地探索代码候选空间并显着提高候选代码的质量。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的 Verilog 状态检查点检查机制，能够及早检测功能错误并为有针对性的修复提供精确的反馈，从而显着增强生成的 RTL 代码的功能正确性。 MAGE 在 VerilogEval-Human v2 基准上实现了 95.7% 的语法和功能正确性代码生成率，比最先进的 Claude-3.5-sonnet 提高了 23.3%，展示了 AI 驱动的 RTL 设计工作流程的稳健可靠的方法。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>MAGE 在 https://github.com/stable-lab/MAGE-A-Multi-Agent-Engine-for-Automated-RTL-Code-Generation 上开源

items.title: Look Before You Leap: A Self-Review Bayesian Optimization Method for Constrained High-Dimensional Design Space Exploration.
items.abstract: The parameterizable and synthesizable RISC-V processors enable the automatic generation of customized CPU cores through EDA tools. However, current methods often explore the extensive design space with significant model errors while neglecting design constraints, which are critical for practical implementations. To address these limitations, we propose a Self-Review Bayesian Optimization method (SRBO). This method integrates a teacher-student paradigm within a local Bayesian optimization framework to reduce model errors and enhance exploration efficiency. Additionally, it employs deep ensembles for effective constraint handling. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods within a limited time budget, significantly enhancing exploration efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 可参数化和可综合的RISC-V处理器可以通过EDA工具自动生成定制的CPU内核。然而，当前的方法经常探索具有重大模型误差的广泛设计空间，而忽略设计约束，这对于实际实现至关重要。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种自我审查贝叶斯优化方法（SRBO）。该方法将师生范式集成到局部贝叶斯优化框架中，以减少模型错误并提高探索效率。此外，它还采用深度集成来进行有效的约束处理。实验结果表明，我们的方法在有限的时间预算内优于最先进的方法，显着提高了勘探效率。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Customized Diffusion Model Empowered by Heterogeneous Graph Network for Effective Floorplanning.
items.abstract: Floorplanning is a critical phase in VLSI physical design, focusing on determining block positions while optimizing wirelength under specified area constraints. However, classical analytical-based floorplanners are highly sensitive to the quality of initial solutions and existing learningbased methods often suffer from high computational inefficiency and complexity. In this paper, we propose a customized diffusion model to directly generate high-quality initial floorplans. By leveraging a classical analytical-based floorplanner on top of this initial floorplan, the final floorplanning results are significantly improved. To enhance feature extraction, a heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) is developed to explicitly incorporate block-to-block and pin-to-block relationships from the netlist during the diffusion process. Additionally, a novel guidance sampling function is introduced to optimize both wirelength and overlap, effectively reducing the required sampling steps while maintaining competitive initial solutions. Experimental results demonstrate that integrating our proposed diffusion model with an advanced analytical-based floorplanner achieves at least 4.8% reduction in runtime and 3.0% reduction in HPWL compared to the original floorplanner and other diffusion-based methods.
items.abstract_zh: 布局规划是 VLSI 物理设计的关键阶段，重点是确定块位置，同时在指定面积约束下优化线长。然而，经典的基于分析的布局规划器对初始解决方案的质量高度敏感，而现有的基于学习的方法常常面临计算效率低下和复杂性高的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种定制的扩散模型来直接生成高质量的初始平面图。通过在此初始布局之上利用经典的基于分析的布局规划器，最终的布局规划结果得到显着改善。为了增强特征提取，开发了异构图神经网络（HGNN），以在扩散过程中明确合并网表中的块到块和引脚到块关系。此外，还引入了新颖的引导采样功能来优化线长和重叠，有效减少所需的采样步骤，同时保持具有竞争力的初始解决方案。实验结果表明，与原始布局规划器和其他基于扩散的方法相比，将我们提出的扩散模型与基于分析的先进布局规划器相集成，可实现运行时间至少减少 4.8%，HPWL 减少 3.0%。

items.title: Curvilinear Optical Proximity Correction via Cardinal Spline.
items.abstract: This paper presents a novel curvilinear optical proximity correction (OPC) framework. The proposed approach involves representing mask patterns with control points, which are interconnected through cardinal splines. Mask optimization is achieved by iteratively adjusting these control points, guided by lithography simulation. To ensure compliance with mask rule checking (MRC) criteria, we develop comprehensive methods for checking width, space, area, and curvature. Additionally, to match the performance of inverse lithography techniques (ILT), we design algorithms to fit ILT results and resolve MRC violations. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our methodology, highlighting its potential as a viable OPC/ILT alternative.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的曲线光学邻近校正（OPC）框架。所提出的方法涉及用控制点表示掩模图案，这些控制点通过基数样条线互连。掩模优化是通过在光刻模拟的指导下迭代调整这些控制点来实现的。为了确保符合掩模规则检查 (MRC) 标准，我们开发了用于检查宽度、空间、面积和曲率的综合方法。此外，为了匹配逆光刻技术 (ILT) 的性能，我们设计了适合 ILT 结果并解决 MRC 违规问题的算法。大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，凸显了其作为可行的 OPC/ILT 替代方案的潜力。

items.title: ChatLS: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Chain-of-Thought for Logic Synthesis Script Customization.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in automating the Electronic Design Automation (EDA) process through effective integration with EDA tools. This paper targets the customization of logic synthesis scripts, which is crucial for accommodating the unique characteristics of each design in the EDA workflow. The proposed framework, called ChatLS, integrates multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, enabling LLMs to collaboratively analyze design features and precisely customize synthesis scripts. Experimental results demonstrate that ChatLS has achieved superior performance in customizing synthesis scripts with a commercial logic synthesis tool.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过与 EDA 工具的有效集成，在实现电子设计自动化 (EDA) 流程自动化方面展现出了巨大的潜力。本文针对逻辑综合脚本的定制，这对于适应 EDA 工作流程中每个设计的独特特征至关重要。所提出的框架称为 ChatLS，集成了多模态检索增强生成 (RAG) 和思想链 (CoT) 推理，使法学硕士能够协作分析设计特征并精确定制综合脚本。 Experimental results demonstrate that ChatLS has achieved superior performance in customizing synthesis scripts with a commercial logic synthesis tool.

items.title: Comprehensive Placement and Routing Framework with Guaranteed In-Cell Routability for Synthesizing Complementary-FET Cells.
items.abstract: As the technology node advances beyond 5 nm, the conventional FinFET architecture encounters substantial scaling issues. ComplementaryFET (CFET) technology, characterized by the vertical stacking of P-FET over N-FET or vice versa, has emerged as a promising solution. However, the inherent characteristics of CFET architecture, particularly the scarcity of routing resources, pose significant obstacles to in-cell routability and layout generation. In this paper, we develop a comprehensive placement and routing framework for synthesizing CFET cells. We first present a partitioning technique followed by a heuristic quality maintenance strategy for large-scale cells to ensure scalability and efficiency. Then, we propose a novel satisfiability modulo theories (SMT)-based placement method that incorporates partial routing to achieve minimum-width placement while ensuring in-cell routability. Particularly, the placement method also determines the pin positions for each net, which simplifies subsequent routing complexity. Finally, we propose a progressive metal routing method to address the challenges of routing resource scarcity and unidirectional routing in CFET technology, which includes a manual-inspired M0 routing followed by an integral linear programming (ILP)-based M1 and M2 routing. Compared with the state-of-the-art CFET cell generators, experimental results show that our algorithm achieves the smallest cell width for all tested cells, with 7 out of 30 cells exhibiting smaller widths. For the remaining 23 cells, which have the same cell width as those in other generators, our algorithm achieves the smallest M2 usage and total metal length.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点发展到 5 nm 以上，传统 FinFET 架构遇到了严重的缩放问题。互补 FET (CFET) 技术的特点是 P-FET 垂直堆叠在 N-FET 上，反之亦然，已成为一种有前景的解决方案。然而，CFET 架构的固有特性，特别是布线资源的稀缺性，对单元内布线和布局生成造成了重大障碍。在本文中，我们开发了一个用于合成 CFET 单元的综合布局和布线框架。我们首先提出一种分区技术，然后是大规模单元的启发式质量维护策略，以确保可扩展性和效率。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于可满足性模理论（SMT）的布局方法，该方法结合部分布线来实现最小宽度布局，同时确保单元内可布线性。特别是，布局方法还确定了每个网络的引脚位置，这简化了后续布线的复杂性。最后，我们提出了一种渐进式金属布线方法，以解决 CFET 技术中布线资源稀缺和单向布线的挑战，其中包括手动启发的 M0 布线以及基于积分线性编程 (ILP) 的 M1 和 M2 布线。与最先进的 CFET 单元生成器相比，实验结果表明，我们的算法实现了所有测试单元的最小单元宽度，30 个单元中有 7 个显示出更小的宽度。对于其余 23 个单元，其单元宽度与其他发电机中的单元宽度相同，我们的算法实现了最小的 M2 使用量和总金属长度。

items.title: Routability-aware Packing for High-density Nonvolatile FPGAs.
items.abstract: Nonvolatile field-programmable gate arrays (NVFPGAs) can use multi-level cell (MLC) nonvolatile memories (NVMs) to enhance their logic density. However, the highdensity design of NVFPGAs degrades the intra-routability of configurable logic blocks (CLBs), which significantly prolongs the time consumed by the packing process in the computer-aided design (CAD) flow. To relieve the efficiency degradation, in this paper, we propose a routability-aware re-pair stage to adjust the logical-physical look-up table (LUT) assignments to mitigate the congestion and improve their intra-routability, thereby reducing the packing time. In addition, exploiting the structural equivalence of MLC LUTs, we remove unnecessary intra-routing attempts from packing to further improve efficiency. Evaluation shows the proposed strategies reduce packing time by $41.48 \%$ on average. Index Terms-nonvolatile memory (NVM), multi-level cell (MLC), field-programmable gate array (FPGA), computer-aided design (CAD), packing.
items.abstract_zh: 非易失性现场可编程门阵列 (NVFPGA) 可以使用多层单元 (MLC) 非易失性存储器 (NVM) 来增强其逻辑密度。然而，NVFPGA 的高密度设计降低了可配置逻辑块 (CLB) 的内部可布线性，从而显着延长了计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 流程中打包过程所消耗的时间。为了缓解效率下降，在本文中，我们提出了一种可路由性感知的重新配对阶段来调整逻辑物理查找表（LUT）分配，以减轻拥塞并提高其内部可路由性，从而减少打包时间。此外，利用 MLC LUT 的结构等效性，我们从打包中删除了不必要的内部路由尝试，以进一步提高效率。评估表明，所提出的策略平均将打包时间减少 $41.48 \%$。索引术语-非易失性存储器（NVM）、多级单元（MLC）、现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）、计算机辅助设计（CAD）、封装。

items.title: HybriMoE: Hybrid CPU-GPU Scheduling and Cache Management for Efficient MoE Inference.
items.abstract: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has demonstrated significant advantages as it enables to increase the model capacity without a proportional increase in computation. However, the large MoE model size still introduces substantial memory demands, which usually requires expert offloading on resource-constrained platforms and incurs significant overhead. Hybrid CPU-GPU inference has been proposed to leverage CPU computation to reduce expert loading overhead but faces major challenges: on one hand, the expert activation patterns of MoE models are highly unstable, rendering the fixed mapping strategies in existing works inefficient; on the other hand, the hybrid CPU-GPU schedule for MoE is inherently complex due to the diverse expert sizes, structures, uneven workload distribution, etc. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose HybriMoE, a hybrid CPU-GPU inference framework that improves resource utilization through a novel CPU-GPU scheduling and cache management system. HybriMoE introduces (i) a dynamic intra-layer scheduling strategy to balance workloads across CPU and GPU, (ii) an impact-driven inter-layer prefetching algorithm, and (iii) a score-based caching algorithm to mitigate expert activation instability. We implement HybriMoE on top of the kTransformers framework and evaluate it on three widely used MoE-based LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that HybriMoE achieves an average speedup of $\mathbf{1. 3 3} \times$ in the prefill stage and $1.70 \times$ in the decode stage compared to state-of-the-art hybrid MoE inference framework. Our code is available at: https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/HybriMoE.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 架构已展现出显着的优势，因为它能够在不成比例增加计算量的情况下增加模型容量。然而，大的 MoE 模型尺寸仍然会带来大量的内存需求，这通常需要在资源受限的平台上进行专家卸载，并产生大量开销。混合CPU-GPU推理已经被提出来利用CPU计算来减少专家加载开销，但面临着重大挑战：一方面，MoE模型的专家激活模式高度不稳定，导致现有工作中的固定映射策略效率低下；另一方面，由于专家规模、结构不同、工作负载分布不均匀等原因，MoE 的混合 CPU-GPU 调度本质上很复杂。为了解决这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了 HybriMoE，一种混合​​ CPU-GPU 推理框架，通过新颖的 CPU-GPU 调度和缓存管理系统提高资源利用率。 HybriMoE 引入了 (i) 动态层内调度策略来平衡 CPU 和 GPU 之间的工作负载，(ii) 影响驱动的层间预取算法，以及 (iii) 基于分数的缓存算法以减轻专家激活的不稳定性。我们在 kTransformers 框架之上实现 HybriMoE，并在三个广泛使用的基于 MoE 的法学硕士上对其进行评估。实验结果表明 HybriMoE 实现了 $\mathbf{1 的平均加速。与最先进的混合 MoE 推理框架相比，预填充阶段的成本为 3 3} \times$，解码阶段的成本为 $1.70 \times$。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/HybriMoE。

items.title: A Memory-Efficient LLM Accelerator with Q-K Correlation Prediction using Cluster-Based Associative Array for Selective KV Accessing.
items.abstract: Attention-based LLMs excel in text generation but face redundant computations in autoregressive token generation. While KV cache mitigates this, it introduces increased memory access overhead as sequences grow. We propose Sella, a hardware-software co-design using cluster-based associative arrays to predict Q-K correlations, enabling selective KV cache access and reducing memory access without retraining. Sella includes a specialized accelerator featuring a prediction engine to improve performance and energy efficiency. Experiments show Sella achieves $2.1 \times$, $93.8 \times$, $31.4 \times$, and $53.5 \times$ speedup over SpAtten, Sanger, TITAN RTX GPU, and Xeon CPU, respectively, reducing off-chip memory access by up to $66 \%$ with negligible accuracy loss. -Large Language Models, KV Cache, Accelerator
items.abstract_zh: 基于注意力的法学硕士在文本生成方面表现出色，但在自回归标记生成方面面临冗余计算。虽然 KV 缓存缓解了这一问题，但随着序列的增长，它会增加内存访问开销。我们提出了 Sella，一种硬件-软件协同设计，使用基于集群的关联数组来预测 Q-K 相关性，从而实现选择性 KV 缓存访问并减少内存访问，而无需重新训练。 Sella 包括一个具有预测引擎的专用加速器，可提高性能和能源效率。实验表明，Sella 比 SpAtten、Sanger、TITAN RTX GPU 和 Xeon CPU 分别实现了 $2.1 \times$、$93.8 \times$、$31.4 \times$ 和 $53.5 \times$ 加速，将片外内存访问减少了高达 $66 \%$，且精度损失可以忽略不计。 -大型语言模型、KV缓存、加速器

items.title: A Full-system, Programmable, and Extensible In-Memory Computing Simulation Framework for Deep Learning.
items.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) has established itself as an attractive alternative to hardware accelerators in addressing the memory wall problem for artificial intelligence (AI) workloads. However, designing programmable IMC-based computing platforms for today’s large generative AI models, such as large language models (LLMs) and diffusion transformers (DiTs), is hindered by the absence of a simulator that is able to address the associated scalability challenges while simultaneously incorporating device and circuit-level behaviors intrinsic to IMCs. To address this challenge, we present IMCsim, a versatile fullsystem IMC simulation framework. IMCsim integrates software runtime libraries for AI models, introduces a new set of ISA extensions to express common tensor operators, and provides flexibility in mapping these operators to various IMC architectures. As such, IMCsim enables designers to explore trade-offs between performance, energy, area, and computational accuracy for various IMC design choices. To demonstrate the functionality, efficiency, and versatility of IMCsim, we model three types of IMCs: (1) embedded non-volatile memory (eNVM)-based, (2) SRAM-based, and (3) digital IMCs. We validate IMCsim using measured data from two laboratory-tested IMC prototype ICs—a 22 nm MRAM-based IMC and a 28 nm SRAM-based IMC—and a digital IMC design in 28 nm. Next, we demonstrate the utility of IMCsim by exploring the architectural design space to obtain insights for maximizing utilization of IMC-based processors for diverse workloads—ResNet-18, Llama, and a DiT—using the three IMC types. Finally, we employ IMCsim as a design tool to obtain an efficient chip architecture and layout in 28 nm for a lightweight DiT.
items.abstract_zh: 在解决人工智能 (AI) 工作负载的内存墙问题方面，内存计算 (IMC) 已成为硬件加速器的有吸引力的替代方案。然而，为当今的大型生成人工智能模型（例如大型语言模型（LLM）和扩散变压器（DiT））设计基于 IMC 的可编程计算平台，由于缺乏能够解决相关可扩展性挑战同时整合 IMC 固有的设备和电路级行为的模拟器而受到阻碍。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 IMCsim，这是一个多功能的全系统 IMC 仿真框架。 IMCsim 集成了 AI 模型的软件运行时库，引入了一组新的 ISA 扩展来表达常见的张量运算符，并提供了将这些运算符映射到各种 IMC 架构的灵活性。因此，IMCsim 使设计人员能够针对各种 IMC 设计选择探索性能、能量、面积和计算精度之间的权衡。为了演示 IMCsim 的功能、效率和多功能性，我们对三种类型的 IMC 进行建模：(1) 基于嵌入式非易失性存储器 (eNVM)、(2) 基于 SRAM 和 (3) 数字 IMC。我们使用两个经过实验室测试的 IMC 原型 IC（基于 22 nm MRAM 的 IMC 和基于 28 nm SRAM 的 IMC）以及 28 nm 数字 IMC 设计的测量数据来验证 IMCsim。接下来，我们通过探索架构设计空间来展示 IMCsim 的实用性，以获得关于使用三种 IMC 类型最大限度地利用基于 IMC 的处理器来处理不同工作负载（ResNet-18、Llama 和 DiT）的见解。最后，我们采用 IMCsim 作为设计工具，为轻量级 DiT 获得高效的 28 nm 芯片架构和布局。

items.title: FactorHD: A Hyperdimensional Computing Model for Multi-Object Multi-Class Representation and Factorization.
items.abstract: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (neurosymbolic AI) excels in logical analysis and reasoning. Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), a promising braininspired computational model, is integral to neuro-symbolic AI. Various HDC models have been proposed to represent class-instance and class-class relations, but when representing the more complex class-subclass relation, where multiple objects associate different levels of classes and subclasses, they face challenges for factorization, a crucial task for neuro-symbolic AI systems. In this article, we propose FactorHD, a novel HDC model capable of representing and factorizing the complex class-subclass relation efficiently. FactorHD features a symbolic encoding method that embeds an extra memorization clause, preserving more information for multiple objects. In addition, it employs an efficient factorization algorithm that selectively eliminates redundant classes by identifying the memorization clause of the target class. Such model significantly enhances computing efficiency and accuracy in representing and factorizing multiple objects with class-subclass relation, overcoming limitations of existing HDC models such as “superposition catastrophe” and “the problem of 2 “. Evaluations show that FactorHD achieves approximately $5667 \times$ speedup at a representation size of $10^{9}$ compared to existing HDC models. When integrated with the ResNet-18 neural network, FactorHD achieves $92.48 \%$ factorization accuracy on the Cifar-10 dataset.
items.abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能（neurosymbolic AI）擅长逻辑分析和推理。超维计算 (HDC) 是一种很有前途的受大脑启发的计算模型，是神经符号人工智能不可或缺的一部分。人们已经提出了各种 HDC 模型来表示类-实例和类-类关系，但是当表示更复杂的类-子类关系时，多个对象关联不同级别的类和子类，它们面临因式分解的挑战，这是神经符号人工智能系统的一项关键任务。在本文中，我们提出了 FactorHD，一种新颖的 HDC 模型，能够有效地表示和分解复杂的类-子类关系。 FactorHD 采用符号编码方法，嵌入额外的记忆子句，为多个对象保留更多信息。此外，它采用高效的分解算法，通过识别目标类的记忆子句来选择性地消除冗余类。该模型显着提高了用类-子类关系表示和分解多个对象的计算效率和准确性，克服了现有HDC模型的“叠加灾难”和“2问题”等局限性。评估表明，与现有 HDC 模型相比，FactorHD 在表示大小为 10^{9}$ 时实现了约 5667 美元的加速。当与 ResNet-18 神经网络集成时，FactorHD 在 Cifar-10 数据集上实现了 $92.48 \%$ 分解精度。

items.title: An Energy-Efficient High-Utilization Hardware Architecture for Attention Mechanism in Transformer using Balanced Systolic Array and Multi-Row Interleaved Operation Ordering.
items.abstract: Transformer-based neural networks have achieved remarkable performance. Designing energy-efficient and high-speed accelerators for the attention mechanism, which dominates the energy and latency in Transformers, has become increasingly significant. Existing attention accelerators commonly use algorithm-hardware co-design to achieve higher energy efficiency and speed. However, deeply customized algorithms make these accelerators dependent on a particular application. Therefore, optimizing hardware architecture is crucial for achieving general-purpose acceleration. We observe two limitations in the hardware architecture of existing attention accelerators. First, the widely used input stationary, weight stationary, and output stationary systolic arrays (SAs) can’t balance data reuse, register saving, and utilization, which hinders to build more energy-efficient and faster SA-based accelerators. Second, layer-by-layer operation ordering introduces high SRAM access overhead of intermediate results. To address the first limitation, we propose the “Balanced Systolic Array”, which improves energy efficiency by 40% compared to conventional systolic arrays and achieves a utilization rate of 99.5%. To address the second limitation, we propose “Multi-Row Interleaved” operation ordering, which reduces the SRAM energy by 31.7% By integrating two techniques, the proposed attention accelerator achieves a 39% improvement in energy efficiency and a 38% enhancement in throughput×energy efficiency compared to previous works.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经网络已经取得了显着的性能。为注意力机制设计节能且高速的加速器已变得越来越重要，注意力机制在变形金刚中主导着能量和延迟。现有的注意力加速器通常使用算法-硬件协同设计来实现更高的能效和速度。然而，深度定制的算法使得这些加速器依赖于特定的应用程序。因此，优化硬件架构对于实现通用加速至关重要。我们观察到现有注意力加速器的硬件架构存在两个局限性。首先，广泛使用的输入固定、重量固定和输出固定脉动阵列（SA）无法平衡数据重用、寄存器节省和利用率，这阻碍了构建更节能、更快的基于 SA 的加速器。其次，逐层操作排序引入了中间结果的高 SRAM 访问开销。为了解决第一个限制，我们提出了“平衡脉动阵列”，与传统脉动阵列相比，其能效提高了40%，利用率达到99.5%。为了解决第二个限制，我们提出了“多行交错”操作排序，这将 SRAM 能耗降低了 31.7% 通过集成两种技术，所提出的注意力加速器与之前的工作相比，实现了 39% 的能源效率提高和 38% 的吞吐量×能源效率提高。

items.title: Insights from Rights and Wrongs: A Large Language Model for Solving Assertion Failures in RTL Design.
items.abstract: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are essential for verifying Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, as they can be embedded into key functional paths to detect unintended behaviours. During simulation, assertion failures occur when the design’s behaviour deviates from expectations. Solving these failures, i.e., identifying and fixing the issues causing the deviation, requires analysing complex logical and timing relationships between multiple signals. This process heavily relies on human expertise, and there is currently no automatic tool available to assist with it. Here, we present AssertSolver, an opensource Large Language Model (LLM) specifically designed for solving assertion failures. By leveraging synthetic training data and learning from error responses to challenging cases, AssertSolver achieves a bug-fixing pass@1 metric of $88.54 \%$ on our testbench, significantly outperforming OpenAI’s o1-preview by up to $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$. We release our model and testbench for public access to encourage further research: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-AssertSolver-DAC-25.
items.abstract_zh: SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 对于验证寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计至关重要，因为它们可以嵌入到关键功能路径中以检测意外行为。在仿真过程中，当设计的行为偏离预期时，就会发生断言失败。解决这些故障，即识别并修复导致偏差的问题，需要分析多个信号之间复杂的逻辑和时序关系。这个过程在很大程度上依赖于人类的专业知识，目前没有可用的自动工具来协助它。在这里，我们介绍 AssertSolver，这是一种专为解决断言失败问题而设计的开源大型语言模型 (LLM)。通过利用合成训练数据并从对挑战性案例的错误响应中学习，AssertSolver 在我们的测试平台上实现了 88.54 \%$ 的错误修复 pass@1 指标，显着优于 OpenAI 的 o1-preview，高达 $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$。我们发布了我们的模型和测试平台以供公众访问，以鼓励进一步的研究：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-AssertSolver-DAC-25。

items.title: Insights from Rights and Wrongs: A Large Language Model for Solving Assertion Failures in RTL Design.
items.abstract: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are essential for verifying Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, as they can be embedded into key functional paths to detect unintended behaviours. During simulation, assertion failures occur when the design’s behaviour deviates from expectations. Solving these failures, i.e., identifying and fixing the issues causing the deviation, requires analysing complex logical and timing relationships between multiple signals. This process heavily relies on human expertise, and there is currently no automatic tool available to assist with it. Here, we present AssertSolver, an opensource Large Language Model (LLM) specifically designed for solving assertion failures. By leveraging synthetic training data and learning from error responses to challenging cases, AssertSolver achieves a bug-fixing pass@1 metric of $88.54 \%$ on our testbench, significantly outperforming OpenAI’s o1-preview by up to $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$. We release our model and testbench for public access to encourage further research: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-AssertSolver-DAC-25.
items.abstract_zh: SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 对于验证寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计至关重要，因为它们可以嵌入到关键功能路径中以检测意外行为。在仿真过程中，当设计的行为偏离预期时，就会发生断言失败。解决这些故障，即识别并修复导致偏差的问题，需要分析多个信号之间复杂的逻辑和时序关系。这个过程在很大程度上依赖于人类的专业知识，目前没有可用的自动工具来协助它。在这里，我们介绍 AssertSolver，这是一种专为解决断言失败问题而设计的开源大型语言模型 (LLM)。通过利用合成训练数据并从对挑战性案例的错误响应中学习，AssertSolver 在我们的测试平台上实现了 88.54 \%$ 的错误修复 pass@1 指标，显着优于 OpenAI 的 o1-preview，高达 $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$。我们发布了我们的模型和测试平台以供公众访问，以鼓励进一步的研究：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-AssertSolver-DAC-25。

items.title: PatternPaint: Practical Layout Pattern Generation Using Diffusion-Based Inpainting.
items.abstract: Generating diverse VLSI layout patterns is essential for various downstream tasks in design for manufacturing, as design rules continually evolve during the development of new technology nodes. However, existing training-based methods for layout pattern generation rely on large datasets. In practical scenarios, especially when developing a new technology node, obtaining such extensive layout data is challenging. Consequently, training models with large datasets becomes impractical, limiting the scalability and adaptability of prior approaches. To this end, we propose PatternPaint, a diffusion-based framework capable of generating legal patterns with limited design-rule-compliant training samples. PatternPaint simplifies complex layout pattern generation into a series of inpainting processes with a template-based denoising scheme. Furthermore, we perform few-shot finetuning on a pretrained image foundation model with only 20 design-rule-compliant samples. Experimental results show that using a sub-3nm technology node (Intel 18A), our model is the only one that can generate legal patterns in complex 2D metal interconnect design rule settings among all previous works and achieves a high diversity score. Additionally, our few-shot finetuning can boost the legality rate by 1.87 X compared to the original pretrained model. As a result, we demonstrate a production-ready approach for layout pattern generation in developing new technology nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 生成不同的 VLSI 布局模式对于制造设计中的各种下游任务至关重要，因为设计规则在新技术节点的开发过程中不断发展。然而，现有的基于训练的布局图案生成方法依赖于大型数据集。在实际场景中，尤其是在开发新技术节点时，获取如此广泛的布局数据具有挑战性。因此，使用大型数据集训练模型变得不切实际，限制了先前方法的可扩展性和适应性。为此，我们提出了 PatternPaint，这是一种基于扩散的框架，能够通过有限的符合设计规则的训练样本生成合法模式。 PatternPaint 使用基于模板的去噪方案将复杂的布局图案生成简化为一系列修复过程。此外，我们仅使用 20 个符合设计规则的样本对预训练的图像基础模型进行少量镜头微调。实验结果表明，使用sub-3nm技术节点（Intel 18A），我们的模型是之前所有工作中唯一能够在复杂的2D金属互连设计规则设置中生成合法模式的模型，并取得了很高的多样性分数。此外，与原始预训练模型相比，我们的小样本微调可以将合法率提高 1.87 倍。因此，我们展示了一种在开发新技术节点时生成布局图案的生产就绪方法。

items.title: DyREM: Dynamically Mitigating Quantum Readout Error with Embedded Accelerator.
items.abstract: Quantum readout error is the most significant source of error, substantially reducing the measurement fidelity. Tensor-product-based readout error mitigation has been proposed to address this issue by approximating the mitigation matrix. However, this method inevitably encounters the dynamic generation of the mitigation matrix, leading to long latency. In this paper, we propose DyREM, a software-hardware codesign approach that mitigates readout errors with an embedded accelerator. The main innovation lies in leveraging the inherent sparsity in the nonzero probability distribution of quantum states and calculating the tensor product on an embedded accelerator. Specifically, using the output sparsity, our dataflow dynamically downsamples the original mitigation matrix, which dramatically reduces the memory requirement. Then, we design DyREM architecture that can flexibly gate the redundant computation of nonzero quantum states. Experiments demonstrate that DyREM achieves an average speedup of $9.6 \times \sim 2000 \times$ and fidelity improvements of $1.03 \times \sim 1.15 \times$ compared to state-of-the-art readout error mitigation methods.
items.abstract_zh: 量子读出误差是最重要的误差源，大大降低了测量保真度。提出了基于张量积的读出错误缓解方法，通过近似缓解矩阵来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法不可避免地会遇到缓解矩阵的动态生成，导致延迟较长。在本文中，我们提出了 DyREM，这是一种软件硬件协同设计方法，可通过嵌入式加速器减少读出错误。主要创新在于利用量子态非零概率分布中固有的稀疏性并在嵌入式加速器上计算张量积。具体来说，使用输出稀疏性，我们的数据流动态地对原始缓解矩阵进行下采样，这大大减少了内存需求。然后，我们设计了 DyREM 架构，可以灵活地门控非零量子态的冗余计算。实验表明，与最先进的读出误差缓解方法相比，DyREM 的平均加速比为 $9.6 \times \sim 2000 \times$，保真度提高为 $1.03 \times \sim 1.15 \times$。

items.title: ASRR-PINN: Adaptive Sub-Regional Random Resampling-Based PINN for Thermal Analysis of 3D-ICs.
items.abstract: The physics-informed neural network (PINN) is a promising technology to accelerate thermal analysis of integrated circuits (ICs). However, the application of PINN to threedimensional (3D) scenarios is faced with numerous challenges, including the requirement of a vast number of sampling points as well as the high-level fitting capability of the network. This paper introduces an Adaptive Sub-regional Random Resamplingbased PINN (ASRR-PINN) to accelerate the thermal analysis of 3D-ICs. The adaptive sub-regional random resampling (ASRR) algorithm is proposed for efficient sampling in PINN, which divides the solution domain into a series of sub-regions and further adaptively decomposes these sub-regions during the training process. Besides, the sampling points are randomly resampled within each sub-region. By this means, the solution accuracy is enhanced significantly, especially in cases of a limited number of sampling points. To accelerate the convergence of the network, the thermal boundary conditions are incorporated into the ASRRPINN, ensuring that the network outputs automatically satisfy these constraints. Furthermore, the capability of parameterization of ASRR-PINN is achieved by training an additional reduced network. Numerical results show that the ASRR algorithm reduces the maximum absolute error (AE) by more than $56 \%$ compared with other non-uniform sampling methods while the runtime is shortened by at least $28 \%$. Moreover, using the parameterized ASRR-PINN to explore the design space of 3D-ICs achieves speeds over 200 times faster than the original ASRR-PINN.
items.abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 是一项很有前途的加速集成电路 (IC) 热分析的技术。然而，PINN在三维（3D）场景中的应用面临着诸多挑战，包括大量采样点的需求以及网络的高水平拟合能力。本文介绍了一种基于自适应子区域随机重采样的 PINN (ASRR-PINN)，以加速 3D-IC 的热分析。为了实现PINN中的高效采样，提出了自适应子区域随机重采样（ASRR）算法，该算法将解域划分为一系列子区域，并在训练过程中进一步自适应地分解这些子区域。此外，采样点在每个子区域内随机重采样。通过这种方式，求解精度显着提高，尤其是在采样点数量有限的情况下。为了加速网络的收敛，热边界条件被纳入 ASRRPINN 中，确保网络输出自动满足这些约束。此外，ASRR-PINN 的参数化能力是通过训练额外的简化网络来实现的。数值结果表明，与其他非均匀采样方法相比，ASRR算法将最大绝对误差（AE）降低了超过$56\%$，同时运行时间缩短了至少$28\%$。此外，使用参数化的 ASRR-PINN 来探索 3D-IC 的设计空间，其速度比原始 ASRR-PINN 快 200 倍以上。

items.title: XShift: FPGA-efficient Binarized LLM with Joint Quantization and Sparsification.
items.abstract: Binarization is a promising approach to significantly reduce computational complexity by replacing multiplications with hardwareefficient XNOR operations. However, the binarization of LLM activations often leads to severe accuracy degradation, while weight-only binarization fails to eliminate multipliers due to the Self-Attention mechanism. Furthermore, LLMs exhibit distinctive channel-level data distribution characteristics and differing computational and memory requirements between the Pre-fill and Decoding stages, necessitating a specialized inference framework. In response, we introduce XShift, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework optimized for efficient binarized LLM inference on FPGAs. XShift incorporates three key contributions: (1) a hardwarefriendly XNOR-Shift Encoding (XSE) format that transforms traditional multiplications into XNOR and shift operations, ensuring scalability and precision; (2) Hardware Adaptive Outlier and Sparsity (HAOS) techniques, which exploit channel-level data distribution and systolic array architectures for optimized quantization and sparsification; and (3) a dedicated hardware accelerator featuring an XNOR-Shift Systolic Array (XSSA) and an enhanced Base-2 SoftMax Converter (BSMC), designed to address the specific computational demands of binarized LLMs. Experimental evaluations on the Alveo U280 and U50 FPGA demonstrate that XShift achieves a $\mathbf{1 0 - 1 5 x}$ reduction in DSP resource usage while surpassing existing accelerators and GPUs in inference performance. Specifically, XShift delivers an average speedup of 4.174.76 x and a 14.29-6.95 x improvement in energy efficiency, alongside lower perplexity compared to other low-precision LLM techniques. These results underscore the potential of XShift for edge deployment of LLMs.
items.abstract_zh: 二值化是一种很有前途的方法，通过用硬件高效的 XNOR 运算代替乘法来显着降低计算复杂性。然而，LLM激活的二值化通常会导致严重的精度下降，而仅权重二值化由于自注意力机制而无法消除乘数。此外，LLM 表现出独特的通道级数据分布特征以及预填充和解码阶段之间不同的计算和内存要求，需要专门的推理框架。为此，我们推出了 XShift，这是一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，针对 FPGA 上的高效二值化 LLM 推理进行了优化。 XShift 包含三个关键贡献：(1) 硬件友好的 XNOR-Shift 编码 (XSE) 格式，将传统乘法转换为 XNOR 和移位运算，确保可扩展性和精度； (2) 硬件自适应异常值和稀疏性 (HAOS) 技术，利用通道级数据分布和脉动阵列架构来优化量化和稀疏化； (3) 专用硬件加速器，具有 XNOR 移位脉动阵列 (XSSA) 和增强型 Base-2 SoftMax 转换器 (BSMC)，旨在满足二值化 LLM 的特定计算需求。对 Alveo U280 和 U50 FPGA 的实验评估表明，XShift 在 DSP 资源使用方面实现了 $\mathbf{1 0 - 1 5 x}$ 减少，同时在推理性能方面超越了现有的加速器和 GPU。具体来说，与其他低精度 LLM 技术相比，XShift 的平均加速率为 4.174.76 倍，能源效率提高了 14.29-6.95 倍，同时困惑度更低。这些结果强调了 XShift 在 LLM 边缘部署方面的潜力。

items.title: Parallel Dynamic Partitioning for Datapath Combinational Equivalence Checking.
items.abstract: Combinational Equivalence Checking (CEC) is a crucial technique in electronic design automation for verifying the functional equivalence of combinational circuits. Recently, combinational circuit design increasingly incorporates more complex arithmetic structures, commonly known as datapath circuits. However, existing state-of-the-art tools often exhibit subpar performance in solving datapath CEC problems. To further advance the exploration on datapath CEC process, this study introduces PDP-CEC (Parallel Dynamic Partitioning Combinational Equivalence Checking), a novel parallel CEC approach integrating circuit partitioning and dynamic task scheduling into the CEC process, enhancing the efficiency of CEC for datapath circuits. PDP-CEC introduces an innovative method for selecting critical nodes to split the search space of the CEC problem, facilitating the efficient generation of numerous independent subproblems. Meanwhile, a dynamic task scheduling strategy is implemented in PDP-CEC to ensure load balancing and prevent hard-to-solve subproblems from stalling the entire process. Compared to the most advanced tools such as ABC and HybridCEC, PDP-CEC significantly accelerates CEC process, achieving speedups ranging from $5.11 x$ to $125.27 x$, while effectively solving approximately three times more datapath CEC problems. With excellent scalability, PDP-CEC shows substantial improvements in combinational equivalence checking for datapath circuits, offering an efficient parallel approach to meet the demands of large-scale datapath CEC tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 组合等效检查（CEC）是电子设计自动化中验证组合电路功能等效性的一项关键技术。最近，组合电路设计越来越多地采用更复杂的算术结构，通常称为数据路径电路。然而，现有最先进的工具在解决数据路径 CEC 问题时常常表现出低于标准的性能。为了进一步推进数据路径CEC过程的探索，本研究引入了PDP-CEC（并行动态分区组合等价检查），这是一种新颖的并行CEC方法，将电路分区和动态任务调度集成到CEC过程中，提高了数据路径电路的CEC效率。 PDP-CEC引入了一种创新的选择关键节点的方法来分割CEC问题的搜索空间，促进大量独立子问题的高效生成。同时，PDP-CEC中实现了动态任务调度策略，以确保负载平衡并防止难以解决的子问题导致整个过程停滞。与 ABC 和 HybridCEC 等最先进的工具相比，PDP-CEC 显着加速了 CEC 流程，实现了从 5.11 x$ 到 125.27 x$ 的加速，同时有效解决了大约三倍的数据路径 CEC 问题。凭借出色的可扩展性，PDP-CEC 在数据路径电路的组合等价检查方面显示出显着的改进，提供了一种高效的并行方法来满足大规模数据路径 CEC 任务的需求。

items.title: SDISC: A Spike-Driven Human-Machine Interface with In-Situ Computing for Real-Time Low-Power Interaction.
items.abstract: Feature extraction and classification of bio-signals are crucial in human-machine interface (HMI), yet suffer from high delay and limited energy efficiency using conventional hardware. To mitigate this challenge, we propose an SDISC architecture, a neuromorphic HMI with the innovation from signal encoding, computing-in-memory (CIM) hardware, to algorithm-hardware co-optimization. The following strategies are implemented: (1) A spike-driven feature extractor, achieving > $10 \times$ sparser dataflow than frame-based method; (2) In-situ computing based on resistive random-access memory (RRAM), enabling energy-efficient (4.09 TOPS/W) spiking neural network (SNN) classifier; (3) A Spike-Activity-Distillation algorithm and an Aid-Loser-Only recovery scheme to alleviate the non-ideality of RRAM devices, ensuring SDISC maintains high accuracy ($\sim \mathbf{9 8. 0 \%}$) in long time inference ($\boldsymbol{\gt} \mathbf{1 5}$ days). We further develop an end-to-end SDISC system for real-time EMG-based robot control, achieving a low latency ($34 \mu \mathrm{~s}$) and low power ($39.72 \mu \mathrm{~W} /$ sample) interaction on edge.
items.abstract_zh: 生物信号的特征提取和分类在人机界面 (HMI) 中至关重要，但使用传统硬件会遇到高延迟和有限的能源效率。为了缓解这一挑战，我们提出了 SDISC 架构，这是一种神经形态 HMI，具有从信号编码、内存计算 (CIM) 硬件到算法硬件协同优化的创新。实现了以下策略：（1）尖峰驱动的特征提取器，比基于帧的方法实现> $10 \times$稀疏数据流； （2）基于电阻式随机存取存储器（RRAM）的原位计算，实现节能（4.09 TOPS/W）尖峰神经网络（SNN）分类器； (3) 采用 Spike-Activity-Distillation 算法和 Aid-Loser-Only 恢复方案来缓解 RRAM 器件的非理想性，确保 SDISC 在长时间推理（$\boldsymbol{\gt} \mathbf{1 5}$ 天）下保持高精度（$\sim \mathbf{9 8. 0 \%}$）。我们进一步开发了一种端到端的 SDISC 系统，用于基于 EMG 的实时机器人控制，实现了边缘低延迟（$34 \mu \mathrm{~s}$）和低功耗（$39.72 \mu \mathrm{~W} /$sample）交互。

items.title: A Post-Implementation Performance Prediction Method with HLS Optimization Directives.
items.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) offers various optimization directives that enable designers to flexibly adjust hardware microarchitecture. However, existing HLS performance prediction methods typically rely on control data flow graphs generated (CDFG) from original HLS C/C++, which struggle to capture the complex interactions between directives and the resulting hardware resource reuse issues. To address these issues, this paper proposes a post-implementation performance prediction method tailored for directive-optimized circuits design, which utilizes a Graph Builder to integrate directive optimization and resource reuse information into the graph representation. In addition, the performance prediction model, which integrates a TransformerConv-based graph neural network (GNN) and an aggregation pool module, effectively captures key features related to post-implementation performance. Experimental results show that our method can reduce the prediction error of critical path delay (CP), power, and resource utilization to 3.87% $\sim$ 8.08%, significantly outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods. It also demonstrates excellent generalization on unseen kernels, providing a more effective and accurate performance prediction tool for HLS.
items.abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）提供各种优化指令，使设计人员能够灵活调整硬件微架构。然而，现有的 HLS 性能预测方法通常依赖于从原始 HLS C/C++ 生成的控制数据流图 (CDFG)，这很难捕获指令之间的复杂交互以及由此产生的硬件资源重用问题。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种针对指令优化电路设计量身定制的实现后性能预测方法，该方法利用图形生成器将指令优化和资源重用信息集成到图形表示中。此外，性能预测模型集成了基于 TransformerConv 的图神经网络（GNN）和聚合池模块，可以有效捕获与实现后性能相关的关键特征。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以将关键路径延迟（CP）、功耗和资源利用率的预测误差降低到 3.87% $\sim$ 8.08%，显着优于现有的最先进方法。它还展示了对未见过的内核的出色泛化，为 HLS 提供了更有效、更准确的性能预测工具。

items.title: SAPO: Improving the Scalability and Accuracy of Quantum Linear Solver for Portfolio Optimization.
items.abstract: Portfolio optimization is one of the most important financial problem, suffering from huge computational pressure due to arithmetic complexity. Quantum computing offers polynomial or even exponential speedup that turns out to be a promising approach. However, existing quantum methods is fundamentally limited by either poor scalability or insufficient accuracy. In this paper, we propose SAPO, which formally articulates the quantum circuit that seamlessly integrates financial theory and historical data characteristics with quantum algebra. The circuit design is extended from the HHL algorithm incorporating mean-variance theory, which promotes scalability by equivalent transformation. Then, we present a min-max eigenvalue model that leverages historical financial information to refine parameter settings with high accuracy. Experiments conducted on market data demonstrate that SAPO can effectively reduce the complexity by $\mathbf{3 6. 9 4 \%}$ compared to basic HHL [1], [2] and improve the accuracy by $1.46 \times$ compared to hybrid HHL [3].
items.abstract_zh: 投资组合优化是最重要的金融问题之一，由于算术复杂性而承受着巨大的计算压力。 Quantum computing offers polynomial or even exponential speedup that turns out to be a promising approach.然而，现有的量子方法从根本上受到可扩展性差或精度不足的限制。在本文中，我们提出了 SAPO，它正式阐明了将金融理论和历史数据特征与量子代数无缝集成的量子电路。该电路设计是从结合均值方差理论的 HHL 算法扩展而来，通过等效变换提高了可扩展性。然后，我们提出了一个最小-最大特征值模型，该模型利用历史财务信息来高精度地细化参数设置。对市场数据进行的实验表明，与基本 HHL [1]、[2] 相比，SAPO 可以有效地将复杂度降低 $\mathbf{3 6. 9 4 \%}$，与混合 HHL [3] 相比，将准确性提高 $1.46 \times$。

items.title: Leveraging Critical Proof Obligations for Efficient IC3 Verification.
items.abstract: IC3 and its variants are SAT-based model-checking methods that play a critical role in hardware verification. Efficient management of proof obligations, which track states that need to be proven unreachable, is essential for improving verification performance. This paper presents a novel approach that utilizes Critical Proof Obligations (CPOs) to improve proof obligation management. We propose two techniques, CPO-Driven UNSAT Core Generation and CPO-Driven Proof Obligation Propagation, to promote lemma propagation and frame refinement. Experimental results on HWMCC benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements in CPO discovery and lemma propagation, resulting in notable performance gains.
items.abstract_zh: IC3 及其变体是基于 SAT 的模型检查方法，在硬件验证中发挥着关键作用。证明义务的有效管理（跟踪需要证明无法到达的状态）对于提高验证性能至关重要。本文提出了一种利用关键证明义务 (CPO) 来改进证明义务管理的新方法。我们提出了两种技术，即 CPO 驱动的 UNSAT 核心生成和 CPO 驱动的证明义务传播，以促进引理传播和框架细化。 HWMCC 基准测试的实验结果表明，CPO 发现和引理传播方面有了显着改进，从而带来了显着的性能提升。

items.title: OutlierCIM: Outlier-Aware Digital CIM-Based LLM Accelerator with Hybrid-Strategy Quantization and Unified FP-INT Computation.
items.abstract: Activation outliers in Large Language Models (LLMs), which exhibit large magnitudes but small quantities, significantly affect model performance and pose challenges for the acceleration of LLMs. To address this bottleneck, researchers have proposed several co-design frameworks with outlier-aware algorithms and dedicated hardware. However, they face challenges balancing model accuracy with hardware efficiency when accelerating LLMs in a low bit-width manner. To this end, we propose OutlierCIM, the first algorithm and hardware codesign framework for the compute-in-memory (CIM) accelerator with outlier-aware quantization algorithm. The key contributions of OutlierCIM are 1) an outlier-clustered tiling strategy that regulates memory access and reduces inefficient workloads which are both introduced by outliers, 2) a hybrid-strategy quantization and a reconfigurable double-bit CIM macro array that overcome the low storage utilization and high latency of outlier-based LLM quantization, and 3) a quantization factor post-processing strategy and a dedicated quantizer that efficiently unify the multiplication and accumulation of outlier-caused FP-INT workloads. Implemented in a 28 nm CMOS technology, OutlierCIM occupies an area of $2.25 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$. When evaluated at comprehensive benchmarks, OutlierCIM achieves up to $4.54 \times$ energy efficiency improvement and $3.91 \times$ speedup compared to the state-of-the-art outlier-aware accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 中的激活异常值数量级大但数量小，会显着影响模型性能，并对 LLM 的加速提出挑战。为了解决这个瓶颈，研究人员提出了几种具有异常值感知算法和专用硬件的协同设计框架。然而，当以低位宽方式加速 LLM 时，他们面临着平衡模型准确性和硬件效率的挑战。为此，我们提出了 OutlierCIM，这是第一个用于具有异常值感知量化算法的内存计算 (CIM) 加速器的算法和硬件协同设计框架。 OutlierCIM 的主要贡献是 1) 异常值聚类平铺策略，可调节内存访问并减少由异常值引入的低效工作负载；2) 混合策略量化和可重新配置的双位 CIM 宏阵列，克服基于异常值的 LLM 量化的低存储利用率和高延迟；3) 量化因子后处理策略和专用量化器，可有效统一乘法和累加异常值导致的 FP-INT 工作负载。 OutlierCIM 采用 28 nm CMOS 技术实现，占用面积为 $2.25 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$。在综合基准评估中，与最先进的异常值感知加速器相比，OutlierCIM 实现了高达 4.54 美元 × 美元的能源效率提升和 3.91 美元 × 美元的加速。

items.title: 62nd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference, DAC 2025, San Francisco, CA, USA, June 22-25, 2025
items.abstract: IEEE Xplore, delivering full text access to the world's highest quality technical literature in engineering and technology. | IEEE Xplore
items.abstract_zh: IEEE Xplore，提供对世界上最高质量的工程和技术技术文献的全文访问。 | IEEE探索
